Result: 通过蒙特卡洛仿真和功能梯度材料的案例研究，SMAC能有效检测微妙缺陷，并具备诊断能力，能够定位异常的位置和来源。

Conclusion: SMAC框架在无需繁琐预处理的情况下，实现了复杂零件形状与颜色的高效、准确监测和诊断，特别擅长捕捉细微缺陷，在先进制造领域具有应用潜力。

Abstract: Advanced manufacturing technologies allow for the production of intricate parts featuring high shape complexity and spatially-varying material composition. Data fusion of point clouds with chromatic attributes provides 4D point clouds, a compact and informative representation that encodes both shape and material information. In this paper, we present a registration-free framework for Simultaneous Monitoring of shApe and Color (SMAC) via 4D point clouds. The proposed framework leverages Laplace-Beltrami operator spectral properties to capture and monitor geometric features and the relationship between shape and surface color. A combined monitoring scheme is proposed to effectively detect shape deformations and color anomalies, along with a spatially-aware post-signal diagnostic procedure to determine the source of change and localize color anomalies. Importantly, neither component relies on registration or mesh reconstruction, eliminating error-prone and computationally expensive preprocessing steps. A Monte Carlo simulation study and a case study on functionally graded materials demonstrate that SMAC achieves effective detection performance, particularly for subtle defects, while providing diagnostic capabilities to identify the source and location of anomalies.

</details>


### [74] [Flame3D: Zero-shot Compositional Reasoning of 3D Scenes with Agentic Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09218)
*Sagar Bharadwaj,Ziyong Ma,Anurag Ghosh,Srinivasan Seshan,Anthony Rowe*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Flame3D是一种无需特定3D训练就能实现复杂3D场景理解的推理框架，通过将视觉-文本3D记忆与MLLM及空间工具组合，支持灵活空间推理，表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么依赖大规模3D-语言训练，要么只支持基础的物体定位和空间关系，缺乏对开放性空间推理与复杂场景理解的支持，训练成本高、灵活性有限。作者希望突破限制，提高普适性和灵活推理能力。

Method: 提出Flame3D框架，采用可编辑的视觉-文本3D记忆体表示场景，将其暴露给现成的多模态大模型（MLLM），通过可组合的空间工具进行空间理解和推理。推理阶段，代理能合成专属的空间程序，实现开放式推理。支持引入外部数据和人工修正，无需重新训练。

Result: Flame3D在ScanQA数据集上达到了与微调3D-LMM方法相当的性能。进一步在自建Compose3D空间组合推理基准上测试，发现推理阶段合成空间操作是完成多步复杂推理的关键，固有工具无法胜任。

Conclusion: Flame3D展示了训练外推理和表达性空间操作的强大潜力，提示未来3D场景理解应关注更丰富的场景记忆和组合型抽象机制，而非纯依赖训练。

Abstract: 3D scene understanding spans reasoning about free space, object grounding, hypothetical object insertions, complex geometric relationships, and integrating all of these with external tools and data sources. Existing 3D understanding methods typically rely on large-scale 3D-language training or focus on object grounding and simple spatial relationships. We argue that the broad generalization that motivates 3D-language training can be achieved at inference time, without 3D-specific training. We propose Flame3D, a training-free framework that represents scenes as editable visual-textual 3D memories and exposes them to an off-the-shelf MLLM through composable spatial tools. Flame3D also lets the agent synthesize custom spatial programs at inference time, enabling open-ended reasoning over layouts, empty space, and objects not yet present in the scene. External data and corrections can be added to the memory without retraining. In addition to showing competitive performance to finetuned 3D-LMM methods on ScanQA, we study multi-hop 3D reasoning capabilities of Flame3D by evaluating it on a curated compositional spatial-reasoning benchmark, Compose3D. We find that fixed tools fall short and that the agent's ability to synthesize spatial operations at inference time is essential. These results invite the question: should future progress in 3D scene understanding focus on richer scene memories and expressive compositional abstractions?

</details>


### [75] [Contour-Native Bridge Defect Detection and Compact Digital Archiving with Frequency-Supervised Fourier Contours](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08781)
*Jin Liu,Wang Wang,Hongxu Pu,Zhen Cao,Yasong Wang,Hu Wang,Kunming Luo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种更紧凑、更可恢复的桥梁缺陷矢量化表示方法，能够优于传统的检测与分割方式提升几何准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI桥梁缺陷检测方法多以边框或位图掩码形式输出，存在几何表达粗糙、数据存储与传输代价高、复用受限等问题。因此需要更精确、高效的缺陷边界表达方式。

Method: 提出了Frequency-Supervised Fourier Series Detection (FS-FSD) 方法，直接回归傅里叶轮廓描述符，可在统一的多边形空间协议下评估缺陷的边框、掩码和轮廓。

Result: 在3767幅无人机采集的桥梁图像（包含42346个缺陷实例）上测试，FS-FSD在多边形空间准确率和目标几何质量上均优于主流的检测、分割和轮廓提取方法。

Conclusion: 与传统矩形框和位图掩码相比，傅里叶轮廓记录在缺陷边界几何表达上更紧凑、可恢复且更易于信息共享，适合工程复核及后续信息流程。未来将研究对多区域、零碎及邻接缺陷的建模，并扩展至缺陷生命周期管理。

Abstract: AI-assisted bridge defect inspection often produces bounding boxes with crude geometry or raster masks that are costly to store, transmit, and reuse. This study investigates how detected defects can be represented as compact, recoverable contour-level vector records in image space. We propose Frequency-Supervised Fourier Series Detection (FS-FSD), which directly regresses Fourier contour descriptors and evaluates boxes, masks, and contours under a unified polygon-space protocol. On 3,767 UAV-collected bridge images with 42,346 defect instances, FS-FSD achieves higher polygon-space accuracy and better matched-TP geometric quality than representative detection, segmentation, and contour baselines. These results show that, compared with bounding boxes and raster masks, Fourier contour records preserve defect-boundary geometry in a more compact, recoverable, and shareable form for engineering review and downstream information workflows. Future work will study the modeling of multi-region, fragmented, and adjacent bridge-defect boundaries and extend the framework toward long-term bridge-defect tracking and lifecycle-oriented management.

</details>


### [76] [MAG-VLAQ: Multi-modal Aerial-Ground Query Aggregation for Cross-View Place Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09418)
*Zhengyi Xu,Yuhang Ming,Zhihao Zhan,Hanyu Zhu,Javier Civera,Wanzeng Kong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了MAG-VLAQ框架，结合视觉与几何基础模型，通过ODE条件和VLAQ机制有效提升多模态空地视角定位任务的精度，在KITTI360-AG等数据集上显著超过现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地面与空中视角间的巨大视角、模态与空间结构差异，导致多模态跨视角地点识别非常困难，因此亟需提升不同模态与视角数据之间的对齐与匹配能力。

Method: 1. 利用预训练基础模型分别从地面及空中图像中提取稠密视觉token，从地面LiDAR中提取丰富几何token。2. 所有token投影至共享特征空间，实现跨模态对齐与融合。3. 提出ODE-conditioned VLAQ，结合神经ODE实现RGB-LiDAR特征自适应动态融合，并通过VLAQ聚合机制，动态调整全局描述子的聚合中心，提高场景特异细节的表达能力。

Result: 在KITTI360-AG和nuScenes-AG数据集上进行实验，MAG-VLAQ明显优于现有方法，特别是在KITTI360-AG卫星设定下，Recall@1达到61.1，远高于此前最佳方法的34.5。

Conclusion: MAG-VLAQ有效融合多模态（视觉和几何）信息，通过ODE机制与聚合查询策略提升了空地跨视角定位的准确性，为多模态地点识别提供了新思路。

Abstract: Multi-modal cross-view place recognition remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics due to the severe viewpoint, modality, and spatial-structure discrepancies between ground observations and aerial references. To address this challenge, we present MAG-VLAQ, a foundation-model-enhanced query aggregation framework for multi-modal aerial-ground cross-view place recognition. Specifically, our approach leverages pre-trained foundation models to extract dense visual tokens from both ground and aerial images, as well as expressive geometric tokens from ground LiDAR observations. These heterogeneous tokens are then projected into a shared embedding space for cross-modal alignment and fusion. As our main contribution, we propose ODE-conditioned VLAQ, which tightly couples neural ordinary differential equations (ODE)-based RGB-LiDAR fusion with vectors of locally aggregated queries (VLAQ). In this design, the VLAQ query centers are dynamically adapted according to the fused multi-modal state. This mechanism allows the final global descriptor to preserve globally learned retrieval prototypes while remaining responsive to scene-specific visual and geometric evidence, significantly improving aerial-ground matching. Extensive experiments on KITTI360-AG and nuScenes-AG validate the effectiveness of our proposed MAG-VLAQ. Notably, on KITTI360-AG, our MAG-VLAQ nearly doubles the state-of-the-art performance, achieving 61.1 Recall@1 in the satellite setting, compared with 34.5 from the closest competing approach.

</details>


### [77] [simpleposter: a simple baseline for product poster generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08784)
*Benlei Cui,Fangao Zeng,Weitao Jiang,Yuwen Zhai,Haiwen Hong,Longtao Huang,Hui Xue,Wenxiang Shang,Pipei Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新方法SimplePoster，用于产品海报自动生成，能够准确保留产品外观并高效实现多行文本布局，同时简化了模型结构，提升了准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有产品海报生成方法结构复杂，需要附加模块如ControlNet和OCR编码器，既增加了计算开销，也无法很好解决文本和主体扩展伪影等问题。急需更简洁但同样高效的方法解决这些难题。

Method: 提出的SimplePoster框架基于图像修复（inpainting），通过对基础模型进行全参数微调实现主体扩展抑制，同时采用零成本字符级位置编码方法，实现无需额外布局模块的几何感知文本生成，无需外部控制器。

Result: SimplePoster实现了98.7%的主体保留率（相比SeedEdit 3.0的55.2%和PosterMaker的85.3%），同时文本渲染准确度也得到了提升。

Conclusion: SimplePoster在海报生成任务中以更简洁的模型架构和更高的主体保留及文本准确率，优于现有方法，为高效自动化产品海报设计提供了更优解决方案。

Abstract: Product poster generation poses distinct challenges beyond general poster design, requiring both faithful preservation of product appearance and precise control over dense, multi-line text layouts. Prior methods typically adopt inpainting frameworks augmented with auxiliary modules such as ControlNet and OCR encoders. However, these approaches introduce architectural complexity and computational overhead while still suffering from text errors and subject extension artifacts. We present SimplePoster, a simple yet effective inpainting-based framework that achieves faithful subject preservation and accurate, position-controllable text rendering without external controllers. Our approach builds on two observations: (1) full-parameter fine-tuning of the base model effectively suppresses subject extension, outperforming ControlNet-based alternatives; and (2) a zero-cost character-level position encoding enables geometry-aware text generation without dedicated layout modules. Experiments show that SimplePoster achieves a $98.7\%$ subject preservation rate, compared to $55.2\%$ for SeedEdit 3.0 and $85.3\%$ for PosterMaker, while also improving text rendering accuracy. Code, models, benchmark and a part of training data will be available at https://github.com/Alibaba-YuFeng/SIMPLEPOSTER

</details>


### [78] [QueST: Persistent Queries as Semantic Monitors for Drift Suppression in Long-Horizon Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09513)
*Mayank Anand,Mohammad Saqlain,Kyan Mahajan,Priya Shukla,Gora Chand Nandi,Andrew Melnik*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出一种新的视频点追踪框架QueST，通过语义监控机制实现更稳定、高效的长时点追踪，显著改善了现有方法易发生身份漂移的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有追踪方法大多采用逐帧点对点匹配，易在长时间、遮挡或物体自运动时累计误差，导致追踪漂移，且监控点的身份语义难以长期保持，因此急需更稳健的长时追踪方案。

Method: QueST采用将需要追踪的关键点（entity）视作长期持久的语义查询（semantic queries），非传统的短时点追踪；每个查询全局关注时空特征，实现了更加稳固的身份锚定。同时，通过3D物理约束提升追踪的几何合理性，可大幅降低在遮挡情况下的漂移。

Result: QueST在模拟动态部件的数据集PartNet-Mobility（基于SAPIEN）上测试，对比RAFT-3D、CoTracker和TAP-Net，有效减少终端漂移，Absolute Point Error（APE）相较TAP-Net提升67.7%，身份一致率也更高。

Conclusion: 论文证明将语义监控机制直接添加到感知系统可以更稳健地解决长时间追踪和分布转移下的身份漂移问题，实现更可靠的视频点追踪。

Abstract: Tracking points in videos is typically formulated as frame-to-frame correspondence, where each point is matched locally to the next frame. While this works over short horizons, errors accumulate under articulation, occlusion, and viewpoint change, leading to silent semantic drift that existing trackers cannot detect or correct. In this work, we revisit long-horizon tracking from a monitoring perspective and introduce QueST, a monitoring-by-design framework that treats interaction-relevant entities as persistent semantic queries rather than transient point tracks. Instead of local propagation, each query attends globally over spatio-temporal video features at every time-step, providing a stable semantic anchor across time. We further constrain query trajectories with lightweight 3D physical grounding, using geometric plausibility to suppress unbounded drift under occlusion. We evaluate QueST on long-horizon articulated sequences from PartNet-Mobility in SAPIEN and compare against RAFT-3D, CoTracker, and TAP-Net. QueST substantially reduces terminal drift achieving a 67.7% Absolute Point Error (APE) improvement over TAP-Net while better preserving identity over extended horizons. Our results show that embedding semantic monitoring directly into perception enables more reliable long-horizon tracking under distribution shift.

</details>


### [79] [Lost in Volume: The CT-SpatialVQA Benchmark for Evaluating Semantic-Spatial Understanding of 3D Medical Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08787)
*Mashrafi Monon,Umaima Rahman,Asif Hanif,Numan Saeed,Mohammad Yaqub*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个用于评估3D医疗视觉-语言模型（VLM）语义-空间推理能力的新基准CT-SpatialVQA，发现现有模型在空间推理上表现较差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管3D医疗视觉-语言模型在问答和报告生成任务中取得了进展，但其是否真正理解了3D空间解剖信息仍不明确。缺乏系统性的空间语义推理评估，这对临床决策支持的可靠性至关重要。

Method: 作者构建了CT-SpatialVQA基准，包括9077对经过严格验证的临床相关问答，题目涉及解剖定位、侧向识别、结构比较和三维关系等，基于1601份CT报告和图像而来。同时，规定了标准化评测流程，并对8个主流3D医疗VLM进行了基准测试。

Result: 在空间语义推理任务中，8个3D医疗VLM的平均准确率仅为34%，有时甚至低于随机水平，表现出对三维证据整合的严重不足。

Conclusion: 当前3D医疗VLM在空间推理能力上严重不足，加强模型对三维体积证据的深入融合是实现可信赖临床应用的关键。

Abstract: Recent advances in 3D medical vision-language models have enabled joint reasoning over volumetric images and text, showing strong performance in medical visual question-answering (VQA) and report generation. Despite this progress, it remains unclear whether these models learn spatially grounded anatomy from 3D volumes or rely primarily on learned priors and language correlations. This uncertainty stems from the lack of systematic evaluation of semantic-spatial reasoning in volumetric medical VLMs for clinically reliable decision support. To address this gap, we introduce CT-SpatialVQA, a benchmark designed to evaluate semantic-spatial reasoning in 3D CT data. The benchmark comprises 9077 clinically grounded question-answer (QA) pairs derived directly from 1601 radiology reports and CT volumes, which are validated via a robust LLM-assisted pipeline with a 95% human consensus agreement rate. Our dataset requires explicit anatomical localization, laterality awareness, structural comparison, and 3D inter-structure relational reasoning. We also introduce a standardized evaluation protocol and benchmark eight 3D medical VLMs, finding severe degradation on semantic-spatial reasoning tasks, averaging 34% accuracy and often below random, highlighting the need for deeper integration of volumetric evidence for trustworthy clinical use.

</details>


### [80] [PhysHanDI: Physics-Based Reconstruction of Hand-Deformable Object Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09538)
*Jihyun Lee,Changmin Lee,Donghwan Kim,Tae-Kyun Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PhysHanDI是一个物理驱动的框架，同时支持交互手和非刚性物体（如布料、毛绒玩具）的3D重建，方法领先于现有技术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前的手-物体交互重建方法要么只适用于刚性或分块刚性物体，无法处理真实生活中高度非刚性的物体；要么虽然能模拟可变形物体，但没有完成手的3D重建。为此作者提出结合物理模拟方法，弥补这一空白。

Method: 提出了PhysHanDI框架，将手部三维重建和基于物理的非刚性物体变形模拟结合在一起。利用手的动力学驱动物体变形仿真，并通过逆物理过程进一步优化手部重建。

Result: 实验结果表明，PhysHanDI在重建和未来预测能力上，相比现有最新方法都表现更好。

Conclusion: PhysHanDI实现了物理可行且一致的手-非刚性物体交互的3D重建，为真实场景下的复杂交互建模提供了新思路。

Abstract: While existing methods for reconstructing hand-object interactions have made impressive progress, they either focus on rigid or part-wise rigid objects-limiting their ability to model real-world objects (e.g., cloth, stuffed animals) that exhibit highly non-rigid deformations-or model deformable objects without full 3D hand reconstruction. To bridge this gap, we present PhysHanDI (Physics-based Reconstruction of Hand and Deformable Object Interactions), a framework that enables full 3D reconstruction of both interacting hands and non-rigid objects. Our key idea is to physically simulate object deformations driven by forces induced from densely reconstructed 3D hand motions, ensuring that the reconstructed object dynamics are both physically plausible and coherent with the interacting hand movements. Furthermore, we demonstrate that such simulation of object deformations can, in turn, refine and improve hand reconstruction via inverse physics. In experiments, PhysHanDI outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline across reconstruction and future prediction.

</details>


### [81] [PPU-Bench:Real World Benchmark for Personalized Partial Unlearning in Vision Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08800)
*Jiahui Guang,Zexun Zhan,Zhenlin Xu,Cuiyun Gao,Haiyan Wang,Jing Li,Zhaoquan Gu,Yanchun Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了PPU-Bench，这是一个面向多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）个人化部分遗忘的真实基准，无需微调，用于评价模型对事实的细粒度遗忘能力。该基准数据集涵盖三种难度递进的遗忘场景，并通过大量实验揭示了遗忘方法的挑战。作者还提出了Boundary-Aware Optimization（BAO）方法，用于更有效地管理遗忘边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM遗忘评测常依赖虚构知识或完全删除某一主体，无法反映现实中更为个性化、细粒度的事实删除需求。为此，作者希望建立一个更符合实际应用场景和精细性要求的评测基准，并探索解决相关遗忘难题的新方法。

Method: 作者构建了PPU-Bench基准，涵盖24K数据样本及三种遗忘设置（完整、选择性和个性化），用以考察多模态和单模态下模型是否能够有选择地忘记目标知识且保持其它知识及模型性能。随后，作者提出了Boundary-Aware Optimization（BAO），专门建模同一主体内需遗忘与保留事实之间的边界以加强控制。

Result: 实验发现，完整遗忘通常抑制了视觉身份，但遗忘事实效果一般；而选择性和个性化遗忘则揭示了遗忘与保留之间的显著权衡和挑战。鲁棒性分析显示不同遗忘策略在面对图像和提示攻击时有不同的脆弱性。BAO方法在两个代表性遗忘方法上验证有效，能更好地实现主体内事实遗忘边界。

Conclusion: PPU-Bench为MLLM遗忘研究提供了更实际且细致的评测平台，也揭示了现有遗忘方法的不足。提出的BAO方法对提升个性化遗忘的边界控制能力有显著帮助，为今后多模态遗忘算法升级提供了新方向。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) may memorize sensitive cross-modal information during pretraining. However, existing MLLM unlearning benchmarks rely on synthetic knowledge injection or complete subject-level deletion, which fail to capture realistic, personalized deletion requests that require fine-grained factual control. In this paper, we introduce PPU-Bench, a real-world and fine-tuning-free benchmark for personalized partial unlearning in MLLMs. PPU-Bench contains 24K multimodal and unimodal samples derived from pre-existing knowledge of 500 public figures under three progressively challenging settings: Complete, Selective, and Personalized unlearning. The benchmark evaluates whether methods can remove target knowledge while preserving non-target facts, model utility, and cross-modal consistency. Extensive experiments show that Complete Unlearning often suppresses visual identity rather than factual knowledge, while Selective and Personalized Unlearning expose significant forget--retain trade-offs and challenges in intra-subject factual boundaries. Robustness analysis under cross-image and prompt-based attacks reveals distinct vulnerabilities across different unlearning settings. Motivated by these findings, we propose Boundary-Aware Optimization (BAO), which explicitly models intra-subject forget-retain boundaries. Experimental results on two representative methods demonstrate that BAO can effectively enforce intra-subject factual boundaries.

</details>


### [82] [DeformMaster: An Interactive Physics-Neural World Model for Deformable Objects from Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09586)
*Can Li,Zhoujian Li,Ren Li,Jie Gu,Lei Lei,Jingmin Chen,Lei Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了DeformMaster，一种基于视频的、可交互的物理与神经世界模型，能够自动从真实交互视频中学习变形物体的动力学与外观。实验表明，其在未来状态预测、外观渲染等任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 变形物体（如布料、橡皮等）受复杂动力学、交互和材料属性影响，真实视频建模难度大。当前模型难以同时处理几何、外观与底层物理，缺乏泛化和交互能力。

Method: 提出DeformMaster框架，将结构化物理推演与神经网络残差结合，增强未建模效应的补偿。利用稀疏手部运动实现手与连续介质的交互，结合空间材料专家表示材料响应，并从预测的物理状态驱动高保真4D外观渲染。

Result: 在实际变形物体视频数据集上，DeformMaster可准确预测未来动力学与外观，在新动作推演、材料参数变化及动态新视点合成等方面超过主流方法。

Conclusion: DeformMaster实现了对变形物体的统一动力学与外观建模，可自动从视频学习物理规律，提升了交互仿真、材料建模和外观渲染的效果，对相关领域有重要推动作用。

Abstract: World models for deformable objects should recover not only geometry and appearance, but also underlying physical dynamics, interaction grounding, and material behavior. Learning such a model from real videos is challenging because deformable linear, planar, and volumetric objects evolve under high-dimensional deformation, noisy interactions, and complex material response. The model must therefore infer a physical state from visual observations, roll it forward under new interactions, and render the resulting dynamics with high visual fidelity. We present DeformMaster, a video-derived interactive physics--neural world model that turns real interaction videos into an online interactive model of deformable objects within a unified dynamics-and-appearance framework. DeformMaster preserves structured physical rollout while using a neural residual to compensate for unmodeled effects, grounds sparse hand motion as distributed compliant actuator for hand--continuum interaction, represents material response with spatially varying constitutive experts, and drives high-fidelity 4D appearance from the predicted physical evolution. Experiments on real-world deformable-object sequences demonstrate DeformMaster's ability to roll out future dynamics and render dynamic appearance, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while supporting novel action rollout, material-parameter variation, and dynamic novel-view synthesis.

</details>


### [83] [CoLVR: Enhancing Exploratory Latent Visual Reasoning via Contrastive Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08802)
*Ziyang Ding,Linjian Meng,Yiming Wu,Yuhan Li,Yuhao Liu,Zhen Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的潜在视觉推理方法（CoLVR），通过对隐空间的对比学习和强化学习优化，提高MLLMs进行探索性推理的能力，并在多个基准测试上取得了显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于连续隐状态的视觉推理方法普遍采用硬对齐目标，使得潜在表示被强制匹配预定义视觉特征，限制了模型推理的探索性。

Method: 提出CoLVR方法，在训练阶段使用基于角度扰动的隐空间对比学习以扩展语义空间，避免过度约束；在强化学习后训练阶段引入隐空间轨迹对比奖励，实现对推理过程的精细优化。

Result: CoLVR在VSP与Jigsaw两个基准测试上平均分别提升了5.83%和8.00%；在MMStar这一域外测试上优于现有模型，提升了3.40%。

Conclusion: CoLVR能够显著提升多模态大模型在视觉推理任务中的探索能力，为潜在推理方法带来了更高的表现与泛化性。

Abstract: Due to the potential for exploratory reasoning of Latent Visual Reasoning, recent works tend to enable MLLMs (Multimodal Large Language Models) to perform visual reasoning by propagating continuous hidden states instead of decoding intermediate steps into discrete tokens. However, existing works typically rely on hard alignment objectives to force latent representations to match predefined visual features, thereby severely limiting the exploratory of latent reasoning process. To address this problem, we propose CoLVR (Contrastive Optimization for Latent Visual Reasoning). To obtain a more exploratory visual reasoning, CoLVR introduces a latent contrastive training framework. Firstly, CoLVR learns diverse and exploratory representations with a latent contrastive objective guided by angle-based perturbation, which expands the semantic latent space and avoids over-constrained embedding. Then, CoLVR employs a latent trajectory contrastive reward for RL (Reinforcement Learning) post-training to enable fine-grained optimization of latent visual reasoning process and thus fostering diverse reasoning behaviors. Experiments demonstrate that CoLVR significantly enhances the exploratory capability of latent representations, achieving average improvements of 5.83% on VSP and 8.00% on Jigsaw, while also outperforming existing latent models on out of domain benchmarks, with a 3.40% gain on MMStar. The data, codes, and models are released at https://github.com/Oscar-dzy/CoLVR.

</details>


### [84] [MTA-RL: Robust Urban Driving via Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10177)
*Guangli Chen,Dianzhao Li,Wenjian Zhong,Bangquan Xie,Ostap Okhrin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向城市自动驾驶的新型端到端框架MTA-RL，利用多模态Transformer融合和强化学习，以增强系统的泛化能力及稳定性，并在CARLA仿真中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统在3D场景理解和高密度互动下的稳定决策上仍面临挑战，且端到端模型难以解释、模块化方法接口脆弱导致误差传播。因此，亟需一种兼具可解释性、鲁棒性和泛化能力的新方法。

Method: 提出MTA-RL框架：采用Transformer结构融合RGB图像与激光雷达点云，预测显式的几何感知affordance表征，再将其作为紧凑观测空间输入RL策略，从而提升样本效率与决策稳定性，并通过多模态融合和奖励设计强化性能。

Result: 在CARLA Town01-03和不同密度下测试，MTA-RL表现优于现有最优方法，尤其在未见过的城镇（zero-shot）泛化上分别提升了路线完成度9.0%、总距离11.0%，违规距离提升83.7%。消融实验也证实多模态与奖励设计对性能提升至关重要。

Conclusion: MTA-RL凭借多模态3D感知与RL策略，有效提升了城市自动驾驶的鲁棒性与泛化性，展示了用于实际复杂场景的潜力。

Abstract: Robust urban autonomous driving requires reliable 3D scene understanding and stable decision-making under dense interactions. However, existing end-to-end models lack interpretability, while modular pipelines suffer from error propagation across brittle interfaces. This paper proposes MTA-RL, the first framework that bridges perception and control through Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Unlike previous fusion models that directly regress actions, RGB images and LiDAR point clouds are fused using a transformer architecture to predict explicit, geometry-aware affordance representations. These structured representations serve as a compact observation space, enabling the RL policy to operate purely on predicted driving semantics, which significantly improves sample efficiency and stability. Extensive evaluations in CARLA Town01-03 across varying densities (20-60 background vehicles) show that MTA-RL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Trained solely on Town03, our method demonstrates superior zero-shot generalization in unseen towns, achieving up to a 9.0% increase in Route Completion, an 11.0% increase in Total Distance, and an 83.7% improvement in Distance Per Violation. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm that our multi-modal fusion and reward shaping are critical, significantly outperforming image-only and unshaped variants, demonstrating the effectiveness of MTA-RL for robust urban autonomous driving.

</details>


### [85] [LightAVSeg: Lightweight Audio-Visual Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08805)
*Qing Zhong,Guodong Ding,Lingqiao Liu,Zaiwen Feng,Lin Yuanbo Wu,Angela Yao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种名为LightAVSeg的轻量级音频-视觉分割框架，有效减少了推理计算量，在移动端也能高效运行，并在MS3基准上达到了当前轻量级方法中的最佳性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频-视觉分割模型多依赖于计算量大的跨模态注意力机制，导致推理过程计算成本过高，不适用于资源有限的设备。大多数提升效率的方法仅关注主干网络（backbone）的简化，忽略了交互模块才是主要的计算瓶颈。

Method: LightAVSeg框架通过解耦设计，将语义筛选和空间定位分开，摒弃了传统笨重的注意力机制，使交互模块的计算量仅与空间分辨率线性相关。此外，引入辅助对齐损失，在训练阶段增强语义一致性，并且不会带来额外推理开销。

Result: 在20.5M参数量（约为AVSegFormer的1/7）的条件下，LightAVSeg在MS3基准上取得50.4 mIoU，并实现在移动处理器上的高效推理，优于现有所有轻量级AVS方法。

Conclusion: LightAVSeg极大提升了音频-视觉分割任务的效率，显著降低了计算资源需求，同时保持高精度表现，适合移动端等资源受限场景的大规模应用。

Abstract: Audio-Visual Segmentation (AVS) targets pixel level localization of sounding emitting objects in videos. However, existing models rely on dense cross-modal attention with quadratic computational cost, limiting their suitability for resource efficient deployment. Most efficiency oriented methods focus on backbone reduction and overlook the interaction module as the primary bottleneck. This paper proposes LightAVSeg, a lightweight framework that replaces heavy attention with a decoupled design for semantic filtering and spatial grounding, resulting in interaction costs that scale linearly with spatial resolution. Furthermore, we introduce an auxiliary alignment loss to enforce semantic consistency during training with zero inference overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LightAVSeg achieves a new state-of-the-art among lightweight methods: with 20.5M parameters ~1/7 of AVSegFormer), it reaches 50.4 mIoU on the MS3 benchmark and enables efficient inference on a mobile processor.

</details>


### [86] [Increasing the Efficiency of DETR for Maritime High-Resolution Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10269)
*Tinsae Yehuala,Hao Cheng,Ville Lehtola*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于Vision Mamba (ViM)骨干网络的高效海事目标检测方法，通过状态空间模型(SSMs)捕获长距离依赖，实现高分辨率图片下的高效目标检测，尤其适用于无人艇的安全导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人艇安全导航对海事目标检测提出高准确且实时的需求，但由于目标远、小、尺度变化大、边缘计算资源有限及高分辨率图片内存消耗大，现有方法要么牺牲精度，要么计算开销较大，尚无理想的高效解决方案。

Method: 采用Vision Mamba(ViM)骨干网络，将图片序列化为token，高效处理高分辨率输入。结合特定的特征金字塔网络(FPN)、连续下采样和SSM层，以及token剪枝机制，显著减少背景区域冗余计算。

Result: 与当前SOTA方法（如RT-DETR+ResNet50）相比，ViM方案在性能和计算效率间取得更优平衡，提升了高分辨率下的海事目标检测效果。

Conclusion: 通过ViM骨干、专用FPN和token剪枝，本方法兼顾高效性与准确性，非常适合无人艇等对实时和高分辨率目标检测要求高的海事场景。

Abstract: Maritime object detection is critical for the safe navigation of unmanned surface vessels (USVs), requiring accurate recognition of obstacles from small buoys to large vessels. Real-time detection is challenging due to long distances, small object sizes, large-scale variations, edge computing limitations, and the high memory demands of high-resolution imagery. Existing solutions, such as downsampling or image splitting, often reduce accuracy or require additional processing, while memory-efficient models typically handle only limited resolutions. To overcome these limitations, we leverage Vision Mamba (ViM) backbones, which build on State Space Models (SSMs) to capture long-range dependencies while scaling linearly with sequence length. Images are tokenized into sequences for efficient high-resolution processing. For further computational efficiency, we design a tailored Feature Pyramid Network with successive downsampling and SSM layers, as well as token pruning to reduce unnecessary computation on background regions. Compared to state-of-the-art methods like RT-DETR with ResNet50 backbone, our approach achieves a better balance between performance and computational efficiency in maritime object detection.

</details>


### [87] [L2A: Learning to Accumulate Pose History for Accurate 3D Human Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08806)
*Zehua Wang,Changwang Mei,Huaijiang Sun,Pengqi Hu,Zhaoyang Yin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种历史感知的2D-3D姿态估计方法，通过有效利用网络深层之间的历史特征，显著提升了姿态估计算法的表现，并在多个基准测试中取得了最新的最好成绩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有2D-3D人类姿态估计方法未能充分利用网络各层之间的历史姿态特征，仅依赖固定的残差连接传播信息，限制了对早期层级精细空间结构和短期运动线索的有效复用。作者发现跨层历史特征的有效聚合需要保持一致的特征表示空间，这一需求未被现有方法解决。

Method: 作者设计了一个历史感知框架：首先，引入并行的时空Transformer主干以保持表示空间一致性，避免时空变换交替带来的空间漂移。在此基础上，提出了历史姿态累积机制（HPA），自适应聚合所有前层特征，提升当前层表示。同时，构建了层姿态历史聚合（LPA）模块，将跨层姿态特征结构化、紧凑化，减少冗余，实现更稳定的特征融合。

Result: 该方法在多个标准基准数据集上进行了大量实验，结果显示其超越了现有2D-3D姿态估计方法，达到最新最好水平。

Conclusion: 文中提出的历史感知姿态估计框架及相关聚合模块能够有效整合跨层历史特征，增强表示能力，显著提升了2D-3D人类姿态估计的准确率和表现，具备实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Existing 2D-3D lifting human pose estimation methods have achieved strong performance. But the utilization of historical pose representations across network depth was overlooked. In current pipelines, information is propagated through fixed residual connections, which restricts effective reuse of early-layer features such as fine-grained spatial structures and short-term motion cues. However, naively incorporating historical features across layers is non-trivial. We further identify that maintaining a consistent representation space across layers is a prerequisite for effective cross-layer feature aggregation. To address this issue, we propose a history-aware framework that enables effective network cross-layer history feature utilization. Specifically, we adopt a spatial-temporal parallel Transformer backbone to prevent alternating spatial-temporal transformations during sequential processing, thereby maintaining a consistent representation space. Building upon this, we introduce a History Pose Accumulation (HPA) mechanism that adaptively aggregates features from all preceding layers to enhance current representations. Furthermore, we propose a Layer Pose History Aggregation (LPA) module that transforms layer pose features into a compact and structured form, reducing redundancy and enabling more stable aggregation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmarks.

</details>


### [88] [PaMoSplat: Part-Aware Motion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10307)
*Yinan Deng,Jianyu Dou,Jiahui Wang,Jingyu Zhao,Yi Yang,Yufeng Yue*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PaMoSplat是一种新颖的动态高斯喷溅方法，通过引入部分意识和运动先验，实现了高保真动态场景重建和精确目标跟踪。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的3DGS动态场景建模虽有进步，但在处理大幅度、复杂运动场景时，仍难以实现高质量渲染和准确跟踪。本研究旨在解决这些关键难题。

Method: 提出PaMoSplat框架：1）利用多视角分割掩码结合图聚类，将场景分割为3D高斯部件；2）借助多视角光流信息，通过微分进化算法估算各部件的刚性运动，为后续优化提供初始解；3）引入自适应迭代次数、内置可学习刚性参数和光流监督的渲染损失，从而优化训练速度和质量。

Result: 在多种（包括真实世界的）动态场景上，PaMoSplat达到了更高的重建渲染质量、更精准的跟踪效果，且收敛速度优于同类方法。

Conclusion: PaMoSplat不仅显著提升了动态场景重建与跟踪的效果，还支持4D场景编辑等多个基于部件的后续应用，展现了广阔的应用前景。

Abstract: Dynamic scene reconstruction represents a fundamental yet demanding challenge in computer vision and robotics. While recent progress in 3DGS-based methods has advanced dynamic scene modeling, obtaining high-fidelity rendering and accurate tracking in scenarios with substantial, intricate motions remains significantly challenging. To address these challenges, we propose PaMoSplat, a novel dynamic Gaussian splatting framework incorporating part awareness and motion priors. Our approach is grounded in two key observations: 1) Parts serve as primitives for scene deformation, and 2) Motion cues from optical flow can effectively guide part motion. Specifically, PaMoSplat initializes by lifting multi-view segmentation masks into 3D space via graph clustering, establishing coherent Gaussian parts. For subsequent timestamps, we leverage a differential evolutionary algorithm to estimate the rigid motion of these parts using multi-view optical flow cues, providing a robust warm-start for further optimization. Additionally, PaMoSplat introduces an adaptive iteration count mechanism, internal learnable rigidity, and flow-supervised rendering loss to accelerate and optimize the training process. Comprehensive evaluations across diverse scenes, including real-world environments, demonstrate that PaMoSplat delivers superior rendering quality, improved tracking precision, and faster convergence compared to existing methods. Furthermore, it enables multiple part-level downstream applications, such as 4D scene editing.

</details>


### [89] [Curvature-Aware Captioning:Leveraging Geodesic Attention for 3D Scene Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08808)
*Ziyao He,Yingjie Liu,ZhangYangRui,Mingsong Chen,Xuan Tang,Xian Wei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的3D场景稠密描述方法，结合了非欧几里得几何的注意力机制，显著提升了点云数据的定位精度与语义表达能力，在多个基准测试集上取得了最新性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的稠密描述方法难以同时在点云数据中保持细粒度的几何信息和全局语义分层，导致定位不准或描述碎片化，限制了其在机器人导航、增强现实等应用中的效果。

Method: 作者提出了“曲率感知描述”框架，将自注意力机制应用于Oblique空间以保持维度一致性并建立长距离依赖，同时在Lorentz空间中进行双向测地线交叉注意力，以建模场景对象之间的层级语义关系。理论上，通过Oblique流形与Lorentz双曲面之间的曲率补偿，有效解决了欧式与双曲空间的矛盾，实现了特征的稳定与层级结构的自洽。

Result: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D两个基准上进行了大量实验，所提方法在定位准确率和描述丰富性方面均取得了显著提升，达到了最新最优性能。

Conclusion: 通过引入曲率感知的非欧几何注意力机制，可以兼顾局部精准定位和全局语义表达，为3D场景稠密描述提供了有效的新思路，对相关应用具有重要推动作用。

Abstract: Accurate 3D scene description is fundamental to robotic navigation and augmented reality, yet current dense captioning methods face significant limitations in processing sparse point cloud data. %
Existing approaches that apply Euclidean embedding spaces struggle to simultaneously preserve fine-grained local geometric details and model exponentially growing global semantic hierarchies, leading to either inaccurate localization or disjointed, shallow scene descriptions. %
In this work, we propose a novel \textbf{\textsc{Curvature-Aware Captioning}} framework, integrating novel non-Euclidean geodesic attention mechanisms, to resolve the localization-contextualization conflict. %
Specifically, self-attention within Oblique space enforces dimensional homogeneity while establishing long-range dependencies. Bidirectional geodesic cross-attention within Lorentz space models hierarchical semantic relationships across scene instances, enabling simultaneous precision in object localization and coherence in scene descriptions. %
Theoretical analysis confirms that the curvature complementarity between the Oblique manifold and Lorentz hyperboloid resolves the Euclidean-hyperbolic conflict, ensuring feature stability via isotropic optimization while preserving inherent hierarchical relationships. Extensive experiments on ScanRefer and Nr3D benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with significant gains in both localization accuracy and descriptive richness.

</details>


### [90] [Temporal Sampling Frequency Matters: A Capacity-Aware Study of End-to-End Driving Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10388)
*Yumao Liu,Tao Liu,Xiangyu Li,Jiaxiang Li,Ke Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文深入探讨了在端到端（E2E）自动驾驶轨迹预测中，训练数据的摄像头帧采样频率对模型性能的影响，发现不同容量的模型对采样频率的需求并不一致，高频采样不总是最优，需针对模型调优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前主流做法将可用最高的摄像头帧采样频率作为训练数据输入，普遍认为越高的采样频率越有利于自动驾驶模型学习。然而，作者质疑这一假设，提出采样频率应作为可调变量，并系统性评估其影响。

Method: 作者在高频E2E自动驾驶数据集上，按照不同采样频率对摄像头帧进行下采样，生成频率渐变的训练集。对比不同容量的E2E模型及AutoVLA模型，在Waymo、nuScenes和PAVE数据集上，按统一协议训练与评估，观察模型在不同采样频率下的表现变化。

Result: 结果显示，不同模型对采样频率有不同的响应。较小的模型在较低或中等采样频率时3秒ADE（平均距离误差）表现最佳，频率变化非单调；而大型AutoVLA模型在最高频率下表现最好。控制实验表明，小模型在低或中频下的优势并非仅因训练步数差异。

Conclusion: 文章得出，摄像头帧的采样频率对模型性能有影响，不应一味追求最高频率。采样频率应在报告和调整时作为重要参数，需结合具体模型和算力进行选择，而不是盲目固定。

Abstract: End to end (E2E) autonomous driving trajectory prediction is often trained with camera frames sampled at the highest available temporal frequency, assuming that denser sampling improves performance. We question this assumption by treating temporal sampling frequency as an explicit training set design variable. Starting from high frequency E2E driving datasets, we construct frequency sweep training sets by temporally subsampling camera frames along each trajectory. For each model dataset pair, we train and evaluate the same model under a fixed protocol, so the frequency response reflects how prediction performance changes with sampling frequency. We analyze this response from a capacity aware perspective. Sparse sampling may miss driving relevant cues, while dense sampling may add redundant visual content and off manifold noise. For finite capacity models, this can create a driving irrelevant capacity burden. We evaluate three smaller E2E models and a larger VLA style AutoVLA model on Waymo, nuScenes, and PAVE. Results show model and dataset dependent frequency responses. Smaller E2E models often show non monotonic or near plateau trends and achieve their best 3 second ADE at lower or intermediate frequencies. In contrast, AutoVLA achieves its best 3 second ADE and FDE at the highest evaluated frequency on all three datasets. Iteration matched controls suggest that the advantage of lower or intermediate frequencies for smaller models is not explained only by unequal training update counts. These findings show that temporal sampling frequency should be reported and tuned, rather than fixed to the highest available value.

</details>


### [91] [Zero-Shot Chinese Character Recognition via Global-Local Dual-Branch Alignment and Hierarchical Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08814)
*Wei Cao,Hao Xu,Xiaolei Diao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种解决零样本汉字识别的新方法GL-HPN，兼顾效率与精度，在多个测试集上表现优异，尤其适合低资源场景，并显著降低了推理成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汉字类别数量极大，实际应用容易遇到未见过的新汉字，零样本识别难度高。现有方法存在整体表征过粗、细粒度对齐噪声多且检索成本高两大问题。

Method: 提出Global-Local Hierarchical Perception Network（GL-HPN），在全局和局部层面分别对汉字图像和IDS序列进行对齐。通过结构过滤掩码抑制噪声，并采用分层推理策略：先全局检索，再对Top-K候选局部细排，最终融合输出结果。

Result: GL-HPN在多个零样本任务与低资源条件下均取得具有竞争力的识别效果，推理阶段的计算成本得到了大幅降低。

Conclusion: 该方法在保持高精度的同时，极大提高了推理效率，是处理大规模汉字零样本识别问题的有效方案。

Abstract: Chinese character categories are extremely large, and unseen characters frequently arise in open-world scenarios, making zero-shot Chinese character recognition an important yet challenging problem. Existing IDS-based retrieval methods usually encode a character image and its ideographic description sequence into a single global vector for matching. Although efficient, such holistic alignment often under-models local component differences. Moreover, directly introducing patch-token level fine-grained interaction suffers from both the noise of structural operators in IDS and the high cost of full-candidate retrieval.To address these issues, we propose a Global-Local Hierarchical Perception Network (GL-HPN), which jointly learns global and local representations of character images and IDS sequences within a unified cross-modal alignment framework. The global branch supports efficient coarse recall, while the local branch improves component-level discrimination through patch-token interaction. We further introduce a structure filtering mask to suppress structurally meaningful but visually non-entity IDS operators in local similarity aggregation. On top of this, we design a coarse-to-fine hierarchical inference strategy that performs global retrieval over the full candidate set and local reranking only on Top-$K$ candidates, followed by parameter-free multiplicative fusion of normalized posterior scores. Experimental results show that GL-HPN achieves competitive performance across multiple zero-shot splits, performs especially well under low-resource settings, and substantially reduces the inference cost of large-scale candidate retrieval.

</details>


### [92] [OpenSGA: Efficient 3D Scene Graph Alignment in the Open World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10484)
*Gang Chen,Sebastián Barbas Laina,Stefan Leutenegger,Javier Alonso-Mora*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种统一高效的三维场景图对齐框架，将多模态信息（视觉-语言、文本、几何特征）与空间上下文融合，实现了在复杂情形下精确的物体对应匹配，并公开了一个大规模数据集，显著提升了F2S和S2S任务表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有三维场景图对齐方法大多依赖于点云的几何特征，集中在子扫描对齐（S2S），很少探索帧对场景（F2S）与视觉-语言的开放集特征，且缺乏具有多样性的大规模数据集，导致训练和评估受限。机器人在长期任务中需要对环境建立长期记忆，因此高效且通用的场景图对齐方法尤其重要。

Method: 提出融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征的统一场景图对齐框架。具体包括：距离门控空间注意力编码器、最小代价流分配模块和全局场景嵌入生成器。这些模块结合，实现了对大坐标误差下的准确对齐。

Result: 在自动标注生成的大规模ScanNet-SG数据集（70万+样本、509类对象、3千多扩展标签）以及现有任务上，方法在F2S和S2S均达到最优效果，大幅超越前人方法。

Conclusion: 提出的多模态融合框架极大增强了三维场景图对齐的表现，结合新数据集为领域提供了系统性的训练和评测工具，对机器人长期记忆与多智能体场景理解具有重要意义。

Abstract: Scene graph alignment establishes object correspondences between two 3D scene graphs constructed from partially overlapping observations. This enables efficient scene understanding and object-level relocalization when a robot revisits a place, as well as global map fusion across multiple agents. Such capabilities are essential for robots that require long-term memory for long-horizon tasks involving interactions with the environment. Existing approaches mainly focus on subscan-to-subscan (S2S) alignment and depend heavily on geometric point-cloud features, leaving frame-to-scan (F2S) alignment and open-set vision-language features underexplored. In addition, existing datasets for scene graph alignment remain small-scale with limited object diversity, constraining systematic training and evaluation. We present a unified and efficient scene graph alignment framework that predicts object correspondences by fusing vision-language, textual, and geometric features with spatial context. The framework comprises modules such as a distance-gated spatial attention encoder, a minimum-cost-flow-based allocator, and a global scene embedding generator to achieve accurate alignment even under large coordinate discrepancies. We further introduce ScanNet-SG, a large-scale dataset generated via an automated annotation pipeline with over 700k samples, covering 509 object categories from ScanNet labels and over 3k categories from GPT-4o-based tagging. Experiments show that our method achieves the best overall performance on both F2S and S2S tasks, substantially outperforming existing scene graph alignment methods. Our code and dataset are released at: https://autonomousrobots.nl/paper_websites/opensga.

</details>


### [93] [From pre-training to downstream performance: Does domain-specific pre-training make sense?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08819)
*Felix Krones*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了卷积神经网络和变换器在多种预训练策略下对医学影像任务的影响，发现仅与目标模态高度匹配的数据预训练才能显著提升下游表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习已显著提高医学影像诊断的准确性，但不同预训练策略对下游任务性能的影响尚不明确。本研究旨在探究预训练方式、初始参数和数据模态之间的关系，以优化医学影像模型。

Method: 研究比较了CNN和Transformer在有监督、无监督等多种预训练方法下的表现，涵盖自然图像、胸部X光、胸部CT和视网膜OCT等多种模态，并评估了预训练数据与目标模态匹配度的影响。

Result: 结果显示，仅当预训练数据与目标任务模态高度一致时，下游性能才会有明显提升。此外，在特定情况下，无监督预训练优于有监督方法，但其效果依赖具体情境。

Conclusion: 研究强调了针对目标模态选择合适预训练策略的重要性，为提升医学影像深度模型的可靠性和有效性提供了依据，有助于开发更精准的临床诊断工具，改善患者治疗结果。

Abstract: Deep learning techniques have revolutionised medical imaging, improving diagnostic accuracy and enabling both more accurate and earlier disease detection. However, the relationship between pre-training strategies and downstream performance in medical imaging models requires further exploration. Here, we systematically compare convolutional neural networks and transformers, examining various pre-training approaches, including supervised and self-supervised learning, as well as different initialisations and data modalities. Models are evaluated on natural images, chest X-rays, chest CT and retina OCT images, considering the effects of matching pre-training data with target modalities. Our findings indicate that only pre-training on data closely matching the target modality significantly improves downstream performance. While self-supervised learning can outperform supervised methods, its effectiveness varies with context. The study underscores the importance of pre-training strategies to enhance the reliability and effectiveness of deep learning models in medical imaging. By addressing these key factors, our research aims to contribute to the development of more accurate and dependable diagnostic tools, ultimately improving patient outcomes in clinical settings.

</details>


### [94] [DeepSight: Long-Horizon World Modeling via Latent States Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10564)
*Lingjun Zhang,Changjie Wu,Linzhe Shi,Jiangyang Li,Jiaxin Liu,Lei Yang,Hang Zhang,Mu Xu,Hong Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合视觉推理和自适应文本推理的端到端自动驾驶系统，在鸟瞰图空间并行预测未来世界状态语义特征，并在Bench2drive基准上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的端到端自动驾驶系统中的视觉-语言模型（VLM）推理方式多为通用领域的直接迁移，对自动驾驶场景及其需求的探索不够，尤其视觉推理模块的针对性不足，导致在复杂或长尾场景下表现有限。

Method: 作者提出了基于鸟瞰图（BEV）空间的驾驶世界模型，能够对连续未来帧的隐空间语义特征进行并行预测，实现对世界长期状态的建模。同时，设计了一种高效、自适应的文本推理机制，结合外部社会知识，提升系统在复杂场景下的决策能力。

Result: 所提方法在闭环Bench2drive基准测试中达到了最新的SOTA效果，证明了模型在自动驾驶决策中的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该工作通过引入更贴合自动驾驶需求的视觉与文本推理机制，有效提升了自动驾驶系统的远期预测和决策能力，为未来自动驾驶推理模块的设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving systems are increasingly integrating Vision-Language Model (VLM) architectures, incorporating text reasoning or visual reasoning to enhance the robustness and accuracy of driving decisions. However, the reasoning mechanisms employed in most methods are direct adaptations from general domains, lacking in-depth exploration tailored to autonomous driving scenarios, particularly within visual reasoning modules. In this paper, we propose a driving world model that performs parallel prediction of latent semantic features for consecutive future frames in the bird's-eye-view (BEV) space, thereby enabling long-horizon modeling of future world states. We also introduce an efficient and adaptive text reasoning mechanism that utilizes additional social knowledge and reasoning capabilities to further improve driving performance in challenging long-tail scenarios. We present a novel, efficient, and effective approach that achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on the closed-loop Bench2drive benchmark. Codes are available at: https://github.com/hotdogcheesewhite/DeepSight.

</details>


### [95] [FraudBench: A Multimodal Benchmark for Detecting AI-Generated Fraudulent Refund Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08820)
*Xinyu Yan,Boyang Chen,Jiaming Zhang,Tiantong Wu,Hong Xi Tae,Yichen He,Tiantong Wang,Yachun Mi,Yurong Hao,Yilei Zhao,Lei Xiao,Longtao Huang,Pengjun Xie,Wei Liu,Wei Yang Bryan Lim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出FraudBench，一个用于检测AI生成的欺诈性退款证据的多模态基准，发现现有方法在现实场景中仍存在检测不足的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI生成图像变得更加真实，越来越多被用于支持虚假索赔，尤其是网购退款等场景。这带来了新的视觉证据核查难题，而现有检测方法对特定索赔背景下的欺诈性证据识别关注不足。

Method: 作者基于真实的电子商务、外卖与旅游服务中的用户评论，收集并人工筛选了真实损坏和未损坏的证据图像，并利用多种先进的AI图像生成方法合成伪造损坏图。以此建立了FraudBench基准，并在其上对多模态大模型（MLLM）、专业AI生成图检测器以及人类参与者进行了系统评测。

Result: 实验显示，当前MLLM能较好区分真实损坏证据，但在检测伪造损坏证据上表现糟糕，识别率远低于50%。专业检测器表现略好，但在不同生成器上的一致性不佳，还会误报真实损坏样本。

Conclusion: 现有AI生成图像的检测方法在与具体索赔场景结合的欺诈性退款证据核查中仍存在明显短板，需进一步研究以提升实际应用中的可靠性和适应性。

Abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI)-generated images have become increasingly realistic and readily adaptable to concrete real-world claims, creating new challenges for verifying visual evidence. A concrete emerging risk is AI-generated refund fraud, in which manipulated or synthetic images are used to support claims about damaged products, poor delivery conditions, or service-related defects. Existing AI-generated image detection benchmarks mainly evaluate standalone authenticity classification, cross-generator transfer, or forensic localization, leaving claim-conditioned fraudulent evidence detection underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce FraudBench, a multimodal benchmark for detecting AI-generated fraudulent refund evidence. FraudBench is constructed from real-world user-review evidence across e-commerce, food delivery, and travel-service scenarios. We curate real evidence images together with their associated review and product metadata, identify genuine damaged and undamaged evidence through MLLM-assisted filtering and human annotation, and synthesize fake-damaged evidence from genuine undamaged reference images using six state-of-the-art image editing and generation models. Using FraudBench, we evaluate MLLMs, specialized AI-generated image detectors, and human participants under the same settings. Experiments show that current MLLMs often recognize real-damaged evidence but fail on many fake-damaged subsets, with fake-damage detection rates (TPR) far below the 50% baseline on most generator subsets. Specialized detectors generally perform better but remain inconsistent across generators and can produce false positives on real-damaged samples, revealing a clear gap between generic AI image detection and reliable claim-conditioned refund-evidence verification.

</details>


### [96] [C-CoT: Counterfactual Chain-of-Thought with Vision-Language Models for Safe Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10744)
*Kefei Tian,Yuansheng Lian,Kai Yang,Xiangdong Chen,Shen Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于反事实链式思维（C-CoT）的框架，结合视觉语言模型（VLMs），用于提升自动驾驶在城市十字路口等复杂场景下的安全决策能力。实验表明该方法能显著提升风险预测与决策的准确度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶决策方法（无论基于规则还是数据驱动）在复杂语义建模及高风险稀有场景下的推理能力有限，难以保证安全性与鲁棒性。反观VLMs虽有潜力，但缺乏反思与因果推理。为此，作者希望通过新的推理框架提升自动驾驶在关键情境下的安全性。

Method: 提出C-CoT框架，将驾驶决策分为场景描述、关键对象识别、风险预测、反事实风险推理、最终行动规划五个阶段，并引入结构化的元行动评估树，在反事实推理阶段评估不同行动组合的后果。所用VLM为微调的Qwen2.5-VL（7B），基于DeepAccident-CCoT数据集进行训练和评估。

Result: 该方法的风险预测召回率达到81.9%，碰撞率降至3.52%，轨迹误差L2降至1.98 m。消融实验表明反事实推理和元行动评估树对提升安全性与可解释性至关重要。

Conclusion: C-CoT框架显著增强了自动驾驶系统在复杂场景和长尾事件中的安全决策能力，反事实因果推理有效提升了模型的鲁棒性和可解释特性。

Abstract: Safety-critical planning in complex environments, particularly at urban intersections, remains a fundamental challenge for autonomous driving. Existing methods, whether rule-based or data-driven, frequently struggle to capture complex scene semantics, infer potential risks, and make reliable decisions in rare, high-risk situations. While vision-language models (VLMs) offer promising approaches for safe decision-making in these environments, most current approaches lack reflective and causal reasoning, thereby limiting their overall robustness. To address this, we propose a counterfactual chain-of-thought (C-CoT) framework that leverages VLMs to decompose driving decisions into five sequential stages: scene description, critical object identification, risk prediction, counterfactual risk reasoning, and final action planning. Within the counterfactual reasoning stage, we introduce a structured meta-action evaluation tree to explicitly assess the potential consequences of alternative action combinations. This self-reflective reasoning establishes causal links between action choices and safety outcomes, improving robustness in long-tail and out-of-distribution scenarios. To validate our approach, we construct the DeepAccident-CCoT dataset based on the DeepAccident benchmark and fine-tune a Qwen2.5-VL (7B) model using low-rank adaptation. Our model achieves a risk prediction recall of 81.9%, reduces the collision rate to 3.52%, and lowers L2 error to 1.98 m. Ablation studies further confirm the critical role of counterfactual reasoning and the meta-action evaluation tree in enhancing safety and interpretability.

</details>


### [97] [Rethinking Event-Based Object Dtection through Representation-Level Temporal Aggregation and Model-Level Hypergraph Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08825)
*Meisen Wang,Hao Deng,Wei Bao,Ma Yuanxiao,Chengjie Wang,Zhiqiang Tian,Shaoyi Du,Siqi Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种新的事件相机目标检测方法Ev-DTAD，通过更紧凑的时序表示和高阶时序关系建模，有效提升了检测精度和速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前事件相机目标检测方法在事件数据的时序信息建模和碎片化事件响应聚合方面存在局限，难以充分发挥事件相机在快速运动和极端光照下的优势。

Method: 提出Ev-DTAD框架：1）在表征层，设计了分层时序聚合（HTA），通过三通道伪RGB形式直接编码时序信息；2）在模型层，提出频率感知超图时序融合（FHTF），提升多尺度特征的时序演化建模和高阶关系建模能力。

Result: 在Gen1、1Mpx/Gen4和eTraM三个主流数据集上，Ev-DTAD相比已有方法，平均提升mAP和检测速度（分别提升0.8、0.5、3.0 mAP，速度提升1.7-2.0倍）。

Conclusion: Ev-DTAD通过创新的紧凑时序表示和超图特征推理，兼顾了精度和效率，对事件相机感知任务有重要推动作用。

Abstract: Event cameras provide microsecond-level temporal resolution, low latency, and high dynamic range, offering potential for perception under fast motion and challenging illumination conditions. However, existing Event-based Object Detection (EOD) methods face limitations at both the representation and model levels: prior event representations usually encode temporal information indirectly through redundant structures, while detection models struggle to explicitly aggregate fragmented event responses into coherent high-order object features. To address these limitations, we present Event Dual Temporal-Relational Aggregation Detector (Ev-DTAD), a unified EOD framework that integrates representation-level temporal encoding with model-level temporal-hypergraph reasoning. Specifically, we introduce Hierarchical Temporal Aggregation (HTA), a compact three-channel pseudo-RGB representation that explicitly embeds temporal information across intra- and inter-window events. To further enhance detection under sparse and fragmented event responses, we propose Frequency-aware Hypergraph Temporal Fusion (FHTF), which refines multi-scale event features through temporal evolution modeling and high-order relational reasoning. Extensive experiments on Gen1 (+0.8 mAP and 1.7$\times$ faster), 1Mpx/Gen4 (+0.5 mAP and 1.6$\times$ faster), and eTraM (+3.0 mAP and \textbf{2.0$\times$ faster}) demonstrate that Ev-DTAD achieves a competitive accuracy-efficiency trade-off, validating the complementarity between compact temporal representation and temporal-hypergraph feature reasoning.

</details>


### [98] [Is Your Driving World Model an All-Around Player?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10858)
*Lingdong Kong,Ao Liang,Tianyi Yan,Hongsi Liu,Wesley Yang,Ziqi Huang,Xian Sun,Wei Yin,Jialong Zuo,Yixuan Hu,Dekai Zhu,Dongyue Lu,Youquan Liu,Guangfeng Jiang,Linfeng Li,Xiangtai Li,Long Zhuo,Lai Xing Ng,Benoit R. Cottereau,Changxin Gao,Liang Pan,Wei Tsang Ooi,Ziwei Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出WorldLens基准，综合评估自动驾驶生成世界模型的视觉、物理和行为真实度，并引入大规模人类标注数据集及自动化评估工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成驾驶视频的世界模型各有所长，但普遍存在只关注视觉真实性而忽略物理和行为真实性的问题，缺乏多维度一体化的评测工具。

Method: 1. 提出WorldLens基准，从像素质量、4D几何、一致性、闭环驾驶、人类感知等5大方面、24个细化维度综合评测模型。
2. 评测现有6个代表性模型，分析其各自不足。
3. 发布WorldLens-26K数据集（包含26,808个人类偏好打分与理由），并训练了视觉-语言评测器WorldLens-Agent，可自动给出解释性评分。

Result: 测试显示：无一模型全方位突出，注重视觉者物理违背，注重几何的行为失真，即使表现最好的模型在“人类真实感”仅得2-3/10分。

Conclusion: 仅追求视觉真实远远不够，物理和行为一致性才是“生成世界”的核心指标。WorldLens基准及相关工具为未来模型评估建立了系统化、多维度的可靠标准，推动更真实的世界模型发展。

Abstract: Today's driving world models can generate remarkably realistic dash-cam videos, yet no single model excels universally. Some generate photorealistic textures but violate basic physics; others maintain geometric consistency but fail when subjected to closed-loop planning. This disconnect exposes a critical gap: the field evaluates how real generated worlds appear, but rarely whether they behave realistically. We introduce WorldLens, a unified benchmark that measures world-model fidelity across the full spectrum, from pixel quality and 4D geometry to closed-loop driving and human perceptual alignment, through five complementary aspects and 24 standardized dimensions. Our evaluation of six representative models reveals that no existing approach dominates across all axes: texture-rich models violate geometry, geometry-aware models lack behavioral fidelity, and even the strongest performers achieve only 2-3 out of 10 on human realism ratings. To bridge algorithmic metrics with human perception, we further contribute WorldLens-26K, a 26,808-entry human-annotated preference dataset pairing numerical scores with textual rationales, and WorldLens-Agent, a vision-language evaluator distilled from these judgments that enables scalable, explainable auto-assessment. Together, the benchmark, dataset, and agent form a unified ecosystem for assessing generated worlds not merely by visual appeal, but by physical and behavioral fidelity.

</details>


### [99] [CapVector: Learning Transferable Capability Vectors in Parametric Space for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10903)
*Wenxuan Song,Han Zhao,Fuhao Li,Ziyang Zhou,Xi Wang,Jing Lyu,Pengxiang Ding,Yan Wang,Donglin Wang,Haoang Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种创新方法，通过解耦增益目标与任务拟合目标，在参数空间中提升VLA模型能力，并降低微调成本。核心思路是在两个不同训练策略下得到能力向量，并将其融合以增强预训练模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前预训练VLA模型在标准有监督微调（SFT）时，性能提升有限且适应成本高。虽然辅助目标可提升能力并加快收敛，但会显著增加计算开销。研究动机是实现无需显著额外计算的能力增强。

Method: 作者将辅助目标SFT的两个目标（能力增强和任务拟合）在参数空间中解耦，先在小规模任务集上用两种训练策略微调出两个模型，再将其参数差异（能力向量）与预训练参数融合，形成能力增强的meta模型；同时可用轻量级正交正则进一步提升性能。

Result: 该方法获得的能力向量跨多种模型有效，能够直接泛化至新环境和新实体。融合能力向量的模型在减少计算开销的同时，性能与有辅助目标微调模型相当。

Conclusion: 能力向量方法能够以更低成本提升VLA模型的泛化和适应能力，具备广泛适配性和泛化潜力，有望成为高效微调VLA模型的新策略。

Abstract: This paper proposes a novel approach to address the challenge that pretrained VLA models often fail to effectively improve performance and reduce adaptation costs during standard supervised finetuning (SFT). Some advanced finetuning methods with auxiliary training objectives can improve performance and reduce the number of convergence steps. However, they typically incur significant computational overhead due to the additional losses from auxiliary objectives. To simultaneously achieve the enhanced capabilities of auxiliary training with the simplicity of standard SFT, we decouple the two objectives of auxiliary-objective SFT within the parameter space, namely, enhancing general capabilities and fitting task-specific action distributions. To deliver the goal, we only need to train the model to converge on a small-scale task set using two distinct training strategies, resulting in two finetuned models. The parameters' difference between the two models can then be interpreted as capability vectors provided by auxiliary objectives. These vectors are then merged with pretrained parameters to form a capability-enhanced meta model. Moreover, when standard SFT is augmented with a lightweight orthogonal regularization loss, the merged model attains performance comparable to auxiliary finetuned baselines with reduced computational overhead. Internal and external experiments demonstrate that our capability vectors (1) are effective and versatile across diverse models, (2) can generalize to novel environments and embodiments out of the box.

</details>


### [100] [Cross-Sample Relational Fusion: Unifying Domain Generalization and Class-Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08839)
*Zhen-Hao Xie,Yan Wang,Hao Sun,Han-Jia Ye,De-Chuan Zhan,Da-Wei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CORF框架，同时解决类增量学习（CIL）中的领域迁移和灾难性遗忘问题，在不同数据分布下保持模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际应用中，CIL模型不仅要避免灾难性遗忘，还需处理例如城市/农村/高速公路和不同天气导致的数据分布变化（领域迁移）问题，现有方法难以兼顾。

Method: 1）提出‘CrOss-sample Relational Fusion (CORF)’统一框架；2）利用空间贡献图有针对性地增强有语义信息的训练样本区域，提高泛化性；3）基于预测置信度自适应加权样本，学习与领域无关的特征表征；4）引入级联蒸馏框架，在多层特征层次捕捉样本间关系，促进旧任务知识的传递。

Result: CORF能无缝集成到现有CIL方法中，在多个主流基准数据集上提升泛化能力，获得有竞争力的表现。

Conclusion: CORF为同时应对领域迁移和灾难遗忘带来了新思路，提升了CIL方法在复杂、变化环境下的应用潜力。

Abstract: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) requires a learning system to learn new classes while retaining previously learned knowledge. However, in real-world scenarios such as autonomous driving, a system trained on urban roads in sunny weather may later need to operate in rural or highway environments with different traffic patterns and weather conditions. This requires the model not only to overcome catastrophic forgetting, but also to effectively handle domain shifts. In this paper, we propose CrOss-sample Relational Fusion (CORF), a unified framework to address domain shift and catastrophic forgetting simultaneously. To enhance generalizability, we perform selective refinement of training samples by leveraging spatial contribution maps to highlight semantically informative regions. Furthermore, we incorporate predictive confidence to adaptively weigh samples, thereby facilitating the learning of domain-agnostic representations. To alleviate forgetting, we propose a cascaded distillation framework that captures cross-sample relational dependencies across multiple feature hierarchies, enabling multi-grained knowledge transfer from previous tasks. CORF can be seamlessly integrated into existing CIL algorithms to enhance their generalizability, achieving competitive performance across various benchmark datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/LAMDA-CL/TMM26-CORF .

</details>


### [101] [Illusion-Aware Visual Preprocessing and Anti-Illusion Prompting for Classic Illusion Understanding in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08841)
*Junli Zha,Jiahui Wang,Xinkai Lu,Jinbo Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种无需训练的框架，通过图像预处理、提示词工程和多投票集成三种策略，显著提升了视觉-语言模型识别视觉错觉的能力，在DataCV Challenge获得第二名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在处理视觉错觉时，常偏向于回忆记忆中的事实而非感知实际视觉差异，导致感知与记忆之间存在冲突。因此，提升VLMs对视觉错觉的真实感知能力具有重要意义。

Method: 作者提出三种互补策略：1）针对不同类型错觉的图像预处理（如边缘提取、颜色分离、形态处理与参考线叠加），削弱诱发错觉的背景；2）反错觉的提示词工程，引导模型进行定性视觉比较；3）多投票集成，通过5票多数表决提升鲁棒性。整个方案无需模型微调，仅通过视觉处理与提示词设计即可实现。

Result: 该方法在官方630张测试集上使用Claude模型+5票集成达到90.48%准确率，在人工确认子集上准确率高达98.41%。最终在挑战赛中获得第二名，仅比第一名低0.47%。

Conclusion: 通过创新性的预处理与提示词设计，显著提升了VLMs在视觉错觉任务上的表现，为未来相关任务提供了简便、高效的无微调解决思路。源码已公开，便于社区复现与推广。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit systematic bias toward visual illusions, recalling memorized facts rather than perceiving actual visual differences. This paper presents a training-free framework for the 5th DataCV Challenge Task 1 at CVPR 2026, addressing this perception-versus-memory conflict through three complementary strategies:(1) illusion-aware image preprocessing that weakens illusion-inducing context via type-specific transformations (edge extraction, color isolation, morphological processing, and reference-line overlay), (2) anti-illusion prompt engineering guiding VLMs toward qualitative visual comparison, and (3) multi-vote ensemble that further improves robustness. Our method achieves 90.48% accuracy on the official 630-image test set using Claude (claude-opus-4-6) with 5-vote majority ensemble, and 98.41% on a human-verified subset. The approach requires no finetuning, relying solely on visual manipulation and prompt design. Our solution secured 2nd place in the challenge, only 0.47% behind the 1st-place solution. Code is available at https://github.com/jasminezz/sf-illusion-aware-vlm.git.

</details>


### [102] [Geometrically Constrained Stenosis Editing in Coronary Angiography via Entropic Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08851)
*Jialin Li,Zhuo Zhang,Yue Cao,Guipeng Lan,Jiabao Wen,Shuai Xiao,Jiachen Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的数据合成方法（OT-Bridge Editor）来改善冠状动脉造影（CAG）狭窄自动检测的数据短缺问题，合成数据显著提升了检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量冠状动脉造影狭窄影像数据匮乏，限制了自动狭窄检测的临床应用。合成狭窄数据有助于提升模型泛化能力和准确性，但现有方法在像素级精度和结构保留上存在局限。

Method: 作者提出OT-Bridge Editor，将局部编辑问题建模为受约束的熵最优传输问题，并利用几何信息引导生成路径，从而实现更强的几何可控性和结构保持。

Result: 通过大量实验证明，合成的数据能显著提升下游的狭窄检测任务：在公开数据集ARCADE上提升了27.8%，在多中心数据集上提升了23.0%，同时获得了持续一致的定性结果。

Conclusion: 所提方法能够有效实现结构精准控制的合成血管狭窄影像，显著增强了自动检测模型的性能，为此类任务在医学影像中的应用提供了新的方向。

Abstract: The scarcity of high-quality imaging data for coronary angiography (CAG) stenosis limits the clinical translation of automated stenosis detection. Synthetic stenosis data provides a practical avenue to augment training sets, improving data quality, diversity, and distributional coverage, and enhancing detection precision and generalization. However, diffusion-based editing commonly relies on soft guidance in a noise-initialized reverse process, offering limited pixel-level precision and structure preservation. We propose the OT-Bridge Editor, which reframes localized editing as a constrained entropic optimal transport (OT) problem and leverages geometric information to steer the generation path, enabling stronger geometric control. Extensive experiments show that our synthesized angiograms consistently improve downstream stenosis detection, yielding substantial relative gains of 27.8% on the public ARCADE benchmark and 23.0% on our multi-center dataset, supported by consistent qualitative results.

</details>


### [103] [Restoration-Aligned Generative Flow Models for Blind Motion Deblurring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08854)
*Insoo Kim,Jinwoo Shin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DeblurFlow提出了一种新颖的生成流模型适配去模糊任务的方法，显著提升了图像恢复的保真度与感知质量，同时保持计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 直接将生成流模型应用于运动去模糊等图像恢复任务会导致恢复结果保真度下降，因为原始流模型的训练目标与恢复任务不对齐。作者提出有必要重新设计流模型的目标，使其更好地服务于恢复任务。

Method: 作者将噪声端点替换为模糊观测图，使流轨迹的向量场与模糊图和清晰图之间的残差一致，实现了与恢复任务对齐的损失函数，并通过LoRA轻量调优预训练流模型。此外，提出了双专家采样策略和适用于残差解码的r-space潜空间，大幅降低了编码-解码计算成本。

Result: DeblurFlow的双专家采样策略使得初始高保真（PSNR 33.69 dB）的恢复结果，通过DeblurFlow提升感知质量后保真度仅有轻微下降（PSNR 33.05 dB），显著优于直接在高保真专家输出上使用生成模型（PSNR降至27.60 dB）。r-space方案也显著减少了计算消耗。

Conclusion: DeblurFlow能有效解决生成流模型在去模糊任务的目标错位问题，兼顾保真度与感知质量，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Generative flow models offer powerful priors learned from large-scale natural images, but directly adapting them to restoration tasks such as motion deblurring causes severe fidelity degradation, as their training objective is inherently misaligned with restoration. We present DeblurFlow, a framework that resolves this misalignment by reformulating the flow trajectory itself: we replace the noise endpoint with the blur observation, which makes the underlying vector field coincide with the residual error between blur and clean images. Under this formulation, the standard flow matching loss naturally takes the form of a residual loss, allowing pretrained flow models to be optimized under restoration-aligned objectives via LoRA adaptation. This formulation further enables a dual-expert sampling strategy: a fidelity expert provides a high-fidelity initialization, e.g., PSNR 33.69 dB, and DeblurFlow enhances perceptual quality with only a marginal fidelity reduction to 33.05 dB, whereas directly applying a generative model on top of a fidelity expert decreases PSNR to 27.60 dB. To make this practical, we further introduce r-space, a latent space tailored for residual decoding rather than image reconstruction, which reduces encoder-decoder cost by up to 9$\times$over standard VAE latents. Extensive experiments on GoPro, HIDE, RealBlur, and RWBI demonstrate that DeblurFlow achieves strong restoration fidelity and perceptual realism, while remaining computationally practical.

</details>


### [104] [ProDG: Prototypes for Data-Free Generative Post-Hoc Explainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08858)
*Piotr Borycki,Magdalena Trędowicz,Jacek Tabor,Łukasz Struski,Przemysław Spurek*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需原始数据即可生成解释性原型的新方法ProDG，实现了真正的数据无关、可解释的AI。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有原型（prototype）方法虽然解释性好，但依赖于数据集来筛选和提取原型，对于隐私、数据敏感场景难以应用。如何在完全没有原始数据的情况下实现原型解释，是亟需解决的问题。

Method: 提出ProDG框架，基于生成模型，利用冻结的神经网络权重直接合成高质量、纯净的视觉原型，无需任何外部数据集，从而实现数据无关的后验解释。

Result: ProDG可以在不接触任何外部数据的情况下，为模型输出生成可视化的、具有高度可解释性的原型，完全摆脱了对测试集或验证集等数据的依赖。

Conclusion: ProDG开拓了零数据环境下的可解释AI新方向，为隐私严格的数据环境提供了强有力的解释手段，有望广泛应用于安全、敏感数据领域。

Abstract: Ante-hoc interpretability methods based on prototypes provide highly accurate explanations by utilizing the intuitive "this looks like that" reasoning paradigm. On the other hand, post-hoc models can explain predictions for a single image without relying on an underlying dataset or requiring costly neural network retraining. Recent approaches successfully solve the retraining problem for prototype-based networks. However, they still face a fundamental limitation: they require access to a subset of data (e.g., a test or validation set) to search for and extract the visual prototypes. In this paper, we address this issue and introduce ProDG: Generative Prototypes for Data-Free Post-Hoc Explainability, a novel framework that leverages generative models to synthesize pure, high-fidelity prototypes directly from the frozen model's weights, completely eliminating the dependency on any external data. By establishing this new frontier in Data-Free XAI, ProDG unlocks robust visual interpretability for privacy-sensitive domains, where original data is strictly restricted or fundamentally inaccessible. Project page: https://github.com/piotr310100/ProDG

</details>


### [105] [Semantic Alignment in Hyperbolic Space for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08874)
*Hoang M. Truong,Hai Nguyen-Truong,Dang Huynh*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种名为HyRo的超球面微调框架，有效提升了open-vocabulary语义分割的性能，并实现了新的最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在利用CLIP等视觉-语言模型进行open-vocabulary语义分割时，存在层级结构和语义对齐失配，尤其是同层级内的语义对齐问题被忽略。为了解决这一挑战，作者提出了新的对齐方式。

Method: 提出HyRo框架，使用Poincaré球模型分别进行层级和语义对齐：通过调整超球面半径对齐层级，通过正交变换实现角度对齐，从而独立精细化语义关系，并保证超球面半径理论上的不变性。

Result: 在公开的开放词汇语义分割基准数据集上，HyRo方法取得了比之前方法更优的结果，表现出领先的分割性能。

Conclusion: HyRo有效地解决了语义和层级对齐失配问题，在open-vocabulary语义分割任务中达到了当前最好的效果，对相关领域有较高的应用价值和理论意义。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation requires adapting image-level vision-language models such as CLIP to dense pixel-level prediction, which is challenging due to the mismatch between hierarchical structure and semantic alignment in the embedding space. While recent works leverage hyperbolic geometry to model hierarchical relationships, they align embeddings across hierarchical levels but overlook semantic misalignment among embeddings within the same level. In this work, we propose HyRo, a hyperbolic fine-tuning framework that decouples hierarchical and semantic alignment in the Poincaré ball model. HyRo aligns hierarchical levels by adjusting the hyperbolic radius and refines semantic relationships through angular alignment using an orthogonal transformation that theoretically preserves the hyperbolic radius. Experiments on standard open-vocabulary semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that HyRo achieves state-of-the-art performance over prior methods.

</details>


### [106] [DAPE: Dynamic Non-uniform Alignment and Progressive Detail Enhancement Techniques for Improving the Performance of Efficient Visual Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08902)
*Mengyuan Tian,Qiyan Zhao,Yanan Wang,Da-Han Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种动态跨模态对齐新框架，可以更精细对齐图文信息，提高下游任务精度并降低计算资源消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前主流视觉-语言预训练模型在处理图像和文本信息时，通常采用统一对齐方式，未考虑二者信息密度和语义范围的差异，导致语义细节损失或计算资源消耗过高，这限制了模型的实际应用。

Method: 1）设计了动态自适应跨模态匹配机制，通过可学习的匹配函数根据文本标签的信息密度动态分配不同数量和大小的图像块，实现更精确的跨模态注意力交互；2）开发了连续细节引入模块，将高分辨率视觉特征逐步引入对齐过程，提高细粒度表现。

Result: 在多个主流数据集和基准任务中实验证明，该方法在下游任务准确率显著提升，同时减少了计算开销。

Conclusion: 本文方法在提升语义对齐精细度的同时，兼顾了效率和性能，为视觉-语言预训练模型在真实场景中的部署提供了更优方案。

Abstract: In recent years, pre-trained visual-linguistic models have demonstrated tremendous potential, becoming a crucial foundational framework for numerous downstream tasks. However, the information density between text and images is not uniformly distributed. Existing methods often overlook the inherent and dynamic differences in information density and semantic scope between text tags and image blocks. These common uniform alignment strategies result in coarse-grained cross-modal interactions and loss of fine semantic details. Moreover, pursuing finer alignment typically requires substantial computational overhead, limiting practical model deployment. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a novel framework for dynamic cross-modal alignment with continuous detail introduction. First, we design a dynamically adaptive cross-modal matching mechanism that uses a learnable matching function to dynamically assign varying numbers and sizes of image tags to text tags of the same size but different information density, enabling more precise attention interaction. Second, we develop a continuous detail introduction module to progressively incorporate high-resolution visual feature enhancement into the alignment process. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate significant improvements in the accuracy of various downstream tasks while reducing computational overhead.

</details>


### [107] [Unified Modeling of Lane and Lane Topology for Driving Scene Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08911)
*Han Li,Yulu Gao,Si Liu,Yuhang Wang,Bo Liu,Beipeng Mu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种统一建模车道及其拓扑关系的方法（UniTopo），在端到端模型中同时实现车道位置与拓扑信息的感知，性能明显优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶场景下的车道拓扑推理方法主要依赖于车道检测，拓扑关系从检测结果中推断，存在信息割裂和效率低下的问题。亟需能一体化直接感知位置和拓扑的感知方案。

Method: 作者提出UniTopo方法，将车道及其拓扑关系统一建模为“相连车道”，包括前继、后继及其间的连接关系，并在一个联合感知流程中直接从原始图像特征感知车道的空间位置和拓扑结构。该方法在OpenLane-V2基准上进行实验验证。

Result: 在OpenLane-V2基准的两个子集（分别基于Argoverse2和nuScenes）上，UniTopo分别取得了30.1%和31.8%的TOP_ll分数，较最优现有方法T^2SG有6.0%和8.6%的显著提升。

Conclusion: UniTopo开创了由原始图像特征直接感知车道拓扑的新范式，在统一感知车道空间位置与拓扑信息方面取得了优异效果，有望推动自动驾驶场景下车道感知与推理的发展。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles need to perceive not only physical elements in the driving scene, such as lane lines and traffic lights, but also logical elements like lane centerlines and their topology. Existing lane topology reasoning methods typically follow a reasoning-by-detection paradigm, where lane topological relationships are primarily derived from lane detection results. In this paper, we propose an innovative method called Unified Modeling of Lane and Lane Topology (UniTopo), which represents the topological relationships between lanes as connected lanes, encompassing predecessor lanes, successor lanes, and their interconnections. This unified representation of lanes and lane topology allows us to simultaneously obtain both the positions and topological information of lanes within a shared perception pipeline, establishing a new paradigm for directly perceiving lane topology from original image features. We validate our method on the driving scene reasoning benchmark OpenLane-V2, which consists of two subsets, built based on Argoverse2 and nuScenes, respectively. Our method achieves TOP_ll of 30.1% and 31.8% on the two subsets, significantly surpassing the existing state-of-the-art method T^2SG by 6.0% and 8.6%.

</details>


### [108] [Few-Click-Driven Interactive 3D Segmentation with Semantic Embedding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08925)
*Xueyang Kang,Zijian Yu,Kourosh Khoshelham,Liangliang Nan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效、泛化能力强的3D交互式实例分割框架，可一次性处理多个目标，且无需每次点击后重复模型更新，显著提升分割精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前的3D交互分割方法主要有两大局限：1）通常一次只能预测一个物体，且仅能输出二值掩码；2）有些方法依赖2D基础模型和相机对齐，不直接处理3D点云，导致泛化能力或实时性受限。因此，亟需一种能直接基于稀疏3D点的、更高效的多目标交互分割方法。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的3D交互分割框架：直接处理稀疏、随机下采样的3D点云，同时支持一次性对多个用户点击目标进行推理。方案采用基于Point Transformer的编码器及分层掩码解码器，通过多级裁剪-合并操作与可学习的语义嵌入集成。与以往需每次纠正点击后重复更新模型的方法不同，本方法可一次性联合建模所有点击，提升实例间关系建模及空间、语义预测能力。

Result: 大量实验显示，该方法的mIoU指标相比强基线提升超过20%，在跨数据集测试时（一物体仅需一点击）提升8-10%；通常每个目标仅需一次点击即可获得鲁棒分割效果。

Conclusion: 本方法为实时3D交互式实例分割问题提供了可泛化、高效的解决思路，非常适合机器人操作、自动导航及快速3D语义标注等场景。

Abstract: Interactive segmentation allows efficient label generation by leveraging user-provided clicks to progressively refine predictions, which is critical when fully supervised labels are costly or generalization to unseen classes is needed. Existing 3D interactive methods are limited: most operate sequentially, predicting only one object per iteration with binary masks, while several recent approaches depend on 2D foundation models and camera alignment to bridge the 2D-3D gap. To address these limitations, we propose a novel interactive segmentation framework that operates directly on sparse, randomly downsampled 3D points and processes multiple object clicks in a single forward pass. Our framework consists of a point Transformer-based encoder and a hierarchical mask decoder, which integrates multi-level crop-and-merge operations conditioned on learnable semantic embeddings. Unlike prior interactive approaches that require repeated model updates after each manually corrective click, our method jointly reasons over all click queries, modeling inter-instance relationships and refining both spatial masks and semantic predictions through spatial and semantic embeddings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model improves the mIoU metric by over 20 percent compared to strong baselines and achieves 8-10 percent gains under cross-dataset evaluation for a one-click per instance setting, often requiring only a single click per object. Our approach provides a generalizable and efficient solution for interactive 3D instance segmentation, particularly suitable for real-time applications such as robotic manipulation, navigation, and rapid 3D semantic annotation.

</details>


### [109] [PIDNet: Progressive Implicit Decouple Network for Multimodal Action Quality Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08945)
*Qiqi Li,Pengfei Wang,Nenggan Zheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的多模态动作质量评估网络PIDNet，在多个公开数据集上显著提升了评分准确性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的多模态动作质量评估方法在模态融合和时序建模上存在信息冗余、模态特征混淆和质量特征弱化等问题，难以充分提取和融合不同模态中的高质量线索。

Method: 提出了渐进性隐式解耦和融合网络（PIDNet），包含：1）iMambaWave模块，将RGB、光流和音频等多模态特征映射到统一空间，并采用Bi-Mamba分支和小波变换分支分别提取长程与局部特征；2）门控聚合机制自适应融合时域与频域信息；3）三阶段Group3M块渐进融合网络，结合模态互补注意与多尺度卷积，抑制冗余，丰富表示能力。

Result: 在Rhythmic Gymnastics和Fis-V数据集上，PIDNet取得了具较高评分一致性和低误差的表现，优于同类单模态及多模态方法。消融实验验证了各新模块的有效性。此外，iMambaWave模块在多种主干网络上均能提升视觉时序建模与泛化能力。

Conclusion: PIDNet提升了多模态动作质量评估的效果，提出的模块具有良好的通用性和可插拔性，为相关领域的评分与动作分析等任务提供了新方法与理论基础。

Abstract: Action quality assessment (AQA) aims to automatically quantify the execution quality of human actions in videos and is valuable for applications such as competitive sports judging. In multimodal AQA, quality evidence from different modalities is heterogeneous, and quality cues evolve progressively over time. Existing methods often rely on coarse fusion or unified temporal modeling, which may blur modality-specific cues, preserve cross-modal redundancy, and weaken stage-specific quality evidence. To address these issues, we propose a progressive implicit decoupling and fusion network (PIDNet) that progressively integrates modality-specific information, cross-modal complementary cues, and global quality semantics for accurate assessment. Specifically, we design an iMambaWave module that maps RGB, optical flow, and audio features into a shared latent space and disentangles them with a Bi-Mamba branch and a wavelet-transform branch to capture long-range temporal dependencies and local perturbation details, respectively. A gated aggregation mechanism adaptively fuses temporal and frequency-domain information. We further build a three-stage progressive fusion network using Group3M blocks, where modality complementary attention retrieves cross-modal evidence while suppressing redundancy, and multi-scale convolutions enrich feature representations. Experiments on the Rhythmic Gymnastics and Fis-V datasets show that PIDNet achieves highly competitive score correlation with favorable error control compared with existing unimodal and multimodal methods. Ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each component.
