TL;DR: 本文提出了一种单块循环ViT（bViT），即只用一个Transformer块多次递归地处理图像，显著减少参数量，同时在ImageNet-1K等任务上表现与标准ViT相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前的Vision Transformer（ViT）通过堆叠多个独立参数化的块来实现深度，但尚不清楚这些深度究竟需要多少层特定的变换以及能否通过循环计算实现。本文旨在探究有多少ViT的深度可以通过循环而非堆叠实现。

Method: 作者设计了bViT架构，用单个共享Transformer块进行多步递归处理，保持ViT迭代结构，同时大幅减少层特定参数。作者对比了不同宽度的bViT在ImageNet和下游任务中的表现，并分析了其逐步激活、注意力和剪枝行为。

Result: 12步bViT-B在ImageNet-1K上与标准ViT-B精度相当，但参数量大幅减少。宽度越大（宽特征空间）表现越接近标准ViT。bViT在迁移到下游任务和高效微调方面也有竞争力。分析显示共享块会根据循环步数动态调整行为。

Conclusion: 只要特征空间足够宽，ViT的深度很大一部分可以用循环复用单块实现。这表明参数化可以更高效，循环结构能近似多层结构的表达能力。

Abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are built by stacking independently parameterized blocks, but it remains unclear how much of this depth requires layer specific transformations and how much can be realized through recurrent computation. We study this question with bViT, a single-block recurrent ViT in which one transformer block is applied repeatedly to process an image. This architecture preserves the iterative structure of a deep ViT while removing layer specific block parameterization, providing a controlled setting for studying recurrence in vision. On ImageNet-1K, a 12-step bViT-B achieves accuracy comparable to standard ViT-B under the same training recipe and computational budget, while using an order of magnitude fewer parameters. We observe that recurrent performance improves with representation width, with wider bViTs recovering much more of the performance of standard ViTs than narrow variants. We interpret this behavior as implicit depth multiplexing, where a shared block expresses multiple step-dependent computations through the evolving hidden state. Beyond ImageNet classification, bViT transfers competitively to downstream tasks and enables parameter-efficient fine-tuning. Mechanistic analyses of activations, attention and step-specific pruning show that the shared block changes its effective behavior across recurrent steps rather than simply repeating the same computation. Our results suggest that a large fraction of ViT depth can be implemented through recurrent reuse, provided that the representation space is sufficiently wide.

</details>


### [291] [Neuromorphic Monocular Depth Estimation with Uncertainty Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10675)
*Viktor Bergkvist,Felix Rydell,Per-Erik Forssén,David Gustafsson,Johan Rideg*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用深度神经网络从单目事件流中预测每像素深度分布的方法，并集成了不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 事件摄像机具备高时间分辨率和高动态范围等优势，但如何有效从事件流中估计深度信息仍是难点。引入不确定性估计可提升深度估计的可靠性。

Method: 采用基于U-Net的神经网络，输入不同时空表征（包括多种时空体素网格、CSTR和TORE体积），结合高斯、对数正态和证据学习框架实现不确定性估计。先在合成数据训练，再在真实序列微调，综合多项指标评估表现。

Result: 不同事件流表征表现相近，其中10-bin对数正态和5-bin证据学习模型在多数指标下最佳。不确定性估计可有效指出深度较可靠的像素。

Conclusion: 不确定性估计可成功融合进基于事件流的单目深度估计系统，为像素级深度可靠性提供有效指示，提高应用实用性。

Abstract: Event cameras offer distinct advantages over conventional frame-based sensors, including microsecond-level temporal resolution, high dynamic range, and low bandwidth. In this paper, we predict per-pixel depth distributions from monocular event streams using deep neural networks. We estimate uncertainty using Gaussian, log-normal, and evidential learning frameworks. We compare six event representations: spatio-temporal voxel grids with 1, 5, 10, and 20 temporal bins, the Compact Spatio-Temporal Representation (CSTR), and Time-Ordered Recent Event (TORE) volumes. Our U-Net-based models are trained on synthetic data and then fine-tuned on real sequences. We evaluate performance using absolute relative error, root mean squared error, and the area under the sparsification error. Quantitative results show that the representations perform similarly, while 10 bin log-normal and 5 bin evidential learning perform best across metrics. Our experiments demonstrate that uncertainty estimation can be successfully integrated into event-based monocular depth estimation, and be used to indicate pixels with reliable depth.

</details>


### [292] [Not Blind but Silenced: Rebalancing Vision and Language via Adversarial Counter-Commonsense Equilibrium](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10676)
*Qingxin Xiao,Peilin Zhao,Yangyang Zhao,Lingwei Dang,Qingyao Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文认为多模态大模型（MLLM）解码时，注意力集中在无关图像token并不是无效噪声，而是视觉和叙事逻辑的重要载体。提出ACE方法，通过对图像上下文进行对抗扰动来识别和抑制幻觉，提高模型可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常将注意力偏移至无关图像token视为噪声并通过“强行纠正”来尝试提高模型性能，但作者认为这种做法反而削弱了视觉—语言平衡，忽视了这些token的潜在信息价值。作者的动机是揭示并解决MLLM中幻觉产生的深层次原因，改变现有处理方式。

Method: 作者采用“解码即博弈”视角，认为幻觉产生于语言先验和视觉信息的失衡。提出了ACE（Adversarial Counter-Commonsense Equilibrium）框架：在解码过程中，对图像上下文施加对抗性反常识扰动；真实视觉特征在扰动下保持稳定，幻觉信息则不稳定。ACE据此抑制对扰动敏感的内容，增强视觉信号，用博弈策略动态平衡解码。

Result: 大量实验证明，ACE作为一种免训练、即插即用策略，能够降低幻觉产生，提高多模态模型的可信度，且推理开销极小。

Conclusion: ACE提供了一种创新的动态抑制幻想并补偿视觉信号、强化图文平衡的新解码策略，显著提升了多模态大模型的准确性和可信任度。

Abstract: During MLLM decoding, attention often abnormally concentrates on irrelevant image tokens. While existing research dismisses this as invalid noise and forcibly redirects attention to compel focusing on key image information, we argue these tokens are critical carriers of visual and narrative logic, and such coercive corrections exacerbate visual-language imbalance. Adopting a "decoding-as-game" perspective, we reveal that hallucinations stem from an equilibrium imbalance between linguistic priors and visual information. We propose Adversarial Counter-Commonsense Equilibrium (ACE), a training-free framework that perturbs visual context via counter-commonsense patches. Leveraging the fact that authentic visual features remain stable under perturbation while hallucinations fluctuate, ACE implements a dynamic game decoding strategy. This approach precisely suppresses perturbation-sensitive priors while compensating for stable visual signals to restore balance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ACE, as a plug-and-play strategy, enhances model trustworthiness with negligible inference overhead.

</details>


### [293] [TransmissiveGS: Residual-Guided Disentangled Gaussian Splatting for Transmissive Scene Reconstruction and Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10705)
*Zhenyu Liang,Xiao Zhang,Tianchao Li,Jack C. P. Cheng,Chi-Keung Tang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了TransmissiveGS框架，用于实现可传输场景的解耦重建与渲染，利用双高斯建模和反射-透射分离策略，有效提升了该类场景的重建与呈现效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法难以处理包含近场反射与场景透射内容耦合的可传输场景，导致重建和渲染时存在多重几何与辐射成分的歧义，因此需要新的方法进行解耦。

Method: 提出了基于双高斯（Dual-Gaussian）表示的TransmissiveGS方法，并引入延迟着色函数联合渲染双高斯分量，通过利用反射的多视图不一致性和重建残差，进行反射与透射的分离，同时设计了反射光场和高频正则化来提升细节表现。

Result: 实验证明该方法在合成与真实场景中均优于现有的基于Gaussian Splatting的可传输场景重建与渲染方法，提升了成像质量。

Conclusion: TransmissiveGS能够有效实现可传输场景的解耦重建及高质量渲染，显著解决了现有方法在此类场景下的模糊与歧义问题。

Abstract: Transmissive scenes are ubiquitous in daily life, yet reconstructing and rendering them remains highly challenging due to the inherent entanglement between near-field reflections from the surrounding environment on the transmissive surface, and the transmitted content of the scene behind it. This coupling gives rise to dual surface geometries and dual radiance components within each observation, posing ambiguities for standard methods. We present TransmissiveGS, a novel framework for disentangled reconstruction and rendering of transmissive scenes. Specifically, we model the scene with a dual-Gaussian representation and introduce a deferred shading function to jointly render the two Gaussian components. To separate reflection and transmission, we exploit the inherent multi-view inconsistency of reflections and leverage the residuals from reconstructing multi-view consistent content as cues for disentangled geometry and appearance modeling. We further propose a reflection light field that enables high-fidelity estimation of near-field reflections. During training, we introduce a high-frequency regularization to preserve fine details. We also contribute a new synthetic dataset for evaluating transmissive surface reconstruction. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world scenes demonstrate that TransmissiveGS consistently outperforms prior Gaussian Splatting-based methods in both reconstruction and rendering quality for transmissive scenes.

</details>


### [294] [UAV-Assisted Scan-to-Simulation for Landslides Using Physics-Informed Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10715)
*Zhenyu Liang,Jack C. P. Cheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种基于无人机（UAV）的滑坡监测与仿真的新型流程，实现了高真实感的场景重建与物理仿真的有机结合，显著提升了滑坡模拟的视觉表现与实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前滑坡模拟多依赖数字高程模型和网格表示，虽然适合几何分析，但在视觉表现和交互、科普等场景下缺乏真实感，影响灾害沟通和教育效果，因此需要一种能兼顾仿真准确性和视觉真实感的新方法。

Method: 提出了一套四阶段流程：1）无人机获取坡面影像；2）重建低各向异性3DGS场景表示；3）通过填充曲面模型内部将目标区域转换为体素模型；4）将所得体素模型集成至物质点法（MPM）开展滑坡仿真。

Result: 在香港实际发生严重滑坡的观测点对方法进行验证，结果表明该方法兼顾了逼真的视觉重建和高效的物理仿真能力。

Conclusion: 所提流程为滑坡模拟提供了兼具视觉真实和物理准确性的技术路径，提升了互动应用、灾害沟通和大众教育中的实际应用价值。

Abstract: Landslide monitoring and simulation play an important role in urban safety assessment and disaster prevention. Existing landslide simulation pipelines typically rely on digital elevation model and mesh-based representations, which are suitable for geometric analysis, but often lack visual realism. This limitation reduces their effectiveness in interactive applications, hazard communication, and public education. In this paper, we propose a UAV-based scan-to-simulation framework that bridges photorealistic scene capture and physics-based landslide simulation through 3DGS. Specifically, our pipeline includes four stages: (1) UAV-based acquisition of slope imagery, (2) reconstruction of a low-anisotropy 3DGS scene representation, (3) volumetric conversion of the target simulation region by filling the interior of the surface-based model, and (4) integration with the Material Point Method (MPM) for landslide simulation. We validate the proposed framework on a real landslide site in Hong Kong that experienced a severe landslide event. The results show that our method supports both realistic visual reconstruction and effective simulation.

</details>


### [295] [AllocMV: Optimal Resource Allocation for Music Video Generation via Structured Persistent State](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10723)
*Huimin Wang,Leilei Ouyang,Chang Xia,Yongqi Kang,Yu Fu,Yuqi Ouyang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效生成长时长音乐视频（MV）的方法AllocMV，通过分层结构和资源优化解决了高质量和低成本的平衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成长时音乐视频通常面临计算成本高昂，以及难以保持镜头之间一致性的问题。作者希望提出一种新方法，在有限资源下提升生成质量并保持全局一致性。

Method: 作者将MV生成任务建模为多选背包问题（MCKP），设计了AllocMV分层框架。利用全局规划器，将角色、场景等全局信息结构化存储，估算各段重要性，并用动态规划分配三类生成/复用分支的资源。对重复乐段采用分歧式复用视觉前缀策略，以降低成本且保证动机层次连贯性。

Result: 通过与以往方法对比，AllocMV在严格成本和节奏限制下，使用成本-质量比（CQR）评估表现出色，实现了质量与资源支出最佳平衡。

Conclusion: AllocMV能有效在资源约束下生成高质量长时MV，兼顾全局一致性和计算效率，在音乐视频生成领域具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: Generating long-horizon music videos (MVs) is frequently constrained by prohibitive computational costs and difficulty maintaining cross-shot consistency. We propose AllocMV, a hierarchical framework formulating music video synthesis as a Multiple-Choice Knapsack Problem (MCKP). AllocMV represents the video's persistent state as a compact, structured object comprising character entities, scene priors, and sharing graphs, produced by a global planner prior to realization. By estimating segment saliency from multimodal cues, a group-level MCKP solver based on dynamic programming optimally allocates resources across High-Gen, Mid-Gen, and Reuse branches. For repetitive musical motifs, we implement a divergence-based forking strategy that reuses visual prefixes to reduce costs while ensuring motif-level continuity. Evaluated via the Cost-Quality Ratio (CQR), AllocMV achieves an optimal trade-off between perceived quality and resource expenditure under strict budgetary and rhythmic constraints.

</details>


### [296] [Qwen-Image-2.0 Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10730)
*Bing Zhao,Chenfei Wu,Deqing Li,Hao Meng,Jiahao Li,Jie Zhang,Jingren Zhou,Junyang Lin,Kaiyuan Gao,Kuan Cao,Kun Yan,Liang Peng,Lihan Jiang,Niantong Li,Ningyuan Tang,Shengming Yin,Tianhe Wu,Xiao Xu,Xiaoyue Chen,Xihua Wang,Yan Shu,Yanran Zhang,Yi Wang,Yilei Chen,Ying Ba,Yixian Xu,Yujia Wu,Yuxiang Chen,Zecheng Tang,Zekai Zhang,Zhendong Wang,Zihao Liu,Zikai Zhou,An Yang,Chen Cheng,Chenxu Lv,Dayiheng Liu,Fan Zhou,Hantian Xiong,Hongzhu Shi,Hu Wei,Huihong Zhao,Ivy Liu,Jianwei Zhang,Jiawei Zhang,Kai Chen,Kang He,Levon Xue,Lin Qu,Linhan Tang,Luwen Feng,Minggang Wu,Minmin Sun,Na Ni,Rui Men,Shuai Bai,Sishou Zheng,Tao Lan,Tianqi Zhang,Tingkun Wen,Wei Wang,Weixu Qiao,Weiyi Lu,Wenmeng Zhou,Xiaodong Deng,Xiaoxiao Xu,Xinlei Fang,Xionghui Chen,Yanan Wang,Yang Fan,Yichang Zhang,Yixuan Xu,Yu Wu,Zhiyuan Ma,Zhizhi Cai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Qwen-Image-2.0是一个统一生成和编辑的多模态图像基础模型，在多语言文本渲染、高分辨率真实感生成、复杂指令跟随等方面大幅提升，并在多项评测中超过前代模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像生成模型在超长文本、多语言排版、高分辨率真实感、复杂合成、部署效率等方面存在明显不足，亟需统一且实用的基础模型来满足高文本密度和复杂生成编辑需求。

Method: Qwen-Image-2.0结合Qwen3-VL作为条件编码器和多模态扩散Transformer进行联合建模，通过大规模数据整理和多阶段训练流程，提升多模态理解、文本渲染及图像生成编辑能力，并支持最多1K tokens的复杂指令。

Result: 模型在中英文等多语言文本渲染、复杂文案海报等文本丰富内容生成、高分辨率真实感图片及复杂指令跟随等维度明显优于前代。在全面的人类评测中，在生成和编辑任务上均表现出色。

Conclusion: Qwen-Image-2.0显著提升了多模态图像生成和编辑的统一能力，是更为通用、可靠、实用的基础视觉生成模型，推动了图像智能生成的发展。

Abstract: We present Qwen-Image-2.0, an omni-capable image generation foundation model that unifies high-fidelity generation and precise image editing within a single framework. Despite recent progress, existing models still struggle with ultra-long text rendering, multilingual typography, high-resolution photorealism, robust instruction following, and efficient deployment, especially in text-rich and compositionally complex scenarios. Qwen-Image-2.0 addresses these challenges by coupling Qwen3-VL as the condition encoder with a Multimodal Diffusion Transformer for joint condition-target modeling, supported by large-scale data curation and a customized multi-stage training pipeline. This enables strong multimodal understanding while preserving flexible generation and editing capabilities. The model supports instructions of up to 1K tokens for generating text-rich content such as slides, posters, infographics, and comics, while significantly improving multilingual text fidelity and typography. It also enhances photorealistic generation with richer details, more realistic textures, and coherent lighting, and follows complex prompts more reliably across diverse styles. Extensive human evaluations show that Qwen-Image-2.0 substantially outperforms previous Qwen-Image models in both generation and editing, marking a step toward more general, reliable, and practical image generation foundation models.

</details>


### [297] [iPay: Integrated Payment Action Recognition via Multimodal Networks and Adaptive Spatial Prior Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10732)
*Kaicong Huang,Weiheng Oh,Thomas Guggisberg,Ruimin Ke*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向公交监控系统的集成支付行为识别框架iPay，结合多模态特征流，有效提升了自动化票务审计的准确性和实用性，并在真实场景中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动化票务行为识别主要依赖人工检查，效率低下且缺乏可扩展性。以往基于视觉或骨架的方法在噪声监控环境下鲁棒性不足，且往往依赖不易泛化的手工特征。因此，急需一种能兼顾系统部署需求和模型设计挑战的高性能解决方案。

Method: iPay框架采用多模态混合专家结构，包括：RGB专家流关注局部证据，骨架专家流利用图卷积捕捉动作，全局—局部双向融合流实现模态互补，空间差分判别器显式建模手部相对运动。还采集并标注了大量真实公交监控数据用于训练和测试。

Result: iPay在公交支付行为识别任务中表现优异，实验显示其识别准确率达到83.45%，优于现有方法，并具备优秀的运算效率，适合边缘设备部署。

Conclusion: iPay框架有效结合了RGB与骨架信息，显著提升了公交监控下的支付行为识别精度和实际部署的可行性，有望推动公交自动化票务分析的应用落地。

Abstract: Automated transit payment analysis is vital for scalable fare auditing and passenger analytics, yet practice still relies on limited manual inspection. Prior vision- and skeleton-based methods remain brittle under noisy onboard surveillance and often depend on poorly generalizable handcrafted features. Building on the success of graph convolutional networks in human action recognition, we observe that skeleton features excel at modeling global spatiotemporal dependencies but tend to underemphasize the subtle local relative motions that distinguish payment actions. In contrast, RGB features preserve fine-grained spatial details yet often lack reliable temporal continuity in surveillance footage. To bridge both system-level deployment needs and model-level design challenges, we present iPay, an integrated payment action recognition framework for onboard transit surveillance system. iPay adopts a multimodal mixture-of-experts architecture with four tightly coupled streams: (1) an RGB expert stream emphasizing local evidence via region-focused computation; (2) a skeleton expert stream modeling articulated motion with a graph convolutional backbone; (3) a dual-attention fusion stream enabling skeleton-to-RGB temporal transfer and RGB-to-skeleton spatial enhancement; and (4) a prior-driven Spatial Difference Discriminator (SDD) that explicitly models hand-to-anchor relative motion to improve task-specific discriminability. We also collaborate with local transit agencies to collect over 55 hours of real onboard surveillance footage, yielding 500+ payment clips. Experiments show that iPay outperforms prior methods and achieves 83.45\% recognition accuracy with competitive computational efficiency, making it suitable for edge deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/ccoopq/iPay.

</details>


### [298] [TINS: Test-time ID-prototype-separated Negative Semantics Learning for OOD Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10756)
*Yifeng Yang,Jubo Feng,Jing Xu,Xinbing Wang,Qinying Gu,Nanyang Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为TINS的新方法，通过在测试时动态生成负语义，并分离ID原型，实现更高效的视觉-语言模型OOD检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前负标签法依赖静态负标签，难以应对多变和多样化的OOD概念，测试时动态扩展常引入ID污染，本研究希望解决这些局限。

Method: TINS方法通过图像-文本模态反转为每个样本学习负文本嵌入，并引入ID原型分离正则化，防止负语义与ID概念混淆，并结合聚类打分和缓存更新策略实现负语义扩展的稳定性。

Result: 在Four-OOD、OpenOOD、Temporal-shift和Various ID等不同OOD检测场景下，TINS均优于现有强基线，在ImageNet-1K作为ID的Four-OOD基准上，将FPR95从14.04%降至6.72%。

Conclusion: TINS能够动态、有效分离负语义和ID语义，极大提升视觉-语言模型的OOD检测性能，具备泛化和实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Vision-language models enable OOD detection by comparing image alignment with ID labels and negative semantics. Existing negative-label-based methods mainly rely on static negative labels constructed before inference, limiting their ability to cover diverse and evolving OOD concepts. Although test-time expansion provides a natural solution, naively learning negative semantics from potential OOD samples may introduce hard ID contamination. To address this issue, we propose a \textbf{T}est-time \textbf{I}D-prototype-separated \textbf{N}egative \textbf{S}emantics learning method, termed \textbf{TINS}. TINS learns sample-specific negative text embeddings via image-to-text modality inversion and introduces ID-prototype-separated regularization to keep them separated from ID semantics. To further stabilize negative semantics expansion, TINS employs group-wise aggregation scoring and a buffer update strategy. Extensive experiments across Four-OOD, OpenOOD, Temporal-shift, and Various ID settings show consistent improvements over strong baselines. Notably, on the Four-OOD benchmark with ImageNet-1K as ID, TINS reduces the average FPR95 from 14.04\% to 6.72\%. Our code is available at https://github.com/zxk1212/tins.

</details>


### [299] [RadThinking: A Dataset for Longitudinal Clinical Reasoning in Radiology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10761)
*Wenxuan Li,Pedro R. A. S. Bassi,Xinze Zhou,Jakob Wasserthal,Alan L. Yuille,Zongwei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出并公开了RadThinking，这是一个专门面向癌症筛查的视觉问答（VQA）数据集，按照推理难度分为多个层级，助力AI模型系统性学习和评估影像诊断推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 癌症筛查不仅需要基础的影像识别，还包含复杂的多步推理。目前缺乏能够分层次衡量影像AI推理能力的公开数据集，限制了AI系统在医学推理层面上的进展和验证。

Method: 构建了RadThinking VQA数据集，涵盖20,362个CT检查，来自9,131位患者及2,077名健康对照。问题按照难度分为基础层（原子感知）、单步推理和多步链式推理。每个复杂VQA问题都提供对应的基础问题链及其推理路径，且数据与现有临床报告标准高度对应。

Result: RadThinking成为首个将癌症筛查推理分层、基于临床报告标准的数据集，为AI模型提供丰富的训练和测试数据，适用于监督学习与强化学习场景。

Conclusion: 该数据集填补了医学影像AI推理研究的空白，有助于系统性评估和提升AI在癌症筛查场景下的推理能力，不再局限于检测表层的影像异常。

Abstract: Cancer screening is a reasoning task. A radiologist observes findings, compares them to prior scans, integrates clinical context, and reaches a diagnostic conclusion confirmed by pathology. We present RadThinking, a Visual Question Answering (VQA) dataset that makes this reasoning explicit and trainable. RadThinking releases VQA pairs at three difficulty tiers. Foundation VQAs are atomic perception questions. Single-step reasoning VQAs apply one clinical rule. Compositional VQAs require multi-step chain-of-thought to reach a guideline category such as LI-RADS-5. For every compositional VQA, we release the chain of foundation VQAs that solves it. The chain follows the rules of the governing clinical reporting standard. The dataset spans 20,362 CT scans from 9,131 patients across 43 cancer groups, plus 2,077 verified healthy controls with >1-year follow-up. To our knowledge, RadThinking is the first cancer-screening VQA corpus that stratifies questions by reasoning depth and grounds compositions in clinical reporting standards. The foundation tier supplies atomic perception supervision. The compositional tier supplies chain-of-thought data and verifiable rewards for reinforcement-learning recipes such as DeepSeek-R1 and OpenAI o1. RadThinking enables systematic training and evaluation of whether AI systems can reason about cancer, not merely detect it.

</details>


### [300] [GridProbe: Posterior-Probing for Adaptive Test-Time Compute in Long-Video VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10762)
*Mohamed Eltahir,Lama Ayash,Ali Habibullah,Tanveer Hussain,Naeemullah Khan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种高效且无训练的长视频帧选择方法GridProbe，只需较低计算量就能保持视觉语言模型（VLM）在长视频理解任务上的高性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长视频在视觉语言模型（VLM）中的理解受限于每次处理成千上万帧时的高计算量（注意力机制呈平方级增长）。现有方法多先选少量关键信息帧再做整体推理，但这些“训练自由选择器”依赖预训练的编码空间特征，相对简单，难以应对推理型问题（如否定推理、跨帧计数、全文总结）。

Method: GridProbe方法，将视频帧按$K\times K$网格排列，分别按行与列执行轻量级posterior probe，通过冻结的VLM本身的答案空间来评估帧的重要性，生成解释性强的帧重要性分布。再通过统计分布的偏度和峰度自适应决定每个问题实际需要选取的帧数$M_{\mathrm{eff}}$，从而有效降低所需计算资源。GridProbe在推理时完全无训练，可与不同大小的QA模型结合。

Result: 在Video-MME-v2数据集上，与整体处理所有帧的基线相比，GridProbe只损失1.6个百分点精度，但计算量减少3.36倍；在LongVideoBench上不仅精度提升0.9个百分点，计算量还有0.35倍的下降。且小模型的选择器与大模型QA的组合，在同等计算资源下，效果优于纯小模型基线，无需再训练。

Conclusion: GridProbe实现了基于问题难度的自适应推理计算，显著提升长视频理解效率并保持准确率，高度解释性的帧选择机制为后续行为诊断、语义对齐等提供了新方向。

Abstract: Long-video understanding in VLMs is bottlenecked by a single monolithic forward pass over thousands of frames at quadratic attention cost. A common mitigation is to first select a small subset of informative frames before the forward pass; common for training-free selectors via auxiliary encoder-space similarities. Such signals are capped by contrastive pretraining, which usually fails on reasoning-heavy queries (negation, cross-frame counting, holistic summarization). We propose GridProbe, an efficient training-free posterior-probing inference paradigm that scores evidence in answer space using a frozen VLM's own reasoning and then selects question-relevant frames adaptively, resulting in sub-quadratic attention cost with little to no accuracy loss. We arrange frames on a $K{\times}K$ grid and run lightweight row R and column C probes, where each probe reads its peak posterior as a query-conditioned confidence. The outer product of R and C yields an interpretable importance map whose skewness and kurtosis drive Shape-Adaptive Selection, a closed-form rule that reliably replaces the fixed frame budget $M$ with a per-question $M_{\mathrm{eff}}$. We show empirically that $M_{\mathrm{eff}}$ tracks intrinsic question difficulty without ever seeing the answer, a sign of test-time adaptive compute. On Video-MME-v2, GridProbe matches the monolithic baseline within $1.6$ pp Avg Acc at $3.36\times$ TFLOPs reduction, while on LongVideoBench it Pareto-dominates the baseline ($+0.9$ pp at $0.35\times$ compute). Because the selector and QA models can be decoupled, pairing a small 2B selector with a stronger 4B or 8B QA is strictly Pareto-dominant over the 2B monolithic baseline (up to $+4.0$ pp at $0.52\times$ compute, on average), with no retraining. Finally, the interpretability of the importance maps opens future avenues for behavioral diagnostics, grounding, and frame-selection distillation.

</details>


### [301] [Break the Brake, Not the Wheel: Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10764)
*Mengqi He,Xinyu Tian,Xin Shen,Shu Zou,Jinhong Ni,Zhaoyuan Yang,Weikang Li,Xuesong Li,Jing Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的通用图像越狱方法，可以在多个视觉-语言模型（VLMs）间实现更高的迁移性，突破了以往越狱手段迁移性差的瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于梯度的通用图像越狱方法在VLMs间迁移性极差，限制了相关攻击研究和防御测试，故需探索更有效、迁移性更好的越狱方法。

Method: 通过分析VLMs中拒绝行为集中在自回归解码时的高熵token，提出在这些高熵token处用熵最大化攻击（UJEM-KL方法），以提高拒绝转成非拒绝生成的几率，同时保持低熵部分稳定以保障输出质量。

Result: UJEM-KL方法在三种VLM和两种安全基准测试上表现优异，在白盒攻击和迁移性方面优于以往方法，同时在应对多重防御时依然有效。

Conclusion: VLM越狱迁移性差主要源自过于约束的优化目标，通过熵最大化的新策略可以显著提升迁移性和攻击效果。

Abstract: Recent studies show that gradient-based universal image jailbreaks on vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit little or no cross-model transferability, casting doubt on the feasibility of transferable multimodal jailbreaks. We revisit this conclusion under a strictly untargeted threat model without enforcing a fixed prefix or response pattern. Our preliminary experiment reveals that refusal behavior concentrates at high-entropy tokens during autoregressive decoding, and non-refusal tokens already carry substantial probability mass among the top-ranked candidates before attack. Motivated by this finding, we propose Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization(UJEM)-KL, a lightweight attack that maximizes entropy at these decision tokens to flip refusal outcomes, while stabilizing the remaining low-entropy positions to preserve output quality. Across three VLMs and two safety benchmarks, UJEM-KL achieves competitive white-box attack success rates and consistently improves transferability, while remaining effective under representative defenses. Our experimental results indicate that the limited transferability primarily stems from overly constrained optimization objectives.

</details>


### [302] [Dynamic Cross-Modal Prompt Generation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10765)
*Tao Hu,Da-Wei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DRAPE是一种用于多模态持续指令微调（MCIT）的动态跨模态软提示生成框架，可以为每个实例自适应地产生个性化提示，在维持已有能力的同时扩展新能力，并显著提升了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态持续指令微调方法无法有效针对单个实例的差异进行适配，只能基于任务级模块进行组合，难以应对真实场景下样本间多样化的问题。

Method: 提出了DRAPE框架，不从固定提示池中选择，而是动态生成与具体文本指令和图像内容相关联的软提示，并在推理时引入了CLIP原型路由，避免依赖任务标签；同时通过投影到无梯度空间防止模型遗忘。

Result: 在多模态持续指令微调基准上，DRAPE在各项任务中超过了主流基于提示和LoRA方法的持续学习基线，表现出了最新的性能。

Conclusion: DRAPE通过实例级自适应软提示生成和防遗忘策略，实现了MCIT场景下更强的能力迁移和抗遗忘能力。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance through instruction tuning, yet real-world deployment often requires continual capability expansion across sequential tasks. In such scenarios, Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) aims to acquire new capabilities while limiting catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods mainly follow a module-composition paradigm: they maintain task-level prompts or LoRA experts and dynamically route or aggregate a subset of them at inference. However, samples within the same task can still differ substantially in visual scenes, question intents, and reasoning demands. This motivates instance-level adaptation to individual query-image pairs rather than only selecting or combining task-level modules. To this end, we propose DRAPE (Dynamic Cross-Modal Prompt Generation), a prompt-learning framework that synthesizes continuous instance-specific soft prompts for MCIT. Instead of selecting prompts from a fixed pool, DRAPE derives prompt queries from the textual instruction and cross-attends to visual patch features, producing query-image conditioned prompts that are prepended to the frozen LLM. To mitigate forgetting during sequential updates, DRAPE applies null-space gradient projection to the shared projector and uses CLIP-based prototype routing for task-label-free generator selection at inference. Extensive experiments on MCIT benchmarks show that DRAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance among representative prompt-based and LoRA-based continual-learning baselines.

</details>


### [303] [MPerS: Dynamic MLLM MixExperts Perception-Guided Remote Sensing Scene Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10769)
*Ziyi Wang,Xianping Ma,Ziyao Wang,Hongyang Zhang,Man On Pun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了MPerS框架，利用多专家视角和多模态融合，有效提升遥感场景分割的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有遥感多模态融合方法主要关注结构优化，忽略了高质量遥感描述的生成及其在多模态融合中的作用。

Method: 1. 利用多种提示词，让多种MLLM专家（如LLaVA、ChatGPT、Qwen）生成高质量遥感场景描述；2. 使用DINOv3提取地物稠密视觉特征；3. 设计动态MixExperts模块自适应融合最有效的文本语义；4. 构建Linguistic Query Guided Attention, 以文本语义引导视觉特征实现精准分割。

Result: 该方法在三大公开遥感语义分割数据集上取得了优越的分割效果。

Conclusion: 通过融合多个MLLM专家生成的高质量文本语义与视觉特征，提升了遥感场景的分割准确率，为多模态信息融合提供了新思路。

Abstract: The multimodal fusion of images and scene captions has been extensively explored and applied in various fields. However, when dealing with complex remote sensing (RS) scenes, existing studies have predominantly concentrated on architectural optimizations for integrating textual semantic information with visual features, while largely neglecting the generation of high-quality RS captions and the investigation of their effectiveness in multimodal semantic fusion.In this context, we propose the Dynamic MLLM Mixture-of-Experts Perception-Guided Remote Sensing Scene Segmentation, referred to as MPerS.We design multiple prompts for MLLMs to generate high-quality RS captions, enabling MLLMs to perceive RS scenes from diverse expert perspectives. DINOv3 is employed to extract dense visual representations of land-covers.We design a Dynamic MixExperts module that adaptively integrates the most effective textual semantics. Linguistic Query Guided Attention is constructed to utilize textual semantic information to guide visual features for precise segmentation. The MLLMs include LLaVA, ChatGPT, and Qwen. Our method achieves superior performance on three public semantic segmentation RS datasets.

</details>


### [304] [Towards a Large Language-Vision Question Answering Model for MSTAR Automatic Target Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10772)
*David F. Ramirez,Tim L. Overman,Kristen Jaskie,Marv Kleine,Andreas Spanias*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文探讨了大规模语言-视觉模型（LLVM）在针对合成孔径雷达（SAR）遥感图像进行图像描述与视觉问答（VQA）任务中的应用，并开发了新的挑战性数据集及训练评测基准，为细粒度自动目标识别（ATR）任务取得了98%的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动目标识别（ATR）在遥感领域，特别是在合成孔径雷达（SAR）数据中，对军事和情报有重要意义。人工分析SAR影像难度极高，需要大量人力与经验。近年来，基于Transformer的LLVM模型在多模态感知任务上表现优异，因此作者希望探索LLVM模型在SAR数据自动识别与理解上的潜力。

Method: 作者实验了包括CLIP、LLaVA等LLVM架构，在MSTAR公开数据集基础上扩充了带有文字描述和VQA的SAR图像数据集，并采用参数高效微调方式对LLVM模型进行训练，以实现细粒度目标识别和问答。

Result: 微调后的LLVM模型在SAR数据中关于细粒度军事车辆识别达到了98%的准确率。论文同时分析并规避了数据集及实验中可能导致结果失真的风险。

Conclusion: 该研究首次将大规模语言-视觉模型系统性应用于SAR遥感图像中的自动目标识别任务，不仅显著提升了模型的准确率，也为机器辅助的军事遥感分析提供了新途径，具备重要应用前景。

Abstract: Large language-vision models (LLVM), such as OpenAI's ChatGPT and GPT-4, have gained prominence as powerful tools for analyzing text and imagery. The merging of these data domains represents a significant paradigm shift with far-reaching implications for automatic target recognition (ATR). Recent transformer-based LLVM research has shown substantial improvements for geospatial perception tasks. Our study examines the application of LLVM to remote sensing image captioning and visual question-answering (VQA), with a specific focus on synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery. We examine newly published LLVM methods, including CLIP and LLaVA neural network transformer architectures. We have developed a work-in-progress SAR training and evaluation benchmark derived from the MSTAR Public Dataset. This has been extended to include descriptive text captions and question-answer pairs for VQA tasks. This challenge dataset is designed to push the boundaries of an LLVM in identifying nuanced ATR details in SAR imagery. Utilizing parameter-efficient fine-tuning, we train an LLVM method to identify fine-grained target qualities at 98% accuracy. We detail our data setup and experiments, addressing potential pitfalls that could lead to misleading conclusions. Accurately identifying and differentiating military vehicle types in SAR data poses a critical challenge, especially under complex environmental conditions. Mastering this target recognition skill may require a human analyst months of training and years of practice. This research represents a unique effort to apply LLVM to SAR applications, advancing machine-assisted remote sensing ATR for military and intelligence contexts.

</details>


### [305] [Beyond the Last Layer: Multi-Layer Representation Fusion for Visual Tokenizatio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10780)
*Xuanyu Zhu,Yan Bai,Yang Shi,Yihang Lou,Yuanxing Zhang,Jing Jin,Yuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进视觉自编码器重建与生成质量的方法，通过融合预训练编码器的多层特征，显著提升了模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前的视觉自编码器方法通常只利用预训练编码器最后一层的特征，忽略了中间层中丰富的分层信息，导致低级视觉细节的信息损失。作者旨在发掘和融合这些被忽视的层次特征，从而提升视觉重建与生成效果。

Method: 提出DRoRAE（Depth-Routed Representation AutoEncoder），该方法采用一个轻量级的融合模块，通过能量约束路由和增量校正自适应聚合编码器所有层的特征，并兼容于冻结的预训练解码器。训练分为三阶段，先在解码器的隐含分布约束下学习融合，再微调解码器利用丰富的表示。

Result: 在ImageNet-256上，DRoRAE将rFID从0.57降至0.29，生成FID由1.74提升至1.65（配合AutoGuidance），且在文本到图像生成的任务上也取得类似增益。此外，揭示了融合能力与重建质量之间的对数线性标度关系，将“表征丰富性”确立为类似于NLP词表规模的可预测扩展新维度。

Conclusion: 通过多层特征融合，DRoRAE极大地提升了视觉自编码器的重建与生成表现，并为视觉分词器设计提供了新的可扩展性视角，即表征丰富性这一新维度。

Abstract: Representation autoencoders that reuse frozen pretrained vision encoders as visual tokenizers have achieved strong reconstruction and generation quality. However, existing methods universally extract features from only the last encoder layer, discarding the rich hierarchical information distributed across intermediate layers. We show that low-level visual details survive in the last layer merely as attenuated residuals after multiple layers of semantic abstraction, and that explicitly fusing multi-layer features can substantially recover this lost information. We propose DRoRAE (Depth-Routed Representation AutoEncoder), a lightweight fusion module that adaptively aggregates all encoder layers via energy-constrained routing and incremental correction, producing an enriched latent compatible with a frozen pretrained decoder. A three-phase decoupled training strategy first learns the fusion under the implicit distributional constraint of the frozen decoder, then fine-tunes the decoder to fully exploit the enriched representation. On ImageNet-256, DRoRAE reduces rFID from 0.57 to 0.29 and improves generation FID from 1.74 to 1.65 (with AutoGuidance), with gains also transferring to text-to-image synthesis. Furthermore, we uncover a log-linear scaling law ($R^2{=}0.86$) between fusion capacity and reconstruction quality, identifying \textit{representation richness} as a new, predictably scalable dimension for visual tokenizers analogous to vocabulary size in NLP.

</details>


### [306] [Rapid Forest Fuel Load Estimation via Virtual Remote Sensing and Metric-Scale Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10789)
*Quanyun Wu,Kyle Gao,Wentao Sun,Zhengsen Xu,Hudson Sun,Linlin Xu,Yuhao Chen,David A. Clausi,Jonathan Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Google Earth Studio(GES)虚拟遥感数据的自动化森林清查流程，高效、低成本地实现森林覆盖和可燃生物量的估算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的激光雷达和实地调查方法成本高、耗时长，卫星影像缺乏垂直分辨率，限制了森林结构和生物量的及时精准测量。急需一种经济高效且能够获取三维结构的解决方案。

Method: 首先用GES生成目标区域的低空轨道图像与相机姿态。然后采用Pi-Long模型进行高密度三维重建，并利用Sim(3) Umeyama算法通过真实轨迹纠正尺度歧义，实现三维点云的度量化。最后正射投影生成俯视高程和密度图，结合分水岭分割和高度方差分析进行树种分类（针叶/阔叶）、叶面积指数（LAI）计算和燃料负荷估算。

Result: 实验表明，该流程能以较低成本、较高一致性和较快速度替代物理扫描，实现森林生物量的实时、高精度估算。

Conclusion: 本方法为森林资源调查与火灾风险评估提供了切实可行且经济高效的新路径，具有广阔的应用前景。

Abstract: Accurate quantification of forest coverage and combustible biomass (fuel load) is critical for wildfire risk assessment and ecosystem management. However, traditional methods relying on airborne LiDAR or field surveys are cost-prohibitive and time-intensive, while satellite imagery often lacks the vertical resolution required for canopy volume analysis. This paper proposes a novel, automated pipeline for rapid forest inventory using virtual remote sensing data derived from Google Earth Studio (GES). Our approach first generates low-altitude orbital imagery and camera poses for a target region. For dense 3D reconstruction, we employ Pi-Long, developed within the VGGT-Long framework. This model serves as a scalable extension of the Pi-3 feed-forward Transformer architecture. To address the inherent scale ambiguity in monocular reconstruction, we introduce a metric recovery module that aligns the reconstructed trajectory with GES ground truth poses via Sim(3) Umeyama optimization. The metric-scale point cloud is then orthogonally projected into Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) height and density maps. Finally, we employ a watershed-based segmentation algorithm combined with height variance analysis to classify tree species (conifer vs. broadleaf), calculate Leaf Area Index (LAI), and estimate total fuel load. Experimental results demonstrate that this pipeline offers a scalable, cost-effective alternative to physical scanning, enabling near-real-time estimation of forest biomass with high geometric consistency.

</details>


### [307] [PhyGround: Benchmarking Physical Reasoning in Generative World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10806)
*Juyi Lin,Arash Akbari,Yumei He,Lin Zhao,Haichao Zhang,Arman Akbari,Xingchen Xu,Zoe Y. Lu,Enfu Nan,Hokin Deng,Edmund Yeh,Sarah Ostadabbas,Yun Fu,Jennifer Dy,Pu Zhao,Yanzhi Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了PhyGround，一个用于评估视频生成模型物理推理能力的新基准，包括250个带物理预期结果的提示和13种物理定律分类。通过大规模人类标注实验和自动化工具，系统评估了8种主流视频生成模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频生成模型越来越多地被用于模拟现实世界的物理动态。然而，如何准确评估这些模型是否遵循现实物理规律仍面临方法粗糙、评估主观性强、自动化工具欠缺等问题。本工作旨在通过更科学的评测标准和工具，弥补现有基准的不足。

Method: 作者构建了PhyGround基准，包括250个经过人工精挑细选的视频生成提示，并给出每个对应的物理预期结果，涵盖13种物理定律，细分为可观察的子问题，支持逐条物理规律诊断。采用了大规模、高质量的人类标注实验，涉及459名标注员与近6千次注释，并开发了物理专业的自动化VLM judge（PhyJudge-9B），与主流VLM进行对比评测。

Result: 通过人类评测，实验数据充足且标注质量高，模型排名结果可靠。PhyJudge-9B自动评测工具显示出显著更低的评判偏置（3.3%），明显优于Gemini-3.1-Pro（16.6%）。相关数据、模型和代码均已开源。

Conclusion: PhyGround基准及其配套自动评测工具为物理推理型视频生成模型的评测提供了更科学、公平和详尽的方法，有助于社区更加规范和高效地评估和改进此类模型。

Abstract: Generative world models are increasingly used for video generation, where learned simulators are expected to capture the physical rules that govern real-world dynamics. However, evaluating whether generated videos actually follow these rules remains challenging. Existing physics-focused video benchmarks have made important progress, but they still face three key challenges, including the coarse evaluation frameworks that hide law-specific failures, response biases and fatigue that undermine the validity of annotation judgments, and automated evaluators that are insufficiently physics-aware or difficult to audit. To address those challenges, we introduce PhyGround, a criteria-grounded benchmark for evaluating physical reasoning in video generation. The benchmark contains 250 curated prompts, each augmented with an expected physical outcome, and a taxonomy of 13 physical laws across solid-body mechanics, fluid dynamics, and optics. Each law is operationalized through observable sub-questions to enable per-law diagnostics. We evaluate eight modern video generation models through a large-scale, quality-controlled human study, grounded on social science lab experiment design. A total of 459 annotators provided 5,796 complete annotations and over 37.4K fine-grained labels; after quality control, the retained annotations exhibited high split-half model-ranking correlations (Spearman's rho > 0.90). To support reproducible automated evaluation, we release PhyJudge-9B, an open physics-specialized VLM judge. PhyJudge-9B achieves substantially lower aggregate relative bias than Gemini-3.1-Pro (3.3% vs. 16.6%). We release prompts, human annotations, model checkpoints, and evaluation code on the project page https://phyground.github.io/.

</details>


### [308] [Predicting 3D structure by latent posterior sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10830)
*Azmi Haider,Dan Rosenbaum*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合NeRF三维场景表示和扩散模型概率建模的三维重建方法，实现了对不同观测条件下三维结构的高质量重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 2D图像生成模型和3D神经场表示各自取得了巨大成功，但二者一直未有良好融合。当前3D重建任务存在观测不确定性，本工作旨在通过概率推理方法来提高3D重建的鲁棒性和准确性。

Method: 方法上，将三维场景看作潜在变量，建立其先验分布，并用NeRF进行体渲染建模。在训练阶段分两步：首先自编码训练重建模型以获得场景潜变量，然后再用扩散模型训练潜变量的先验分布。推断时采用基于score的扩散模型推理与重建模型的似然项结合，从观测出发对场景进行后验采样。

Result: 实验展示分别在单视图、多视图、带噪声图像、稀疏像素和稀疏深度观测条件下，都能成功重建三维结构，且能自然反映不同输入信息量下的不确定性，重建效果优于对比方法。

Conclusion: 提出的方法为不同种类观测下三维场景重建提供了统一且有效的概率建模方案，不仅提升了准确度，还能量化与应对观测带来的不确定性。

Abstract: The remarkable achievements of both generative models of 2D images and neural field representations for 3D scenes present a compelling opportunity to integrate the strengths of both approaches. In this work, we propose a methodology that combines a NeRF-based representation of 3D scenes with probabilistic modeling and reasoning using diffusion models. We view 3D reconstruction as a perception problem with inherent uncertainty that can thereby benefit from probabilistic inference methods. The core idea is to represent the 3D scene as a stochastic latent variable for which we can learn a prior and use it to perform posterior inference given a set of observations. We formulate posterior sampling using the score-based inference method of diffusion models in conjunction with a likelihood term computed from a reconstruction model that includes volumetric rendering. We train the model using a two-stage process: first we train the reconstruction model while auto-decoding the latent representations for a dataset of 3D scenes, and then we train the prior over the latents using a diffusion model. By using the model to generate samples from the posterior we demonstrate that various 3D reconstruction tasks can be performed, differing by the type of observation used as inputs. We showcase reconstruction from single-view, multi-view, noisy images, sparse pixels, and sparse depth data. These observations vary in the amount of information they provide for the scene and we show that our method can model the varying levels of inherent uncertainty associated with each task. Our experiments illustrate that this approach yields a comprehensive method capable of accurately predicting 3D structure from diverse types of observations.

</details>


### [309] [MMVIAD: Multi-view Multi-task Video Understanding for Industrial Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10833)
*Xiran Zhao,Jing Jin,Yan Bai,Zhongan Wang,Yifeng Sun,Yihang Lou,Xuanyu Zhu,Tao Feng,Yingna Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了第一个面向工业异常检测的连续多视角视频数据集MMVIAD，并提供了完整的基准和多任务评测方案，提高了工业质检中异常检测和理解的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前工业质检对于异常检测主要依赖静态图片或稀疏视角，无法全面反映真实工业场景下的连续检测流程。因此，需要一个能更好模拟实际检测过程的数据集与评测体系，促进模型在异常检测等多任务上的进步。

Method: 作者构建了MMVIAD数据集，包含覆盖48种工业物体、14种环境、6类结构异常的连续多视角检测视频，并支持异常检测、缺陷分类、物体分类和异常可见时刻定位等任务。在此基础上，提出两阶段后训练流程：先用PS-SFT初始化感知-结构化推理能力，再用VISTA-GRPO通过语义门控奖励和可见性奖励细化模型，最终得到VISTA模型。

Result: 在MMVIAD数据集上系统实验证明，现有商用与开源的视频多模态大模型（MLLMs）在该基准下均远低于人类表现，尤其在细粒度缺陷识别与时序定位上表现不足。VISTA模型在MMVIAD-Unseen上将四项任务均分从45.0提升至57.5，优于GPT-5.4。

Conclusion: 该工作显著完善了工业异常检测领域的数据支撑和评测标准，并通过创新的训练流程推动了模型在异常检测和相关多任务场景下的泛化和性能提升，有益于实际工业应用落地。

Abstract: Industrial anomaly detection is critical for manufacturing quality control, yet existing datasets mainly focus on static images or sparse views, which do not fully reflect continuous inspection processes in real industrial scenarios. We introduce MMVIAD (Multi-view Multi-task Video Industrial Anomaly Detection), to the best of our knowledge the first continuous multi-view video dataset for industrial anomaly detection and understanding, together with a benchmark for multi-task evaluation. MMVIAD contains object-centric 2-second inspection clips with approximately 120 degrees of camera motion, covering 48 object categories, 14 environments, and 6 structural anomaly types. It supports anomaly detection, defect classification, object classification, and anomaly visible-time localization. Systematic evaluations on MMVIAD show that current commercial and open-source video MLLMs remain far below human performance, especially for fine-grained defect recognition and temporal grounding. To improve transferable anomaly understanding, we further develop a two-stage post-training pipeline where PS-SFT (Perception-Structured Supervised Fine-Tuning) initializes perception-structured reasoning and VISTA-GRPO (Visibility-grounded Industrial Structured Temporal Anomaly Group Relative Policy Optimization) refines the model with semantic-gated defect reward and visibility-aware temporal reward, producing the final model VISTA. On MMVIAD-Unseen, VISTA improves the base model's average score across the four tasks from 45.0 to 57.5, surpassing GPT-5.4. Source code is available at https://github.com/Georgekeepmoving/MMVIAD.

</details>


### [310] [Transcoda: End-to-End Zero-Shot Optical Music Recognition via Data-Centric Synthetic Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10835)
*Daniel Dratschuk,Paul Swoboda*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本论文提出了Transcoda，一种基于先进合成数据生成和语法解码的新型光学乐谱识别（OMR）系统，大幅提升了模型在合成及历史乐谱数据集上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前OMR发展受限于真实乐谱扫描件的大规模标注数据集匮乏，导致模型只能用样本稀少的迁移或过于简单的合成数据训练。此外，乐谱编码存在一对多映射，增加了解码难度和不确定性。作者旨在解决数据瓶颈和编码唯一性带来的难题。

Method: 1）通过高级合成数据生成管线扩充训练数据。2）规范化**kern编码，确保唯一性。3）引入基于语法的解码器，用于输出合成结果的语法正确性。在小模型规模下实现高效训练。

Result: 在合成乐谱基准数据集上，Transcoda的OMR-NED为18.46%，远优于最优对比系统Legato（43.91%）；在真实历史波兰乐谱扫描件上，错误率降至63.97%（SMT++为80.16%）。

Conclusion: Transcoda显示出在训练资源有限和编码复杂场景下的优秀性能，表明新的数据生成、唯一化与解码策略能有效提升OMR系统准确率，并为OMR领域带来新的技术进展。

Abstract: Optical Music Recognition (OMR), the task of transcribing sheet music into a structured textual representation, is currently bottlenecked by a lack of large-scale, annotated datasets of real scans. This forces models to rely on either few-shot transfer or synthetic training pipelines that remain overly simplistic. A secondary challenge is encoding non-uniqueness: in the popular Humdrum **kern format for transcribing music, multiple different text encodings can render into the same visual sheet music. This one-to-many mapping creates a harder learning task and introduces high uncertainty during decoding. We propose Transcoda, an OMR system built on (i) an advanced synthetic data generation pipeline, (ii) a normalization of the **kern encoding to enforce a unique normal form and (iii) grammar-based decoding to ensure the syntactic correctness of the output. This approach allows us to train a compact 59M-parameter model in just 6 hours on a single GPU that outperforms billion-parameter baselines. Transcoda achieves the best score among state of the art baselines on a newly curated benchmark of synthetically rendered scores at 18.46% OMR-NED (compared to 43.91% for the next-best system, Legato) and reduces the error rate on historical Polish scans to 63.97% OMR-NED (down from 80.16% for SMT++).

</details>


### [311] [Verification Mirage: Mapping the Reliability Boundary of Self-Verification in Medical VQA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10850)
*Ruinan Jin,Beidi Zhao,Myeongkyun Kang,Qiong Zhang,Xiaoxiao Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文针对医学视觉问答（VQA）中常用的自验证机制提出质疑，并提出了一种分析VLM自验证可靠性的新方法，指出自验证可能会产生虚假的高通过率和安全感，尤其在知识密集型任务下问题更为严重。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着多模态模型（VLM）在医疗视觉问答领域的应用，自验证被普遍认为是提升回答正确性和安全性的默认手段，但其实际是否可靠并未被系统评估。本文希望揭示这一机制的潜在风险和缺陷。

Method: 提出了新的诊断性分析框架，将VLM自验证行为分解为判别能力和一致性偏差两部分。通过评估六类开源VLM在五个医疗VQA数据集和七项任务中的表现，详细刻画了自验证容易失效的边界区域，并采用统计分析与显著性分析验证发现。

Result: 发现自验证的可靠性取决于任务难度，知识密集型任务最容易陷入“验证假象”，表现为高错误率和高一致性偏差。自验证无法作为独立安全信号，且在多轮对话时错误更易被锁定。交叉验证虽然有改善但不能彻底解决问题。

Conclusion: 医学VLM的自验证方法存在重大的内在局限性，当前广泛采用的做法可能带来虚假的安全感，实际临床应用中失败可能性更高。需要开发更为可靠和独立的验证机制。

Abstract: Self-verification, re-invoking the same vision language model (VLM) in a fresh context to check its own generated answer, is increasingly used as a default safety layer for medical visual question answering (VQA). We argue that this practice is fundamentally unreliable. We introduce [METHOD NAME], a diagnostic framework for mapping the reliability boundary of medical VLM self-verification by decomposing verifier behavior into discrimination capability and agreement bias. Because the verifier and answer generator are capacity-coupled, the verifier can overly agree with the generator, creating a verification mirage: a regime with both high verifier error and high agreement bias, driven by false acceptance of incorrect answers. Evaluating six open-weight VLMs across five medical VQA datasets and seven medical tasks, we find that this boundary is strongly task-conditioned. Knowledge-intensive clinical tasks fall deepest into the mirage, simpler tasks are more resistant, and perceptual tasks lie in between. Verification also fails to provide an independent safety signal: logistic mixed-effects analysis shows that verifier error and agreement bias become more likely when the generator is wrong, while saliency analyses show that verifiers under-attend to image evidence relative to generators, a phenomenon we call the lazy verifier. Cross-verification reduces but does not eliminate the mirage. Moreover, when verification is reused in multi-turn actor-verifier loops, most initially wrong answers become locked in by false verification. Since our experiments use clean benchmarks, the observed reliability boundary likely underestimates failures in real clinical deployment.

</details>


### [312] [Masked Generative Transformer Is What You Need for Image Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10859)
*Wei Chow,Linfeng Li,Xian Sun,Lingdong Kong,Zefeng Li,Qi Xu,Hang Song,Tian Ye,Xian Wang,Jinbin Bai,Shilin Xu,Xiangtai Li,Junting Pan,Shaoteng Liu,Ran Zhou,Tianshu Yang,Songhua Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Masked Generative Transformers (MGTs)的新型图像编辑方法（EditMGT），通过局部预测机制限制编辑影响范围，克服扩散模型中编辑区域与周围内容相互干扰的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在图像编辑中的主导地位由于其全局去噪机制导致编辑效果容易影响未编辑区域，存在修改“泄漏”，无法实现精确、局部性的图像编辑。急需一种能精确控制编辑影响范围的方法。

Method: 提出利用MGT的局部token预测特点，仅改变指定区域。具体方法包括多层注意力整合提升编辑定位精度，region-hold采样机制防止非目标区域被意外更改。同时，构建了高分辨率、涵盖七大类别、包含200万样本的CrispEdit-2M数据集支持训练。

Result: EditMGT模型仅960M参数，在多个基准上达到了最优的图像相似度，并且实现6倍于扩散模型的编辑速度。

Conclusion: MGT为图像编辑提供了高效、精确、局部控制的替代方案，优于主流扩散编辑方法。

Abstract: Diffusion models dominate image editing, yet their global denoising mechanism entangles edited regions with surrounding context, causing modifications to propagate into areas that should remain intact. We propose a fundamentally different approach by leveraging Masked Generative Transformers (MGTs), whose localized token-prediction paradigm naturally confines changes to intended regions. We present EditMGT, an MGT-based editing framework that is the first of its kind. Our approach employs multi-layer attention consolidation to aggregate cross-attention maps into precise edit localization signals, and region-hold sampling to explicitly prevent token flipping in non-target areas. To support training, we construct CrispEdit-2M, a 2M-sample high-resolution (>1024) editing dataset spanning seven categories. With only 960M parameters, EditMGT achieves state-of-the-art image similarity on multiple benchmarks while delivering 6x faster editing, demonstrating that MGTs offer a compelling alternative to diffusion-based editing.

</details>


### [313] [CADBench: A Multimodal Benchmark for AI-Assisted CAD Program Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10873)
*Anna C. Doris,Jacob Thomas Sony,Ghadi Nehme,Era Syla,Amin Heyrani Nobari,Faez Ahmed*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了CADBench，一个统一的多模态CAD程序生成基准，用于标准化和系统性地评估从图像或三维数据恢复可编辑CAD程序的能力，涵盖多数据集和评价指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于AI的可编辑CAD程序恢复方法评测分散在不同的数据集、模态和评价标准之间，导致方法难以公平对比和进步难以量化，因此亟需一个统一全面的评测基准。

Method: CADBench基准包含18,000个多样化评测样本，覆盖六个主流数据集家族、五种输入模态（包括不同类型网格渲染图）、六类评价指标（几何保真度、可执行性和程序紧凑度），并对样本难度与多样性做系统控制。作者对11种CAD专用或通用视觉-语言模型进行了全面评测，总计生成超140万份CAD程序。

Result: 评测显示，针对理想输入，专用mesh-to-CAD模型性能远超通用代码生成型视觉-语言模型，同时揭示了三个常见失败模式：几何复杂度提升导致重构质量下降、专用模型对输入模态敏感、同一模型排名在不同指标下显著变化。

Conclusion: CADBench为多模态可编辑CAD程序生成与三维重构领域提供了标准化诊断与测量工具，有利于促进该领域方法的对比、发展与实际落地应用。

Abstract: Recovering editable CAD programs from images or 3D observations is central to AI-assisted design, but progress is difficult to measure because existing evaluations are fragmented across datasets, modalities, and metrics. We introduce CADBench, a unified benchmark for multimodal CAD program generation. CADBench contains 18,000 evaluation samples spanning six benchmark families derived from DeepCAD, Fusion 360, ABC, MCB, and Objaverse; five input modalities including clean meshes, noisy meshes, single-view renders, photorealistic renders, and multi-view renders; and six metrics covering geometric fidelity, executability, and program compactness. STEP-based families are stratified by B-rep face count and all families are diversity-sampled to support controlled analysis across complexity and object variation. We benchmark eleven CAD-specialized and general-purpose vision-language systems, generating more than 1.4 million CAD programs. Under idealized inputs, specialized mesh-to-CAD models substantially outperform code-generating VLMs, which remain far from reliable CAD program reconstruction. CADBench further reveals three recurring failure modes: reconstruction quality degrades with geometric complexity, CAD-specialized models can be brittle under modality shift, and model rankings change across metrics. Together, these results position CADBench as a diagnostic testbed for measuring progress in editable 3D reconstruction and multimodal CAD understanding. The benchmark is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/DeCoDELab/CADBench.

</details>


### [314] [Geometry-aware Prototype Learning for Cross-domain Few-shot Medical Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10885)
*Feifan Song,Yuntian Bo,Haofeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种几何感知的跨域少样本医学图像分割方法 GeoProto，通过引入几何结构先验来提升模型在新解剖类别和新成像域上的泛化能力，并在多个数据集和设置上取得了最新最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前跨域少样本医学分割方法中，解剖结构与域特定的外观特征被混合，导致模型在遇到域转移（例如不同成像设备或协议）时表现不稳。作者发现解剖结构作为几何先验，在不同域中具有更强的可迁移性，但此前未被充分利用。

Method: 提出GeoProto框架，核心方法为几何感知原型增强（GAPE）：对每个局部外观原型加入几何偏移，该偏移由辅助的有序形状分支（OSB）生成。OSB在监督下学习不同区域的有序几何表示，而仅需标准分割掩码，无需额外标注。

Result: 在七个涵盖跨模态、跨序列和跨场景的医学图像数据集上进行大量实验，GeoProto在所有设置中都取得了领先性能。

Conclusion: 引入显式几何先验提升了跨域少样本分割的鲁棒性和泛化能力，GeoProto为该任务提供了先进有效的参考方法。

Abstract: Cross-domain few-shot medical image segmentation (CD-FSMIS) requires a model to generalise simultaneously to novel anatomical categories and unseen imaging domains from only a handful of annotated examples. Existing prototypical approaches inevitably entangle anatomical structure with domain-specific appearance variations, and thus lack a stable reference for reliable matching under domain shift. We observe that the geometric structure of human anatomy constitutes a reliable, domain-transferable prior that has been overlooked. Building on this insight, we propose GeoProto, a geometry-aware CD-FSMIS framework that enriches prototypical matching with explicit structural priors. The core component, Geometry-Aware Prototype Enrichment (GAPE), augments each local appearance prototype with a learned geometric offset encoding its ordinal position within the organ's interior topology. This offset is derived from an auxiliary Ordinal Shape Branch (OSB) trained under an ordinally consistent objective that enforces monotonic variation of geometric embeddings across interior strata, requiring no annotation beyond standard segmentation masks. Extensive experiments across seven datasets spanning three evaluation settings (cross-modality, cross-sequence, and cross-context) demonstrate that GeoProto achieves state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [315] [Count Anything at Any Granularity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10887)
*Chang Liu,Haoning Wu,Weidi Xie*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了多粒度（multi-grained）开放世界目标计数新范式，并发布了KubriCount大规模多注释数据集及HieraCount模型，显著提升了细粒度语义下的计数表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前开放世界目标计数面临困难，主要因为“计数粒度”未被显式定义，用户指令的语义层次差异导致现有方法难以精确定义“计数什么”。因此，明确计数粒度对于改进开放世界计数具有重要意义。

Method: 1）将开放世界计数定义为多粒度计数任务，结合视觉示例和细粒度文本、多层次负面提示，显式划分五种语义层次；2）提出首个自动化数据生成流水线，结合3D可控合成、图像编辑和VLM筛选，构建KubriCount大规模、多层次标注计数数据集；3）系统评测现有主流模型在多粒度场景下的表现；4）训练HieraCount模型，融合文本与视觉示例，联合指定不同层次目标。

Result: KubriCount数据集支持训练和多粒度评测，主流大模型和专用计数模型在粒度细分场景均出现遵循指令失败。相比之下，HieraCount模型在多粒度计数准确率上有明显提升，并能泛化适应复杂真实场景。

Conclusion: 明确计数粒度问题，结合自动化生成的数据集和多粒度建模，可以显著提升开放世界目标计数的实用性和准确性。KubriCount数据集和HieraCount模型为细粒度计数研究提供有力支撑，并推进该领域发展。

Abstract: Open-world object counting remains brittle: despite rapid advances in vision-language models (VLMs), reliably counting the objects a user intends is far from solved. We argue that a central reason is that counting granularity is left implicit; users may refer to a specific identity, an attribute, an instance type, a category, or an abstract concept, yet most methods treat "what to count" as a single, category-level matching problem. In this work, we redefine open-world counting as multi-grained counting, where visual exemplars specify target appearance and fine-grained text, with optional negative prompts, specifies the intended semantic granularity across five explicit levels. Making granularity explicit, however, exposes a critical data bottleneck: existing counting datasets lack the multi-category scenes, controlled distractors, and instance-level annotations needed to verify fine-grained prompt semantics. To address this, we propose the first fully automatic data-scaling pipeline that integrates controllable 3D synthesis with consistent image editing and VLM-based filtering, and use it to construct KubriCount, the largest and most comprehensively annotated counting dataset to date, supporting both training and multi-grained evaluation. Systematic benchmarking reveals that both multimodal large language models and specialist counting models exhibit severe prompt-following failures under fine-grained distinctions. Motivated by these findings, we train HieraCount, a multi-grained counting model that jointly leverages text and visual exemplars as complementary target specifications. HieraCount substantially improves multi-grained counting accuracy and generalizes robustly to challenging real-world scenarios. The project page is available here: https://verg-avesta.github.io/KubriCount/.

</details>


### [316] [Counterfactual Stress Testing for Image Classification Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10894)
*Moritz Stammel,Fabio De Sousa Ribeiro,Raghav Mehta,Mélanie Roschewitz,Ben Glocker*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于因果生成模型的反事实压力测试框架，更真实地模拟医学影像AI系统在实际分布偏移下的表现，可有效评估模型稳健性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前医学影像深度学习模型在新环境部署时，由于训练与实际环境存在分布差异，模型表现常常大打折扣，且常用的压力测试（如亮度、对比度扰动）不能真实反映临床分布变化带来的影响。

Method: 作者提出通过基于因果生成模型的方法，生成具备临床意义的反事实图像，例如在保持解剖结构不变的情况下，修改患者性别或扫描仪类型，从而实现有针对性的分布偏移评估。该方法在胸部X光和乳腺X光两种模态、三种架构和多种情景下测试。

Result: 相较于传统的简单扰动，反事实压力测试能更准确反映真实分布外（OOD）表现，包括性能变化的方向与幅度，以及模型排名。

Conclusion: 因果生成模型可作为医学影像AI系统更可靠和实用的稳健性评估工具，为临床部署前的模型评估提供更有力的依据。

Abstract: Deep learning models in medical imaging often fail when deployed in new clinical environments due to distribution shifts in demographics, scanner hardware, or acquisition protocols. A central challenge is underspecification, where models with similar validation performance exhibit divergent real-world failure modes. Although stress testing has emerged as a tool to assess this, current methods typically rely on simple, uninformed perturbations (e.g., brightness or contrast changes), which fail to capture clinically realistic variation and can overestimate robustness. In this work, we introduce a counterfactual stress testing framework based on causal generative models that create realistic "what if" images by intervening on attributes such as scanner type and patient sex while preserving anatomical identity, enabling controlled and semantically meaningful evaluation under targeted distribution shifts. Across two imaging modalities (chest X-ray and mammography), three model architectures, and multiple shift scenarios, we show that counterfactual stress tests provide a substantially more accurate proxy for real out-of-distribution performance than classical perturbations, capturing the direction and relative magnitude of performance changes as well as model ranking. These results suggest that causal generative models can serve as practical simulators for robustness assessment, offering a more reliable basis for evaluating medical AI systems prior to deployment.

</details>


### [317] [Confidence-Guided Diffusion Augmentation for Enhanced Bangla Compound Character Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10916)
*Md. Sultan Al Rayhan,Maheen Islam*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于置信度引导的扩散生成增长框架，用于增强低分辨率孟加拉复合手写字符的识别准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孟加拉手写复合字符结构复杂、书写风格多样，高质量标注数据稀缺使得识别问题尤为困难。现有方法难以对复杂和多变的字符进行有效泛化，尤其是对包含复杂连写和变体的复合字符。

Method: 方法包括：1）采用类别条件扩散模型结合分类器引导，合成高质量的复合手写字符样本；2）在U-Net扩散模型中引入Squeeze-and-Excitation增强残差块提升生成质量；3）用预训练分类器作为质量门控，仅保留置信度高的合成样本；4）将筛选后的合成样本与原训练数据融合，用于重新训练多种典型识别网络（如ResNet50、DenseNet121、VGG16和Vision Transformer）。

Result: 在AIBangla复合字符数据集上的实验显示，所提方法在多种主流深度学习架构上的识别准确率均明显提升，最佳模型达到89.2%准确率，远超以往AIBangla基准。

Conclusion: 基于质量控制的扩散式数据增强可显著提升低资源文字系统中复杂手写字符识别性能，对小语种的字符识别具有广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: Recognition of handwritten Bangla compound characters remains a challenging problem due to complex character structures, large intra-class variation, and limited availability of high-quality annotated data. Existing Bangla handwritten character recognition systems often struggle to generalize across diverse writing styles, particularly for compound characters containing intricate ligatures and diacritical variations. In this work, we propose a confidence-guided diffusion augmentation framework for low-resolution Bangla compound character recognition. Our framework combines class-conditional diffusion modeling with classifier guidance to synthesize high-quality handwritten compound character samples. To further improve generation quality, we introduce Squeeze-and-Excitation enhanced residual blocks within the diffusion model's U-Net backbone. We additionally propose a confidence-based filtering mechanism where pre-trained classifiers act as quality gates to retain only highly class-consistent synthetic samples. The filtered synthetic images are fused with the original training data and used to retrain multiple classification architectures. Experiments conducted on the AIBangla compound character dataset demonstrate consistent performance improvements across ResNet50, DenseNet121, VGG16, and Vision Transformer architectures. Our best-performing model achieves 89.2\% classification accuracy, surpassing the previously published AIBangla benchmark by a substantial margin. The results demonstrate that quality-aware diffusion augmentation can effectively enhance handwritten character recognition performance in low-resource script domains.

</details>


### [318] [Pixal3D: Pixel-Aligned 3D Generation from Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10922)
*Dong-Yang Li,Wang Zhao,Yuxin Chen,Wenbo Hu,Meng-Hao Guo,Fang-Lue Zhang,Ying Shan,Shi-Min Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Pixal3D模型，通过像素对齐的方式提升图像到3D资产生成的忠实度，实现了更高质量、更真实的3D资产生成。相比以往生成方法，Pixal3D在保持高分辨率几何和外观的基础上，更好地还原输入图像的细节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D生成模型虽然外观和几何精度不断提升，但生成3D资产与输入图像在像素层面的高度一致性（fidélity）仍是难点，主要源自2D图像与3D形状之间的内在对应不明确。本文希望解决像素层级的2D-3D关联问题，从而提升生成结果的忠实度。

Method: 提出Pixal3D，一种像素对齐的3D生成范式。它不在规范姿态空间中生成形状，而是直接以与输入视图一致的像素对齐方式生成3D。为此，方法引入了一个像素反投影条件机制，用于将多尺度图像特征显式提升到3D特征体积中，建立直接的像素与3D关联。并支持多视图生成，可聚合不同视图的特征体积。

Result: 实验显示，Pixal3D不仅具备可扩展性和高质量3D资产生成能力，还大幅提升了与输入图像的一致性，接近3D重建方案的忠实度。此外，该方法还能扩展到场景级的3D生成，支持多对象3D场景还原。

Conclusion: Pixal3D首次实现在规模化条件下的3D像素对齐生成，为单视图或多视图图像的高保真3D对象和场景生成提出了一种全新且有效的路径，对高保真3D生成领域具有重要启发意义。

Abstract: Recent advances in 3D generative models have rapidly improved image-to-3D synthesis quality, enabling higher-resolution geometry and more realistic appearance. Yet fidelity, which measures pixel-level faithfulness of the generated 3D asset to the input image, still remains a central bottleneck. We argue this stems from an implicit 2D-3D correspondence issue: most 3D-native generators synthesize shape in canonical space and inject image cues via attention, leaving pixel-to-3D associations ambiguous. To tackle this issue, we draw inspiration from 3D reconstruction and propose Pixal3D, a pixel-aligned 3D generation paradigm for high-fidelity 3D asset creation from images. Instead of generating in a canonical pose, Pixal3D directly generates 3D in a pixel-aligned way, consistent with the input view. To enable this, we introduce a pixel back-projection conditioning scheme that explicitly lifts multi-scale image features into a 3D feature volume, establishing direct pixel-to-3D correspondence without ambiguity. We show that Pixal3D is not only scalable and capable of producing high-quality 3D assets, but also substantially improves fidelity, approaching the fidelity level of reconstruction. Furthermore, Pixal3D naturally extends to multi-view generation by aggregating back-projected feature volumes across views. Finally, we show pixel-aligned generation benefits scene synthesis, and present a modular pipeline that produces high-fidelity, object-separated 3D scenes from images. Pixal3D for the first time demonstrates 3D-native pixel-aligned generation at scale, and provides a new inspiring way towards high-fidelity 3D generation of object or scene from single or multi-view images. Project page: https://ldyang694.github.io/projects/pixal3d/

</details>


### [319] [Personal Visual Context Learning in Large Multimodal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10936)
*Zihui Xue,Ami Baid,Sangho Kim,Mi Luo,Kristen Grauman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了个人视觉上下文学习（Personal VCL）的新任务，建立了Personal-VCL-Bench基准，并提出了Agentic Context Bank方法以提升大规模多模态模型（LMMs）在个性化助理场景中的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着可穿戴设备（如智能眼镜）与LMMs结合，如何让这些模型理解和利用与用户个体相关的独特视觉信息，成为模型进化为真正个人助理的关键。因此，作者要系统性地评估和加强LMMs处理个性化视觉查询的能力。

Method: 1）正式定义个人视觉上下文学习（Personal VCL）能力；2）构建涵盖不同人的对象、行为等个人视觉世界的大型基准Personal-VCL-Bench；3）分析现有LMM在个性化视觉理解方面的不足；4）提出Agentic Context Bank，即一种推理时构建自我完善记忆库并根据查询选择证据的结构化方法。

Result: Personal-VCL-Bench显著揭示了主流LMM在利用和整合个人视觉证据方面的明显不足。而Agentic Context Bank方案在多项任务和模型骨干上，均显著优于传统上下文提示方法。

Conclusion: Agentic Context Bank为实现LMMs在个性化视觉助理方向的实际应用扫清了重要障碍，并为未来LMM的个性化能力提升提供了有效途径。

Abstract: As wearable devices like smart glasses integrate Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) into the continuous first-person visual streams of individual users, the evolution of these models into true personal assistants hinges on visual personalization: the ability to reason over visual information unique to the wearer. We formalize this capability as Personal Visual Context Learning (Personal VCL), the prompt-time capability of using user-specific visual context to resolve personalized queries. To systematically evaluate this, we present Personal-VCL-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark capturing the personal visual world across persons, objects, and behaviors. Our analysis of frontier LMMs identifies a profound context utilization gap, revealing that the mechanisms for leveraging visual evidence, as well as aggregating multiple visual observations, remain critically understudied. Motivated by these findings, we propose the Agentic Context Bank, a strong inference-time baseline that structures a user's visual context into a self-refining memory bank and employs query-adaptive evidence selection. Our baseline approach consistently improves over standard context prompting regimes across tasks and evaluated backbones, demonstrating a practical path towards future personalized LMMs.

</details>


### [320] [Power Reinforcement Post-Training of Text-to-Image Models with Super-Linear Advantage Shaping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10937)
*Haoyuan Sun,Jing Wang,Yuxin Song,Yu Lu,Bo Fang,Yifu Luo,Jun Yin,Pengyu Zeng,Miao Zhang,Tiantian Zhang,Xueqian Wang,Shijian Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的SLAS方法，通过非线性几何结构优化T2I模型的策略学习，改善奖励系统缺陷，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前T2I模型的强化学习后训练方法（如GRPO）容易出现‘奖励劫持’等问题，导致模型性能提升不真实。实现奖励信号与真实性能一致性，有效抵抗噪音与偏置成为主要挑战。

Method: 提出Super-Linear Advantage Shaping（SLAS），从信息几何出发，通过优势值调整Fisher-Rao信息度量，引入非线性几何结构，放大高优势方向的信息更新、抑制低优势噪音，同时采用批归一化稳定奖励尺度。

Result: SLAS在多种模型和基准下，均超越DanceGRPO基线，带来更快训练、更优泛化（特别是在GenEval、UniGenBench++评测）和更强的扩展鲁棒性，有效减缓奖励劫持并保持生成结果的语义与组合准确性。

Conclusion: SLAS方法在改善奖励劫持、提升训练稳定性与泛化性、并保持高语义保真的能力上表现优异，为T2I模型后训练优化提供了更为可靠的新路线。

Abstract: Recently, post-training methods based on reinforcement learning, with a particular focus on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), have emerged as the robust paradigm for further advancement of text-to-image (T2I) models. However, these methods are often prone to reward hacking, wherein models exploit biases in imperfect reward functions rather than yielding genuine performance gains. In this work, we identify that normalization could lead to miscalibration and directly removing the prompt-level standard deviation term yields an optimal policy ascent direction that is linear in the advantage but still limits the separation of genuine signals from noise. To mitigate the above issues, we propose Super-Linear Advantage Shaping (SLAS) by revisiting the functional update from an information geometry perspective. By extending the Fisher-Rao information metric with advantage-dependent weighting, SLAS introduces a non-linear geometric structure that reshapes the local policy space. This design relaxes constraints along high-advantage directions to amplify informative updates, while tightening those in low-advantage regions to suppress illusory gradients. In addition, batch-level normalization is applied to stabilize training under varying reward scales. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that SLAS consistently surpasses the DanceGRPO baseline across multiple backbones and benchmarks. In particular, it yields faster training dynamics, improved out-of-domain performance on GenEval and UniGenBench++, and enhanced robustness to model scaling, while mitigating reward hacking and preserving semantic and compositional fidelity in generations.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [321] [SalesSim: Benchmarking and Aligning Multimodal Language Models as Retail User Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08334)
*Yada Pruksachatkun,Elaine Wan,Lyanna Chen,Kai-Wei Chang,Chien-Sheng Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了SalesSim框架，用于测试多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在零售场景下模拟真实用户行为的能力，并提出新方法改善模型在人设对齐上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大模型在模拟多轮、复杂、带工具辅助的零售用户行为时，往往只停留在表面对话生成，缺乏深入、基于人设的决策过程建模，因此需要一个更贴近实际、可衡量的仿真和评估框架。

Method: 1. 提出SalesSim框架，以多模态和真实用户人设为基础，生成和评估模拟用户行为。2. 设计对齐度与对话质量等新评测指标。3. 基于不同大模型对SalesSim进行Benchmark，分析其不足。4. 提出UserGRPO多目标强化学习方法，优化模型的对话流利度及决策对齐度。

Result: 发现当前大模型虽然对话流畅，但词汇多样性低、人设区分性弱，人设对齐度最高不足79%。采用UserGRPO后，对齐度提升了13.8%，同时对话质量也有所提升。

Conclusion: SalesSim为用户模拟器的精准性和现实感提供了新基准及提升方法，有助于社区进一步研究和改进面向目标任务的用户行为模拟模型。

Abstract: We present SalesSim, a framework and testbed for evaluating the ability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to simulate realistic, persona-driven customer behavior in multi-turn, multi-modal, tool-augmented online retail conversations. Unlike prior work that treat user simulation as surface-level dialogue generation, SalesSim models retail interaction and decision-making as a grounded, agentic process, where shoppers with diverse backgrounds, preferences, and dealbreakers interact with a sales agent, seek clarifications, and make informed purchasing decisions. For evaluation, we design a suite of metrics centered on decision alignment, measuring the consistency between the simulator's actions and its persona specifications, as well as conversational quality. We find several behavioral gaps after benchmarking 6 open and closed-source state-of-the-art models. First, while models produce fluent conversations, they display significantly lower lexical diversity and overdisclosure of criteria across personas compared to human conversations. Second, models tend to be persuaded by sales agent suggestions and drift from persona specifications. Even the strongest model achieves less than 79% average alignment with its underlying persona specifications. To make progress on these limitations, we propose UserGRPO, a multi-turn, multi-objective reinforcement learning recipe to optimize both conversational fluency and decision alignment under persona specifications. Our experiments demonstrate that UserGRPO boosts decision alignment of the baseline model by 13.8% while improving conversational quality. By introducing SalesSim, we provide a new testbed for the community to investigate and improve the adherence of user simulators in goal-oriented settings.

</details>


### [322] [Sanity Checks for Long-Form Hallucination Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08346)
*Geigh Zollicoffer,Minh Vu,Hongli Zhan,Raymond Li,Manish Bhattarai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种区分大语言模型幻觉检测方法真正评估推理过程还是只关注最终答案表面特征的控制不变性方法，并通过两个oracle测试验证。研究表明，有效识别幻觉并不一定需要复杂的表征模型，轻量级的基于推理轨迹词汇特征的方法同样表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近年来大语言模型的幻觉检测方法越来越依赖chain-of-thought（CoT）推理轨迹，但尚不明确这些方法究竟是在评估推理过程本身，还是利用了最终答案的表面关联特征。因此，研究者希望通过新的方法来揭示和区分这两种情形，为更有效的幻觉检测提供理论和实证支持。

Method: 作者提出了控制不变性方法，通过两个oracle测试：Force（将每个响应的最终答案替换为真实答案，保留推理过程）和Remove（去除答案公布步骤，仅保留推理轨迹），来检验检测方法的预测能力是否真的源于对推理步骤的把握而非答案本身。之后，作者提出了一个轻量级得分器（TRACT），利用推理轨迹中的词汇动态特征进行幻觉检测。

Result: 实验结果显示，在消除答案层面伪迹后，单纯依靠词汇轨迹特征构建的轻量级模型（TRACT）依然可以实现稳定且优异的检测效果，甚至超过部分基线复杂模型。

Conclusion: 现有基于推理感知的幻觉检测面临的核心挑战，不是推理轨迹本身无信息，而是难以将推理过程与终点（答案）线索有效分离。简单高效的表征方法在合理控制后依然具备强大的检测能力。

Abstract: Hallucination detection methods for large language models increasingly operate on chain-of-thought reasoning traces, yet it remains unclear whether they evaluate the reasoning itself or merely exploit surface correlates of the final answer. We introduce a controlled-invariance methodology that exposes this distinction through two oracle tests: \textsc{Force}, which replaces each response's final answer with the ground truth while preserving the reasoning trace, and \textsc{Remove}, which strips answer-announcement steps while leaving the trajectory intact. This reveals if their predictive power derives from answer-level artifacts rather than from the structure or validity of intermediate reasoning. We further show that once these artifacts are controlled for, effective detection does not necessarily require complex learned representations: TRACT, a lightweight scorer built on lexical trajectory features (hedging trends, step-length dynamics, and cross-response vocabulary convergence), achieves strong robustness while remaining competitive with or outperforming existing baselines on unperturbed traces. These findings suggest that the current central challenge in reasoning-aware hallucination detection is not the absence of signal in the trace, but the failure to isolate it from endpoint cues.

</details>


### [323] [How Much Do Circuits Tell Us? Measuring the Consistency and Specificity of Language Model Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08348)
*Michael Li,Nishant Subramani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文分析了在机械解释性中的回路（circuits）是否具有任务唯一性，并发现虽然模型组件对任务很重要，但同一组件在多个任务间高度复用，并非严格任务特有。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 回路框架希望通过识别模型中对任务因果上重要的组件（如注意力头、MLP层）来理解模型行为。当前大部分研究关注单一任务，但实际中模型可能在多任务间共享回路，回路的复用性与任务特异性研究不足。

Method: 作者提出衡量回路复用、内部一致性与任务特异性的指标。通过对六个任务、七个模型，利用edge attribution patching技术，系统性分析不同任务间回路组件的共享及其重要性。

Result: 作者发现：1）同一任务内部回路组件复用度高且必要性强，删除后性能几乎完全损失；2）但这些组件并不是任务特有，删除一个任务的回路对其他任务损伤同样严重，说明不同任务在回路上存在大量共用；3）虽然部分回路包含任务唯一组件，但对整体性能提升有限。

Conclusion: 结果显示，虽然在注意力头和MLP层水平上的回路能发现模型关键组件，但这种组件高度共享性导致难以做特定任务解释与干预，质疑了回路在目标性解释和调控上的有效性。

Abstract: The circuits framework in mechanistic interpretability aims to identify causally important sparse subgraphs of model components, typically evaluated by measuring necessity and sufficiency. We measure circuit reuse, the proportion of components shared across per-example circuits within a task, and investigate two less-studied properties of this: consistency, the recurrence of components within a task, and specificity, their uniqueness to a task. Using edge attribution patching across six tasks and seven models, we find that within-task reuse is high and that shared components are necessary for task performance, with ablations causing up to $\sim$100% relative accuracy drops. However, circuits turn out not to be task-specific: ablating one task's circuit damages another task's performance about as much as that task's own circuit does. We discover that this is due to substantial overlap between circuits across tasks, which are causally important for performance. Some circuits do contain a smaller set of task-specific components, but these account for only a modest portion of circuit performance. Overall, our findings suggest that while circuit discovery at the level of attention heads and MLP layers identifies important components, their lack of task-specificity raises questions about the degree to which circuits can support targeted understanding and intervention on model behavior.

</details>


### [324] [Change My View? The Dynamics of Persuasion and Polarization in Online Discourse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08383)
*David Freeborn,Malihe Alikani,Anthony Sicilia*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文利用大语言模型分析Reddit上的r/ChangeMyView辩论，发现让步与共情等策略比正面反驳等更易促成观点转变，有效说服不仅仅依赖证据，还需关注关系性表达。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 哲学上普遍认为共享证据与理性论证应促进观点趋同，但日常交流常并非如此；作者希望通过实证数据分析有效说服的实际机制，检验并补充规范性说理理论。

Method: 作者收集、分析了r/ChangeMyView社区中信念变化被明确标记的辩论数据，利用大语言模型预测观点改变的可能性，并对每条回复采用机器辅助方法，识别十种典型修辞策略，对说服效果进行量化分析。

Result: 引入让步、共情等策略显著提升对观点转变的预测，表达让步或共情一致性大幅提高信念变化概率，而正面反驳、攻击对方可信度和转移话题则降低说服成功率。

Conclusion: 有效的公众理性交流不仅依赖证据，还需恰当的关系性框架，当前的规范理性对话理论应更重视修辞与人际关系在实际说服中的作用。

Abstract: Philosophical accounts of persuasion often assume that shared evidence and rational argumentation should lead to a convergence of views between peers, yet everyday discourse often suggests otherwise. In this study, we use large language models to analyze a corpus of debates on Reddit's r/ChangeMyView, where belief revision is publicly signaled. Large language models were asked, halfway through each discussion, to forecast whether such an acknowledgement would arise; their probabilistic estimates serve as a conversational baseline. Each reply was then coded, through a hybrid machine-assisted procedure, for ten familiar rhetorical strategies -- concession, empathy, logical challenge, credibility appeals, and so forth. Adding these strategic features markedly improves predictive power and yields a consistent pattern: moves that express concession or empathetic alignment substantially increase the prospect of belief change, whereas frontal refutation, credibility attacks, and topic deflection diminish it. The findings indicate that effective public reasoning depends as much on relational framing as on evidential content, and they invite a refinement of normative accounts of rational dialogue.

</details>


### [325] [jina-embeddings-v5-omni: Text-Geometry-Preserving Multimodal Embeddings via Frozen-Tower Composition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08384)
*Florian Hönicke,Michael Günther,Andreas Koukounas,Kalim Akram,Scott Martens,Saba Sturua,Han Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的多模态嵌入模型组合方法——frozen-encoder model composition，实现了多种模态（文本、图片、音频、视频）输入到一个统一语义空间的编码。其效率高、表现优异，可媲美更大规模、多模态模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态嵌入模型训练代价高，全参数微调耗时耗力。目前方法难以兼顾扩展性和效率。因此，寻找参数高效、易扩展的新型多模态嵌入方案成为研究热点。

Method: 采用“冻结编码器”思想，将现有文本嵌入模型（Jina Embeddings v5 Text）保持不变，仅新增图片和音频编码器，并只训练各编码器与语言模型的连接组件（参数仅占0.35%）。这样文本主干模型及非文本编码器均不更新，大幅减少计算和数据需求。
