Result: 无需大规模全参数训练，模型即可高效支持文本、图片、音频、视频的统一嵌入。实验表明，方法在准确度表现上接近甚至媲美更大、更复杂的主流多模态嵌入模型。

Conclusion: 冻结编码器+轻量连接组件的多模态模型方案，不仅大幅提升训练效率，还保证了SOTA级的嵌入表现，对构建高效、可扩展的多模态语义空间具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: In this work, we introduce frozen-encoder model composition, a novel approach to multimodal embedding models. We build on the VLM-style architecture, in which non-text encoders are adapted to produce input for a language model, which in turn generates embeddings for all varieties of input. We present the result: the jina-embeddings-v5-omni suite, a pair of models that encode text, image, audio, and video input into a single semantic embedding space. Our method is to extend the two Jina Embeddings v5 Text models to support additional media by adding encoders for images and audio. The backbone text embedding models and the added non-text media encoders remain frozen. We only trained the connecting components, representing 0.35% of the total weights of the joint model. Training is therefore much more efficient than full-parameter retraining. Additionally, the language model remains effectively unaltered, producing exactly the same embeddings for text inputs as the Jina Embeddings v5 Text models. Our evaluations show that this approach produces results that are competitive with the state-of-the-art, yielding nearly equal performance to larger multimodal embedding models.

</details>


### [326] [AIPO: : Learning to Reason from Active Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08401)
*Junnan Liu,Linhao Luo,Thuy-Trang Vu,Gholamreza Haffari*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种通过多智能体交互提高大语言模型推理能力的强化学习框架AIPO，显著扩展了模型的推理边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的强化学习算法在大语言模型推理能力提升中受限于策略模型本身的能力上限，引入外部专家演示虽有帮助，却存在效率低、泛化性差等问题。作者希望突破单一模型能力边界，从而提升推理广度与深度。

Method: AIPO框架在模型遇到推理瓶颈时，可自主与三个协同智能体（验证代理、知识代理、推理代理）互动，获得细粒度、针对性的反馈来持续拓展能力边界。此外，设计了重要性采样系数和截断策略，抑制协同代理反馈带来的off-policy偏差和梯度消失。训练完成后，策略模型可独立执行推理任务，无须依赖智能体。

Result: 在AIME、MATH500、GPQA-Diamond和LiveCodeBench等多项推理基准测试中，AIPO方法稳定提升了推理性能，并在不同模型和算法下表现出良好的泛化能力，有效扩展了策略模型的推理能力边界。

Conclusion: AIPO强化学习框架通过多智能体协作创新性地突破了大语言模型推理能力的限制，为未来基于RLVR提升LLM智能性提供了新思路，并具备较强的实用与推广价值。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities, largely stimulated by Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). However, existing RL algorithms face a fundamental limitation: their exploration remains largely constrained by the inherent capability boundary of the policy model. Although recent methods introduce external expert demonstrations to extend this boundary, they typically rely on complete trajectory-level guidance, which is sample-inefficient, information-sparse, and may confine exploration to a static guidance space. Inspired by the potential of multi-agent systems, we propose $\textbf{AIPO}$, an enhanced reinforcement learning framework that improves LLM reasoning through active multi-agent interaction during exploration. Specifically, AIPO enables the policy model to proactively consult three functional collaborative agents, $\textit{Verify Agent}$, $\textit{Knowledge Agent}$, and $\textit{Reasoning Agent}$, when encountering reasoning bottlenecks, thereby receiving fine-grained and targeted guidance to actively expand its capability boundary during training. We further introduce a tailored importance sampling coefficient together with a clipping strategy to mitigate the off-policy bias and gradient vanishing issues that arise when learning from agent-provided feedback. After training, the policy model performs reasoning independently without relying on collaborative agents. Extensive experiments on diverse reasoning benchmarks, including AIME, MATH500, GPQA-Diamond, and LiveCodeBench, show that AIPO consistently improves reasoning performance, generalizes robustly across different policy models and RLVR algorithms, and effectively expands the reasoning capability boundary of the policy model.

</details>


### [327] [Built Environment Reasoning from Remote Sensing Imagery Using Large Vision--Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08404)
*Dongdong Wang,Deepak Balakrishnan,Ravi Srinivasan,Shenhao Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了将大语言模型（LLM）与遥感影像结合，应用于智慧城市建设环境相关任务，包括设计建议、可施工性评价、土地利用分析和风险识别，并比较了多种主流多模态语言模型在准确性与可靠性上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着智慧城市建设的发展，如何高效利用遥感数据辅助城市决策成为关键。传统方法多依赖人工或单一算法处理，难以满足复杂场景下的多样化需求。大语言模型的涌现为自动化理解和生成城市建议带来了新机遇。

Method: 作者采用多尺度遥感影像作为输入，用于多模态语言建模，并选择当前领先的多模态大语言模型（如InternVL、Qwen）进行对比测试，评估其在环境推理和建议生成中的表现。

Result: 实验结果显示，结合遥感影像与大语言模型的方法在智慧城市相关任务上表现出较高的潜力。各主流模型在准确性和可靠性上存在差异，证明多模态集成具备现实应用价值。

Conclusion: 将遥感影像与大语言模型结合，能够有效提升城市环境理解和决策建议能力，为智慧城市建设提供新工具和方法。

Abstract: This work investigates the use of large language models (LLMs) for tasks in smart cities. The core idea is to leverage remote sensing imagery to characterize the built environment, including design suggestions, constructability assessment, landuse patterns, and risk identification. We examine remote sensing imagery at multiple spatial scales as inputs for multimodal language modeling and evaluate their effects on built-environment-related reasoning. In addition, we compare state-of-the-art LLMs, including InternVL and Qwen, in terms of accuracy and reliability when generating built environment recommendations. The results demonstrate the potential of integrating remote sensing imagery with large language models to assist smart cities and decision-making.

</details>


### [328] [Effective Explanations Support Planning Under Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08406)
*Hanqi Zhou,Britt Besch,Charley M. Wu,Tobias Gerstenberg*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种将语言解释转化为行动计划的计算模型，并通过实验验证高质量解释能有效提升导航表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从A点到B点的解释不仅需清楚描述路线，还涉及对听者如何理解并执行指令的推测。因此，作者希望刻画语言解释转化为实际行动的认知过程。

Method: 作者提出结合大语言模型与规划代理的模型：大模型将解释翻译成程序化的行动指导（包括策略先验和价值图），规划代理在不完全可观测环境下执行。通过惩罚多次重新规划，量化解释的效率与可靠性。设计了四组实验，收集1,200条解释，并衡量不同质量解释下的导航表现和主观有用性。

Result: 实验显示，评分较高的解释被认为更有帮助，并且显著提升受试者的导航能力。参与者有解释时表现优于无解释，有高分解释时优于低分解释。

Conclusion: 该研究表明，程序化的语言解释是一种以效用为导向的交流模式，语言在不确定性下有效指导行为，并提供了语言与动作之间的行动基础。

Abstract: Explaining how to get from A to B can be challenging. It requires mentally simulating what the listener will do based on what they are told. To capture this process, we propose a computational model that converts utterances into action plans: a large language model translates an explanation into program-like guidance (a policy prior and value map), and a planning agent executes it under partial observability. We score explanations by the efficiency and reliability of the resulting paths, penalizing replanning. Across four preregistered experiments, we collect a corpus of 1,200 explanations over 24 maps, elicit helpfulness judgments, measure baseline navigation, and test behavior with explanations of differing quality. Higher-scored explanations are judged more helpful and improve navigation: participants with explanations outperform those without, and high-scoring explanations help more than low-scoring ones. Together, these results show procedural explanation as utility-guided communication shaped by how language can be grounded into action under uncertainty.

</details>


### [329] [A Semantic-Sampling Framework for Evaluating Calibration in Open-Ended Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08432)
*Zhanliang Wang,Jiancong Xiao,Ruochen Jin,Shu Yang,Bojian Hou,Li Shen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的LLM模型置信度校准评估方法Sem-ECE，解决了现有开放式问答校准评估的不足。通过实验验证，其优于现有方法，适用于无法访问模型内部概率的场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在医学、法律等高风险领域的应用依赖于其置信度的可靠校准，但针对开放式问答的校准评估方法依然薄弱。现有方法在实际应用场景下存在局限，如对输出格式有要求、需访问内部概率或依赖于不明确的抽取规则。因此需要一种适用于实际部署、评估开放式问答校准的新方法。

Method: 提出Sem-ECE评估框架：通过采样模型输出答案，将其按语义分组，用各组出现频率衡量置信度。再给出两种实现估计器（Sem1-ECE与Sem2-ECE），分别基于自一致性和分离式评估答案选择与置信度。理论上证明二者无偏，并分析它们在题目简单与困难时的表现。

Result: 实验在三个开放式QA数据集、五种商用LLM上进行，结果显示Sem-ECE方法与理论预期一致，在置信度评估上优于自报置信度和现有采样方法，并能补充logit方法（在无法访问内部概率时）。

Conclusion: Sem-ECE为开放式问答场景下LLM置信度校准评估提供了有效新工具，解决了原有方法的局限，并在理论和实验上都表现优秀，对于实际部署具有重要意义。

Abstract: Calibration measures whether a model's predicted confidence aligns with its empirical accuracy, and is central to the reliable deployment of large language models (LLMs) in high-stakes domains such as medicine and law. While much recent work focuses on improving LLM calibration, the equally important question of how to evaluate it in realistic settings remains underdeveloped. Open-ended question answering (QA), the most common deployment setting for modern LLMs, is where existing evaluation methods fall short: logit-based metrics need restricted output formats and internal probabilities; verbalized confidence is self-reported and often overconfident; and sampling-based methods rely on task-specific extraction rules without a clear finite-sample target. We introduce Sem-ECE (Semantic-Sampling Expected Calibration Error), a calibration evaluation framework for open-ended QA that samples answers from the model, groups them into semantic classes, and uses the resulting frequencies as confidence. We study two estimators within this framework: Sem$_1$-ECE, the same-sample self-consistency score, and Sem$_2$-ECE, a held-out variant that separates answer selection from confidence evaluation. We prove both are asymptotically unbiased, and further show that they agree on easy questions but diverge on hard ones with Sem$_2$ achieving strictly smaller calibration error, so their gap also serves as a diagnostic for question difficulty. Experiments on three open-ended QA benchmarks across five leading commercial LLMs match our theoretical predictions and show that Sem-ECE outperforms verbalized confidence and existing sampling-based methods, while complementing logit-based evaluation when internal probabilities are unavailable.

</details>


### [330] [Magis-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Magistrate-Level Legal Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08437)
*Ramon Pires,Thales Sales Almeida,Celio Larcher Junior,Giovana Bonás,Hugo Abonizio,Marcos Piau,Roseval Malaquias Junior,Thiago Laitz,Rodrigo Nogueira*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了Magis-Bench，一个专为评估大型语言模型(LLM)法院判决类写作能力而设计的基准数据集，并基于多个主流LLM模型进行了实验分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前法律AI基准多数聚焦于LLM生成法律文档与论证的能力，而“判断能力”（诸如权衡主张、适用法律到案情、做出有理据的裁判）对法治系统同样重要，但缺乏系统评测。

Method: 作者基于巴西2023到2025年司法职位考试的74道题，构建了涵盖多轮法律分析和完整民刑判决写作的Magis-Bench，并用多种LLM进行测试，通过四个前沿模型互评，采用LLM-判官式评估方法，分析模型表现。

Result: 评测结果显示评委间一致性极高（Kendall's W=0.984，配对τ≥0.897），Gemini-3-Pro-Preview得分最高（6.97/10），但所有模型最佳得分也低于满分70%，即当前LLM距离法官级推理和写作仍有较大差距。

Conclusion: 论文建议，尽管LLM在法律写作能力上取得进展，但要实现法官级裁判仍具挑战性。为推动法律AI研究，作者公开数据集、模型输出及评测代码。

Abstract: Existing benchmarks for legal AI focus primarily on tasks where LLMs must produce legal arguments or documents, yet the capacity to \emph{judge} such arguments -- weighing competing claims, applying doctrine to facts, and rendering reasoned decisions -- is arguably as fundamental to a well-functioning legal system as advocacy itself. We introduce Magis-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs on magistrate-level writing tasks derived from recent Brazilian competitive examinations for judicial positions. Magis-Bench comprises 74 questions from eight examinations conducted between 2023 and 2025, including discursive legal analysis questions with multi-turn structure and practical exercises requiring the composition of complete civil and criminal judicial sentences. We evaluate 23 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge methodology with four independent frontier models as evaluators. Our results show strong inter-judge agreement (Kendall's $W = 0.984$; pairwise Kendall's $τ\ge 0.897$), with Google's Gemini-3-Pro-Preview achieving the highest average score (6.97/10), followed by Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (6.67) and Claude-4.5-Opus (6.46). Even the best-performing models score below 70\% of the maximum, indicating that judicial-level legal reasoning and writing remain challenging for current LLMs. We release the complete benchmark, model outputs, and evaluation code to support further research on legal AI capabilities.

</details>


### [331] [Can Language Models Identify Side Effects of Breast Cancer Radiation Treatments?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08439)
*Natalie Seah,Danielle S. Bitterman,Daphna Spiegel,Thomas Hartvigsen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出并测试了一个面向实际部署的压力测试框架，用以评估大语言模型（LLMs）在乳腺癌放疗副作用列表生成中的表现，并对比临床专家整理的参考标准，发现LLMs存在对部分副作用识别不足等局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前，精准告知癌症幸存者治疗副作用具有重要意义，但面临知识缺乏和数据分散的挑战。随着大语言模型的发展，其能辅助副作用沟通，但实际表现未被系统验证。

Method: 作者结合21个乳腺癌患者档案，设计仅放疗方案不同的病例对，针对7个训练过的LLMs在多种提示下输出副作用列表，并与专家团队基于临床文件与知情同意书梳理出的标准答案对比。标准涵盖了剂量、范围、位置与副作用发生频率和时间。

Result: 实验结果显示，各LLMs对文档细微变化敏感，并存在精确性和召回率权衡，且普遍低估了罕见和长期副作用。单独限制输出数量会降低精确度，而融合专家列表能明显增强输出的可靠性和稳健性。

Conclusion: LLMs在肿瘤学副作用信息传递中仍有明显局限，未来应结合临床专家资料优化模型设计，以实现更安全、有效的癌症幸存者支持应用。

Abstract: Accurately communicating the side effects of cancer treatments to cancer survivors is critical, particularly in settings such as informed consent, where clinicians must clearly and comprehensively convey potential treatment toxicities. However, this task remains challenging due to clinical knowledge deficits about adverse treatment effects and fragmentation across electronic health record (EHR) systems. Large language models (LLMs) have the potential to assist in this task, though their reliability in oncology survivorship contexts remains poorly understood. We present a deployment-oriented stress-testing framework for evaluating LLM-generated radiation side effect lists in breast cancer treatment and survivorship care. Using 21 breast cancer patient profiles, we construct paired patient clinical scenarios that differ only in radiotherapy regimens to evaluate seven instruction-tuned LLMs under multiple prompting regimes. We then compare LLM outputs to a clinician-curated reference derived from informed consent documents at two major academic medical centers and developed by a team including more than seven breast radiation oncologists. The reference maps radiation dose-fractionation, fields, and locations to associated toxicities, broken down by frequency and temporal onset. Across models, we reveal sensitivity to minor documentation changes, trade-offs between precision and recall, and systematic under-recall of rare and long-term side effects. When used alone, constraints on the number of side effects generated reduce precision, and grounding outputs in clinician-curated side effect lists substantially improves reliability and robustness. These findings highlight important limitations of LLM use in oncology and suggest practical design choices for safer and more informative survivorship-focused applications.

</details>


### [332] [Revisiting the syntax of imperatives in Yemeni Arabic: An Agree across phases approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08447)
*Mohammed Q. Shormani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出通过“跨阶段依存关系（AAP）”分析也门阿拉伯语祈使句的句法系统，对简单与复杂祈使句（包括A'-链结构）均可解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分析难以兼顾也门阿拉伯语祈使句在句法和信息结构上的复杂互动。作者希望通过新的理论框架解释各种祈使句现象，并揭示其语义和行事功能。

Method: 采用“跨阶段依存关系（AAP）”理论，结合句法与话语分析，考察祈使句中的主语、前置成分及其对应关系，运用A'-链理论剖析显性/隐性主语与话题结构。

Result: 证明2人称pro是祈使句主语，前置的名词或代词实为C域的话题成分，与主语pro在核心指关系下形成A'-链；无显性话题时则有空话题存在，其解释依赖语境。AAP机制成功解释本地与非本地A'-链。

Conclusion: AAP方法为也门阿拉伯语祈使句的结构提供系统解释，证明祈使句的句法与话语密切相关，揭示逻辑主语与表层主语的分离，并促进对语言信息结构及其句法表现的更深入理解。

Abstract: This article revisits the syntax of imperatives in Yemeni Arabic proposing an Agree acros phases (AAP) approach. I argue that the AAP approach successfully accounts for both simple and complex imperative constructions, including A'-chain structures, by establishing a close interactions between syntax and discourse. The study demonstrates that this interface is motivated by the interpretive and performative functions associated with imperatives, linking informational structure with propositional structure. It is also proposed that the thematic subject of imperatives is a 2-person pro, whereas any overt pronominal or nominal element occurring preverbally is not a subject, but rather a C-domain element, precisely aboutness topic. These topics serve as the logical subjects of imperatives and enter into a coreferentiality relationship with pro. This relation is analyzed as APP involving Match, yielding both local and non-local A'-chains. For core imperatives, viz., lacking an overt topic, I propose a null topic to (re)merge in Spec,TopP, whose interpretation depends on the discourse.

</details>


### [333] [Do Benchmarks Underestimate LLM Performance? Evaluating Hallucination Detection With LLM-First Human-Adjudicated Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08462)
*I. F. Atasoy,B. Mutlu,E. A. Sezer,A. Wahdan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究针对LLM（大语言模型）在摘要任务中的上下文幻觉检测进行了分析，通过引入模型辅助复评，显著提升了评测一致性和模型表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在实际应用中易出现幻觉，导致输出内容与事实或语境不符，尤其在以摘要为代表的语境依赖场景中更为突出。现有人工标注数据集存在一致性和准确率不足的问题，影响了模型评估的可靠性。为此，作者希望探索如何通过人机协同提高标注质量。

Method: 对QAGS-C和SummEval两个数据集分别用Gemini 2.5 Flash与GPT-5 Mini模型进行基于推理和范围的幻觉检测，并将结果与原始人工标注比对。针对人机判断有冲突的样本，引入两名不同文化背景的人工裁决员进行复评，从而得到更高质量的人工标签。

Result: 复评后，三方（人类、GPT、Gemini）一致性在QAGS-C和SummEval上分别提升6.38%与7.62%。模型准确率方面，GPT在QAGS-C提升4.25%、SummEval提升2.34%；Gemini分别提升8.51%和3.80%。人工裁决明显倾向于支持模型在给出明确推理时的判断，整体复评后裁决员之间的一致性达到83%-87%。

Conclusion: 在具有较高歧义的摘要幻觉检测任务中，单轮人工标注易受主观影响。人机协作复评不仅提升了标注一致性，也更接近‘真实’任务理解。今后构建鲁棒的基准测试时，应更广泛采用模型辅助复评机制。

Abstract: Hallucination remains a persistent challenge in Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly in context-grounded settings such as RAG and agentic AI systems. This study focuses on contextual hallucination detection in summarization tasks. We analyze the QAGS-C and SummEval datasets by comparing original benchmark annotations with reason and span-based predictions from Gemini 2.5 Flash and GPT-5 Mini. To address systematic divergences between human labels and LLM judgments, we re-evaluated all conflicted samples through a human adjudication process involving 2 cross-cultural adjudicators. Following this re-evaluation, triple agreement (between human, GPT, and Gemini) increased by 6.38% for QAGS-C and 7.62% for SummEval. Similarly, model accuracy improved, with GPT increasing by 4.25% on QAGS-C and 2.34% on SummEval, while Gemini showed gains of 8.51% and 3.80%, respectively. Notably, adjudicators frequently sided with the models' judgments over original human annotations when LLMs provided explicit reasoning. Overall human adjudicator agreement ranged between 83% and 87%. These findings suggest that for ambiguity-prone tasks, single-pass annotations may be insufficient, and model-assisted re-evaluation yields more reliable benchmarks.

</details>


### [334] [PYTHALAB-MERA: Validation-Grounded Memory, Retrieval, and Acceptance Control for Frozen-LLM Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08468)
*Mehmet Iscan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于本地 LLM 编码代理的外部控制器 PYTHALAB-MERA，能够通过执行反馈和记忆检索提高代码生成的验证成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于 LLM 的编码代理方法在多轮反馈、记忆复用和适应性检索等方面各有优势，但单独使用时不能全面满足智能编码场景对验证支撑、记忆管理和技能复用的需求。尤其在本地部署和严格校验环境下，现有方法难以有效提升编码正确性和通过率。

Method: 作者提出 PYTHALAB-MERA，实现为本地 CLI 工具。该方法用冻结语言模型生成完整源码，外部控制器则根据执行验证结果，自适应选择记忆和技能进行提示优化，采用 fail-fast 验证流水线，将结果转化为奖励信号，并通过 TD(lambda) 算法进行延迟奖励分配。

Result: 在强化学习编程任务、三次尝试机会和严格校验门槛的本地实验中，PYTHALAB-MERA 成功通过 8/9 项验证，显著优于自我精炼和 GRACE 扩展基线（均为 0/9 通过）。

Conclusion: 实验表明，外部记忆与检索控制器能在受控本地环境中有效提升代码验证的成功率，但未能证明其通用代码合成能力、最优性能或形式化程序正确性和安全性。

Abstract: Local LLM-based coding agents increasingly work in settings where correctness is earned through execution feedback, persistent state, and bounded repair, not through a single fluent answer. Static retrieval, long-context prompting, self-refinement, execution-feedback repair, and reinforcement learning over model weights each address part of this setting, but they do not jointly provide validation-grounded episodic memory, adaptive retrieval-action selection, delayed credit assignment, and structural skill reuse around a frozen local model. We introduce PYTHALAB-MERA, a lightweight external controller for local validation-conditioned code generation. The frozen language model proposes complete source files; the controller decides which memory records and AST-derived skills should enter the next prompt, validates each candidate through a fail-fast pipeline, converts validation outcomes into bounded shaped rewards, and propagates delayed credit through TD(lambda)-style eligibility traces. We evaluate the implementation as a local CLI artifact on reinforcement-learning coding tasks with strict validation gates. In the measured hard RL setting with three tasks, three repetitions, and a three-attempt budget, PYTHALAB-MERA passed 8/9 strict validations; the self-refinement baseline and the investigated GRACE extension each passed 0/9. These results support a deliberately bounded claim: in this recorded setting, the external memory-and-retrieval controller improved validation success. They do not establish general-purpose code synthesis, state-of-the-art performance, formal program correctness, or formal safety.

</details>


### [335] [A Computational Operationalisation of Competing Maturational Theories of Syntactic Development via Statistical Grammar Induction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08476)
*Mila Marcheva,Suchir Salhan,Weiwei Sun*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过统计语法归纳以计算方式检验儿童在母语习得中获得中间句法范畴的顺序，发现词汇及屈折结构先获得（GROWING理论）的预测优于先获得话语相关范畴（INWARD理论）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同成熟理论对儿童首先获得哪些中间句法范畴及其顺序有不同预测。澄清这一过程能帮助更好理解语言习得机制。

Method: 将GROWING（自下而上）和INWARD（向内）两种假设通过统计语法归纳进行计算操作化，控制输入和学习算法，比较两种顺序下可学习的结构。

Result: GROWING理论，即首先获得词汇和屈折结构的假说，在三个评价指标上均显著优于INWARD理论。

Conclusion: 结果支持儿童首先习得词汇与屈折结构，中间句法范畴习得顺序更符合GROWING理论的预测。

Abstract: This paper is concerned with what intermediate syntactic categories children acquire during first language development, and in what order. Maturational theories make different predictions. Bottom-up accounts (GROWING) propose that lexical and inflectional structure emerges first, while inward accounts (INWARD) predict early access to discourse-related categories. We computationally operationalise these hypotheses of staged syntactic emergence using statistical grammar induction, asking what each proposed ordering makes learnable when input and learning algorithm are held constant. Our framework makes category acquisition explicit and allows us to explore how different maturational orderings shape the structure that can be learned under identical conditions. Based on this operationalisation, the GROWING account significantly outperforms the INWARD account across three evaluation metrics.

</details>


### [336] [Do Agents Need to Plan Step-by-Step? Rethinking Planning Horizon in Data-Centric Tool Calling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08477)
*Naoki Otani,Nikita Bhutani,Hannah Kim,Dan Zhang,Estevam Hruschka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探讨了在大语言模型（LLM）智能体处理复杂数据型任务时，计划视野（planning horizon）对任务解决效率和准确性的影响。结果显示，对于结构良好的数据任务，采用全视野计划并按需重新规划比逐步计划模式更高效，且准确率相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为高效地完成复杂的数据型任务，LLM智能体需要调用外部工具并进行明确规划。目前主流的两种规划策略（全视野和逐步）各有优劣，尚不清楚在不同任务复杂性和工具健壮性下哪种策略更合适。本文旨在系统性地研究这一问题，优化LLM智能体的任务规划效果。

Method: 作者分别实验对比了全视野计划（FH）和单步计划（SH）模式，将其应用于知识库问答和多跳问答任务，并控制任务的拓扑复杂性和工具的鲁棒性。主要关注两种模式下的准确性表现与 token 消耗。

Result: 实验发现：全视野计划搭配懒惰重规划（即只在必要时重新规划）在不同复杂度、宽度和工具鲁棒性下,可以达到与逐步计划类似的准确率，但 token 消耗减少了2-3倍。

Conclusion: 对于结构清晰、规则明确的数据型任务，无需逐步监控，采用全视野计划并在必要时重新规划更为高效，可作为这类问题的默认策略。

Abstract: Explicit planning is a critical capability for LLM-based agents solving complex data-centric tasks, which require precise tool calling over external data sources. Existing strategies fall into two paradigms based on planning horizon: (1) full-horizon (FH), which generates a complete plan before execution, and (2) single-step horizon (SH), which interleaves each action (tool call) with incremental reasoning and observation. While step-by-step execution is a common default under the assumption that eager execution monitoring is necessary for adaptability, we revisit this assumption for well-defined data-centric tasks. Our controlled empirical study isolates planning horizon as the key architectural feature and systematically analyzes the effects of topological complexity and tool robustness on both paradigms. Our experiments across Knowledge Base Question Answering and Multi-hop QA show that FH planning with lazy replanning achieves accuracy parity with SH across varying depths, breadths, and robustness levels, while using 2-3x fewer tokens. These findings suggest that for well-defined data-centric tasks, eager step-wise monitoring is often unnecessary, and full-horizon planning with on-demand replanning can offer a more efficient default.

</details>


### [337] [NARRA-Gym for Evaluating Interactive Narrative Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08503)
*Yue Huang,Yuchen Ma,Jiayi Ye,Wenjie Wang,Zipeng Ling,Xingjian Hu,Yuexing Hao,Zichen Chen,Zhangchen Xu,Yunhong He,Zhengqing Yuan,Yujun Zhou,Kehan Guo,Chaoran Chen,Toby Jia-Jun Li,Stefan Feuerriegel,Xiangliang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了NARRA-Gym，一个用于评估大语言模型(LLM)交互式叙事能力的环境，并对当前主流LLM进行了系统性测试和评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM在交互式叙事任务上的能力评测存在局限，现有评估方法多集中于静态提示、独立故事生成或事后评价，难以全面反映模型在多轮交互下对故事构建、背景记忆、节奏把控、角色模拟及情感个性化等方面的综合表现。缺乏系统的基准，使得相关模型能力难以被有效衡量和比较。

Method: 作者开发了NARRA-Gym评测环境，将稀疏的情感种子转化为完整的交互式故事，同时记录模型在故事生成、记忆更新、规划、节奏干预及可选故事物品合成等各环节的全过程。随后，针对8个人设与9种先进LLM，采用受控的“LLM判官”自动打分方法以及真人参与的定制化输出评价，系统对模型进行了多维度比较。

Result: 不同模型、不同人设和不同评价维度下表现差异显著：一些模型即使能生成流畅的故事，却在健壮性、用户体验或适应用户偏好等方面存在短板。

Conclusion: 交互式叙事为评估LLM长时序、人适应能力提供了有价值的新基准，仅关注故事质量不足以反映模型在复杂互动情境下的整体能力，NARRA-Gym为行业提供了更全面的评测工具。

Abstract: Interactive narrative tasks require LLMs to sustain a coherent, evolving story while adapting to a user over multiple turns. However, suitable benchmarks for this setting are limited: existing evaluations often focus on static prompts, isolated story generations, or post-hoc ratings, and therefore miss whether models can jointly manage story generation, long-context state and pacing, character simulation, empathic personalization, and story-grounded artifacts. We introduce NARRA-Gym, an executable evaluation environment that turns a sparse emotional seed into a complete interactive story episode and logs the full model-in-the-loop trajectory, including story construction, memory updates, planning, pacing interventions, and optional artifact synthesis. We evaluate nine frontier LLMs using a controlled LLM-as-judge sweep over eight benchmark personas and a human evaluation in which participants rate customized model outputs. Our results show substantial variation across models, personas, and evaluation dimensions: models that produce fluent stories can still fail on robustness, user experience, or resistance-sensitive personalization. These findings suggest that interactive narrative offers a useful benchmark for evaluating long-horizon, user-adaptive LLM behavior beyond isolated story quality.

</details>


### [338] [A Single Layer to Explain Them All:Understanding Massive Activations in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08504)
*Zeru Shi,Zhenting Wang,Fan Yang,Qifan Wang,Ruixiang Tang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示了大语言模型中大规模激活现象的起源，发现了ME层，并提出了缓解该问题的方法，从而提升了模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在推理过程中出现大规模激活（massive activations），导致隐藏表示多样性降低，影响模型性能。作者希望探明这一现象的本质及成因，并提出有效的改进方法。

Method: 作者在多种模型族中系统研究，发现了一个特定层（ME Layer）内RMSNorm和FFN参数共同促成了massive activations。提出了一种简单方法，削弱大规模激活token的刚性，实现对attention sink的缓解。该方法可用于零训练和微调场景。

Result: 该方法在多项任务上（如指令遵循、数学推理）均提升了LLM性能，并减少了attention sink现象，增强了隐藏状态的多样性。

Conclusion: 揭示了massive activation起源，提出的方法有效缓解了该现象，提高了大模型的泛化与多任务性能，并为attention sink治理提供了新思路。

Abstract: We investigate the origins of massive activations in large language models (LLMs) and identify a specific layer named the \textbf{Massive Emergence Layer (ME Layer)}, that is consistently observed across model families, where massive activations first emerge and subsequently propagate to deeper layers through residual connections. We show that, within the ME Layer both the RMSNorm and the FFN parameters jointly contribute to the emergence of massive activations. Once formed, the massive activation token representation remains largely invariant across layers, reducing the diversity of hidden representations passed to the attention module. Motivated by this limitation, we propose a simple and effective method to reduce the rigidity of the massive activation token. Our approach consistently improves LLM performance across multiple tasks, including instruction following and math reasoning, in both training free and fine tuning settings. Moreover, we show that our method mitigates attention sinks by selectively weakening their influence, elucidating their origin at the hidden state level and shedding new light on principled mitigation strategies.

</details>


### [339] [A Single Neuron Is Sufficient to Bypass Safety Alignment in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08513)
*Hamid Kazemi,Atoosa Chegini,Maria Safi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文发现大语言模型的安全对齐主要依赖于少数关键神经元（拒绝神经元和概念神经元），而非分布式机制。对这些神经元进行操控就能显著改变模型的安全表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大模型的安全对齐普遍通过指令微调等方式实现，但对其底层机制了解较少。作者希望揭示模型安全对齐的具体实现方式，并评估其鲁棒性。

Method: 作者通过识别模型内部的关键神经元，分为拒绝神经元（负责拒绝输出有害内容）和概念神经元（编码有害知识）。分别对这些神经元进行抑制或激活操作，观察结果对模型输出安全性的影响。在不同规模和架构的七个模型上重复实验，且无需额外训练或复杂提示工程。

Result: 实验显示，在所有测试模型中，仅需操控极少数关键神经元即可绕过或触发安全对齐：抑制拒绝神经元可以让模型直接输出原本被禁止的信息，激活概念神经元可以诱导模型在无害提示下输出有害内容。表明安全对齐高度依赖于单点神经元而非分布式机制。

Conclusion: 模型安全对齐的实现方式存在脆弱性——依赖于少数关键神经元，缺乏分布式鲁棒性，易被简单操控绕过。这对安全对齐机制的未来设计和评估提出了新挑战。

Abstract: Safety alignment in language models operates through two mechanistically distinct systems: refusal neurons that gate whether harmful knowledge is expressed, and concept neurons that encode the harmful knowledge itself. By targeting a single neuron in each system, we demonstrate both directions of failure -- bypassing safety on explicit harmful requests via suppression, and inducing harmful content from innocent prompts via amplification -- across seven models spanning two families and 1.7B to 70B parameters, without any training or prompt engineering. Our findings suggest that safety alignment is not robustly distributed across model weights but is mediated by individual neurons that are each causally sufficient to gate refusal behavior -- suppressing any one of the identified refusal neurons bypasses safety alignment across diverse harmful requests.

</details>


### [340] [Coordinates of Capability: A Unified MTMM-Geometric Framework for LLM Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08522)
*Adib Sakhawat,Tahsin Islam,Takia Farhin,Syed Rifat Raiyan,Hasan Mahmud,Md Kamrul Hasan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文提出将LLM评估的多个指标统一在几何流形空间中，利用MTMM框架，用于提升评估的有效性和稳健性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM评估缺乏构念效度，分散的基准和即席指标常混淆方法差异与模型真实能力。最新研究已暗示LLM能力可用连续几何流形来表征，亟需将评估方法系统化，以更科学地区分模型实际能力和外在因素影响。

Method: 作者提出了一种通用的多特质多方法（MTMM）框架，将包括同义句不稳定性、漂移分数、Overton宽度和多元性分数在内的九种评估指标，统一解释为潜在共享坐标空间中的几何测度，并将模型行为分解为三个正交潜在维度：不稳定与敏感性，位置与对齐，覆盖与表达性。

Result: 该框架通过空间统一，有效分离与任务无关的扰动和模型真实能力范围，理论上为今后更健壮、具备经验稳定性的基准测试设计提供标准。

Conclusion: 论文所提几何化MTMM框架能科学分离不同维度的模型表现，提升LLM评估的系统性、有效性和跨领域适用性，为业界后续的评测标准奠定了基础。

Abstract: The evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) faces a critical challenge in construct validity, where fragmented benchmarks and ad hoc metrics frequently conflate method variance, such as prompt sensitivity, with true latent capabilities. Concurrently, emerging research suggests that LLM capabilities and outputs can be modeled as continuous geometric manifolds. In this Systematization of Knowledge (SoK), we bridge these paradigms by proposing a generalized Multi-Trait Multi-Method (MTMM) framework for LLM evaluation. We formalize and unify nine evaluation metrics, including Paraphrase Instability, Drift Score, Overton Width, and Pluralism Score, interpreting them not as isolated scalar values but as geometric measurements within a shared latent coordinate space. This spatial unification factorizes model behavior into three orthogonal latent dimensions: (1) Instability and Sensitivity, (2) Position and Alignment, and (3) Coverage and Expressiveness. By systematically separating task-irrelevant perturbations from true capability spans, the framework provides a theoretically grounded and domain-agnostic taxonomy for robust and empirically stable benchmark design.

</details>


### [341] [Source or It Didn't Happen: A Multi-Agent Framework for Citation Hallucination Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08583)
*Mingzhe Li,Zhiqiang Lin,Shiqing Ma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出并实现了CiteTracer，一个基于多智能体、按字段细粒度判断文献真实性的检测系统，有效识别大语言模型生成文本中的伪造引用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型广泛应用于学术写作，伪造但貌似真实的引用（citation hallucination）问题严重，现有检测方法往往只判断引用能否被找到，判断粗糙且易受解析错误影响，对审核人员帮助有限。作者希望更细致、可靠地检测引用的真实性。

Method: 作者提出12个分类的引用真实性细分体系，并据此开发CiteTracer：该系统能从PDF、BibTeX中结构化提取引用，分层检索与验证，包括缓存查找、URL获取、学术搜索和网页检索，通过字段级比对，再将疑难案例交由专门子模块处理。

Result: 作者构建了包含2450个人工合成引用和957条真实伪造引用的基准测试集。CiteTracer在合成数据集上准确率达97.1%，在真实伪造引用中检测准确率达97.1%，F1得分分别为Real:97.0、Potential:95.8、Hallucinated:98.5。

Conclusion: CiteTracer能高效准确地检测并分类大模型生成文本中的引用真伪，显著提升了引用审核的可信度和细致度，对学术自动化审查有实际价值。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in scientific writing, yet they can fabricate citation-shaped references that appear plausible but fail bibliographic verification. Existing detectors often reduce verification to binary found/not-found decisions and rely on brittle parsing or incomplete retrieval, offering little field-level signal to auditors. We reframe citation hallucination detection as taxonomy-aligned field-level adjudication and introduce a 12-code taxonomy spanning Real, Potential, and Hallucinated citations. Based on this taxonomy, we build CiteTracer, a cascading multi-agent detector that extracts structured citations from PDF and BibTeX, retrieves evidence through cache lookup, URL fetch, scholar connectors, and web search, applies deterministic field matching, and routes ambiguous cases to class-specialist judgers. We release a benchmark of 2,450 synthetic citations built from real seeds with controlled LLM mutations, paired with 957 real-world fabricated citations drawn from ICLR 2026 and an anonymous conference desk-rejected submissions. CiteTracer reaches 97.1% accuracy on the synthetic benchmark, with class-level F1 scores of 97.0, 95.8, and 98.5 for Real, Potential, and Hallucinated, respectively, and detects 97.1% of fabrications on the real-world set without abstaining. Code: https://github.com/aaFrostnova/CiteTracer.

</details>


### [342] [100,000+ Movie Reviews from Kazakhstan: Russian, Kazakh, and Code-Switched Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08600)
*Rustem Yeshpanov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文发布了一个包含10万余条哈萨克斯坦电影评论的大型多语言语料库，并在情感分析任务上评测了多种模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前哈萨克斯坦电影评论数据稀缺，尤其缺少多语言和情感标注的数据集，限制了相关NLP研究。

Method: 作者从kino.kz采集了近24年、10万余条电影评论，包含俄语、哈萨克语及混合语，手工标注了语言和情感极性，以及部分评分。设置了三分类情感和五分类评分两项任务，用BoW/TF-IDF与多语Transformer模型进行了对比实验。

Result: 实验显示，Transformer模型（如mBERT、XLM-RoBERTa、RemBERT）在情感三分类任务上显著优于传统基线。但在评分五分类任务中，由于类别不平衡及评分间细微差别，模型表现较差。

Conclusion: 该语料库为哈萨克斯坦及多语言情感分析研究提供了重要资源。多语Transformer对情感极性分类效果良好，但评分分类仍具挑战。

Abstract: We present a new publicly available corpus of 100,502 movie reviews from Kazakhstan collected from kino.kz, spanning 2001-2025 and covering 4,943 unique titles. The dataset is multilingual, consisting mainly of Russian reviews alongside Kazakh and code-switched texts. Reviews are manually annotated for language and sentiment polarity, and 11,309 reviews additionally contain explicit user-provided ratings. We define two sentiment tasks -- three-way polarity classification and five-class score classification -- and benchmark classical BoW/TF-IDF baselines against multilingual transformer models (mBERT, XLM-RoBERTa, RemBERT). Experimental results show that transformer models consistently outperform classical baselines on polarity classification, while score classification remains challenging under leakage-controlled evaluation due to severe class imbalance and subtle distinctions between adjacent rating levels.

</details>


### [343] [PARD-2: Target-Aligned Parallel Draft Model for Dual-Mode Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08632)
*Zihao An,Taichi Liu,Ziqiong Liu,Dong Li,Ruofeng Liu,Emad Barsoum*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PARD-2是一种新的双模式推测解码框架，通过适应性加权优化提高推测草稿模型的token被主模型连续接受的长度，从而显著加速LLM推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前推测解码通常通过草稿模型加速LLM推理，但现有草稿模型的训练目标与实际推理时“最大化连续token接受数”的目标不一致。改进草稿模型的优化目标，有望提高加速效果。

Method: 基于PARD框架，提出了PARD-2，包含Confidence-Adaptive Token (CAT)优化方法，可自适应地对每个token加权，使训练目标转为最大化整体接受长度。PARD-2还能支持目标相关和目标无关两种解码模式，且只需单一草稿模型。

Result: 在多种模型和任务上，PARD-2实现了最高6.94倍的无损加速，在Llama3.1-8B模型上，比EAGLE-3快1.9倍，比PARD快1.3倍，展现出更优的加速能力。

Conclusion: PARD-2通过更合理的训练目标和CAT优化，有效提升了推测解码效率，为大模型推理加速提供了新的思路。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Models (LLMs) inference by using a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens that are verified in parallel by the target model. However, existing draft model training objectives are not directly aligned with the inference-time goal of maximizing consecutive token acceptance. To address this issue, we reformulate the draft model optimization objective, shifting the focus from token prediction accuracy to the overall acceptance length. In this paper, we build upon PARD to propose PARD-2, a dual-mode speculative decoding framework with Confidence-Adaptive Token (CAT) optimization. This approach adaptively reweights each token to better align with the verification process. Notably, PARD-2 enables a single draft model to support both target-dependent and target-independent modes. Experiments across diverse models and tasks demonstrate that PARD-2 achieves up to 6.94$\times$ lossless acceleration, surpassing EAGLE-3 by 1.9$\times$ and PARD by 1.3$\times$ on Llama3.1-8B. Our code is available at https://github.com/AMD-AGI/PARD.

</details>


### [344] [AgentCollabBench: Diagnosing When Good Agents Make Bad Collaborators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08647)
*Aritra Mazumder,Shubhashis Roy Dipta,Nusrat Jahan Lia,Tanzila Khan,Kainat Raisa Hossain,Nehaa Shri,Shubhrangshu Debsarkar,Humayra Tasnim,Gour Gupal Talukder Shawon,Debjoty Mitra,Sumaiya Ahmed Rani,Al Jami Islam Anik,Al Nafeu Khan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了AgentCollabBench诊断基准，专注于多智能体系统中隐藏行为风险的可测性，揭示了现有LLM多智能体协作过程中结构性漏洞及各模型的独特脆弱性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统虽然通过协作获得最佳表现，但单靠结果评估无法发现多跳链路中的约束丢失、错误传播等过程性失效，存在部署前不可见的风险，因此需开发诊断工具对关键行为漏洞进行量化。

Method: 设计了AgentCollabBench基准，包含900个人工验证任务，覆盖软件工程、DevOps和数据工程，针对指令衰减、错误信念传播、上下文泄漏、追踪数据持久性四大风险，评测了四种主流LLM多智能体协作表现，并分析了通信结构对信息传播与失效的影响。

Result: 不同大模型在不同风险上表现各异：Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B在追踪持久性和指令稳定性上最好，GPT 4.1 mini在抵御错误与防止信息泄漏上最优。通信拓扑对信息存活影响极大，特别是合并DAG节点存有独特“合成瓶颈”，导致部分分支信息易被舍弃，线性链无此问题。

Conclusion: 多智能体系统中，结构性设计比单独提升模型能力更关键，不良的拓扑可消除所有智能体的安全保障，系统可靠性需从体系结构层面保障。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems achieve state-of-the-art outcomes through peer collaboration. However, when an agent in the pipeline silently drops a constraint, the system's final output may look correct even though the reasoning chain was quietly corrupted, and existing outcome-based evaluations are blind to such multi-hop process failures. To make these vulnerabilities measurable before deployment, we introduce AgentCollabBench, a diagnostic benchmark of 900 human-validated tasks spanning software engineering, DevOps, and data engineering. Each task isolates one of four behavioral risks: instruction decay (does a constraint survive peer pressure?), false-belief contagion (does a falsehood spread through consensus?), context leakage (does information bleed between tasks?), and tracer durability (does marked data reach the final agent?). Evaluating four modern LLMs (GPT 4.1 mini, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite, Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, and Llama 3.1 8B Instruct), we expose model-specific vulnerability profiles invisible to outcome-only evaluation; Qwen-3.5-35B-A3B, for example, leads on tracer durability and instruction stability, while GPT 4.1 mini leads on leakage containment and false-belief resistance. Beyond per-model differences, communication topology emerges as a primary risk factor that explains 7-40% of the variance in multi-hop information survival. The effect traces to a synthesis bottleneck specific to converging-DAG nodes: an agent weighing competing parent inputs discards constraints carried by a minority branch, a bottleneck structurally absent from linear chains. AgentCollabBench demonstrates that suboptimal topology can silently erase the safeguards of highly capable models, arguing that multi-agent reliability is fundamentally a structural problem and that scaling model intelligence alone is no substitute for architecture.

</details>


### [345] [Explanation Fairness in Large Language Models: An Empirical Analysis of Disparities in How LLMs Justify Decisions Across Demographic Groups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08671)
*Gautam Veldanda*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了解释公平性分类法（EFT），用于系统评估大型语言模型（LLMs）为不同群体生成解释时的公平性，发现不同模型和场景存在显著不平等，并提供了度量和缓解工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然AI决策公平性已被广泛研究，但AI生成解释的公平性——即模型给不同群体生成解释时在质量、深度、语气和语言复杂性上的一致性——鲜有深入探讨。本研究旨在填补这一研究空白。

Method: 提出解释公平性分类法（EFT），涵盖五个可操作维度，并设计八项测量指标。对5种主流LLM在招聘、医疗、信贷和司法4个决策领域，通过80种提示模板和多达400个样本对进行严格对比评测。引入了两种新指标（HDS和EFP）用于解释中的犹豫表达和决策相关度的自动化评价。

Result: 所有EFT指标在对比样本中均检出统计显著的解释公平性差异（Cohen's d从小到大，p_BH均极低）。不同模型的差异幅度不同，如Qwen3 32B在语言冗余性上比LLaMA 3.3 70B高5.9倍。通过提示工程可在一定程度上降低决策相关解释差异（78-95%），但对风格性指标无显著效果。

Conclusion: LLM生成解释在不同群体间存在普遍且显著的不公平性，且这种不平等主要源于预训练阶段，难以通过部署环节单纯修正。研究为评估和监管AI解释公平性提供了实用框架和工具，对实际部署和AI法规制定具有指导意义。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed not only to make decisions but to explain them. While AI decision fairness has been studied extensively, the fairness of AI explanations (whether LLMs justify decisions with equal quality, depth, tone, and linguistic sophistication across demographic groups) has received little attention. This paper introduces the Explanation Fairness Taxonomy (EFT), a framework comprising five formally defined, operationalizable dimensions: Verbosity Disparity, Sentiment Disparity, Epistemic Hedging Disparity, Decision-Linked Explanation Disparity, and Lexical Complexity Disparity. The taxonomy is instantiated in a controlled empirical study across 80 prompt templates, four consequential decision domains (hiring, medical triage, credit assessment, legal judgment), and five LLMs: GPT-4.1, Claude Sonnet, LLaMA 3.3 70B, GPT-OSS 120B, and Qwen3 32B. Two novel black-box metrics are introduced: the Hedging Density Score (HDS) and the Explanation Faithfulness Proxy (EFP), a heuristic indicator of decision-linked explanation variation. Across up to 400 prompt pairs, all eight EFT metrics show statistically significant disparities (Cohen's d ranging from small to large, all p_BH < 10^(-62)). Model choice is strongly associated with disparity magnitude: Qwen3 32B exhibits verbosity disparities 5.9x larger than LLaMA 3.3 70B. Two prompting-based mitigations show significant reductions in EFP disparity (78-95%) but no significant effect on stylistic dimensions, consistent with the hypothesis that stylistic explanation inequalities are encoded in pre-training distributions and are not resolvable through deployment-level instruction alone. A reproducible measurement framework is offered for explanation-level fairness auditing, with implications for AI regulation and deployment practice.

</details>


### [346] [Structured Recurrent Mixers for Massively Parallelized Sequence Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08696)
*Benjamin L. Badger*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新语言建模架构：Structured Recurrent Mixer（SRM），能够在训练时并行、推理时递归地处理序列，显著提升训练效率及推理吞吐量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前主流语言模型已从递归神经网络架构转向并行处理的非递归模型，虽然训练更高效，但推理时吞吐量下降。团队希望结合二者优点，解决大序列、高效率推理的难题。

Method: SRM架构在训练时采用并行序列表征，推理时转换为递归表征，无需特殊硬件或内存管理。实验对比多个线性复杂度模型，SRM在效率、容量、吞吐量上表现更优。

Result: SRM在Mojo/MAX上的推理吞吐量达到Transformer（vLLM）的12倍，并发能力提升170倍；PyTorch下GSM8k性能提升30%。同时，SRM也适用于强化学习训练。

Conclusion: SRM兼具高效并行训练与递归推理的优势，适合信息密集输入和高效推理场景，是具备广泛应用前景的新型语言模型架构。

Abstract: Over the last two decades, language modeling has experienced a shift from predominantly recurrent architectures that process tokens sequentially during training and inference to non-recurrent models that process sequence elements in parallel during training, which results in greater training efficiency and stability at the expense of lower inference throughput. Here we introduce the Structured Recurrent Mixer, an architecture that allows for algebraic conversion between a sequence parallel representation at train time and a recurrent representation at inference, notably without the need for specialized kernels or device-specific memory management. We show experimentally that this dual representation allows for greater training efficiency, higher input information capacity, and larger inference throughput and concurrency when compared to other linear complexity models. We postulate that recurrent models are poorly suited to extended sequence length scaling for information-rich inputs typical of language, but are well suited to scaling in the sample (batch) dimension due to their constant memory per sample. We provide Mojo/MAX inference implementations of SRMs exhibiting 12x the throughput and 170x the concurrency of similarly powerful Transformers inferenced on vLLM, increases characteristic of Pytorch implementations resulting in a 30\% increase in compute-constant GSM8k Pass@k. We conclude by demonstrating that SRMs are effective reinforcement learning training candidates.

</details>


### [347] [AgentForesight: Online Auditing for Early Failure Prediction in Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08715)
*Boxuan Zhang,Jianing Zhu,Zeru Shi,Dongfang Liu,Ruixiang Tang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了AgentForesight框架，实现了对多智能体系统执行长时序任务过程中的关键错误进行在线检测与实时干预，有效降低因单一错误导致整个任务失败的风险。提出的AgentForesight-7B模型在多个公开基准上超越了GPT-4.1等主流模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大模型多智能体系统在执行长时序任务时，常因单步致命错误未被及时发现，导致后续代理全盘接受并失败。以往工作仅能在任务结束后追溯归因，无法实现及时干预，因此需要在线实时审计机制提升系统可靠性。

Method: 作者提出AgentForesight框架，将问题转换为在线审计，每步仅基于已知前缀判断是否报警。为此构建AFTraj-2K数据集，严格标注安全与失误点，并设计AgentForesight-7B审计模型，利用分阶段强化学习，结合三维奖励（what、where、who）训练，精细定位出错步骤。

Result: 在AFTraj-2K及Who&When外部基准上，AgentForesight-7B在出错步骤定位上精度显著提升，step定位错误率降低至原来的约1/3，整体性能优于GPT-4.1、DeepSeek-V4-Pro等主流商业模型，最高提升达19.9%。

Conclusion: AgentForesight实现了LLM多智能体系统失误的实时在线审计和干预，将失误检测从事后归因推进到部署时防控，为增强实际部署中的鲁棒性和安全性，提供了有效工具。

Abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems are increasingly deployed on long-horizon tasks, but a single decisive error is often accepted by downstream agents and cascades into trajectory-level failure. Existing work frames this as \emph{post-hoc failure attribution}, diagnosing the responsible agent and step after the trajectory has ended. However, this paradigm forfeits any opportunity to intervene while trajectory is still unfolding. In this work, we introduce AgentForesight, a framework that reframes this problem as online auditing: at each step of an unfolding trajectory, an auditor observes only the current prefix and must either continue the run or alarm at the earliest decisive error, without access to future steps. To this end, we curate AFTraj-2K, a corpus of agentic trajectories across Coding, Math, and Agentic domains, in which safe trajectories are retained under a strict curation pipeline and unsafe trajectories are annotated at the step of their decisive error via consensus among multiple LLM judges. Built on that, we develop AgentForesight-7B, a compact online auditor trained with a coarse-to-fine reinforcement learning recipe that first equips it with a risk-anticipation prior at the failure boundary on adjacent safe/unsafe prefix pairs, then sharpens this prior into precise step-level localization under a three-axis reward jointly targeting the what, where, and who of an audit verdict. Across AFTraj-2K and an external Who\&When benchmark, AgentForesight-7B outperforms leading proprietary models, including GPT-4.1 and DeepSeek-V4-Pro, achieving up to +19.9% performance gain and 3$\times$ lower step localization error, opening the loop from post-hoc failures detection to enabling deployment-time intervention. Project page: https://zbox1005.github.io/agent-foresight/

</details>


### [348] [Narrative Landscape: Mapping Narrative Dispositions Across LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08742)
*Donghoon Jung,Jiwoo Choi,Songeun Chae,Seohyon Jung*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种量化大语言模型（LLM）倾向性的新框架，通过结构化叙述任务对比分析六个前沿模型，实现对输出“稳定性”和“多样性”的衡量，并可视化各模型在选择任务中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM模型评测多注重性能分数，但缺乏系统方法来揭示模型在多次、不同情境下生成内容中的稳定倾向（如偏好或发散性等）。因此需要一种方法准确描述和比较不同模型的输出特性。

Method: 研究者设计了一项结构化叙述选项选择任务，在六个前沿大模型和三种指令类型下重复进行。用Jaccard相似度衡量每个模型的输出一致性（consistency），用逆Simpson指数衡量选择的多样性（diversity）。同时，借助PCA技术开发了Narrative Landscape可视化，将模型选择偏好映射到同一空间，以观测和比较差异。

Result: 实验结果发现，不同模型家族在稳定性-探索性之间存在明显差异谱系；指令类型变化会显著影响输出选择空间的结构，即使单一分数指标看似相近，实际选择行为却有本质区别。

Conclusion: 本文证明了所提框架能够揭示LLM模型在表面分数之外潜在的输出偏好与结构差异，为更全面评估和选择模型提供了新思路。

Abstract: This study proposes a quantitative framework for profiling LLM dispositions as stable, model-specific regularities in output under repeated, controlled elicitation. Using a structured narrative constraint-selection task administered across six frontier models and three instruction types, we operationalize disposition through two dimensions: "consistency", measured as cross-replication selection overlap via Jaccard similarity, and "diversity", measured as dispersion across options via the inverse Simpson index. We further introduce Narrative Landscape, a PCA-based visualization that maps each model's selection profile into a shared space for direct comparison. Results reveal a clear rigidity-exploration spectrum across model families and show that instruction types shift the geometry of selection spaces even when scalar metrics appear similar, indicating that comparable scores can mask qualitatively distinct selection topologies.

</details>


### [349] [SimReg: Achieving Higher Performance in the Pretraining via Embedding Similarity Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08809)
*Yan Sun,Guoxia Wang,Jinle Zeng,JiaBin Yang,Shuai Li,Li Shen,Dacheng Tao,DianHai Yu,Haifeng Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于LLM预训练的新型相似度正则化损失SimReg，提升了预训练收敛速度和下游表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LLM的token嵌入表示存在同类内部差异大、异类相似度高的问题，影响了表征学习效率，而针对大规模预训练阶段的相似度正则化研究较少。

Method: 提出了SimReg损失：通过contrastive loss机制，让同一标签的token表示更相似，不同标签的token更区分；进一步分析多分类边界的改变。

Result: 在稠密和MoE架构上验证，SimReg使训练收敛加速超30%，下游零样本任务表现提高超1%；并进行了详细的消融和超参数分析。

Conclusion: SimReg提升了LLM预训练效率和泛化能力，并为后续超参数设置和损失选择提供了实践参考。

Abstract: Pretraining large language models (LLMs) with next-token prediction has led to remarkable advances, yet the context-dependent nature of token embeddings in such models results in high intra-class variance and inter-class similarity, thus hindering the efficiency of representation learning. While similarity-based regularization has demonstrated benefit in supervised fine-tuning and classification tasks, its application and efficacy in large-scale LLM pretraining remains underexplored. In this work, we propose the SimReg, an embedding similarity regularization loss that explicitly encourages token representations with the same ground-truth label within each sequence to be more similar, while enforcing separation from different-label tokens via a contrastive loss. Our analysis reveals that this mechanism introduces gains by enlarging multi-classification margins, thereby enabling more efficient classification. Extensive experiments across dense and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures demonstrate that SimReg consistently accelerates training convergence by over 30% and improves average zero-shot downstream performance by over 1% across standard benchmarks. Further ablation studies and analyses offer practical insights into hyperparameter tuning and loss effectiveness.

</details>


### [350] [The Grounding Gap: How LLMs Anchor the Meaning of Abstract Concepts Differently from Humans](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08837)
*Odysseas S. Chlapanis,Orfeas Menis Mastromichalakis,Christos H. Papadimitriou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究发现当前大型语言模型在理解抽象概念（如正义、理论、可得性）时，与人类相比，过度依赖词语联想，难以像人类一样体现情感和内在状态，人与模型的响应存在显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类对抽象概念的理解基于丰富的经验、情感和社会语境，但尚不清楚大语言模型是否具备类似的认知基础。论文旨在评估和理解LLM对抽象概念的“落地”方式及其与人类的异同。

Method: 通过复现认知科学中的属性生成实验，对21个主流开源/商用大语言模型进行测试，并基于人类实验结果对比模型表现；同时，复现概念归因的评价实验，进一步用稀疏自编码器分析模型内部的语义表示是否包含现实世界的“落地维度”。

Result: 与人类相比，所有语言模型对情感、内在状态相关属性的生成严重不足，更倾向于表面词汇联想，模型与人类的相关系数最高仅为0.37；在直接询问具体现实属性时，模型与人类评价趋同，且随模型规模提升而改进。内部特征分析显示LLM部分编码了如感官-运动、社会等“落地维度”。

Conclusion: 当前LLMs可以在明确任务指引下部分恢复抽象概念的真实“落地维度”，但在自由生成文本时未能像人类那样自然调动这些基础维度，表明模型与人类在抽象概念处理上存在本质差异。

Abstract: Abstract concepts - justice, theory, availability - have no single perceivable referent; in the human brain, their meaning emerges from a web of experiences, affect, and social context. Do large language models (LLMs) ground abstract concepts in a similar way? We study this by replicating property-generation experiments from cognitive science on 21 frontier and open-weight LLMs. Across models and experiments, we find a consistent pattern: when compared to humans, models rely too heavily on word associations, and underproduce properties tied to emotion and internal states. This yields a large and consistent grounding gap: no model exceeds a Pearson correlation r=0.37 with human responses, compared to a human-to-human ceiling above r=0.9. To better interpret this gap, we also replicate a rating experiment on grounding categories and find that here LLMs align more closely with human judgment, and alignment improves as models get larger. We then use sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to inspect whether this information is also reflected in the models' internal features, and we do identify features connected to grounding dimensions such as "sensorimotor" and "social". These findings suggest that current LLMs can recover grounding dimensions when explicitly queried, but do not recruit them in a human-like way when words are generated freely.

</details>


### [351] [Generating Leakage-Free Benchmarks for Robust RAG Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08838)
*Jiayi Liu,Jiaxing Zhang,Bowen Jin,Jennifer Neville*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RAG在评估中存在“知识泄漏”问题，SeedRG提出新方法生成能有效评估RAG能力的测试集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG评测数据集很多问题可以被大模型直接回答，导致评估不可靠，并且随着时间推移和数据重复使用，这一问题加剧。

Method: 提出SeedRG方法，从现有数据集中抽取推理图，通过类型约束的实体替换生成新数据，同时通过推理一致性和知识泄漏检测双重验证，保证新样本结构新颖且需检索知识解答。

Result: 生成的新测试集在结构相似性及推理模式保持的同时，显著减少被大模型直接记忆和回答的概率。

Conclusion: SeedRG有效缓解了知识泄漏和基准老化问题，为RAG模型评测提供了更可靠的测试数据。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is widely used to augment large language models (LLMs) with external knowledge. However, many benchmark datasets, designed to test RAG performance, comprise many questions that can already be answered from an LLM's parametric memory. This leads to unreliable evaluation. We refer to this phenomenon as knowledge leakage: cases where RAG tasks are solvable without retrieval. This issue worsens over time due to benchmark aging. As benchmarks are reused for training, their contents are increasingly absorbed into model parameters, making them less effective for evaluating retrieval.
  We introduce SeedRG, a semi-synthetic benchmark generation pipeline that mitigates knowledge leakage and addresses the issue of benchmark aging. Starting from a seed benchmark dataset, SeedRG extracts a reasoning graph from question-context pairs to capture their underlying reasoning structure, and then generates new examples via type-constrained entity replacement. This process produces structurally similar but novel instances that are unlikely to exist in the model's parametric knowledge, while preserving the original reasoning patterns. To ensure quality, we incorporate two verification steps: (1) a reasoning-graph consistency check to maintain task difficulty, and (2) a knowledge-leakage filter to exclude instances answerable without retrieval.

</details>


### [352] [Architecture, Not Scale: Circuit Localization in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08853)
*Sohan Venkatesh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现，在模型可解释性分析中，注意力机制的架构比参数规模对电路可解释性影响更大。某些架构选择可以让大模型同样具有较好的可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有观点认为，随着模型规模增大，神经网络的机制可解释性变得更难。作者质疑这一假设，探究是否有其它因素（如注意力架构）对可解释性影响更大。

Method: 作者比较了不同注意力机制（ grouped query attention 与 standard multi-head attention ）下，三种关键电路类型（如归纳头、间接宾语识别、事实回忆）在 Pythia 和 Qwen2.5 两个系列模型中的表现分析，并观察在同一架构族内模型随规模扩展的变化。

Result: 实验发现 grouped query attention 机制下的可解释性电路更加集中和稳定；在 Qwen2.5 架构中，随规模增加，事实回忆电路在一个临界点后发生离散转变，变为单一瓶颈结构，不再是逐步变差。

Conclusion: 不同注意力架构对模型可解释性影响显著，通过合理架构选择，大模型同样能够便于分析。因此模型规模并不是可解释性难度的唯一决定因素。

Abstract: Mechanistic interpretability assumes that circuit analysis becomes harder as models scale. We challenge this assumption by showing that the attention architecture matters more than parameter count. Studying three circuit types across Pythia and Qwen2.5, we find that grouped query attention produces circuits that are far more concentrated and mechanistically stable than standard multi-head attention at comparable scales. The same concentration pattern holds across indirect object identification, induction heads, and factual recall. Within a single architecture family (Qwen2.5), factual recall circuits undergo a discrete phase transition above a critical scale, collapsing to a single bottleneck rather than degrading gradually. These findings suggest that some architectural choices make large models more tractable to study and that interpretability difficulty is not a fixed consequence of model size.

</details>


### [353] [Max-pooling Network Revisited: Analyzing the Role of Semantic Probability in Multiple Instance Learning for Hallucination Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08863)
*Shota Fujikawa,Issei Sato*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种高效的语言模型幻觉检测方法，用于减少现有SOTA方法的计算开销，同时保持优异检测表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SOTA幻觉检测方法（如HaMI）虽然性能优越，但因多次采样和高昂的语义一致性计算，导致推理效率低下；需要寻找更高效但效果不弱的方法。

Method: 作者对HaMI进行理论分析，认为语义一致性与内部状态共同扩大了决策边界。基于该理解，作者借鉴传统句子分类方法，利用最大池化（max pooling）汇聚token特征，并通过轻量MLP估算句子分数，不再进行语义一致性计算，显著提升推理速度。

Result: 新方法无需语义一致性计算，推理效率大幅提升，并且在准确率等核心指标上与SOTA方法相当。

Conclusion: 该方法兼顾效率与性能，为实际大模型幻觉检测部署提供了实用性更强的新路径。

Abstract: Hallucination detection has become increasingly important for improving the reliability of large language models (LLMs). Recently, hybrid approaches such as HaMI, which combine semantic consistency with internal model states via Multiple Instance Learning (MIL), have achieved state-of-the-art performance. However, these methods incur substantial computational overhead due to repeated sampling and costly semantic similarity computations. In this work, we first provide a theoretical analysis of HaMI in terms of decision margins, revealing that scaling internal states with semantic consistency leads to an enlarged decision margin. Motivated by this insight, we revisit classical sentence classification models from a margin enlargement perspective, aggregating token-level features via max pooling and directly estimating sentence scores using a lightweight MLP. Without requiring semantic consistency computations, our approach achieves substantial efficiency improvements while maintaining competitive performance with state-of-the-art baselines through adaptive aggregation of internal feature representations.

</details>


### [354] [DocScope: Benchmarking Verifiable Reasoning for Trustworthy Long-Document Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08888)
*Xiang Feng,Jiawei Zhou,Zhangfeng Huang,Kewei Wang,Shanshan Ye,Jinxin Hu,Zulong Chen,Yong Luo,Jing Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DocScope是一个新的用于评测多模态大模型在长文本、富含视觉信息文档中进行可验证推理能力的基准，超越单纯的答案准确率。它系统化分解推理流程，并评测多个阶段，揭示当前模型推理链完整性较低，证据聚合和区域定位能力仍是主要瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态大模型在处理包含丰富视觉元素的长文档时，仅评测最终答案的准确性难以全面反映其推理流程的可靠性和可验证性，需要更细致的结构化评测方法。

Method: 提出DocScope基准，将长文档问答任务分解为四个推理阶段（页面定位、区域定位、事实抽取、答案验证），并分别进行独立评测，所有评判标准均通过人类标注和一致性校准。共包含1124个问题、273个文档的人类标注数据，测评了18种主流大模型和若干行业系统。

Result: 实验表明，模型即使给出正确答案，其推理链条完整率依然很低，最多仅为29%；尤其在证据区域定位能力表现最差。主要难点在于跨多个文档区域聚合离散证据，关键瓶颈为视觉感知和事实抽取能力。激活参数数量比模型整体规模对推理能力影响更大。

Conclusion: 仅以答案准确性评测多模态大模型是不充分的。DocScope展示了现有模型在结构化推理的多环节上仍有显著不足，为今后的模型设计和评估提供了新方向。

Abstract: Evaluating whether Multimodal Large Language Models can produce trustworthy, verifiable reasoning over long, visually rich documents requires evaluation beyond end-to-end answer accuracy. We introduce DocScope, a benchmark that formulates long-document QA as a structured reasoning trajectory prediction problem: given a complete PDF document and a question, the model outputs evidence pages, supporting evidence regions, relevant factual statements, and a final answer. We design a four-stage evaluation protocol -- Page Localization, Region Grounding, Fact Extraction, and Answer Verification -- that audits each level of the trajectory independently through inter-stage decoupling, with all judges selected and calibrated via human alignment studies. DocScope comprises 1,124 questions derived from 273 documents, with all hierarchical evidence annotations completed by human annotators. We benchmark 6 proprietary models, 12 open-weight models, and several domain-specific systems. Our experiments reveal that answer accuracy cannot substitute for trajectory-level evaluation: even among correct answers, the highest observed rate of complete evidence chains is only 29\%. Across all models, region grounding remains the weakest trajectory stage. Furthermore, the primary difficulty stems from aggregating evidence dispersed across long distances and multiple document clusters, while an oracle study identifies faithful perception and fact extraction as the dominant capability bottleneck. Cross-architecture comparisons further suggest that activated parameter count matters more than total scale. The benchmark and code will be publicly released at https://github.com/MiliLab/DocScope.

</details>


### [355] [Fitting Is Not Enough: Smoothness in Extremely Quantized LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08894)
*Yuzhuang Xu,Xu Han,Yuxuan Li,Pengzhan Li,Wanxiang Che*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文关注极低比特量化对大语言模型（LLM）性能的影响，发现除数值精度损失外，模型预测的“平滑性”也显著下降，提出平滑性保护原则可进一步提升生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型虽性能强大，但部署成本高昂，因此业界发展极低比特量化技术来降低成本。但现有方法仅聚焦于减少数值精度损失，忽视了其他潜在性能劣化来源。本文旨在揭示极低比特量化过程中的新问题，并探索其背后机制。

Method: 作者首先通过引入平滑性代理指标，量化模型在极端量化下的平滑性退化现象，并基于序列邻域建模分析量化后模型预测空间的稀疏化。为验证平滑性的重要性，分别在训练后量化（PTQ）及量化感知训练（QAT）两种策略下，设计并引入了平滑性保护原则进行实验。

Result: 实验证明，极端量化后，模型输出的有效token备选数量大幅减少，导致生成的解空间稀疏且质量下降。采用平滑性保护后，无论PTQ还是QAT均可在相同精度下进一步提升生成质量，效果超越单纯优化数值精度的方法。

Conclusion: 极低比特量化除带来数值精度损失外，还显著影响模型输出平滑性。保护模型输出的平滑性，对于未来设计极端量化算法具有重要指导意义，从而可在低成本部署条件下提升模型生成性能。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance but incur high deployment costs, motivating extremely low-bit but lossy quantization. Existing quantization algorithms mainly focus on improving the numerical accuracy of forward computation to eliminate performance degradation. In this paper, we show that extremely quantized LLMs suffer from systematic smoothness degradation beyond numerical precision loss. Through a smoothness proxy, we observe that such degradation becomes increasingly severe as the quantization bit-width decreases. Furthermore, based on sequence neighborhood modeling, we find that quantized models exhibit a rapid reduction of effective token candidates within the prediction neighborhood, which directly leads to a sparser decoding tree and degraded generation quality. To validate it, we introduce a simple smoothness-preserving principle in both post-training quantization and quantization-aware training, and demonstrate that preserving smoothness brings additional gains beyond numerical accuracy. The core goal of this paper is to highlight smoothness preservation as an important design consideration for future extreme quantization methods. Code is available at https://github.com/xuyuzhuang11/FINE.

</details>


### [356] [FragileFlow: Spectral Control of Correct-but-Fragile Predictions for Foundation Model Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08896)
*Zhuoyun Li,Boxuan Wang,Jinwei Hu,Xiaowei Huang,Yi Dong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种能揭示大模型在正确预测下潜在脆弱性的分析方法，并提出FragileFlow正则器显著提高了鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统评估方法如平均准确率可能掩盖大模型在干扰下正确但脆弱的系统性失误，需更细致的鲁棒性指标和改进模型方法。

Method: 定义了“margin-aware error flow”现象，提出FragileFlow插件型正则器，对模型每类输出进行概率分布分析，通过校准的margin buffer识别表面正确但脆弱的预测，并构建类别风险矩阵。理论上给出了相关的PAC-Bayes泛化上界。

Result: FragileFlow在多项选择题的LLM数据集和CLIP少样本自适应任务中，系统性提升了按理论设计的新风险度量，并在多数情况下显著提升了最差类别下的鲁棒精度，且不影响整体准确率。

Conclusion: FragileFlow能有效暴露并缓解大模型表面正确预测下的脆弱性，加强了模型实际鲁棒性，是通用且有效的改进手段。

Abstract: Robust adaptation of LLMs and VLMs is often evaluated by average accuracy or average consistency under perturbations. However, these averages can hide a structured failure mode: a prediction may remain correct while probability mass already flows from particular true classes toward systematic wrong competitors near the decision boundary. In this paper, we formalize this phenomenon as margin-aware error flow and introduce FragileFlow, a plug-in regularizer that uses a calibrated margin buffer to identify correct-but-fragile predictions and organize their off-class probability mass into a class-wise vulnerable-risk matrix. Theoretically, we provide the first PAC-Bayes upper bound for this margin-aware error-flow object, showing how empirical spectral control yields a conservative route to deterministic worst-class robustness under a stability condition. Experiments on multiple-choice LLM benchmarks and few-shot CLIP adaptation show that FragileFlow consistently improves the proposed theory-facing risk measures over matched baselines, yields perturbed worst-class accuracy gains in most settings, and preserves clean accuracy across comparisons.

</details>


### [357] [LLM-Agnostic Semantic Representation Attack](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08898)
*Jiawei Lian,Jianhong Pan,Lefan Wang,Yi Wang,Tairan Huang,Shaohui Mei,Lap-Pui Chau*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的对抗攻击方法SRA，通过优化语义表征而非具体文本模板来实现对大型语言模型(LLM)的攻击，能够有效突破当前模型的防护措施，在多模型间有极佳的迁移性和成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型主要采取对齐技术防止有害输出，但这些防护可以被精心设计的对抗性提示（prompt）绕过。主流攻击方法依赖于对固定模板的文本优化，存在收敛性差、自然度低和跨模型泛化弱等问题。

Method: 提出了以语义表征为目标的对抗攻击范式SRA，并通过SRHS算法实现。该算法在生成攻击性prompt时，扩展语义相关的token块，保证了可解释性和结构连贯性。理论上，作者给出了语义一致性与收敛性的关系，并证明保持语义一致性可以带来白盒收敛和黑盒迁移能力。

Result: 在26个开源LLM上进行了大量评测，攻击成功率高达99.71%，表现出极强的模型迁移性与隐蔽性。

Conclusion: 语义层面的对抗攻击方法具备极高效率与泛化能力，是突破当前LLM安全防线的有力手段，且更易于保持生成文本的自然性和可解释性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly employ alignment techniques to prevent harmful outputs. Despite these safeguards, attackers can circumvent them by crafting adversarial prompts. Predominant token-level optimization methods primarily rely on optimizing for exact affirmative templates (e.g., ``\textit{Sure, here is...}''). However, these paradigms frequently encounter bottlenecks such as suboptimal convergence, compromised prompt naturalness, and poor cross-model generalization. To address these limitations, we propose Semantic Representation Attack (SRA), a novel LLM-agnostic paradigm that fundamentally reconceptualizes adversarial objectives from exact textual targeting to malicious semantic representations. Theoretically, we establish the semantic Coherence-Convergence Relationship and derive a Cross-Model Semantic Generalization bound, proving that maintaining semantic coherence guarantees both white-box semantic convergence and black-box transferability. Technically, we operationalize this framework via the Semantic Representation Heuristic Search (SRHS) algorithm, which preserves interpretability and structural coherence of the adversarial prompts during incremental discrete token chunk expansion. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our framework achieves a 99.71% average attack success rate across 26 open-source LLMs, with strong transferability and stealth.

</details>


### [358] [Improving Lexical Difficulty Prediction with Context-Aligned Contrastive Learning and Ridge Ensembling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08950)
*Wicaksono Leksono Muhamad,Joanito Agili Lopo,Tsamarah Rana Nugraha,Ahmad Cahyono Adi,Muhammad Oriza Nurfajri*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于预测词汇难度的新方法，结合了回归和对比学习目标，以提高跨语言的一致性和难度层次感知，实验验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统词汇难度预测方法主要依靠标量监督的回归训练，导致难以捕捉不同语言背景下的难度分布和跨语言一致性，且对难度的层次结构建模不足。

Method: 提出Context-Aligned Contrastive Regression方法，将岭回归集成与跨视角语境对齐的对比目标和顺序软对比学习目标结合，从而同时提升跨语言表征对齐和难度有序性。

Result: 在三个不同母语（L1）数据集上的实验表明：（1）对比目标加强了跨语言表征对齐，同时保留了特定语言特性；（2）模型学习到的表示能反映词汇难度的有序结构；（3）集成方法能缓解单一模型的系统性偏差，提高各难度等级下的稳定表现。

Conclusion: 结合对比学习的多目标集成模型能更好地对词汇难度进行跨语言、层次化预测，在词汇学习和可读性评估等应用中具有潜力。

Abstract: Lexical difficulty prediction is a fundamental problem in language learning and readability assessment, requiring models to estimate word difficulty across different first-language (L1) backgrounds. However, existing approaches rely on regression-only training with scalar supervision, which does not explicitly structure the representation space, limiting their ability to capture cross-lingual alignment and ordinal difficulty. To mitigate these issues, we propose Context-Aligned Contrastive Regression, which integrates Ridge regression ensemble with two complementary objectives, i.e., Cross-View Context and Ordinal Soft Contrastive Learning. Experiments on three L1 datasets show that (i) contrastive objectives improve cross-lingual representation alignment while preserving language-specific nuances, (ii) the learned representations capture the ordinal structure of lexical difficulty, and (iii) the ensemble effectively mitigates systematic biases of individual models, leading to more stable performance across difficulty levels.

</details>


### [359] [LLiMba: Sardinian on a Single GPU -- Adapting a 3B Language Model to a Vanishing Romance Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09015)
*Luca Ballore*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个专为撒丁语（Sardinian）设计的大型语言模型 LLiMba（3B 参数），通过继续预训练和多种微调方法有效提升撒丁语文本生成和翻译能力，大幅优于原始模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 撒丁语是一种罗曼语族的低资源语言，现代NLP领域中几乎未被支持，主流商业NLP服务和当前的大模型都无法有效处理或产出撒丁语。填补撒丁语 NLP 领域空白，并探索低资源语言的适应方法是本研究主要动机。

Method: 基于Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct模型，通过继续预训练（CPT）和多种有监督微调（SFT，包括全量微调、LoRA、rsLoRA 和 DoRA）在单块消费级24GB显卡上，对包含1150万撒丁语和240万罗曼语相关文本的语料进行训练和实验。对比不同微调方法对撒丁语翻译表现的影响，并通过困惑度和BLEU等指标评估。

Result: CPT后模型在撒丁语上的困惑度为6.76，在FLORES-200六个翻译方向上均优于基线。rsLoRA r256在英译撒丁语的BLEU从CPT后的17.3提升至28.5，明显超过全量微调和其他配置。LoRA r64虽参数少但偏离事实内容更严重，DoRA r256训练测试间差距最小但事实准确性最差。此外，实际表现与BLEU等指标排名顺序一致但存在偏质表现。

Conclusion: 适配罗曼语族低资源目标语言时，适配器容量比LoRA变体选择更重要，强正则化效应并非始终有益。常规翻译指标虽可排序但忽略了部分失败现象，且不同字母表下困惑度指标需谨慎解读。

Abstract: Sardinian, a Romance language with roughly one million speakers, has minimal presence in modern NLP. Commercial services do not support it, and current language models do not produce it reliably. We present LLiMba, a 3B parameter Sardinian-ready model adapted from Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct through continued pretraining (CPT) and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on a single 24 GB consumer GPU. The corpus contains 11.5 million tokens of Sardinian spanning LSC, Logudorese, and Campidanese, augmented with 2.4 million tokens of related Romance text as replay against register blurring. After CPT the model reaches a perplexity of 6.76 on held out Sardinian and outperforms the base across all six FLORES-200 directions. We compare five SFT configurations under matched conditions: full fine-tuning, LoRA r64, rsLoRA r128, rsLoRA r256, and DoRA r256. rsLoRA r256 wins on every direction into Sardinian, reaching 28.5 BLEU from English against 17.3 after CPT and 21.0 with full fine-tuning. The rank ablation places r128 between LoRA r64 and rsLoRA r256 on BLEU but reveals failure modes invisible to the metric, including leakage across scripts no other variant produces. LoRA r64 retains less factual content from SFT than configurations at higher rank and produces more confident fabrications, though all methods fabricate on content absent from training. DoRA r256 yields the smallest gap between training and evaluation but the worst factual accuracy. The findings indicate that adapter capacity matters more than the choice among LoRA variants for adapting a Romance pretrained base to a low resource Romance target, that stronger regularization is not uniformly beneficial, and that translation metrics smoothly order configurations whose qualitative behavior differs categorically. Perplexity comparisons across scripts must account for byte fallback tokenization, which deflates the metric for scripts other than Latin.

</details>


### [360] [GAMBIT: A Three-Mode Benchmark for Adversarial Robustness in Multi-Agent LLM Collectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09027)
*Alexandre Le Mercier,Chris Develder,Thomas Demeester*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了GAMBIT基准，用于评估多智能体系统（MAS）中针对自适应伪装者的检测能力，包含分布漂移和快速适应等多种考察模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多智能体系统中的对抗性研究多数关注于简单任务，且忽视了能够自适应进化、专门躲避检测器的高级对手，在实际应用中难以反映真实威胁。

Method: 作者设计了GAMBIT基准，包括三种评测模式（两种零样本分布漂移测试和一种快速再校准模式），并构建了一个涵盖240种共进化伪装策略、共27804条标注数据集。以国际象棋为问题载体，采用Gemini 3.1 Pro作为智能体，引入一种基于高效进化框架的自适应伪装者，同时评测不同检测器的表现。

Result: （1）GAMBIT和相关数据集公开，可系统性评估检测器对抗隐蔽自适应伪装者时的真实能力；（2）提出的自适应伪装者几乎不可检测（使用Gemini检测F1仅50.5%），能显著破坏集体任务表现；（3）零样本评测易产生误导，不同检测器在快速适应新型攻击时性能差距可达8倍，元学习检测器在再校准模式下收敛速度快20倍。

Conclusion: GAMBIT开创了多智能体系统中攻击与防御共进化的真实评测环境，提出的框架不仅适用于国际象棋，还便于扩展到其它场景，为快速检测适应与防御提供了新思路。

Abstract: In multi-agent systems (MAS), a single deceptive agent can nullify all gains of an agentic AI collective and evade deployed defenses. However, existing adversarial studies on MAS target only shallow tasks and do not consider adaptive adversaries, which evolve their strategies to evade the very detectors trained to catch them. To address that gap, we introduce GAMBIT, a benchmark with three evaluation modes and two independent scores for evaluating imposter detectors: the first two modes measure zero-shot detection under increasing distribution shift, and a third recalibration mode measures how quickly a detector adapts to novel attacks from just 20 labeled examples. The benchmark comes with a dataset of 27,804 labeled instances spanning 240 co-evolved imposter strategies. Our contributions are threefold: (1) Using chess as a substrate deep reasoning problem and Gemini 3.1 Pro for agents, we release GAMBIT and its dataset to evaluate imposter detectors under realistic constraints against a stealthy adaptive imposter; (2) We introduce an adaptive imposter agent based on an efficient evolutionary framework, generalizable beyond chess, that collapses collective task performance while remaining essentially undetectable (50.5% F1-score with a Gemini-based detector); (3) We show that zero-shot evaluation can be highly misleading for adaptive adversaries: two detectors with near-identical zero-shot scores differ by 8x on few-shot adaptation, while the meta-learned variant converges 20x faster, a gap only visible in the recalibration mode. Altogether, GAMBIT provides the first multi-agent benchmark where adversarial attacks and defenses co-evolve, with an imposter framework generalizable beyond our use case, and promising techniques for fast recalibration in a rapidly evolving adversarial system. Code and data: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/gambit.

</details>


### [361] [A Quantum Inspired Variational Kernel and Explainable AI Framework for Cross Region Solar and Wind Energy Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09032)
*Pavan Manjunath,Thomas Prufer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种四阶段的混合框架，用于提升短期太阳能和风能发电量预测的可靠性，将传统算法、量子启发的变分核、生成式AI应用于分别解决预测、残差修正与可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大多数可再生能源预测方法仅针对单一区域气候，且研究多集中在传统循环神经网络或合并预测与解释的模型，不易泛化且可解释性不足，亟需一种结构解耦、具备更强泛化与解释能力的预测框架。

Method: 1) 通过API收集小时级发电、辐照度与表面气象数据；2) 使用三种传统模型（ARIMA、梯度提升树、两层LSTM）预测，并获得预测残差；3) 用量子启发的变分核（基于6量子比特、3层纠缠的高效ansatz）修正残差；4) 利用生成式AI，仅作为解释层，将结果转为结构化自然语言，增强可解释性。

Result: 所提框架在三个区域（伊比利亚太阳能、北海风能、德州混合数据）上表现稳定，短期预测任务中与最优传统方法误差仅差1%；量子核对风平浪静与风暴天气的区分能力高于优化径向基核约15倍（Fisher判别率）。

Conclusion: 四阶段框架在提升预测准确性、残差修正及气象状态区分方面有效，同时将AI用于自然语言解释显著提升了模型可解释性，为可再生能源短期预测提供了新范式。

Abstract: Reliable short horizon forecasting of solar and wind generation is a structural prerequisite of any modern power system yet most published forecasters are tuned and evaluated on a single climatic regime and most algorithmic novelty has been concentrated either on classical recurrent networks or on monolithic foundation models that combine forecasting and explanation We develop a four stage hybrid framework that separates these concerns The first stage acquires hourly generation irradiance and surface weather records through public application programming interfaces The second stage trains three classical baselines autoregressive integrated moving average gradient boosted regression trees and a two layer long short term memory network and produces a strong point forecast together with a residual error series The third stage corrects the residual through a quantum inspired variational kernel built on a six qubit hardware efficient ansatz with three repeated entangling layers The fourth stage uses generative artificial intelligence strictly as an explainability layer that reads the measured benchmark numbers and produces a structured natural language interpretation Across three regions drawn from open public archives Iberian solar North Sea wind and a mixed Texas trace the proposed configuration stays within one percentage point of the strongest classical baseline on the in domain forecasting task and the quantum inspired kernel separates calm and stormy weather regimes with a Fisher discriminant ratio approximately fifteen fold higher than a tuned radial basis kernel

</details>


### [362] [BiAxisAudit: A Novel Framework to Evaluate LLM Bias Across Prompt Sensitivity and Response-Layer Divergence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09041)
*Jialing Gan,Junhao Dong,Songze Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文指出现有大模型偏见测评基准存在重大可靠性隐患，设计出BiAxisAudit协议解决两大被忽视的失效模式，并系统分析了八个主流LLM的偏见表现、内部一致性及基准本身的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI治理规范（如欧盟AI法案）日益严格，对大模型偏见审计的准确性和可靠性需求显著提升，现有做法却将复杂偏见现象简化为单一标量评价，导致被攻击或误判的风险。作者动机在于揭示和克服当前测评基准的关键薄弱点，防止模型在不改变参数的前提下规避审计。

Method: 作者分析了两个主流失效模式：一是跨prompt的格式变化会显著改变偏见分数（对同一内容，仅靠语义等价的表述更换，分数浮动可达0.7）；二是模型在选择题（Selection）和自由文本解释（Elaboration）环节可呈现截然相反立场导致“抵消陷阱”。作者提出BiAxisAudit协议，用两个正交轴横向（prompt、格式、视角、角色、语气四维网格）与纵向（Selection/Elaboration分层打码，并定义“不一致率”“净分歧”等指标）对偏见分数可靠性进行量化。大规模测评8个LLM、80200条响应，统计分析格式和模型选项对偏见信号的影响。

Result: 实验发现，仅任务格式变化可解释偏见分数方差与模型本身同量级，63.6%（最高达85.2%）的偏见信号只在一个打码层出现，且跨prompt维度的交互影响大过主效应。选择/解释打分排名几乎不相关，且有配置能真正减少所有层的偏见，也有配置只影响选择层。

Conclusion: 偏见基准本身不是中立可靠的判据；基准设计中的格式、打码层分离对避免偏见误判、重新分布以及内部不一致暴露至关重要。BiAxisAudit工具能识别真实偏见减少与表面减少的区别，有助AI治理和后续审计工具标准化。

Abstract: Bias audits of large language models now operate within governance frameworks such as the EU AI Act, making benchmark reliability a security concern in its own right. Many current benchmarks, however, collapse bias into a single scalar from one prompt format and one surface label. This design misses two failure modes that can be exploited without changing model weights. Across prompts, meaning-preserving format changes shift bias endorsement by more than $0.7$ on a fixed statement pool. Within a response, the discrete Selection and free-text Elaboration can take opposing stances, so an apparently clean aggregate may hide substantial internal inconsistency (a ``cancellation trap'').
