Selection-only and elaboration-only rankings are therefore nearly uncorrelated across eight LLMs (Spearman $ρ= 0.238$, $p = 0.570$): LLaMA3-70B ranks in the middle under selection-only scoring but highest under elaboration-only scoring on the same responses. We introduce \textsc{BiAxisAudit}, a protocol that reports each bias score together with a reliability estimate on two orthogonal axes. The across-prompt axis evaluates each statement under a factorial grid of task format, perspective, role, and sentiment, treating bias as a distribution rather than a point estimate. The within-response axis uses Split Coding to recover Selection and Elaboration as separate signals, measured by the Inconsistency Rate and Divergence Net Imbalance. Across eight LLMs with $80{,}200$ coded responses each, task format alone explains as much variance as model choice; $63.6\%$ of pooled bias signals (up to $85.2\%$ per model) appear in only one coding layer, and prompt-dimension interactions exceed main effects. The instrument also separates real bias reductions from apparent reductions caused by cross-layer redistribution: some prompt configurations reduce both BER and IR, whereas others suppress only selection-layer bias.

</details>


### [363] [Language-Conditioned Visual Grounding with CLIP Multilingual](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09060)
*J. de Curtò,Mauro Liz,I. de Zarzà*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文通过对比多语言CLIP模型，发现性能差异主要源于文本分支而非视觉编码器，并揭示低资源语言因语料和分词器问题受限；提升模型规模加剧了部分语言的劣势，但可用于高效推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言视觉-语言模型在不同语言间性能存在差异，但导致差异的具体机制不明，尤其是不清楚是视觉编码器、文本分支还是两者的相互作用导致。本研究旨在明确性能差异的根本来源。

Method: 构建了密集多语言CLIP探针，固定视觉编码器，仅变更XLM-RoBERTa文本分支，覆盖13种类型各异的语言。分别用两种视觉编码器规模（ViT-B/32和ViT-H/14）组装CLIP，测试11个概念和210张图片，并用IoU、Spearman相关等指标对比各语言与英文的相似性。

Result: （1）低资源语言在任何规模下文本分支性能明显落后；（2）编码器增大加剧了部分低资源语言劣势，但对阿拉伯语有所改善，揭示语料覆盖与分词器适应性双重影响；（3）多语言间最优相似性大致保持，但空间对齐能力下降，表明主要障碍在于空间错位。

Conclusion: 多语言CLIP模型中的跨语种性能差距主要归咎于文本分支，尤其是低资源语言受限最为严重。扩大模型规模可提升部分语言表现，但同时放大结构障碍。所提出的dense-CLIP方法推理能效高，便于节能型多语部署。

Abstract: Multilingual vision-language models exhibit systematic performance gaps across languages, but the mechanism remains ambiguous: cross-language divergence could arise from the visual encoder, the text branch, or their interaction. We resolve this ambiguity through a dense multilingual CLIP probe in which the visual encoder is held identical across thirteen typologically diverse languages and only the XLM-RoBERTa text branch varies. We evaluate two CLIP architectures spanning a 7x visual-encoder scale gap (XLM-R base + ViT-B/32, ~87M visual parameters; XLM-R large + ViT-H/14, ~632M) on 11 concepts and 210 images, and quantify cross-language agreement via cluster-mask IoU, top-percentile IoU, and Spearman rank correlation against an English reference (n=2,310 paired observations per language). Three findings emerge. First, low-resource languages (Arabic, Basque, Luxembourgish) incur a structural penalty at both backbone scales (Wilcoxon HR>LR p<10^-300; cluster-mask IoU gap +0.114 at base, +0.143 at large), isolating the deficit to the text branch. Second, scaling the encoder 7x widens the gap for structural failure cases (Basque Δ=-0.056, Luxembourgish Δ=-0.076) while improving Arabic (Δ=+0.033), separating corpus-coverage from tokeniser-fertility failures. Third, peak similarity is preserved across languages (mean ratio 0.94 at large scale) while cluster-mask IoU drops sharply, identifying spatial misalignment, not signal collapse, as the dominant failure mode. At 3.4-3.9 Wh per 1,000 queries, dense-CLIP grounding is competitive with high-throughput inference budgets, positioning it as a practical substrate for energy-aware multilingual deployment.

</details>


### [364] [Soohak: A Mathematician-Curated Benchmark for Evaluating Research-level Math Capabilities of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09063)
*Guijin Son,Seungone Kim,Catherine Arnett,Hyunwoo Ko,Hyein Lee,Hyeonah Kang,Jiang Longxi,Jin Yun,JungYup Lee,Kyungmin Lee,Sam Yoosuk Kim,Sang Park,Seunghyeok Hong,SeungJae Lee,Seungyeop Yi,Shinae Shin,SunHye Bok,Sunyoung Shin,Yonghoon Ji,Youngtaek Kim,Hanearl Jung,Akari Asai,Graham Neubig,Sean Welleck,Youngjae Yu,Akshelin R,Alexander B. Ivanov,Boboev Muhammadjon,Chaeyoung Han,Christian Stump,Dmitrii Karp,Dohyun Kwon,DoYong Kwon,Duk-Soon Oh,Giovanni Resta,Greta Panova,Huiyun Noh,Hyungryul Baik,Hyungsun Bae,Inomov Mashrafdzhon,Jeewon Kim,Ji Eun Lee,Jiaqi Liu,Jieui Kang,Jimin Kim,Jon-Lark Kim,Junseo Yoon,Junwoo Jo,Kibeom Kim,Kiwoon Kwon,Mario Kummer,Max Mercer,Minjun Kim,Nahyun Lee,Ng Ze-An,Rafał Marcin Łochowski,Raphaël Lachièze-Rey,Ruichen Zhang,Sejin Park,Seonguk Seo,Shin Jaehoon,Sunatullo,Taewoong Eom,Yeachan Park,Yongseok Jang,Youchan Oh,Zhaoyang Wang,Zoltán Kovács*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出了一个全新的研究级数学基准（Soohak），包含439道新创题目，用于更高阶地评测大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，尤其是在研究级数学问题与合理拒答能力上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着前沿LLM在IMO（金牌级奥赛）问题上取得突破，社区需要更具挑战性和前沿性的任务来衡量LLM的推理和研究能力，尤其是在研究级数学领域，但缺乏高质量的测评基准。

Method: 作者联合64位数学家，从零创造439道研究级数学题，构建了Soohak基准。基准分为标准挑战题和拒答题两个部分，用以考察模型在解题和识别不良命题后的拒绝能力。

Result: 在标准挑战题部分，最强商用模型的正确率仅为30%左右，领先开源大模型低于15%；在拒答能力部分，没有任何模型拒答率超过50%。显示当前的LLM在高难数学与合理拒绝方面存在较大提升空间。

Conclusion: Soohak为前沿LLM的进一步发展提供了全新、高标准的测评工具。现有模型在高阶数学推理和拒答能力方面均未达到人类高水平，未来模型需针对这些能力持续优化。

Abstract: Following the recent achievement of gold-medal performance on the IMO by frontier LLMs, the community is searching for the next meaningful and challenging target for measuring LLM reasoning. Whereas olympiad-style problems measure step-by-step reasoning alone, research-level problems use such reasoning to advance the frontier of mathematical knowledge itself, emerging as a compelling alternative. Yet research-level math benchmarks remain scarce because such problems are difficult to source (e.g., Riemann Bench and FrontierMath-Tier 4 contain 25 and 50 problems, respectively). To support reliable evaluation of next-generation frontier models, we introduce Soohak, a 439-problem benchmark newly authored from scratch by 64 mathematicians. Soohak comprises two subsets. On the Challenge subset, frontier models including Gemini-3-Pro, GPT-5, and Claude-Opus-4.5 reach 30.4%, 26.4%, and 10.4% respectively, leaving substantial headroom, while leading open-weight models such as Qwen3-235B, GPT-OSS-120B, and Kimi-2.5 remain below 15%. Notably, beyond standard problem solving, Soohak introduces a refusal subset that probes a capability intrinsic to research mathematics: recognizing ill-posed problems and pausing rather than producing confident but unjustified answers. On this subset, no model exceeds 50%, identifying refusal as a new optimization target that current models do not directly address. To prevent contamination, the dataset will be publicly released in late 2026, with model evaluations available upon request in the interim.

</details>


### [365] [Character-Level Transformer for Tajik-Persian Transliteration with a Parallel Lexical Corpus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09092)
*Mullosharaf K. Arabov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究提出了自动将塔吉克语（西里尔字母）转写为波斯语（阿拉伯-波斯字母）的新方法，并建立了大规模平行词汇语料库，使用Transformer模型显著优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 塔吉克语和波斯语之间存在不同的书写系统，相关转写资源稀缺，阻碍了跨脚本NLP和词典应用发展。作者旨在弥补两者之间自动转写的大规模数据和有效方法的空白。

Method: 构建并人工验证52,152对塔吉克-波斯单词与短语的平行语料库，采用字符级序列到序列的Transformer模型进行训练，对结果以字符错误率（CER）和严格匹配率进行评估，并与基于规则和循环神经网络的基线对比。针对不同词性还做了性能分析。

Result: Transformer模型CER为0.3216，匹配率为0.3133，均优于规则和RNN基线。使用beam search（k=3）优化后，CER降至0.3182，匹配率升至0.3215。

Conclusion: 提出的平行语料库及Transformer方法有效提升了塔吉克-波斯自动转写能力，相关数据和代码均已公开，有助于跨脚本转换、NLP及词典研究。

Abstract: This study addresses automatic transliteration from Tajik (Cyrillic script) to Persian (Perso-Arabic script). We present a curated, lexicographically verified parallel corpus of 52,152 Tajik--Persian words and short phrases, compiled from printed dictionaries, encyclopedic sources, and manually verified online resources. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the largest publicly available word-level corpora for Tajik--Persian transliteration.
  Using this corpus, we train a character-level sequence-to-sequence Transformer model and evaluate it using Character Error Rate (CER) and exact-match accuracy. The Transformer achieves a CER of 0.3216 and an exact-match accuracy of 0.3133, outperforming both dictionary-based rule-based and recurrent neural baselines. With beam search (k=3), performance further improves to CER 0.3182 and accuracy 0.3215. We describe the data collection and preprocessing pipeline, model architecture, and experimental protocol, and report a part-of-speech analysis showing performance differences across lexical categories.
  All preprocessing scripts, deterministic splits into training, validation, and test sets, and training configurations are released to support reproducibility and further research on Tajik and related Persian dialects. The corpus supports research in character-level transliteration, cross-script NLP, and lexicographic applications.

</details>


### [366] [Dynamic Meta-Metrics: Source-Sentence Conditioned Weighting for MT Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09098)
*Luke Zhang,Justin Vasselli,Aditya Khan,York Hay Ng,En-Shiun Annie Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于机器翻译评价的新框架DMM，可动态组合现有评价指标，并根据源句特性自适应调整。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器翻译评价方法往往依赖单一或静态的评价指标组合，无法针对不同源句的特性自适应调整，降低了评价的灵活性和准确性。

Method: DMM框架根据源句特性，动态学习不同的指标组合。方法包括硬条件（每个簇拟合一个解释性组合器）和软条件（根据簇责任连续调整权重）。采用MLP、线性和高斯过程等多种组合策略。

Result: 在WMT多语种任务数据上，使用MLP的组合方式优于线性和高斯过程，软条件方式比线性方式有更好的表现。

Conclusion: DMM框架能提升机器翻译评价的准确性和灵活性，动态适应源句特性，优于传统静态组合方法。

Abstract: We propose Dynamic Meta-Metrics (DMM), a framework for machine translation evaluation that learns source-sentence conditioned combinations of existing metrics. Rather than relying on a single static ensemble or language-specific weighting, DMM adapts the metric combination based on properties of the source segment. We study hard conditioning, which fits an interpretable combiner per cluster, and an exploratory soft-conditioned extension whose weights vary continuously with source-cluster responsibilities. We evaluate DMM on the WMT Metrics Shared Task data across multiple language pairs using pairwise agreement measures at the system and segment levels. Across settings, MLP-based combinations outperform linear and Gaussian process-based ensembles, and introducing soft conditioning yields gains over linear models.

</details>


### [367] [GRC: Unifying Reasoning-Driven Generation, Retrieval and Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09100)
*Zhongtao Miao,Qiyu Wu,Yoshimasa Tsuruoka*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一大语言模型（LLMs）推理生成、文本表征和上下文压缩任务的方法GRC，实现三类任务一次前向推理即可完成，大幅降低训练部署成本，优化RAG等场景效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLMs主要分别训练用于生成与文本嵌入，导致算力和部署成本增加。同时长文本压缩和处理也是持续性学习、复杂生成等场景面临的难题。亟需一种统一高效的解决方案。

Method: 提出基于元隐变量token与统一的生成、表征、压缩混合训练框架GRC。在前向推理阶段可一次实现三类任务；支持乐高式模块化，在推理阶段灵活组合/部署。引入混合paged attention来提升模型推理速度。

Result: 实验在推理为主的检索、生成任务、文档压缩、延迟、RAG测试等多个测试集上，方法表现优异，能高效实现三类任务。训练数据利用率提升3倍，推理高效。

Conclusion: GRC实现了推理驱动生成、表征和压缩任务的无缝统一，降低了算力及部署负担，赋能新型embedding和生成范式。相关成果为真正统一的多任务大模型提供新思路。

Abstract: Text embedding and generative tasks are usually trained separately based on large language models (LLMs) nowadays. This causes a large amount of training cost and deployment effort. Context compression is also a challenging and pressing task, which is vital to reasoning-driven generation, and agentic tasks requiring long context and continual learning. In this paper, we explore how to unify reasoning-driven generation, reasoning-enhanced text representation and context compression tasks in one forward pass for LLMs. Through meta latent tokens and a unified generative, representative and compressive tuning approach, we propose a training framework named GRC that bridges the three tasks. The trained models can accomplish three objectives in a single forward pass while maintaining modular, LEGO-style flexibility during inference. This design greatly reduces the deployment effort for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and achieves efficient inference and three times data utilization during training. Furthermore, this framework design enables a new paradigm for text embedding: self-reason-latent embeds, and a new generation paradigm, latent memory-augmented generation, where compressed and internalized KV cache with O(1) length is used as the updatable memory. We also propose hybrid paged attention to speed up the inference of our models. Extensive experiments on reasoning-intensive retrieval benchmarks, generative tasks, document compression, latency evaluation, and RAG settings demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and may shed light on the truly unified model that can handle reasoning-driven generation, embedding and compression tasks seamlessly.

</details>


### [368] [Fin-Bias: Comprehensive Evaluation for LLM Decision-Making under human bias in Finance Domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09106)
*Xiaoyu Hu,Jinman Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出并发布了Fin-Bias基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLMs）在面对带有分析师主观评级的不确定金融背景下的投资决策可靠性和受偏见影响的倾向。实验显示，LLMs会受到上下文中显性偏见的影响，并提出了一种检测并减弱此类人类意见影响的办法。部分模型在预测未来股票回报方面表现优于人类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLMs在金融领域广泛部署，其可靠性、对齐性及对人为操控的敏感性成为核心问题。现有金融基准多聚焦于小样本行情而忽视了大语言模型对带有人类主观意见（如分析师评级）的上下文易受影响的问题。

Method: 作者创建了Fin-Bias基准，包括8868条大型分析师报告，涵盖多行业和不同投资评级（看涨/中性/看跌）。他们让LLMs在有或没有分析师评级，甚至伪造评级的情况下生成投资判断，并观察其决策倾向。同时发展了检测金融文本中隐含人类意见影响的独立性增强方法。

Result: 实验表明LLMs在分析有显性立场（如评级）的篇章时容易受到影响出现“羊群效应”。引入识别及处理主观意见的方法后，部分模型在股票回报预测能力上超过人类分析师。

Conclusion: LLMs在金融投资场景中易受人类偏见影响，但通过方法干预可提升其独立性和决策质量。Fin-Bias为后续研究LLMs在复杂金融决策中的表现和抗干扰能力提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in financial contexts, raising critical concerns about reliability, alignment, and susceptibility to adversarial manipulation. While prior finance-related benchmarks assess LLMs' capabilities in stock trading, they are often restricted to small sample and fail to demonstrate LLM susceptibility to context with potential human bias. We introduce Fin-Bias (financial herding under long and uncertain financial context), a benchmark for evaluating LLM investment decision-making when faced with uncertainty and possible human-biased opinions. Fin-Bias includes 8868 long firm-specific analyst reports, including firm aspects summarized and analyzed by sophisticated analysts with investment ratings (Bullish/Neutral/Bearish) spanning from various industries. We present large language models with firm analyst reports with/without analyst investment ratings and even with 'fake' rating, to get investment ratings generated by LLMs. Our results reveal that LLMs tend to herd the explicit bias in context. We also develop a method to detect potential human opinions, which can encourage LLMs to think independently, some models even exceed human performance in predicting future stock return.

</details>


### [369] [From Traditional Taggers to LLMs: A Comparative Study of POS Tagging for Medieval Romance Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09147)
*Matthias Schöffel,Esteban Garces Arias*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了大语言模型(LLM)在中世纪罗曼语族语言词性标注中的表现，发现其显著优于传统方法，并揭示了跨语种迁移学习及双语训练的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 中世纪罗曼语族语言存在拼写变异、形态复杂及标注资源稀缺等难题，现有词性标注工具表现有限，需要探索现代神经方法的适用性。

Method: 作者针对中世纪奥克语、加泰罗尼亚语和法语，比较了传统基于规则/统计的标注器与开源LLM在零样本、少样本、单语微调和跨语种迁移等不同设置下的词性标注效果，通过实验系统评估各方法的性能。

Result: LLM方法总体优于传统标注器，微调和多语训练带来最大提升。对于资源稀缺语言，跨语种迁移效果显著，而针对性双语训练对某些目标语言甚至能超过广泛多语训练。还发现语言间亲缘关系和数据集特性影响迁移策略选择。

Conclusion: 现代神经方法对于历史文本处理具备很大潜力，本文为中世纪罗曼语族词性标注实践和数字人文学科工具开发提供了经验和建议。源码与数据已全部公开，方便学界复现。

Abstract: Part-of-speech (POS) tagging for Medieval Romance languages remains challenging due to orthographic variation, morphological complexity, and limited annotated resources. This paper presents a systematic empirical evaluation of large language models (LLMs) for POS tagging across three medieval varieties: Medieval Occitan, Medieval Catalan, and Medieval French. We compare traditional rule-based and statistical taggers with modern open-source LLMs under zero-shot prompting, few-shot prompting, monolingual fine-tuning, and cross-lingual transfer learning settings.
  Experiments on historically grounded datasets show that LLM-based approaches consistently outperform traditional taggers, with fine-tuning and multilingual training yielding the largest improvements. In particular, cross-lingual transfer learning substantially benefits under-resourced varieties, while targeted bilingual training can outperform broader multilingual configurations for specific target languages. The results highlight the importance of linguistic proximity and dataset characteristics when designing transfer strategies for historical NLP.
  These findings provide empirical insights into the applicability of modern neural methods to medieval text processing and provide practical guidance for deploying LLM-based POS tagging pipelines in digital humanities research. All code, models, and processed datasets are released for reproducibility.

</details>


### [370] [Meow-Omni 1: A Multimodal Large Language Model for Feline Ethology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09152)
*Jucheng Hu,Zhangquan Chen,Yulin Chen,Chengjie Hong,Liang Zhou,Tairan Wang,Sifei Li,Giulio Zhu,Feng Zhou,Yiheng Zeng,Suorong Yang,Dongzhan Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文提出Meow-Omni 1，这是首个专为计算动物行为学设计的开源四模态MLLM，能够融合视频、音频、生理时序数据和文本，实现对动物意图的高准确识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MLLM无法处理高频生理时序信号，导致仅能表面匹配动物行为，难以真正推理动物内在状态。论文欲解决语义别名现象，即相同行为信号对应截然不同的内部生理和心理状态。

Method: 通过融合视频、音频、生理时序和文本数据，采用科学专用编码器并在骨干网络中整合，提出以生理相关的跨模态对齐为核心的意图推断方法。模型在新的MeowBench（专家验证的四模态基准）上进行评估。

Result: 在MeowBench基准上，Meow-Omni 1的意图识别准确率达到71.16%，明显优于现有的视觉-语言或全模态模型。

Conclusion: Meow-Omni 1展示了融合多模态信号及生理推理在动物意图识别上的潜力，并通过开源模型和数据集，为跨物种意图理解和实际兽医诊断、野生动物保护奠定基础。

Abstract: Deciphering animal intent is a fundamental challenge in computational ethology, largely because of semantic aliasing, the phenomenon where identical external signals (e.g., a cat's purr) correspond to radically different internal states depending on physiological context. Existing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are blind to high-frequency biological time-series data, restricting them to superficial behavioural pattern matching rather than genuine latent-state reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce Meow-Omni 1, the first open-source, quad-modal MLLM purpose-built for computational ethology. It natively fuses video, audio, and physiological time-series streams with textual reasoning. Through targeted architectural adaptation, we integrate specialized scientific encoders into a unified backbone and formalize intent inference via physiologically grounded cross-modal alignment. Evaluated on MeowBench, a novel, expert-verified quad-modal benchmark, Meow-Omni 1 achieves state-of-the-art intent-recognition accuracy (71.16%), substantially outperforming leading vision-language and omni-modal baselines. We release the complete open-source pipeline including model weights, training framework, and the Meow-10K dataset, to establish a scalable paradigm for inter-species intent understanding and to advance foundation models toward real-world veterinary diagnostics and wildlife conservation.

</details>


### [371] [Lost in Translation? Exploring the Shift in Grammatical Gender from Latin to Occitan](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09156)
*Ahan Chatterjee,Matthias Schöffel,Matthias Aßenmacher,Esteban Garces Arias*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种可解释的深度学习框架，用于研究拉丁语到罗曼语系的语法性别系统从三分转变为两分的历史演化。作者同时改进了针对低资源历史语料的分词器，并在词汇和语言环境层面分析语法性别相关特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 拉丁语向罗曼语发展过程中，语法性别系统发生了结构性变化，对理解语言演化有重要意义。目前缺乏有效手段识别和量化词汇及上下文对性别系统变化的贡献，尤其是在低资源历史语料场景下。

Method: 作者提出一种可解释的深度学习框架，并设计了一种新的分词方法。该方法在词汇层面（利用形态特征预测性别）和上下文层面（量化不同词性对性别预测的贡献）分别进行分析，系统研究性别信息在单词和句子层面的分布。

Result: 新分词器在该历史低资源场景下优于传统方法。实验发现，形态特征和句法上下文中的不同词类对性别预测均有重要作用，对性别信息的分布做出了全面量化。相关代码、数据和结果已公开。

Conclusion: 通过新的分词和深度学习框架，本文系统刻画了拉丁语-罗曼语系别结构变化中的性别信息分布，对理解语言演化、处理低资源历史语料具有重要参考价值。

Abstract: The diachronic evolution from Latin to the Romance languages involved a restructuring of the grammatical gender system from a tripartite configuration (masculine, feminine, neuter) to a bipartite one (masculine, feminine). In this work, we introduce an interpretable deep learning framework to investigate this phenomenon at both lexical and contextual levels. First, we show that conventional tokenization strategies are insufficiently robust for this low-resource historical setting, and that our proposed tokenizer improves performance over these baselines. At the lexical level, we evaluate the contribution of morphological features to gender prediction. At the contextual level, we quantify the contributions of different part-of-speech categories to grammatical gender prediction. Together, these analyses characterize the distribution of gender information between the lemma and its sentential context. We make our codebase, datasets, and results publicly available.

</details>


### [372] [WorldSpeech: A Multilingual Speech Corpus from Around the World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09167)
*Antonis Asonitis,Luca A. Lanzendörfer,Frédéric Berdoz,Roger Wattenhofer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了WorldSpeech——一个大规模、多语种的语音识别数据集，有助于提升中低资源语言的ASR表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前ASR系统在高资源语言上表现良好，但对于大多数缺乏有对齐数据的语言，识别准确率显著下降。因此需要更大规模覆盖多语种的有对齐语音数据集。

Method: 作者收集并整理了一个包含76种语言、总计65,000小时、24 kHz采样率、音频与转录对齐的语音数据集WorldSpeech。数据来源包括议会发言、国际广播、公共有声书等。部分语言对齐语音时长超过1,000小时。

Result: 在该数据集上对现有ASR模型微调后，针对11种类型多样的语言，平均相对词错误率降低了63.5%。

Conclusion: WorldSpeech为多语种ASR任务提供了基础资源显著提升了中低资源语言的自动语音识别精度。

Abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) performs well for high-resource languages with abundant paired audio-transcript data, but its accuracy degrades sharply for most languages due to limited publicly available aligned data. To this end, we introduce WorldSpeech, a 24 kHz multilingual speech corpus comprising 65k hours of aligned audio-transcript data across 76 languages, collected from diverse public sources including parliamentary proceedings, international broadcasts, and public-domain audiobooks. For 37 languages, WorldSpeech provides more than 200 hours of aligned speech, with 28 exceeding 500 hours and 24 surpassing 1k hours. Fine-tuning existing ASR models on WorldSpeech results in an average relative Word-Error-Rate reduction of 63.5% across 11 typologically diverse languages.

</details>


### [373] [Two Ways to De-Bias an LLM-as-a-Judge: A Continuous-Score Comparison of Hierarchical Bayesian Calibration and Neural-ODE Score Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09227)
*Andrea Morandi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文比较了两种对LLM打分结果进行校准的方法：贝叶斯线性校正与神经ODE流，发现两者在不同数据规模下表现各有优劣，推荐根据数据量选择方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前使用大语言模型作为自动评分员虽成本低，但有打分偏差问题（如严格/宽松、分布压缩、冗长答案得分偏高）。因此，如何将LLM评分与人工评分对齐，成为亟需解决的问题。常用手段是后处理校准。

Method: 作者提出并对比了两类校正器：一是参数化的小样本层次贝叶斯线性校正模型（带不确定性），二是非参数神经ODE变换流（FFJORD），并用UltraFeedback微调数据集进行实验，对比在人均分、单项准确度、分布形状三个维度的表现。

Result: 两种方法均能有效缩小与GPT-4人工评分均值的偏差。100个锚点（校准样本）时，线性校正法分布拟合更好（KL 0.031优于0.058），绝对误差相近。1500锚点时，流方法在所有指标胜出（MAE、相关系数与KL均更佳），线性法已趋于瓶颈。流方法随数据量提升持续改善，而线性法因模型结构限制只能拟合线性关系。

Conclusion: 选择哪种校准方法主要取决于校准数据量。少样本时推荐贝叶斯线性校正，数据多时用神经ODE流。文中还给出了实际部署时的决策依据。

Abstract: [Abridged] Using a Large Language Model (LLM) as an automatic rater (LLM-as-a-judge) is cheap but potentially biased: some judges run lenient, others strict, the middle of the scale gets compressed, and verbose answers may be over-rewarded. A common remedy is post-hoc calibration: leave the cheap judge in place and, on a modest set of paired anchors, fit a transformation from raw judge scores to an estimate of the human rating. We compare two correctors that take opposing views on how this mapping should be modeled: a parametric, small-anchor hierarchical Bayesian linear correction with per-score uncertainty, and a non-parametric Neural-ODE (FFJORD) score-transport flow. Both are run head-to-head on UltraFeedback fine-grained_score (1700 paired examples, 200 held out), with calibration split into three operational sub-questions: population-mean recovery, per-item accuracy, and distributional-shape match.
  The headline result is that the choice between methods is primarily a data-budget question. Both correctors close the raw $+0.71$-point mean offset to within $\pm 0.08$ of the GPT-4 reference, at 100 and at 1500 anchors. Past that, the methods swap roles. With 100 anchors, the linear corrector reconstructs the human-score distribution roughly twice as well by KL divergence (0.031 vs. 0.058) and ties the flow on MAE. With 1500 anchors the flow wins on every metric (MAE 0.320 vs. 0.359, Pearson 0.922 vs. 0.896, KL 0.026 vs. 0.037). The Bayesian linear corrector saturates well below 1500 anchors: residual $\tanh$-shaped non-linearity is, by construction, structure a linear correction cannot fit. The flow keeps improving as labels grow. We translate these findings into an explicit decision rule for production deployments.

</details>


### [374] [Matching Meaning at Scale: Evaluating Semantic Search for 18th-Century Intellectual History through the Case of Locke](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09236)
*Yu Wu,Ananth Mahadevan,Filip Ginter,Michael Mathioudakis,Mikko Tolonen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文比较了基于词汇的文本复用方法与语义搜索在18世纪思想史研究中的表现，发现语义搜索能发现更多隐性思想接受，但仍受词汇重叠的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数字语料库分析主要依赖于词汇级检测，无法捕捉到意译或更复杂的文本互动。本研究旨在提高思想传播路径追踪的能力，解决仅能识别原文引用但遗漏意译与隐性关联的问题。

Method: 以洛克著作为案例，利用专家基于语义分类体系进行注释，将市售语义搜索方法与传统词汇检索进行对比，评估其在揭示“意义层面”对应关系上的效果，并结合语言学诊断工具分析检索机制。

Result: 语义搜索能发现更多隐性引用（非直接引用），优于仅靠唯一词汇匹配的方法。但即使是语义模型，查询结果仍较多依赖于表面词汇重叠，存在“词汇门槛”现象。

Conclusion: 语义搜索为追踪思想传播提供了更强工具，但存在对词汇的部分依赖，因此在大规模历史语料中的应用仍有局限，需持续改进语义模型以突破词汇障碍。

Abstract: While digitized corpora have transformed the study of intellectual transmission, current methods rely heavily on lexical text reuse detection, capturing verbatim quotations but fundamentally missing paraphrases and complex implicit engagement. This paper evaluates semantic search in 18th-century intellectual history through the reception of John Locke's foundational work. Using expert annotation grounded in a semantic taxonomy, we examine whether an off-the-shelf semantic search pipeline can surface meaning-level correspondences overlooked by lexical methods. Our results demonstrate that semantic search retrieves substantially more implicit receptions than lexical baselines. However, linguistic diagnostics also reveal a "lexical gatekeeping" effect, where retrieval remains partially constrained by surface vocabulary overlap. These findings highlight both the potential and the limitations of semantic retrieval for analyzing the circulation of ideas in large historical corpora. The data is available at https://github.com/COMHIS/locke-sim-data.

</details>


### [375] [Repeated-Token Counting Reveals a Dissociation Between Representations and Outputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09239)
*Sohan Venkatesh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 大型语言模型在计数重复token时常常出错，但并非因为其无法表示计数信息，而是因为后续处理环节将其覆盖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在推理任务表现优异，但在简单的计数重复token任务上却明显失败。传统观点认为这是内部无法追踪计数所致，本文旨在验证或反驳这一观点，探查模型计数失败的真正机制。

Method: 作者使用残差流上的线性探针在各层解码token计数，并结合注意力模式分析。比较不同token格式（单词token与数字token）、不同分隔符（空格、逗号）和不同模型（Llama-3.2和Qwen2.5多个规模）中的计数表现。定位并分析MLP block中在不同网络深度上的行为变化。

Result: 发现无论在哪一层，残差流中都能准确解码出正确的计数信息，即计数表示始终被很好地保存。然而，在到达网络88-93%深度时，某些MLP block会将正确的计数信息覆盖为固定的错误答案，且只出现在空格分隔的重复词token场景。注意力未出现塌缩，tokenizer无明显贡献。逗号分隔符或模型变大能抑制该错误。该现象在不同模型和深度下表现一致。

Conclusion: 大型模型的计数失败不是因无法表达计数，而是信息“路由”错误导致最终输出出错，提出了解决模型计数能力时应区分表示错误与路由错误，两类问题需采取不同干预手段。

Abstract: Large language models fail at counting repeated tokens despite strong performance on broader reasoning benchmarks. These failures are commonly attributed to limitations in internal count tracking. We show this attribution is wrong. Linear probes on the residual stream decode the correct count with near-perfect accuracy at every post-embedding layer, across all model depths. This holds even at the exact layers where the wrong answer crystallizes while the model simultaneously outputs an incorrect count. Attention patterns show no evidence of collapse over repeated tokens and tokenization artifacts account for none of the failure. Instead, a format-triggered multi-layer perceptron (MLP) block overwrites the correctly-encoded count with a fixed wrong answer at roughly 88--93,% network depth. This prior fires for repeated word-tokens in space-separated list format and is absent for repeated digit-tokens. It is suppressed by comma-separated delimiters in larger models but persists in smaller ones. The finding holds across Llama-3.2 (1B and 3B) and Qwen2.5 (1.5B, 3B and 7B) at consistent relative depth. Counting failure is a failure of routing not of representation and the two require different interventions.

</details>


### [376] [LLM Agents Already Know When to Call Tools -- Even Without Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09252)
*Chung-En Sun,Linbo Liu,Ge Yan,Zimo Wang,Tsui-Wei Weng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了When2Tool基准，系统性地评估大语言模型使用工具的必要性，并发现通过探查隐藏状态可更高效地抑制不必要的工具调用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于工具增强的大语言模型在无需工具时也频繁调用外部工具，增加了成本和延迟，但学术界缺乏可以识别何时真正需要工具的系统性基准。

Method: 提出了When2Tool基准集，覆盖18个环境，分为计算规模、知识边界和执行可靠性三大类，并设置分层难度点。评估了Prompt-only和Reason-then-Act两类无训练基线方法，并进一步通过线性探测模型隐藏状态（Probe），开发了Probe&Prefill方法，用于判断并引导是否应调用工具。

Result: 研究发现，Prompt-only和Reason-then-Act控制能力有限，且在困难任务上精度损失较大。而模型隐藏状态中对工具必要性的信号较为充分（AUROC高达0.89-0.96），Probe&Prefill方法可在精度几乎不损失的情况下，减少48%的工具调用，大幅优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 模型实际具备判断何时需要工具的潜在能力，只是生成时未能利用。通过探查并合理引导隐藏状态，可以显著优化工具调用效率，实现更经济高效的LLM-Agent应用。

Abstract: Tool-augmented LLM agents tend to call tools indiscriminately, even when the model can answer directly. Each unnecessary call wastes API fees and latency, yet no existing benchmark systematically studies when a tool call is actually needed. We propose When2Tool, a benchmark of 18 environments (15 single-hop, 3 multi-hop) spanning three categories of tool necessity -- computational scale, knowledge boundaries, and execution reliability -- each with controlled difficulty levels that create a clear decision boundary between tool-necessary and tool-unnecessary tasks. We evaluate two families of training-free baselines: Prompt-only (varying the prompt to discourage unnecessary calls) and Reason-then-Act (requiring the model to reason about tool necessity before acting). Both provide limited control: Prompt-only suppresses necessary calls alongside unnecessary ones, and Reason-then-Act still incurs a disproportionate accuracy cost on hard tasks. To understand why these baselines fail, we probe the models' hidden states and find that tool necessity is linearly decodable from the pre-generation representation with AUROC 0.89--0.96 across six models, substantially exceeding the model's own verbalized reasoning. This reveals that models already know when tools are needed, but fail to act on this knowledge during generation. Building on this finding, we propose Probe&Prefill, which uses a lightweight linear probe to read the hidden-state signal and prefills the model's response with a steering sentence. Across all models tested, Probe&Prefill reduces tool calls by 48% with only 1.7% accuracy loss, while the best baseline at comparable accuracy only reduces 6% of tool calls, or achieves a similar tool call reduction but incurs a 5$\times$ higher accuracy loss. Our code is available at https://github.com/Trustworthy-ML-Lab/when2tool

</details>


### [377] [Cornerstones or Stumbling Blocks? Deciphering the Rock Tokens in On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09253)
*Yuxuan Jiang,Runchao Li,Shubhashis Roy Dipta,Dawei Li,Zhao Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文发现，在On-Policy Distillation（OPD）训练中，有一类“高损失tokens”（Rock Tokens）在训练结束后仍然表现出持续高损失，虽然它们占据较大梯度份额，但对模型实际推理贡献很小。作者提出跳过此类tokens或可提升模型蒸馏效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前关于OPD的token级训练动态理解极少，已知部分token在RLVR等设置下对性能贡献巨大，但OPD中“高损失tokens”的角色不明。作者旨在揭示这些tokens在蒸馏中的行为及其对训练效率的影响。

Method: 作者通过对OPD训练过程中每个token的损失和梯度变化进行统计分析和因果干预实验，定位出了训练后仍高损失的“Rock Tokens”，并评估它们对整体推理性能的实际作用。

Result: 发现高达18%的输出tokens属于“Rock Tokens”，它们贡献了大量梯度，但对推理性能影响微小，并且在训练中几乎不随teacher梯度收敛。这说明大量训练资源被用于结构与语篇残差的优化。

Conclusion: 论文挑战了对所有token一视同仁处理的传统假设，提出绕过这些“绊脚石”token可以更高效地进行大模型对齐和蒸馏，有望带来更高效的训练范式。

Abstract: While recent work in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has shown that a small subset of critical tokens disproportionately drives reasoning gains, an analogous token-level understanding of On-Policy Distillation (OPD) remains largely unexplored. In this work, we investigate high-loss tokens, a token type that--as the most direct signal of student-teacher mismatch under OPD's per-token KL objective--should progressively diminish as training converges according to existing studies; however, our empirical analysis shows otherwise. Even after OPD training reaches apparent saturation, a substantial subset of tokens continues to exhibit persistently high loss; these tokens, which we term Rock Tokens, can account for up to 18\% of the tokens in generated outputs. Our investigation reveals two startling paradoxes. First, despite their high occurrence frequency providing a disproportionately large share of total gradient norms, Rock Tokens themselves remain stagnant throughout training, resisting teacher-driven corrections. Second, through causal intervention, we find that these tokens provide negligible functional contribution to the model's actual reasoning performance. These findings suggest that a vast amount of optimization bandwidth is spent on structural and discourse residuals that the student model cannot or need not internalize. By deconstructing these dynamics, we demonstrate that strategically bypassing these ``stumbling blocks'' can significantly streamline the alignment process, challenging the necessity of uniform token weighting and offering a more efficient paradigm for large-scale model distillation.

</details>


### [378] [Beyond Continuity: Challenges of Context Switching in Multi-Turn Dialogue with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09268)
*Aditya Sinha,Harald Steck,Vito Ostuni,Matteo Rinaldi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文研究了LLM在多轮对话中识别话题转变和筛选相关上下文的能力，发现目前模型存在明显不足，并提出改进建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户与大语言模型多轮互动时，经常会出现问题细化或话题转变，但LLM难以准确检测并常常带入无关上下文，导致回答错误。

Method: 作者基于真实数据集，合成了多难度的上下文转移基准测试，考察两项任务：（1）检测用户是细化还是转变话题，（2）从前文中筛选相关上下文。对十种不同类型的LLM进行零样本测试并进行对比分析。

Result: 只有强指令性和具推理能力的LLM能较准检测话题转变，开源权重的LLM表现较差，经常携带过时上下文，即使给出明显提示也不例外。所有模型均表现出位置偏差问题。

Conclusion: 现有LLM在多轮对话中对上下文理解和筛选有待提升。论文讨论了提升多轮长期鲁棒性的方法和建议，为LLM未来发展提供参考。

Abstract: Users interacting with Large Language Models (LLMs) in a multi-turn conversation routinely refine their requests or pivot to new topics. LLMs, however, often miss these topic shifts and carry over irrelevant context from previous turns, leading to inaccurate responses. In this paper, we stress-test the multi-turn understanding of LLMs and study the following two sub-tasks: (1) detecting whether the user pivots or refines in the current turn, and (2) shortlisting relevant context from previous turns. To this end, we construct synthetic benchmarks based on real-world datasets from varied domains, as to simulate context shifts of different levels of difficulty. We then evaluate the zero-shot performance of ten LLMs (open-weight, closed-source and reasoning), and demonstrate that only some reasoning and strongly instructed LLMs are accurate in detecting pivots; open-weight LLMs struggle with the task and frequently carry stale context even with explicit cues; and all models suffer from a position bias. Based on the results, we discuss key takeaways for improving long-term robustness in multi-turn capabilities for LLMs.

</details>


### [379] [DeltaRubric: Generative Multimodal Reward Modeling via Joint Planning and Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09269)
*Rui Liu,Dian Yu,Zhenwen Liang,Yucheng Shi,Tong Zheng,Runpeng Dai,Haitao Mi,Pratap Tokekar,Leoweiliang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出DeltaRubric方法，将多模态偏好评价任务分解为“计划-执行”两步：先自动生成实例化的验证清单，再逐项核查，显著提升了多模态奖励模型的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态大模型评价常因过度依赖语言先验而忽视细粒度视觉验证，尤其难以处理需要复杂视觉推理的任务。如何实现更严谨、自动化的多模态奖励建模亟待解决。

Method: 提出DeltaRubric方法，将评价流程拆解为两步：1）模型先作为“分歧计划者”，针对具体输入生成中立且细致的核查清单；2）再作为“清单核查者”，逐项依据图像和问题执行验证。两步通过多角色强化学习联合优化。

Result: 本方法在Qwen3-VL 4B和8B Instruct等模型上验证，VL-RewardBench数据集上比无rubric基线准确率显著提升，4B和8B分别提升22.6和18.8个百分点。

Conclusion: 将多模态评价流程结构化细分为可验证步骤，能显著提升奖励模型的可靠性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Aligning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) requires reliable reward models, yet existing single-step evaluators can suffer from lazy judging, exploiting language priors over fine-grained visual verification. While rubric-based evaluation mitigates these biases in text-only settings, extending it to multimodal tasks is bottlenecked by the complexity of visual reasoning. The critical differences between responses often depend on instance-specific visual details. Robust evaluation requires dynamically synthesizing rubrics that isolate spatial and factual discrepancies. To address this, we introduce $\textbf{DeltaRubric}$, an approach that reformulates multimodal preference evaluation as a plan-and-execute process within a single MLLM. DeltaRubric operates in two steps: acting first as a $\textit{Disagreement Planner}$, the model generates a neutral, instance-specific verification checklist. Transitioning into a $\textit{Checklist Verifier}$, it executes these self-generated checks against the image and question to produce the final grounded judgment. We formulate DeltaRubric as a multi-role reinforcement learning problem, jointly optimizing planning and verification capabilities. Validated on Qwen3-VL 4B and 8B Instruct models, DeltaRubric achieves solid empirical gains. For instance, On VL-RewardBench, it improves base model overall accuracy by $\textbf{+22.6}$ (4B) and $\textbf{+18.8}$ (8B) points, largely outperforming standard no-rubric baselines. The results demonstrate that decomposing evaluation into structured, verifiable steps leads to more reliable and generalizable multimodal reward modeling.

</details>


### [380] [BetaEdit: Null-Space Constrained Sequential Model Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09285)
*Bingqing Liu,Wei Liu,Yuhua Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种改进的模型编辑框架BetaEdit，解决了现有基于零空间方法中知识泄漏和性能下降的问题，并在大规模顺序编辑任务上显著优于以往方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有利用零空间（null space）约束进行模型编辑的方法，由于零空间近似导致知识泄漏，并且在连续多次编辑时，模型性能大幅下降。虽然带有历史信息的方法在实践中有所改进，但其有效性的原因未明。该文旨在分析这些问题，并提升顺序模型编辑的效果。

Method: 作者首先分析了现有零空间方法存在知识泄漏的原因，并解释了历史感知型（history-aware）编辑为何能更好维持编辑效果和模型泛化能力。基于这些洞见，提出了整合历史感知更新的改进零空间框架BetaEdit，有效控制知识泄漏。

Result: 在三个大语言模型、两个标准测试集上进行大量实验，BetaEdit在大规模连续编辑场景下各项指标均优于现有主流方法。

Conclusion: BetaEdit强化了顺序模型编辑的稳定性和有效性，给大模型在知识更新过程中带来了更小知识泄漏和更好编辑效果，证明了引入历史感知与优化零空间控制的价值。

Abstract: Null-space-based methods have garnered considerable attention in model editing by constraining updates to the null space of the pre-existing knowledge representation, thereby preserving the model's original behavior. However, in practice these methods rely on an approximate null space--leading to knowledge leakage--and further suffer from severe performance degradation during sequential editing. Recent work shows that history-aware editing strategies can empirically mitigate this decline, yet the underlying reason remains unclear. In this paper, we first expose the knowledge leakage inherent in existing null-space approaches and then analyze why history-aware updates effectively preserve both editing performance and general capabilities during long-horizon editing. Building on these insights, we propose BetaEdit, a refined framework that effectively controls the knowledge leakage and integrates history-aware updates into the null-space paradigm. Extensive experiments on three large language models across two standard benchmarks show that BetaEdit consistently outperforms prior methods in the challenging regime of massive-scale sequential editing. Code is available at: https://github.com/lbq8942/BetaEdit.

</details>


### [381] [LEAF-SQL: Level-wise Exploration with Adaptive Fine-graining for Text-to-SQL Skeleton Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09295)
*Zhao Tan,Xiping Liu,Qing Shu,Qizhi Wan,Dexi Liu,Changxuan Wan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LEAF-SQL通过分层树搜索、结构多样化与逐步推理，提高LLM在Text-to-SQL复杂查询转换上的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL系统在处理包含复杂嵌套逻辑和多子句的自然语言查询时表现不佳，主流方法依赖单一SQL骨架及缺乏渐进推理能力，限制系统性能。

Method: 提出LEAF-SQL，将SQL骨架预测重构为一种由粗到细的树搜索过程。该方法包括三层骨架层级、用于生成多样候选的Skeleton Formulation Agent、和高效修剪搜索空间的Skeleton Evaluation Agent，实现对多种结构假设的系统性探索与自适应细化。

Result: 多项实验验证LEAF-SQL能稳定提升多种LLM主干模型的表现，在BIRD基准测试集上实现71.6的执行准确率，超越现有主流骨架/搜索方法。

Conclusion: LEAF-SQL为复杂Text-to-SQL场景提高结构多样性和推理深度提供了有效技术路线，在复杂查询转换中展现出较强优势。

Abstract: Text-to-SQL translates natural language questions into executable SQL queries, enabling intuitive database access for non-experts. While large language models achieve strong performance on Text-to-SQL with prompting, they still struggle with complex queries that involve deeply nested logic or multiple clauses. A widely used approach employs SQL skeletons--intermediate representations of query logic--to streamline generation, but existing methods are limited by their reliance on a single structural hypothesis and lack of progressive reasoning. To overcome these limitations, we propose LEAF-SQL, a novel framework that reframes skeleton prediction as a coarse-to-fine tree search process. LEAF-SQL enables systematic exploration of diverse structural hypotheses with adaptive refinement. Several key techniques are employed in LEAF-SQL: (1) a three-level skeleton hierarchy to guide the search, (2) a Skeleton Formulation Agent to generate diverse candidates, and (3) a Skeleton Evaluation Agent to efficiently prune the search space. This integrated design yields skeleton candidates that are both structurally diverse and granularity-adaptive, providing a stronger foundation for the SQL generation. Extensive experiments show that LEAF-SQL consistently improves the performance of various LLM backbones. On the official hidden test set of the challenging BIRD benchmark, our method achieves 71.6 execution accuracy, which outperforms leading search-based and skeleton-based methods, affirming its effectiveness for complex queries.

</details>


### [382] [Mem-W: Latent Memory-Native GUI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09317)
*Guibin Zhang,Yaohui Ling,Fanci Meng,Kun Wang,Shuicheng Yan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出Mem-W模型，使GUI智能体能更原生、连续地融入和利用记忆信息，在Web和移动导航等任务中大幅提升智能体表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前的GUI智能体在Web、移动和桌面环境操作时，智能体需要携带时序与任务信息，但现有方法通常将记忆以文本或结构化数据形式存储，再次输入模型时需要重新编码，与实际策略模型处理的数据形式不一致，导致信息利用效率受限。

Method: 作者提出Mem-W体系，将GUI智能体的记忆作为连续上下文的一部分而非额外符号输入。具体做法是：将历史轨迹和会话数据通过统一的轨迹到隐空间压缩器转化为紧凑的记忆token，然后与当前GUI观测及上下文共同嵌入为一段连续embedding序列，实现行为决策对经历、进展、上下文的同时感知和高效利用。模型通过自蒸馏和结果感知式监督训练，筛选有助于成功决策的关键信息。

Result: 在四个Web和移动导航基准任务上，Mem-W不仅对不同基础模型和现有增强记忆方法都产生提升，最大性能改进达到+30.0，展现了显著的通用性和有效性。

Conclusion: 以隐空间上下文为核心的记忆方式，为长期GUI操作智能体提供了强有力的可扩展基础，相比传统的显式、外部记忆架构有着更高效和自然的表达与利用能力。

Abstract: GUI agents are beginning to operate the web, mobile, and desktop as interactive worlds, where successful control depends on carrying forward visual, procedural, and task-level evidence beyond the fleeting present screen. Yet most agents still treat memory as an external, human-readable artifact: histories are summarized, categorized, retrieved, and reinserted as text or structured records before being encoded again by the policy. This creates a mismatch between the representational form in which experience is stored and the latent embedding sequence over which modern GUI policies actually act. We introduce Mem-W, a series of latent-memory-native GUI agents that treat memory as part of the agent's continuous context rather than as an auxiliary symbolic scaffold. Mem-W weaves both historical trajectories (as experiential memory) and in-session segments (as working memory) into compact memory tokens through a shared trajectory-to-latent compressor. These tokens are woven with the current GUI observation and local context into one continuous embedding sequence, allowing the agent to read successes, failures, and unfinished progress through the same machine-native interface. Mem-W is trained with self-distillation and outcome-aware supervision to preserve decision-relevant state while filtering memory toward evidence that truly supports task success. Across four web and mobile navigation benchmarks, Mem-W consistently improves diverse backbones and memory-enhanced baselines, with gains of up to $+30.0$, suggesting that latent-context-native memory can serve as a scalable foundation for long-horizon GUI agency.

</details>


### [383] [Test-Time Speculation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09329)
*Avinash Kumar,Sujay Sanghavi,Poulami Das*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种提升大模型推理加速方法的新策略——测试时推理（Test-Time Speculation, TTS）。该方法通过在线自适应优化，实现长文本生成场景下的持续加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的推测解码方法（如DFlash, EAGLE-3, PARD）借助速度较快的草稿模型生成草稿，再用高精度目标模型验证。然而，在长文本生成时，这些方法的“接受长度”（一次通过被目标模型接受的draft token数量）迅速下降，几乎无法带来加速，主要原因是draft模型训练时仅用到了短序列，推理时分布与训练不符。

Method: 作者提出了测试时推理（TTS），这是一种在线蒸馏方法。该方法利用draft模型和target模型的每一次交互，在推理过程持续自适应地优化/微调draft模型，无需额外推理开销，将验证过程直接作为draft模型训练信号，使draft与target的分布逐步对齐。

Result: 在Qwen-3、Qwen-3.5和Llama3.1等多个主流大模型上的实验表明，TTS方法相较于现有最优推测方法，接受长度平均提升最大可达72%，平均提升41%，且随生成长度越大优势越明显。

Conclusion: TTS有效解决了长文本生成中推测解码速度下降的问题，通过在线自适应优化，在实际推理中可稳定提升接受率，大幅增强推测解码的适用范围和效益。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by using a fast draft model to generate tokens and a more accurate target model to verify them. Its performance depends on the $\textit{acceptance length}$, or number of draft tokens accepted by the target. Our studies show that the acceptance length of even state-of-the-art speculators, like DFlash, EAGLE-3 and PARD degrade with generation length, reaching values close to 1 (i.e. no speedup) within just a few thousand output tokens, making speculators ineffective for long-response tasks. Acceptance lengths decline because most speculators are trained offline on short sequences, but are forced to match the target model on much longer outputs at inference, well beyond their training distribution.
  To address this issue, we propose $\textit{Test-Time Speculation (TTS)}$, an online distillation approach that continuously adapts the speculator at test-time. TTS leverages the key insight that the token verification step already invokes the target model for each draft token, providing the training signal needed to adapt the draft at no additional cost. Treating the draft as the student and the target as a teacher, TTS adjusts the draft over several speculation rounds, with each update improving the draft's accuracy as generation proceeds. Our results across multiple models from the Qwen-3, Qwen-3.5, and Llama3.1 families show that TTS improves acceptance lengths over state-of-the-art speculators by up to $72\%$ and $41\%$ on average, with the benefits scaling with increased generation lengths.

</details>


### [384] [RuPLaR : Efficient Latent Compression of LLM Reasoning Chains with Rule-Based Priors From Multi-Step to One-Step](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09346)
*Xiaocheng Luo,Kang Wang,Zaifu Zhan,Yuechi Zhou,Xiangyu Duan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的Latent Chain-of-Thought（潜在思维链）推理压缩框架RuPLaR，称为One-Model One-Step，能大幅提升推理准确率与效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CoT方法虽然提升了大语言模型的可解释性，但受限于自然语言表达的低效率和表达瓶颈。潜在CoT将推理在“潜空间”中进行，理论上更高效，但多步或多模型方案易产生误差传播和协调开销。

Method: 设计了One-Model One-Step压缩框架，利用基于规则的先验（rule-based prior）概率分布指导大语言模型在单阶段自主生成潜在推理token。联合训练目标包括答案一致性损失（交叉熵）、token与先验对齐（KL散度）、以及问题与思维在表示空间的语义对齐。

Result: 实验证明，该方法在准确率上超越现有潜在CoT 11.1%，且显著减少token消耗，效果优越且具备良好可扩展性。

Conclusion: One-Model One-Step的提出突破了潜在推理方法的瓶颈，为高效可扩展的大语言模型推理机制提供了新途径。

Abstract: The Chain-of-Thought (CoT) paradigm, while enhancing the interpretability of Large Language Models (LLMs), is constrained by the inefficiencies and expressive limits of natural language. Latent Chain-of-Thought (latent CoT) reasoning, which operates in a continuous latent space, offers a promising alternative but faces challenges from structural complexities in existing multi-step or multi-model paradigms, such as error propagation and coordination overhead. In this paper, we introduce One-Model One-Step, a novel compression framework for Latent Reasoning with Rule-Based Priors(RuPLaR) to address this challenge. Our method trains an LLM to autonomously generate latent reasoning tokens in a single training stage, guided by rule-based prior probability distributions, thereby eliminating cascaded processes and inter-model dependencies. To ensure reasoning quality, we design a joint training objective that enforces answer consistency via cross-entropy, aligns soft tokens with rule-based priors via KL divergence (the Soft Thinking constraint), and adds a problem-thought semantic alignment constraint in the representation space. Extensive experiments show that our compression framework not only improves accuracy by 11.1% over existing latent CoT methods but also achieves this with minimal token usage, underscoring its effectiveness and extensibility. Code: https://github.com/xiaocen-luo/RuPLaR.

</details>


### [385] [HOME-KGQA: A Benchmark Dataset for Multimodal Knowledge Graph Question Answering on Household Daily Activities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09348)
*Shusaku Egami,Aoi Ohta,Tomoki Tsujimura,Masaki Asada,Tatsuya Ishigaki,Ken Fukuda,Masahiro Hamasaki,Hiroya Takamura*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了HOME-KGQA，一个基于多模态家庭日常活动知识图谱的问答数据集，旨在弥补现有数据集在多样性和现实场景中的不足。实验发现，现有基于大语言模型的KGQA方法在本数据集上的表现远不及以往，暴露了现实场景下KGQA系统的重大挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KGQA数据集偏向百科知识、单一模态且缺乏细粒度时空数据，限制了其在具身智能及真实世界应用中的适用性。作者希望通过引入更复杂、多模态及时空推理结合的数据，推动KGQA在真实环境中的发展。

Method: 作者构建了HOME-KGQA数据集。该数据集基于描述家庭日常活动的多模态知识图谱，包含复杂的多跳自然语言问题以及对应的图数据库查询语言。题目涵盖多级时空推理、多模态对齐和聚合函数等，挑战显著高于现有数据集。

Result: 实验表明，当前主流的大语言模型KGQA方法在HOME-KGQA上的表现明显落后于在传统数据集上的成绩，显示出在多模态时空推理等方面的不足。

Conclusion: HOME-KGQA暴露了当前方法在现实家庭场景下的重大短板，对推动KGQA系统向真实环境落地具有重要意义。未来需要重点攻关多模态推理、时空信息与现实场景融合等关键问题。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) provide flexible natural language processing capabilities, while knowledge graphs (KGs) offer explicit and structured knowledge. Integrating these two in a complementary manner enables the development of reliable and verifiable AI systems. In particular, knowledge graph question answering (KGQA) has attracted attention as a means to reduce LLM hallucinations and to leverage knowledge beyond the training data. However, existing KGQA benchmark datasets are biased toward encyclopedic knowledge, limited to a single modality, and lack fine-grained spatiotemporal data, which limits their applicability to real-world scenarios targeted by Embodied AI. We introduce HOME-KGQA, a novel KGQA benchmark dataset built on a multimodal KG of daily household activities. HOME-KGQA consists of complex, multi-hop natural language questions paired with graph database query languages. Compared to existing benchmarks, it includes more challenging questions that involve multi-level spatiotemporal reasoning, multimodal grounding, and aggregate functions. Experimental results show that the LLM-based KGQA methods fail to achieve performance comparable to that on existing datasets when evaluated on HOME-KGQA. This highlights significant challenges that should be addressed for the real-world deployment of KGQA systems. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/aistairc/home-kgqa

</details>


### [386] [Cross-Cultural Transfer of Emoji Semantics and Sentiment in Financial Social Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09414)
*Ahmed Mahrous,Roberto Di Pietro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了表情符号（emoji）在不同语言、社区和平台的金融通信中，作为情感信号的可转移性，并评估了仅用表情符号、仅用文本及二者结合的情感模型在跨场景下的表现。结果表明，表情符号的语义和情感极性具有较强一致性，能提升情感模型的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管表情符号被广泛用于网上金融交流，但其是否能作为通用、跨语言和跨平台的情感信号仍不明确。理解表情符号能否作为高效、共享的情感载体有助于提升金融情感分析模型的泛化能力和适应性。

Method: 作者收集了Twitter和StockTwits四种语言的大规模帖子，分析表情符号在不同金融资产、社区和语言间的频率、语义与情感极性稳定性，并对比仅用表情、仅用文本、及二者结合的情感分析模型在跨社区、跨语言迁移任务中的效果。

Result: 表情符号使用频率因社区和语言不同而有较大差异，但其语义和情感极性在不同社区间大体一致。跨资产迁移中模型性能下降有限，跨语言迁移最具挑战性。包含表情符号的模型在情感转移上总体优于仅文本模型。

Conclusion: 金融社区间存在部分共享的“表情符号代码”，表情符号能作为紧凑、语言无关的情感线索，有效促进模型在不同市场和平台间的泛化能力。

Abstract: Emojis are widely used in online financial communication, but it is unclear whether they provide transferable sentiment signals across languages, platforms, and asset communities. This study examines the extent to which emoji usage, semantics, and sentiment polarity remain stable across financial communities, and how these layers influence zero-shot sentiment transfer. Using large corpora of Twitter and StockTwits posts in four languages, we measure cross-community divergence and evaluate sentiment models trained under emoji-only, text-only, and text+emoji inputs.
  We find that emoji frequencies differ across communities, especially across languages, but their semantics and sentiment polarity are largely stable. Cross-asset transferability shows minimal degradation, while cross-language transfer remains the most challenging. Including emojis consistently reduces transfer gaps relative to text-only models. These results indicate that financial communication exhibits a partially shared ``emoji code,'' and that emojis provide compact, language-independent sentiment cues that improve model generalization across markets and platforms.

</details>


### [387] [Perception Without Engagement: Dissecting the Causal Discovery Deficit in LMMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09422)
*Jiafeng Liang,Zhihao Zhu,Zihan Zhang,Baoqi Ren,Shixin Jiang,Runxuan Liu,Tao Ren,Ming Liu,See-Kiong Ng,Bing Qin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对大规模多模态模型（LMMs）在因果发现任务中过于依赖文本先验、忽视视觉信息的问题，提出了新的评测协议和优化方法，以全面分析并缓解该缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态模型在视频理解上表现强劲，但在推理因果关系时容易受文本先验影响，导致不能充分利用视频内容；并且现有评测方法难以揭示问题根源和程度。

Method: 提出ProCauEval评测协议，基于扰动法有系统地操控视觉和文本模态，剖析模型中二者对因果推理的贡献及失效模式。并提出ADPO（Anti-Distillation Policy Optimization）强化学习框架，通过与基于视觉腐化的“文字先验教师”负对齐，显性促进模型根据视觉证据推理。

Result: 评测17个主流LMM发现：模型虽然感知视频内容，但因果推理时主要依赖文本先验，强化训练后反而加剧此问题；基础性能越强，对扰动的脆弱性越高。ADPO实验显示，模型视觉参与度提升，同时保持理解能力。

Conclusion: ProCauEval能揭示因果推理失效根源，ADPO方法可提升模型利用视觉证据进行因果发现的可靠性，推动多模态因果推理稳健发展。

Abstract: Although Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have achieved strong performance on general video understanding, their susceptibility to textual prior shortcuts during causal discovery has been recognized as a critical deficit. The underlying mechanisms of this phenomenon remain incompletely understood, as existing benchmarks only measure response accuracy without revealing the sources and extent of the deficit. We introduce ProCauEval, a perturbation-based evaluation protocol that shifts from outcome assessment to mechanism diagnosis, probing causal discovery through five controlled configurations that systematically manipulate visual and textual modalities to decompose their respective contributions to model behavior and dissect the failure modes. Evaluating 17 mainstream LMMs, we find that models faithfully perceive video content yet systematically underexploit it during causal reasoning. We further observe that stronger post-training amplifies rather than mitigates textual prior reliance, and that higher baseline performance correlates with greater fragility under perturbation. To address these, we propose Anti-Distillation Policy Optimization (ADPO), a reinforcement learning framework built on negative teacher alignment, which augments GRPO by explicitly pushing the policy away from a prior-only counterfactual teacher induced by visual corruption. Specifically, ADPO maximizes the divergence between the policy distributions conditioned on the original and visually corrupted inputs, thereby forcing the model to ground its reasoning in visual evidence rather than textual shortcuts. Extensive experiments show that ADPO improves visual engagement without sacrificing fundamental comprehension, thus offering a preliminary step toward reliable causal discovery.

</details>


### [388] [PumpSense: Real-Time Detection and Target Extraction of Crypto Pump-and-Dumps on Telegram](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09431)
*Ahmed Mahrous,Roberto Di Pietro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种针对Telegram上加密货币拉盘骗局的实时检测方法，并构建了公开的大规模消息级标注数据集。基于该数据集，作者训练了机器学习模型，实现了高效且准确的拉盘消息识别与目标币种/交易所抽取。与以往依赖市场数据的滞后检测不同，本文方案可在单条消息层面几乎实时做出警报。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究面对Telegram发起的加密货币拉盘骗局时，未能兼顾准确性与响应速度。主要难点在于缺乏公开、细粒度的标注消息数据，以及检测方法的局限性。对此，作者希望通过构建高质量数据集和实时算法，提升预警能力。

Method: 作者收集并人工标注了来自39个Telegram拉盘群的逾28万条消息，明确判定了其中2,246条拉盘公告及其目标币种与交易所。在此基础上，作者提出两项任务：实时拉盘公告检测、目标币种/交易所抽取，并分别对比了LightGBM及Transformer模型（如BGE-M3），以及传统规则法与大语言模型在信息抽取任务的表现。

Result: BGE-M3模型实现了F1为0.83、单条消息延迟仅50毫秒的检测效果，优于传统的LightGBM方法。对于币种/交易所抽取，传统规则方法因符号歧义失效，LLM方案取得了最高0.91的准确率。

Conclusion: 作者证明了直接对Telegram协调消息进行实时分析对预警拉盘骗局极为有效，响应速度大大快于仅分析市场数据的做法，为市场监管提供了新路径。同时，公开了首个大规模手工标注的拉盘消息数据集，并设立了相关任务基准，有助于后续研究及应用推广。

Abstract: Cryptocurrency pump-and-dump schemes coordinated via Telegram threaten market integrity. However, existing research addressing this specific threat has not yet produced solutions that combine reliable results with fast response. This is in part due to the absence of publicly available, message-level labeled data, as well as design choices. In this paper, we address both issues. In particular, we introduce a corpus of over 280,000 Telegram posts from 39 pump-organizing groups, all manually reviewed to identify 2,246 pump announcements and their targeted cryptocurrency and exchange. Leveraging this dataset, we define two tasks: real-time pump-announcement detection and target cryptocurrency/exchange extraction. For detection, we compare two machine-learning models: a lightweight tree-based LightGBM classifier (F1=0.79, latency=9.4 s/sample) and a transformer-based BGE-M3 (F1=0.83, latency=50 ms/sample). With our proposed approach, we show that message analysis can achieve near-instant pump detection at the level of individual Telegram message windows. Unlike prior work that relies purely on market data and typically detects pumps tens of seconds after abnormal trading activity is observed, our method operates directly on the coordination messages themselves and can be evaluated in microseconds per window on commodity hardware. To our knowledge, we also establish the first benchmark for manipulated coin and exchange extraction. We demonstrate that traditional rule-based extraction methods, widely relied upon in prior literature, are ineffective due to ticker ambiguity. In contrast, LLMs achieve the highest accuracy with a score of 0.91.

</details>


### [389] [Key Coverage Matters: Semi-Structured Extraction of OCR Clinical Reports](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09440)
*Yu Wang,Yingyun Li,Ying Qin,Haiyang Qian*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对OCR提取的临床报告，基于关键字段条件的抽取式问答方法，有效提升了信息整合与下游任务的准确率，并提出了关键字段覆盖率作为性能主导指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床报告因隐私和数据孤岛而分散在不同医疗机构，造成医疗信息整合困难，影响病人管理、实时随访等应用。现有OCR虽可数字化纸质报告，但信息抽取受文档异构、噪声等问题影响显著。

Method: 将OCR获得的临床报告抽取任务转化为开放型关键字段条件抽取式问答，采用关键字段挖掘、归一化、聚类和人工轻验，形成规范关键字段清单，并提出关键覆盖率指标。基于0.2B参数的BERT模型，在多院实际报告上进行实验。

Result: 实验表明，关键覆盖率越高模型表现越好，Top-90关键覆盖下，模型在准确匹配和边界容错匹配上F1分别达0.839和0.893，且优于微调版Qwen3-0.6B模型。

Conclusion: 关键字段覆盖率是端到端性能的主导因素。方法具备语言无关性，只需适用的关键字段体系和别名映射，能推广至其他语种和设置。

Abstract: Clinical reports are often fragmented across healthcare institutions because privacy regulations and data silos limit direct information sharing. When patients seek care at a different hospital, they often carry paper or scanned reports from prior visits. This hinders EHR integration and longitudinal review, and downstream applications that depend on more complete patient records, such as patient management, follow-up care, real-world studies, and clinical-trial matching. Although OCR can digitize such reports, reliable extraction remains challenging because clinical documents are heterogeneous, OCR text is noisy, and many healthcare settings require low-cost on-premise deployment. We formulate this problem as canonical key-conditioned extractive question answering over OCR-derived clinical reports. Because the key fields are neither fixed nor known in advance, the key space is open. We maintain a canonical key inventory through iterative key mining, normalization, clustering, and lightweight human verification, and introduce key coverage as a metric to quantify inventory completeness. Using a 0.2B BERT-based model, experiments on real-world reports from more than 20 hospitals show performance improves monotonically with key coverage. The model achieves F1 scores of 0.839 and 0.893 under exact match and boundary-tolerant matching, respectively, once the Top-90 canonical keys are covered. These results show that key coverage is a dominant factor for end-to-end performance. At Top-90 coverage, our model outperforms a fine-tuned Qwen3-0.6B baseline under exact match. Although our annotated corpus is Chinese, the method relies on the language-agnostic key-value organization of semi-structured clinical reports and can be adapted to other settings given an appropriate canonical key inventory and alias mapping.

</details>


### [390] [Beyond Position Bias: Shifting Context Compression from Position-Driven to Semantic-Driven](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09463)
*Jiwei Tang,Zhijing Huang,Xinyu Zhang,Chen Jason Zhang,Jianxing Yu,Libin Zheng,Rui Meng,Jian Yin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的LLM上下文压缩方法，突破了以往方法的位置信息偏见，通过语义驱动实现高效、稳定的上下文压缩，并在多个基准上取得了更优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长上下文处理方法计算开销大，且常出现信息冗余。软提示压缩虽可改善，但受固定位置信息影响，导致表现不稳定及语义割裂。

Method: 提出了SeCo方法，将上下文压缩从物理位置驱动转为语义驱动：动态选择与查询最相关的token作为语义中心，其余token依据语义一致性加权聚合，实现消除位置偏见并保持语义一致性。

Result: 在2个主干模型和14个基准任务上广泛测试，SeCo在下游任务表现、推理延迟和域外鲁棒性上均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: SeCo方法有效消除了压缩时的位置偏见并保持语义一致性，提升了LLM在长上下文任务中的效率和鲁棒性，有望推动该领域应用。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional performance across diverse tasks. However, their deployment in long-context scenarios faces high computational overhead and information redundancy. While soft prompt compression has emerged as a promising way to mitigate these costs by compressing sequences into compact embeddings, existing paradigms remain fundamentally constrained by position bias: they primarily rely on learnable tokens insertion at fixed positions or group tokens according to their physical token layout, thereby inducing performance instability and semantic fragmentation. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose Semantic Consistency Context Compression (SeCo), a method that shifts context compression from position-driven to semantic-driven. Rather than constraint by physical token layout, SeCo dynamically anchors compression directly in the semantic space by selecting query-relevant tokens as semantic centers and aggregating remaining tokens via consistency-weighted merging. This design inherently preserves semantic consistency while eliminating position bias. Extensive experiments on 14 benchmarks across two backbone models demonstrate that SeCo consistently shows superiority in downstream tasks, inference latency, and out-of-domain robustness. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/seco-EE5E.

</details>


### [391] [FinMoji: A Framework for Emoji-driven Sentiment Analysis in Financial Social Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09469)
*Ahmed Mahrous,Roberto Di Pietro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文探讨了在金融情感分析中单独使用表情符号作为市场情绪指标的可行性，发现虽然准确率不及文本结合模型，但有较高效率和实际应用价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着表情符号在社交媒体上的广泛使用，研究其作为投资者情绪简明指征的潜力，尤其在股市相关社交平台（如StockTwits）背景下，可以为市场趋势预测提供新方法。

Method: 作者利用包含52.8万条含有表情符号的StockTwits帖子为数据集，分别采用逻辑回归和transformer模型，比较了仅用表情符号、文本-表情符号结合情感分类模型的效果，包括性能评估、计算效率及数据需求分析。

Result: 仅使用表情符号的情感分析模型F1值约为0.75，低于文本-表情符号结合模型的0.88，但其计算成本显著更低；部分表情符号及其配对对市场情绪预测有极强的区分力，准确率超过90%。

Conclusion: 表情符号虽不如文本结合模型准确，但在高频交易等对时效性要求高的场景下具备效率优势。金融社交语境中的表情符号用法与一般社交媒体有显著统计差异，强调开发领域专属情感分析模型的必要性。

Abstract: This paper explores the use of emojis in financial sentiment analysis, focusing on the social media platform StockTwits. Emojis, increasingly prevalent in digital communication, have potential as compact indicators of investor sentiment, which can be critical for predicting market trends. Our study examines whether emojis alone can serve as reliable proxies for financial sentiment and how they compare with traditional text-based analysis. We conduct a series of experiments using logistic regression and transformer models. We further analyze the performance, computational efficiency, and data requirements of emoji-based versus text-based sentiment classification. Using a balanced dataset of about 528,000 emoji-containing StockTwits posts, we find that emoji-only models achieve F1 approximately 0.75, lower than text-emoji combined models, which achieve F1 approximately 0.88, but with far lower computational cost. This is a useful feature in time-sensitive settings such as high-frequency trading. Furthermore, certain emojis and emoji pairs exhibit strong predictive power for market sentiment, demonstrating over 90 percent accuracy in predicting bullish or bearish trends. Finally, our research reveals large statistical differences in emoji usage between financial and general social media contexts, stressing the need for domain-specific sentiment analysis models.

</details>


### [392] [Align and Shine: Building High-Quality Sentence-Aligned Corpora for Multilingual Text Simplification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09476)
*Kenji Hilasaca,Nouran Khallaf,Serge Sharoff*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一个多语种文本简化数据集的构建，实现了句子级对齐，并公开发布该数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非英语的高质量文本简化数据集匮乏，制约了相关模型的训练与评估。

Method: 利用众包方式，从可比语料中收集多语种简化数据；提出从文档级到句子级的对齐机制，构建句对数据集。

Result: 构建了涵盖加泰罗尼亚语、英语、法语、意大利语和西班牙语的简化句对数据集，并公开发布。

Conclusion: 该数据集为多语种文本简化任务提供了重要资源，为相关系统的训练和测试带来了便利。

Abstract: Text simplification plays a crucial role in improving the accessibility and comprehensibility of written information for diverse audiences, including language learners and readers with limited literacy. Despite its importance, large-scale, high-quality datasets for training and evaluating text simplification models remain scarce for languages other than English. This paper reports an experimental study on the collection and processing of crowd-sourced simplification data from comparable corpora to construct a corpus suitable for both training and testing text simplification systems across multiple languages (Catalan, English, French, Italian and Spanish). We report mechanisms for sentence-level alignment from document-level data. The resulting dataset of the aligned sentence pairs is publicly available.

</details>


### [393] [A Cognitively Grounded Bayesian Framework for Misinformation Susceptibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09483)
*Pranava Madhyastha*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一个名为有界实用听者（BPL）的新贝叶斯框架，用于模拟信息失序易感性的认知机制，并在多个基准数据集上验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 信息失序（misinformation、disinformation、mal-information）在现代社会中广泛传播，深刻影响人类认知和社会决策。现有模型通常缺乏对人类认知局限的刻画，因此有必要构建一个认知基础扎实的模型，以更好解释和预测人们对信息失序的敏感度。

Method: 在理性言语行为（Rational Speech Act）理论的基础上，扩展引入了三个反映有界理性文献的认知限制：递归深度上限（反映工作记忆极限）、先验压缩参数（反映信息瓶颈）以及可用样本数量（以显著性加权的重要性采样操作）。该方法可以量化并测试不同类型信息失序下，个体易感性的认知机制。

Result: 在LIAR和MultiFC等事实核查数据集上，BPL框架表现出了有竞争力的真实性分类能力；实验证明该模型能有效解释深度错配悖论，并获得了与理论预测一致的实验支持。

Conclusion: BPL作为一个结合认知有界性的贝叶斯模型，能够更准确地预测个体对不同类型的信息失序的易感性，为未来信息传播、事实核查和公共认知防护等领域的研究提供了新工具和理论基础。

Abstract: In this (work in progress) paper, we present Bounded Pragmatic Listener (or BPL), a cognitively grounded Bayesian framework for modelling susceptibility to information disorder. BPL extends Rational Speech Act theory with three cognitively motivated bounds derived from the bounded rationality literature with a) a recursion depth bound (that emphasises working memory limits);b) a prior compression parameter (which is oriented at capturing information bottleneck); and c) an availability sample size (that operationalises importance sampling with saliency-weighted proposals). This allows us to test predictions about misinformation susceptibility, annotator disagreement, and the differential vulnerability to mis-, dis-, and mal-information as defined in the Information Disorder framework. We validate BPL on the LIAR and MultiFC benchmarks showcasing competitive veracity classification and experimental support for the depth-mismatch paradox.

</details>


### [394] [Not All Thoughts Need HBM: Semantics-Aware Memory Hierarchy for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09490)
*Aojie Yuan,Tianqi Shen,Dajun Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种语义感知的内存层次结构，将LLM链式推理产生的KV缓存按重要性分层存储于GPU、CPU及压缩层，以显著降低宝贵GPU显存需求，同时保持几乎无损的推理准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM推理需存储大量链式思维token的KV缓存，这对高带宽GPU显存有巨大压力。现有做法主要通过永久移除低重要性token，但这会极大损失模型准确率。作者重新思考：是否有必要所有token都驻留GPU显存？能否把部分迁移至其他存储空间？

Method: 提出一种四层内存层次结构（GPU HBM、CPU DDR、压缩、永久移除），通过token累计注意力分数进行排序和分层。重要性低的token先迁移至CPU内存，推理时再全精度回读参与注意力计算，实现“零近似误差迁移”。同时系统性实验（3×3网格、不同模型规模、多数据集）验证设计有效性，并与现有SOTA方法R-KV直接对比。

Result: 当仅3% token被永久移除时（其余迁移至CPU等分层存储），GSM8K任务准确率可保留91%，MATH-500上可达71%；在14B规模模型上完全匹配未压缩基线，但GPU显存占用减半。实际系统原型测试中，显存换取的代价仅为5-7%带宽开销，批量推理时可节省2-48GB显存。SOTA方法R-KV在相同预算下准确率远低于本文方法。

Conclusion: 不用所有token都常驻GPU显存，通过语义分层迁移可大大降低GPU显存压力，几乎不损失推理准确率，新方法显著优于现有token驱逐策略，为大模型推理提供了成本可控的扩展路径。

Abstract: Reasoning LLMs produce thousands of chain-of-thought tokens whose KV cache must reside in scarce GPU HBM. The dominant response -- permanently evicting low-importance tokens -- is catastrophic for reasoning: accuracy collapses to 0-2.5% when half the cache is removed. We ask a different question: must every token live in HBM, or can some live elsewhere? We introduce a semantics-aware memory hierarchy that sorts tokens into four tiers -- HBM, DDR, compressed, and evicted -- using cumulative attention scoring. Low-importance tokens are moved to CPU memory rather than destroyed; before each attention step they are prefetched back at full precision, contributing exactly the same terms as if they had never left the GPU. We formalize this as zero-approximation-error offloading and derive our central finding: accuracy depends solely on how many tokens are permanently discarded (the eviction ratio), not on how many remain in HBM. A controlled 3x3 grid over HBM and eviction ratios confirms this across three model scales (7B-32B) and four benchmarks. With only 3% eviction, the hierarchy retains 91% of full-cache accuracy on GSM8K and 71% on MATH-500 (n=200); at 14B scale it matches the uncompressed baseline (90% vs. 86%) while halving HBM occupancy. A head-to-head reproduction of R-KV -- the current SOTA eviction method -- on our setup achieves only 0-32% at comparable budgets. A system prototype with real GPU-CPU data movement shows that the price of this preservation is modest -- 5-7% transfer overhead -- and scaling analysis projects 2-48 GB HBM savings at production batch sizes.

</details>


### [395] [APCD: Adaptive Path-Contrastive Decoding for Reliable Large Language Model Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09492)
*Tianyu Zheng,Hong Wu,Jiaji Zhong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文提出了自适应路径对比解码（APCD），一种新的多路径解码框架，通过控制分支时机和路径间影响，提升大语言模型输出的可靠性和事实准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在自回归生成过程中，早期的次优token选择会累积错误，导致“幻觉”现象。虽然多路径解码可以增强鲁棒性，但目前缺乏明确的分支时机和路径交互调控机制。

Method: 提出APCD框架，核心包括两部分：（1）基于熵的路径扩展，当候选Token分布的不确定性（Shannon熵）较大时才进行分支，避免无效探索；（2）基于分布发散度的路径对比，当不同路径的预测分布差异加大时，动态减少路径间的影响，促进多样化推理。

Result: 在8个基准数据集上实验，APCD提升了输出的事实准确性，同时保持了解码效率。

Conclusion: APCD能有效控制分支和路径互动，提升大语言模型输出质量，为多路径解码提供了更为系统化的方法。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often suffer from hallucinations due to error accumulation in autoregressive decoding, where suboptimal early token choices misguide subsequent generation. Although multi-path decoding can improve robustness by exploring alternative trajectories, existing methods lack principled strategies for determining when to branch and how to regulate inter-path interactions. We propose Adaptive Path-Contrastive Decoding (APCD), a multi-path decoding framework that improves output reliability through adaptive exploration and controlled path interaction. APCD consists of two components: (1) Entropy-Driven Path Expansion, which delays branching until predictive uncertainty - measured by Shannon entropy over top candidate tokens - indicates multiple plausible continuations; and (2) Divergence-Aware Path Contrast, which encourages diverse reasoning trajectories while dynamically attenuating inter-path influence as prediction distributions diverge. Experiments on eight benchmarks demonstrate improved factual accuracy while maintaining decoding efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/zty-king/APCD.

</details>


### [396] [Beyond Language: Format-Agnostic Reasoning Subspaces in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09496)
*Aojie Yuan,Zhiyuan Su*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出TriForm Benchmark，研究大模型在不同符号系统（英语、代码、数学）下推理是否有共有内部表征，发现中间层存在形式无关性推理子空间（FARS），并定量测出FARS特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大语言模型能在多种形式（如文字、代码、数学）中展现推理能力，但目前未知它们在内部是否存在共享的推理表征。论文旨在探索多形式表达下，模型内部是否有“普适”推理结构。

Method: 构建TriForm Benchmark（涵盖18个概念的6种表达形式），在5个不同参数量、结构的LLM上，通过排列检验RSA、跨形式探针、激活打补丁等方法，量化分析模型中间层的信息表征。同時提出用concept-centroid PCA抽取并操作形式无关性子空间。

Result: 发现中间层存在非特定形式的推理子空间（FARS），其十维PCA子空间极大增强了模型对概念的表达并有效消除了形式信息。在跨形式打补丁实验中，仅替换这十维就能保留90-96%的推理输出，全激活替换仅44-56%。FARS对未见概念和不同结构模型有良好泛化。

Conclusion: LLMs内部存在形式无关推理子空间，支持“柏拉图式表征”假设。模型表征在叙述性（prose/数学）和程序性（代码）间存在显著不对称，为理解多模态和推理机制提供依据。

Abstract: Large language models represent the same reasoning in vastly different surface forms -- English prose, Python code, mathematical notation -- yet whether they share a common internal substrate across these symbolic systems remains unknown. We introduce the TriForm Benchmark (18 concepts x 6 forms x 3 instances = 324 stimuli) and study five LLMs (1.6B-8B) across three architecture families. Using permutation-corrected RSA, cross-form probing, and activation patching, we find converging evidence for a Format-Agnostic Reasoning Subspace (FARS) in middle layers. We make FARS concrete: concept-centroid PCA extracts a 10-dimensional subspace that amplifies concept structure 3x while suppressing form information to near zero. Replacing only these 10 dimensions during cross-form patching preserves 90-96% of model output -- far exceeding both full activation replacement (44-56%) and variance-maximizing PCA (60-74%) -- while ablating them causes targeted disruption. FARS generalizes to held-out concepts and converges across architectures (CCA > 0.79 for all model pairs), providing within-modality evidence for the Platonic Representation Hypothesis. We further discover a declarative-procedural asymmetry: representations are far more compatible between prose and mathematics than between either and code, suggesting that the critical axis of divergence is not linguistic vs. formal but declarative vs. procedural.

</details>


### [397] [Hidden Error Awareness in Chain-of-Thought Reasoning: The Signal Is Diagnostic, Not Causal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09502)
*Aojie Yuan,Zhiyuan Julian Su,Haiyue Zhang,Yi Nian,Yue Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文研究了大模型在chain-of-thought推理生成时，模型内部是否真的如输出文本所呈现那样自信。结果表明，模型即使在内部检测到了推理错误，仍然会在输出上表现出高自信，且生成文本无法暴露这种错误意识；而线性探针等方法可以在早期识别错误推理。进一步尝试用这些内部信号修正推理错误失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前CoT推理假设生成的推理过程真实反映了模型内部的思考过程，并且输出的自信与其实际计算的正确性相关性很高。但实际上，这一假设没有被证实，理解模型如何内化错误推理具有重要的理论与应用意义。

Method: 作者在多个模型（Qwen, Llama, Phi等）与不同规模参数下，采用线性探针方法分析模型隐藏层状态，评估其对推理正确性的预测能力，并将其与模型生成文本（表面输出）的自信程度对比。还尝试使用激活干预、probe-guided best-of-N、self-correction等方法纠正推理错误。

Result: 线性探针在隐藏态上能以0.95 AUROC准确预测推理正确性，而模型的语言输出几乎无法区分错误与正确推理时的自信程度，表面分类器准确率仅0.59。尝试通过激活干预等方式对抗这种内部错误信号修正推理，但并未成功。

Conclusion: 大模型推理过程中存在隐藏的错误意识（internal error awareness），但这种信号仅具备诊断价值，无法作为纠正推理错误的因果杠杆。CoT推理内部的错误表示与事实知识不同，机制可解释性领域需对此加以区分。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting assumes that generated reasoning reflects a model's internal computation. We show this assumption is wrong in a specific, measurable way: models internally detect their own reasoning errors but outwardly express confidence in them. A linear probe on hidden states predicts trace correctness with 0.95 AUROC -- from the very first reasoning step (0.79) -- while verbalized confidence for wrong traces is 4.55/5, nearly identical to correct ones (4.87/5). A text-surface classifier achieves only 0.59 on the same data, confirming a 0.20-point gap invisible in the generated text. This hidden error awareness holds across three model families (Qwen, Llama, Phi), 1.5B-72B parameters, and RL-trained reasoning models (DeepSeek-R1, 0.852 AUROC). The natural question is whether this signal can fix the errors it detects. It cannot. Four interventions -- activation steering, probe-guided best-of-N, self-correction, and activation patching -- all fail; patching destroys output coherence entirely. The signal is diagnostic, not causal: a readout of computation quality, not a lever to redirect it. This delineates a boundary for mechanistic interpretability: error representations during reasoning are fundamentally different from the factual knowledge representations that prior work has successfully edited.

</details>


### [398] [Assessment of RAG and Fine-Tuning for Industrial Question-Answering-Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09533)
*Jakob Sturm,Josef Pichlmeier,Christian Bernhard,Maka Karalashvili,Johannes Klepsch,Georg Groh,Andre Luckow*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文比较了在企业问答系统中，结合领域知识的两种主流方法——检索增强生成（RAG）和微调（FT）的成本与准确性表现。结果显示RAG在准确性和成本效率上均优于微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大型语言模型被企业问答系统广泛采用，如何将领域专有知识有效融入模型成为关键。因此，研究企业级应用下两大适应方法（RAG与FT）的优劣十分迫切。

Method: 在汽车行业的两个封闭数据集上，作者比较了RAG和FT的答案质量与运营成本，并基于Erol等人提出的Cost-of-Pass框架，联合评估输出质量、生成成本和用户交互成本。

Result: 实验发现，商业高端模型表现最佳，但通过RAG增强的开源模型也能达到相近质量。总的来看，RAG方法在质量和成本上均优于FT，适用于闭源和开源模型。

Conclusion: RAG是当前企业问答系统中，结合领域知识最有效且具成本效益的适配方法，无论是开源还是闭源模型都适用。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly employed in enterprise question-answering (QA) systems, requiring adaptation to domain-specific knowledge. Among the most prevalent methods for incorporating such knowledge are Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and fine-tuning (FT). Yet, from a cost-accuracy trade-off perspective, it remains unclear which approach best suits industry scenarios. This study examines the impact of RAG and FT on two closed datasets specific to the automotive industry, assessing answer quality and operational costs. We extend the Cost-of-Pass framework proposed by Erol et al. (arXiv:2504.13359) to jointly assess output quality, generation cost, and user interaction cost. Our findings reveal that while premium models perform best out of the box, open-source models can achieve comparable quality when enhanced with RAG. Overall, RAG emerges as the most effective and cost-efficient adaptation method for both closed- and open-source models.

</details>


### [399] [TAD: Temporal-Aware Trajectory Self-Distillation for Fast and Accurate Diffusion LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09536)
*Haoyang Zhou,Li Kong,Shijie Ren,Xiting Wang,Shuang Liang,Guowei Wang,Zhenxuan Pan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）的并行文本生成加速方法TAD，在提升生成速度的同时能有效保持或提高生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的dLLMs在并行生成大量tokens时往往面临准确性下降的问题，尤其在加速提升的同时牺牲了性能。作者希望打破这一速度与准确性的权衡，实现既快又准的文本生成。

Method: 作者提出Temporal-Aware trajectory self-Distillation（TAD）框架，通过让教师模型结合输入和真实结果生成解码轨迹，记录中间状态。然后根据与目标token解码的距离，将被mask的token分为近远两类——对即将解码的使用硬性标签训练（交叉熵），对距离较远的使用分布蒸馏（KL散度）进行软性监督。这样学生模型在不同阶段接收适当的学习信号。TAD也提供了两种模型部署模式，分别聚焦于高质量和高速度。
