While widely used, these metrics offer limited diagnostic insights, penalizing errors without revealing whether a system struggles with specific semantic categories, such as people, locations, or events, and making it difficult to interpret model capabilities or derive actionable improvements. We address this gap by introducing a semantically-enhanced evaluation framework for coreference resolution. Our approach overlays Concept and Named Entity Recognition (CNER) onto coreference outputs, assigning semantic labels to nominal mentions and propagating them to entire coreference clusters. This enables the computation of typed scores aimed at evaluating mention extraction and linking capabilities stratified by semantic class. Across our experiments on OntoNotes, LitBank, and PreCo, we show that our framework uncovers systematic weaknesses that remain obscured by aggregate metrics. Furthermore, we demonstrate that these diagnostics can be used to design targeted, low-cost data augmentation strategies, achieving measurable out-of-domain improvements.

</details>


### [475] [Intrinsic Guardrails: How Semantic Geometry of Personality Interacts with Emergent Misalignment in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10633)
*Krishak Aneja,Manas Mittal,Anmol Goel,Ponnurangam Kumaraguru,Vamshi Krishna Bonagiri*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 细调大型语言模型（LLM）时，即使用良性的窄域数据，也可能意外诱发广泛的有害行为，这被称为“突现失调（EM）”。本文揭示了LLMs潜在人格空间的结构稳定性及其调控EM的作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在对LLMs进行安全细调过程中，模型有时会出现超出数据范围的有害行为，现有研究主要关注模型激活空间，而很少涉及模型“人格”表征。作者希望探索LLMs内部人格表征与安全性的关系。

Method: 作者通过心理测评工具（如大五人格、黑暗三联等）及LLM特有行为，在潜在表征空间中对LLMs的人格进行了映射。他们定义了特定方向（如“邪恶人格”向量和语义价向量SVV），并通过因果干预实验，分别在各向上进行增强或移除，观察对失调的影响。

Result: 实验显示，模型的人格表征空间在对齐和被破坏的细调模型中高度稳定。如果削弱“正向人格”向量，失调率超过40%；反之，放大后失调下降至3%以下。此外，从对齐模型提取的人格向量可以零样本迁移到有害细调模型，有效抑制EM。

Conclusion: 有害细调并不会抹除模型内部的人格表示，这些高度结构性的人格表征可以跨细调分布作为稳健的安全防线，用以调节和预防EM等安全问题。

Abstract: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) on benign narrow data can sometimes induce broad harmful behaviors, a vulnerability termed emergent misalignment (EM). While prior work links these failures to specific directions in the activation space, their relationship to the model's broader persona remains unexplored. We map the latent personality space of LLMs through established psychometric profiles like the Big Five, Dark Triad, and LLM-specific behaviors (e.g. evil, sycophancy), and show that the semantic geometry is highly stable across aligned models and their corrupted fine-tunes. Through causal interventions, we find that directions isolating social valence, such as the 'Evil' persona vector, and a Semantic Valence Vector (SVV) that we introduce, function as intrinsic guardrails: ablating them drives the misalignment rates above $40$%, while amplifying them suppresses the failure mode to less than $3$%. Leveraging the structural stability of the personality space, we show that vectors extracted $\textit{a priori}$ from an instruct-tuned model transfer zero-shot to successfully regulate EM in corrupted fine-tunes. Overall, our findings suggest that harmful fine-tuning does not overwrite a model's internal representation of personality, allowing conserved representations to serve as robust, cross-distribution guardrails.

</details>


### [476] [Towards Understanding Continual Factual Knowledge Acquisition of Language Models: From Theory to Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10640)
*Haoyu Wang,Yifan Shang,Zhongxiang Sun,Weijie Yu,Xiao Zhang,Jun Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个理论框架来分析语言模型在持续预训练中事实知识的获取与遗忘机制，并提出了一种新颖的数据回放方法，有效减缓遗忘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管数据回放等经典持续预训练方法被广泛采用，但语言模型在持续学习过程中如何获得并保持事实知识的机制仍不清楚。

Method: 作者用单层Transformer建立了理论分析框架，系统解释了各类持续预训练方法的行为，并提出了一种基于生成式数据回放的新方法（STOC），通过注意力贡献选择关键知识片段用于数据回放。

Result: 理论分析揭示正则化方法只能改变收敛速度而不能从根本上解决遗忘，而数据回放方法能够稳定已训练知识。STOC方法在合成和真实数据集上的实验表现证明其能更好地缓解遗忘。

Conclusion: STOC方法能有效提升语言模型在持续知识获取中的表现，并减缓灾难性遗忘，对理解和改进持续预训练机制具有重要意义。

Abstract: Continual Pre-Training (CPT) is essential for enabling Language Models (LMs) to integrate new knowledge without erasing old. While classical CPT techniques like data replay have become the standard paradigm, the mechanisms underlying how LMs acquire and retain facts over time, termed as continual Factual Knowledge Acquisition (cFKA), remain unclear. In this work, we present a theoretical framework that characterizes the training dynamics of cFKA using a single-layer Transformer, offering a unified explanation for the behavior of representative CPT methods. Our analysis reveals that regularization-based methods merely adjust the convergence rate of parameters without altering the inherent forgetting tendency, whereas data replay methods succeed in shifting convergence dynamics and stabilizing pretrained knowledge. Building on these insights, we propose a novel generative data replay approach, called \textbf{S}electing \textbf{T}okens via attenti\textbf{O}n \textbf{C}ontribution~(STOC), which identifies influential factual snippets to guide replay data generation. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets validate our findings and demonstrate that STOC effectively enhances cFKA by mitigating catastrophic forgetting.

</details>


### [477] [A Single-Layer Model Can Do Language Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10643)
*Zanmin Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了Grounded Prediction Networks (GPN)，强调以少量循环层和单一状态向量替代深层堆叠结构，结果表现接近主流深层模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前主流语言模型广泛采用深层堆叠结构（如Transformer的多层KV缓存），而生物神经系统更侧重大规模递归。作者希望探索纯循环结构在语言建模中的潜力，减少层数和参数量，提高解释性。

Method: 提出GPN架构，每步仅复用一个状态向量，通过单个循环块（含一个前馈网络和共享矩阵存储）进行信息处理。对比不同参数量的GPN与多层Transformer++和GDN等架构在FineWeb-Edu语料库上的表现。

Result: 130M参数的单层GPN+M模型在FineWeb-Edu集上困惑度为18.06，分别仅比12层Transformer++（16.05）高13%、10层GDN（15.34）高18%；2层GPN将差距缩小至6%/11%。

Conclusion: 虽然GPN在性能上尚未完全赶上深层模型，但利用单一向量维护上下文有更高的解释性，例如可直接观察到内容分布和记忆分池。这表明循环结构可在语言建模中有效缩减层数，且具较高分析价值。

Abstract: Modern language models scale depth by stacking layers, each holding its own state - a per-layer KV cache in transformers, a per-layer matrix in Mamba, Gated DeltaNet (GDN), RWKV, and xLSTM. Biological systems lean heavily on recurrence rather than on stacking. We ask how far that shape can go on language modeling. We propose Grounded Prediction Networks (GPN): one state vector revisited at every step through a single recurrent block - one FFN, one shared matrix memory. At 130M parameters, a 1-layer GPN+M reaches FineWeb-Edu perplexity 18.06, within 13% of a 12-layer Transformer++ (16.05) and 18% of a 10-layer GDN (15.34); a 2-layer variant closes the gap to 6%/11%. We do not match the deep baselines. Because the working context is a single vector, we can directly inspect its geometry: a persistent default-token direction, a content-bearing horizon of tens of tokens, and memory heads that split spontaneously into fast and slow retention pools.

</details>


### [478] [When Can Digital Personas Reliably Approximate Human Survey Findings?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10659)
*Mumin Jia,Yilin Chen,Divya Sharma,Jairo Diaz-Rodriguez*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了由大语言模型（LLMs）驱动的数字人格能否替代真实人类参与调查，发现其在某些场景下具有潜力，但仍有显著局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM发展，利用数字人格模拟人类受访者完成调查成为新趋势，但何时能准确替代真实数据尚不明确，因此作者希望系统评估数字人格的有效性和局限。

Method: 作者用LISS panel的数据——包括受访者背景和历史回应——构建数字人格，并用不同的架构与多种LLM，对比其在具体预测任务上的表现（如对比历史与新答复、一致性、分布、聚类、不同问题类型等）。特别考察了增强检索架构效果。

Result: 数字人格对与人类分布的一致性提升明显，尤其在与稳定属性和价值观相关的领域表现更佳，但在个体预测和多变量结构恢复方面存在明显不足。增强检索模型表现最好，但影响更大的是人类答复的结构特征：在低变异和常见模式问题上效果较好，在主观或罕见答复上表现最差。

Conclusion: 数字人格在部分情境下适用于调查，但对于主观、高异质或少见答案、人群结构时仍需人工验证，研究为数字人格的应用边界和实践提供了实际指导。

Abstract: Digital personas powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed as substitutes for human survey respondents, yet it remains unclear when they can reliably approximate human survey findings. We answer this question using the LISS panel, constructing personas from respondents' background variables and pre-2023 survey histories, then testing them against the same respondents' held-out post-cutoff answers. Across four persona architectures, three LLMs, and two prediction tasks, we assess performance at the question, respondent, distributional, equity, and clustering levels. Digital personas improve alignment with human response distributions, especially in domains tied to stable attributes and values, but remain limited for individual prediction and fail to recover multivariate respondent structure. Retrieval-augmented architectures provide the clearest gains, but performance depends more on human response structure than on model choice: personas perform best for low-variability questions and common respondent patterns, and worst for subjective, heterogeneous, or rare responses. Our results provide practical guidance on when digital personas could be appropriate for survey research and when human validation remains necessary.

</details>


### [479] [Prompt-Activation Duality: Improving Activation Steering via Attention-Level Interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10664)
*Diancheng Kang,Zheyuan Liu,Ningshan Ma,Yue Huang,Zhaoxuan Tan,Meng Jiang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种新的方法GCAD（带门控裁剪注意力增量的偏导），用于改善激活引导在多轮对话中累积失效的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的激活引导方法在有状态对话中失效，原因在于KV-cache污染——引导后的token状态被重复使用，导致语义连贯性下降。为了解决这个问题，需要一种可以避免污染同时维持特征表达的新方法。

Method: GCAD方法通过分析自注意力中的system-prompt贡献，提取引导信号，并通过token级门控机制施加到模型中，从而实现更细粒度的行为控制，减少污染累积。

Result: 在persona-steering实验中，GCAD明显提升了长距离对话的语义连贯性。主多轮测试基准中，GCAD使coherence drift从-18.6提升到-1.9，第10轮特征表达率从78.0%提升到93.1%。

Conclusion: GCAD证明了激活引导可以更可靠，尤其是在引导方法遵循模型内用来行为调控的提示路径时。该方法有助于实现长期对话中的稳定行为控制。

Abstract: Activation steering controls language model behavior by adding directions to internal representations at inference time, but standard residual-stream steering can fail in stateful dialogue. We identify KV-cache contamination as a key failure mode: steered token states are stored and repeatedly reused, turning a local perturbation into cumulative coherence degradation. To address this challenge, we propose Gated Cropped Attention-Delta steering (GCAD), which extracts steering signals from system-prompt contributions to self-attention and applies them with token-level gating. Across persona-steering experiments, GCAD preserves trait control while substantially improving long-horizon coherence. On the main multi-turn benchmark, GCAD improves average coherence drift from -18.6 to -1.9 and raises turn-10 trait expression from 78.0 to 93.1. These results suggest that activation steering becomes more reliable when interventions follow the prompt-mediated pathways that models already use for behavioral control.

</details>


### [480] [Why Low-Resource NLP Needs More Than Cross-Lingual Transfer: Lessons Learned from Luxembourgish](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10714)
*Fred Philippy,Siwen Guo,Jacques Klein,Tegawendé F. Bissyandé*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 跨语言迁移与语言特定方法应协同并用，以促进低资源语言NLP发展。两者结合比单独使用效果更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低资源语言NLP进展依赖于如何最大化有限数据的利用价值。虽然跨语言迁移提供了提升的可能，但其对特定语言努力的替代程度不明。

Method: 整合以卢森堡语为例的前人研究和语言数据采集结果，分析跨语迁移与本地语言数据结合的成效。

Result: 跨语言迁移可显著提升目标语言任务表现，但其成效高度依赖于一定质量和数量的目标语言数据。单独的数据往往作用有限，只有与迁移结合才能最大化效果。

Conclusion: 跨语言迁移和语言特定方法不是互相竞争的方案，而应视为互补，联合形成可持续的低资源NLP流程，并据此提出整合两者的实用建议。

Abstract: Cross-lingual transfer has become a central paradigm for extending natural language processing (NLP) technologies to low-resource languages. By leveraging supervision from high-resource languages, multilingual language models can achieve strong task performance with little or no labeled target-language data. However, it remains unclear to what extent cross-lingual transfer can substitute for language-specific efforts. In this paper, we synthesize prior research findings and data collection results on Luxembourgish, which, despite its typological proximity to high-resource languages and its presence in a multilingual context, remains insufficiently represented in modern NLP technologies. Across findings, we observe a fundamental interdependence between cross-lingual transfer and language-specific efforts. Cross-lingual transfer can substantially improve target-language performance, but its success depends critically on the availability of sufficiently high-quality, task-aligned target-language data. At the same time, such resources, particularly in low-resource settings, are typically too limited in scale to drive strong performance on their own. Instead, such resources reach their full potential only when leveraged within a cross-lingual framework. We therefore argue that cross-lingual transfer and language-specific efforts should not be viewed as competing alternatives. Instead, they function as complementary components of a sustainable low-resource NLP pipeline. Based on these insights, we provide practical guidelines for integrating and balancing cross-lingual transfer with language-specific development in sustainable low-resource NLP pipelines.

</details>


### [481] [Towards On-Policy Data Evolution for Visual-Native Multimodal Deep Search Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10832)
*Shijue Huang,Hangyu Guo,Chenxin Li,Junting Lu,Xinyu Geng,Zhaochen Su,Zhenyu Li,Shuang Chen,Hongru Wang,Yi R. Fung*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于多模态深度检索的视觉优先代理系统，通过解决现有系统中中间视觉证据不可复用和训练数据难以适应能力演化的问题，显著提升了复杂任务下的搜索表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态深度检索系统在处理视觉证据和训练数据时存在两大瓶颈：一是检索工具对图片作为一次性输出处理，导致中间视觉证据无法被后续工具复用；二是训练数据固定，有能力提升时难以继续匹配代理当前需要提升的部分。作者意在突破这两个限制，提高多模态智能体在开放领域复杂任务中的搜索与推理能力。

Method: 作者提出了基于“图像库引用协议”的视觉原生代理系统，对每一次工具返回的图片都做可寻址注册，使中间视觉证据可复用。其上设计“On-policy Data Evolution (ODE)”自进化闭环数据生成器，以当前训练策略生成和精炼数据，每轮生成都针对代理当前尚需提升的能力。整个流程支持多样化的有监督微调和策略感知的强化学习数据自动化采集，覆盖完整训练周期。

Result: 在8个多模态深度搜索基准上，ODE将Qwen3-VL-8B智能体平均表现从24.9%提升至39.0%，超越了Gemini-2.5 Pro（37.9%）；30B版得分从30.6%提升到41.5%。进一步分析表明，图像库复用对于需要迭代视觉推理的复杂任务尤为有效，回滚反馈进化产生的数据在有监督训练和策略强化学习上比静态生成更有效。

Conclusion: 通过“图像库引用协议”与“策略自进化数据生成”两项关键创新，显著提升了多模态智能体在复杂检索与推理任务中的能力，所提ODE框架具备灵活高效的训练数据支持和更优的任务表现，对未来多模态系统的设计和应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: Multimodal deep search requires an agent to solve open-world problems by chaining search, tool use, and visual reasoning over evolving textual and visual context. Two bottlenecks limit current systems. First, existing tool-use harnesses treat images returned by search, browsing, or transformation as transient outputs, so intermediate visual evidence cannot be re-consumed by later tools. Second, training data is usually built by fixed curation recipes that cannot track the target agent's evolving capability. To address these challenges, we first introduce a visual-native agent harness centered on an image bank reference protocol, which registers every tool-returned image as an addressable reference and makes intermediate visual evidence reusable by later tools. On top of this harness, On-policy Data Evolution (ODE) runs a closed-loop data generator that refines itself across rounds from rollouts of the policy being trained. This per-round refinement makes each round's data target what the current policy still needs to learn. The same framework supports both diverse supervised fine-tuning data and policy-aware reinforcement learning data curation, covering the full training lifecycle of the target agent. Across 8 multimodal deep search benchmarks, ODE improves the Qwen3-VL-8B agent from 24.9% to 39.0% on average, surpassing Gemini-2.5 Pro in standard agent-workflow setting (37.9%). At 30B, ODE raises the average score from 30.6% to 41.5%. Further analyses validate the effectiveness of image-bank reuse, especially on complex tasks requiring iterative visual refinement, while rollout-feedback evolution yields more grounded SFT traces and better policy-matched RL tasks than static synthesis.

</details>


### [482] [Training-Free Cultural Alignment of Large Language Models via Persona Disagreement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10843)
*Huynh Trung Kiet,Dao Sy Duy Minh,Tuan Nguyen,Chi-Nguyen Tran,Phu-Hoa Pham,Nguyen Lam Phu Quy,The Anh Han,Long Tran-Thanh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需微调或访问模型内部参数，只通过推理阶段即可提升大模型文化对齐性的黑盒方法DISCA，能有效减少文化偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型在道德判断等关键应用中经常表现出非中立的文化偏好，而现有对齐方法要么需要昂贵的逐国数据和微调预算，要么无法适用于商业API的黑盒模式。因此亟需一种仅依赖公共数据、适用于主流API的文化对齐方法。

Method: 提出DISCA方法，将每个国家的人群视为由多个基于世界价值调查的虚拟人格代理组成，将这些代理之间的分歧视为关键调节信号，通过对模型输出概率进行有界、厌恶损失的校正，在推理时实现无需改动模型参数的文化对齐。

Result: 在20个国家和7个（2B-70B参数量级）开源模型上验证，DISCA在MultiTP任务上可使文化偏差减少10-24%（针对≥3.8B参数模型），在开放性任务上减少2-7%，过程中无需修改模型权重。

Conclusion: 推理阶段的校准方法（如DISCA）为满足全球多元化道德偏好提供了比微调更具扩展性的新路径。

Abstract: Large language models increasingly mediate decisions that turn on moral judgement, yet a growing body of evidence shows that their implicit preferences are not culturally neutral. Existing cultural alignment methods either require per-country preference data and fine-tuning budgets or assume white-box access to model internals that commercial APIs do not expose. In this work, we focus on this realistic black-box, public-data-only regime and observe that within-country sociodemographic disagreement, not consensus, is the primary steering signal. We introduce DISCA (Disagreement-Informed Steering for Cultural Alignment), an inference-time method that instantiates each country as a panel of World-Values-Survey-grounded persona agents and converts their disagreement into a bounded, loss-averse logit correction. Across 20 countries and 7 open-weight backbones (2B--70B), DISCA reduces cultural misalignment on MultiTP by 10--24% on the six backbones >=3.8B, and 2--7% on open-ended scenarios, without changing any weights. Our results suggest that inference-time calibration is a scalable alternative to fine-tuning for serving the long tail of global moral preferences.

</details>


### [483] [Grounded Satirical Generation with RAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10853)
*Oona Itkonen,Yuxin Su,Linyao Du,Ona De Gibert*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合检索增强生成（RAG）技术，针对芬兰语环境、以新闻为基础进行讽刺性词典定义生成的新方法，并建立了评价体系和数据集。发现提升政治相关性有效，但提升幽默性困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在幽默生成，尤其是与上下文强相关的讽刺领域表现不佳，论文旨在建立新方法与系统提升模型在实际新闻语境中的讽刺生成能力，并探索评价其表现的标准。

Method: 提出了一个将新闻知识检索并结合生成模型RAG进行讽刺定义写作的流程。建立了专门的人工标注评价体系，对100条词条分别进行多元条件下（文化、词型、是否采用RAG）的人类打分和模型自动评价。

Result: 生成的定义总体被认为更具政治性而非幽默性。主题相关词和RAG提升了政治相关性，但对幽默性没有明显改善。评测中LLM模型和人类在政治相关性评价上一致，但幽默性评价相关性较低。

Conclusion: 结合RAG和主题词有助于提升讽刺文本的政治相关性，但难以提升幽默水平。该文公开了流程、代码和有标注数据集，为后续讽刺生成及评价研究提供支持。

Abstract: Humor generation remains challenging task for Large Language Models (LLMs), due to their subjective nature. We focus on satire, a form of humor strongly shaped by context. In this work, we present a novel pipeline for grounded satire generation that uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over current news to produce satirical dictionary definitions in the Finnish context. We also introduce a new task-specific evaluation framework and annotate 100 generated definitions with six human annotators, enabling analysis across multiple experimental conditions, including cultural background, source-word type, and the presence or absence of RAG. Our results show that the generated definitions are perceived as more political than humorous. Both topic-based word selection and RAG improve the political relevance of the outputs, but neither yields clear gains in humor generation. In addition, our LLM-as-a-judge evaluation of five state-of-the-art models indicates that LLMs correlate well with human judgments on political relevance, but perform poorly on humor. We release our code and annotated dataset to support further research on grounded satire generation and evaluation.

</details>


### [484] [Learning More from Less: Exploiting Counterfactuals for Data-Efficient Chart Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10855)
*Jianzhu Bao,Haozhen Zhang,Kuicai Dong,Bozhi Wu,Sarthak Ketanbhai Modi,Zi Pong Lim,Yon Shin Teo,Wenya Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为ChartCF的高效图表理解训练框架，通过关注反事实敏感性，提高现有视觉-语言模型对图表微小视觉差异的辨识能力，用更少的数据取得了优越或相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型主要依赖大规模合成数据的监督微调，但这种方式忽略了图表作为程序生成视觉对象的特殊性，即微小代码驱动的变化会导致语义和答案巨变，现有训练方式对这种反事实敏感性的学习有限。

Method: 提出ChartCF培训框架，包括：1）基于代码修改的反事实数据合成流程；2）图表相似性过滤机制，筛除过难样本，提高训练效率；3）多模态（文本+视觉）偏好优化策略。

Result: 在五个公开基准测试中，ChartCF使用远少于对手的训练数据，取得了优于或相当于当前最强图表VLM的性能。

Conclusion: ChartCF能高效提升模型对图表反事实微小差异的敏感性，减少对海量训练数据的依赖，有助于推动图表理解领域的发展。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in chart understanding, largely driven by supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on increasingly large synthetic datasets. However, scaling SFT data alone is inefficient and overlooks a key property of charts: charts are programmatically generated visual artifacts, where small, code-controlled visual changes can induce drastic shifts in semantics and correct answers. Learning this counterfactual sensitivity requires VLMs to discriminate fine-grained visual differences, yet standard SFT treats training instances independently and provides limited supervision to enforce this behavior. To address this, we introduce ChartCF, a data-efficient training framework designed to enhance counterfactual sensitivity. ChartCF consists of: (1) a counterfactual data synthesis pipeline via code modification, (2) a chart similarity-based data selection strategy that filters overly difficult samples for improved training efficiency, and (3) multimodal preference optimization across both textual and visual modalities. Experiments on five benchmarks show that ChartCF achieves superior or comparable performance to strong chart-specific VLMs while using significantly less training data.

</details>


### [485] [RUBEN: Rule-Based Explanations for Retrieval-Augmented LLM Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10862)
*Joel Rorseth,Parke Godfrey,Lukasz Golab,Divesh Srivastava,Jarek Szlichta*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了RUBEN工具，可用于发掘并解释检索增强大型语言模型（LLM）输出的最小规则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管检索增强LLM被广泛应用于数据驱动的场景，但其输出的解释性和安全性仍是挑战，尤其是在安全训练和防御对抗提示方面。作者希望通过规则归纳提升LLM的可解释性和安全评估能力。

Method: 采用创新的剪枝策略，高效找到能够覆盖所有其他规则的最小规则集，并提出将这些规则应用于LLM安全性的检测，包括安全训练的鲁棒性和对抗性提示攻击的效果测试。

Result: RUBEN能高效发现用于解释LLM输出的最小规则，所挖掘的规则可用于评估LLM安全训练的稳健性以及识别对抗性提示注入的有效性。

Conclusion: RUBEN不仅有助于提升LLM输出的可解释性，还能用于安全评估和攻击防护等应用，拓展了规则归纳在生成式AI安全领域的应用前景。

Abstract: This paper demonstrates RUBEN, an interactive tool for discovering minimal rules to explain the outputs of retrieval-augmented large language models (LLMs) in data-driven applications. We leverage novel pruning strategies to efficiently identify a minimal set of rules that subsume all others. We further demonstrate novel applications of these rules for LLM safety, specifically to test the resiliency of safety training and effectiveness of adversarial prompt injections.

</details>


### [486] [DGPO: Beyond Pairwise Preferences with Directional Consistent Groupwise Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10863)
*Mengyi Deng,Zhiwei Li,Xin Li,Tingyu Zhu,Yulan Yuan,Zhijiang Guo,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Directional-Groupwise Preference Optimization (DGPO)的新方法，以提升大语言模型在保持推理多样性的同时实现方向一致性的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型在偏好多样性与方向一致性上存在矛盾，现有的偏好优化方法无法同时兼顾两者。本文旨在同时提升方向一致性和推理多样性，使模型能够进行更加一致且丰富的推理。

Method: DGPO是一种轻量级框架，它通过多候选比较在群组层级聚合监督信号，并对前向和反向问答实例结构化分组，利用基于边际的似然目标函数明确区分一致与不一致的推理路径。这种群组式设计比传统的成对目标能够捕捉更丰富的相对信息。

Result: 实验证明，构造的反向数据在五个基准任务上带来了平均3.2%的提升，而DGPO方法在多个数据集和模型家族上进一步稳定提升表现，平均准确率最高提升3.6%。

Conclusion: DGPO能够在提升方向一致性的同时保留推理多样性，为大语言模型的偏好优化提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) have made remarkable progress, current preference optimization methods still struggle to align directional consistency while preserving reasoning diversity. To address this limitation, we propose Directional-Groupwise Preference Optimization (DGPO), a lightweight framework that aggregates supervision signals at the group level and explicitly models direction-aware alignment through multi-candidate comparisons. DGPO organizes forward and reverse question-answer instances into structured sets and optimizes a margin-based likelihood objective that separates coherent reasoning paths from inconsistent alternatives. This group-wise formulation captures richer relative information than pairwise objectives and reinforces consistency across diverse reasoning pathways. Empirical results show that our constructed reverse data yields a 3.2% average improvement across five benchmarks, while DGPO further delivers consistent gains across multiple datasets and model families, achieving average accuracy improvements of up to 3.6%.

</details>


### [487] [Neural at ArchEHR-QA 2026: One Method Fits All: Unified Prompt Optimization for Clinical QA over EHRs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10877)
*Abrar Majeedi,Viswanatha Reddy Gajjala,Sai Prasanna Teja Reddy Bogireddy,Siddhant Rai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了Neural1.5方法，针对电子健康记录（EHR）问答任务，通过多阶段分离、自动优化提示词和自一致性机制，在ArchEHR-QA 2026赛事中取得了优异成绩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子健康记录问答任务需要高精度证据检索和答案生成，且答案需要明确依赖于临床笔记。现有方案往往在精准性和通用性之间难以兼顾，亟需高效、经济、可泛化的方法。

Method: 本方法将EHR问答任务拆分为四个独立模块（问题解释、证据识别、答案生成、证据对齐），在每一步通过DSPy的MIPROv2优化器自动发现并调优高效提示词和演示示例。同时利用多次随机推理的自一致性投票，以及阶段性自反和链式验证，提升输出准确性。

Result: 在ArchEHR-QA 2026多队伍参与的四子任务中平均排名第二，具体在各子任务中的排名为第四、第一、第四、第七，显示出方法的出色表现。

Conclusion: 分阶段的提示词优化结合自一致性机制，无需对模型进行复杂微调，即可在复杂的临床问答任务中高效取得优异结果，是一种经济且可靠的替代方案。

Abstract: Automated question answering (QA) over electronic health records (EHRs) demands precise evidence retrieval, faithful answer generation, and explicit grounding of answers in clinical notes. In this work, we present Neural1.5, our method for the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task at CL4Health@LREC 2026, which comprises four subtasks: question interpretation, evidence identification, answer generation, and evidence alignment. Our approach decouples the task into independent, modular stages and employs DSPy"s MIPROv2 optimizer to automatically discover high-performing prompts, jointly tuning instructions and few-shot demonstrations for each stage. Within every stage, self-consistency voting over multiple stochastic inference runs suppresses spurious errors and improves reliability, while stage-specific verification mechanisms (e.g., self-reflection and chain-of-verification for alignment) further refine output quality. Among all teams that participated in all four subtasks, our method ranks second overall (mean rank 4.00), placing 4th, 1st, 4th, and 7th on Subtasks 1-4, respectively. These results demonstrate that systematic, per-stage prompt optimization combined with self-consistency mechanisms is a cost-effective alternative to model fine-tuning for multifaceted clinical QA.

</details>


### [488] [Grounded or Guessing? LVLM Confidence Estimation via Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10893)
*Reza Khanmohammadi,Erfan Miahi,Simerjot Kaur,Charese H. Smiley,Ivan Brugere,Kundan Thind,Mohammad M. Ghassemi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为BICR的通用置信度估计框架，通过对比模型在真实图片和遮蔽图片输入下的隐藏状态，提升了模型视觉依赖性检测能力。BICR在多领域和多个主流模型上表现优异，且参数量更少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大模型存在视觉未落地的问题，即模型仅凭文本先验即可作出看似合理但未利用图像信息的判断，现有的置信度估计方法难以检测此类现象。作者旨在解决如何分辨模型答案是否真正基于图像信息的问题。

Method: 作者提出Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking（BICR）框架，将同一问题分别配对真实图片和遮蔽（黑化）图片，并用冻结的LVLM提取隐藏状态。利用探针网络在真实图片隐藏状态上训练，并用排序损失使探针对只用文本的遮蔽图片持更低置信，从而引导置信度反映视觉依赖。推理时不增加额外计算量。

Result: BICR在五个LVLM和七个基线的多个任务（如视觉问答、幻觉检测、医学影像、金融文档）上，校准与辨别能力均取得最好平均表现，且辨别力提升统计显著，参数量远低于最强基线。

Conclusion: BICR高效提升了模型置信度的判别能力，显著增强视觉落地检测，广泛适用于现有大模型且无需增加推理成本。

Abstract: Large vision-language models suffer from visual ungroundedness: they can produce a fluent, confident, and even correct response driven entirely by language priors, with the image contributing nothing to the prediction. Existing confidence estimation methods cannot detect this, as they observe model behavior under normal inference with no mechanism to determine whether a prediction was shaped by the image or by text alone. We introduce BICR (Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking), a model-agnostic confidence estimation framework that makes this contrast explicit during training by extracting hidden states from a frozen LVLM twice: once with the real image-question pair, and once with the image blacked out while the question is held fixed. A lightweight probe is trained on the real-image hidden state and regularized by a ranking loss that penalizes higher confidence on the blacked-out view, teaching it to treat visual grounding as a signal of reliability at zero additional inference cost. Evaluated across five modern LVLMs and seven baselines on a benchmark covering visual question answering, object hallucination detection, medical imaging, and financial document understanding, BICR achieves the best cross-LVLM average on both calibration and discrimination simultaneously, with statistically significant discrimination gains robust to cluster-aware analysis at 4-18x fewer parameters than the strongest probing baseline.

</details>


### [489] [RubricEM: Meta-RL with Rubric-guided Policy Decomposition beyond Verifiable Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10899)
*Gaotang Li,Bhavana Dalvi Mishra,Zifeng Wang,Jun Yan,Yanfei Chen,Chun-Liang Li,Long T. Le,Rujun Han,George Lee,Hanghang Tong,Chen-Yu Lee,Tomas Pfister*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出RubricEM框架，通过引入rubric（评判标准）作为RL代理的政策执行、反馈和记忆的统一接口，实现深度研究代理的高效训练，在多个长篇研究任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度研究代理的强化学习面临奖励不可验证、决策复杂及经验难复用的问题。单靠最终答案的评判不足以指导复杂任务的学习，因此需要更细化、结构化的方法。

Method: 提出RubricEM，融合分阶段的策略分解和基于自反反思的元策略进化。核心包括：1）以自生成rubric结构化分阶段任务轨迹（如规划、搜证、汇总等）；2）采用阶段化的GRPO算法，根据rubric对每阶段给予丰富反馈；3）引入统一反思机制，抽取可复用经验。

Result: RubricEM-8B模型在四个长文本研究基准测试中表现优异，超过同类开源模型，接近商业深度研究系统。作者也深入分析了系统的关键有效要素。

Conclusion: RubricEM通过引入rubric的细颗粒度结构，将其作为强化学习复杂任务的核心接口，有效提升了长程任务的训练效率和表现。

Abstract: Training deep research agents, namely systems that plan, search, evaluate evidence, and synthesize long-form reports, pushes reinforcement learning beyond the regime of verifiable rewards. Their outputs lack ground-truth answers, their trajectories span many tool-augmented decisions, and standard post-training offers little mechanism for turning past attempts into reusable experience. In this work, we argue that rubrics should serve not merely as final-answer evaluators, but as the shared interface that structures policy execution, judge feedback, and agent memory. Based on this view, we introduce RubricEM, a rubric-guided reinforcement learning framework that combines stagewise policy decomposition with reflection-based meta-policy evolution. RubricEM first makes research trajectories stage-aware by conditioning planning, evidence gathering, review, and synthesis on self-generated rubrics. It then assigns credit with Stage-Structured GRPO, which uses stagewise rubric judgments to provide denser semantic feedback for long-horizon optimization. In parallel, RubricEM trains a shared-backbone reflection meta-policy that distills judged trajectories into reusable rubric-grounded guidance for future attempts. The resulting RubricEM-8B achieves strong performance across four long-form research benchmarks, outperforming comparable open models and approaching proprietary deep-research systems. Beyond final performance, we perform thorough analyses to understand the key ingredients of RubricEM.

</details>


### [490] [WildClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World, Long-Horizon Agent Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10912)
*Shuangrui Ding,Xuanlang Dai,Long Xing,Shengyuan Ding,Ziyu Liu,Yang JingYi,Penghui Yang,Zhixiong Zhang,Xilin Wei,Xinyu Fang,Yubo Ma,Haodong Duan,Jing Shao,Jiaqi Wang,Dahua Lin,Kai Chen,Yuhang Zang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了WildClawBench，一个基于实际运行环境和多模态任务的命令行智能体评测基准，用于测试大型语言模型在真实长任务中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体评测多依赖简单或仿真任务，缺乏对真实、长时间且复杂任务下性能的系统评估，这限制了模型在实际部署环境下能力的验证。

Method: 构建WildClawBench基准，包括60个人工编写的双语多模态任务，覆盖六大主题类别；任务在真实的命令行环境和Docker容器下运行，智能体可调用真实工具；评分方式结合规则检查、环境状态审计及大模型判定。

Result: 19个前沿大模型中，表现最好的是Claude Opus 4.7，在OpenClaw环境下最高得分仅62.2%。更换智能体接口同一模型得分可有高达18分的浮动，其余模型得分均未超过60%。

Conclusion: 当前大型语言与视觉-语言模型在现实、长时任务中的智能体表现依然不理想，智能体原生环境评测仍面临巨大挑战。作者公开了全部任务和工具，支持可复现性研究。

Abstract: Large language and vision-language models increasingly power agents that act on a user's behalf through command-line interface (CLI) harnesses. However, most agent benchmarks still rely on synthetic sandboxes, short-horizon tasks, mock-service APIs, and final-answer checks, leaving open whether agents can complete realistic long-horizon work in the runtimes where they are deployed. This work presents WildClawBench, a native-runtime benchmark of 60 human-authored, bilingual, multimodal tasks spanning six thematic categories. Each task averages roughly 8 minutes of wall-clock time and over 20 tool calls, and runs inside a reproducible Docker container hosting an actual CLI agent harness (OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, or Hermes Agent) with access to real tools rather than mock services. Grading is hybrid, combining deterministic rule-based checks, environment-state auditing of side effects, and an LLM/VLM judge for semantic verification. Across 19 frontier models, the best, Claude Opus 4.7, reaches only 62.2% overall under OpenClaw, while every other model stays below 60%, and switching harness alone shifts a single model by up to 18 points. These results show that long-horizon, native-runtime agent evaluation remains a far-from-resolved task for current frontier models. We release the tasks, code, and containerized tooling to support reproducible evaluation.

</details>


### [491] [ELF: Embedded Language Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10938)
*Keya Hu,Linlu Qiu,Yiyang Lu,Hanhong Zhao,Tianhong Li,Yoon Kim,Jacob Andreas,Kaiming He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的连续扩散语言模型（DLM）——Embedded Language Flows (ELF)，其在连续嵌入空间内进行语言生成，结果优于现有离散和连续DLM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型和流模型在图像、视频等连续数据生成领域表现突出，因此学界希望将其优势带入语言建模领域。但现有扩散语言模型主要处理离散token，对于连续空间的高效利用不足。本文探索如何以最小改动，将连续空间扩散模型的方法应用于自然语言生成。

Method: 提出ELF（Embedded Language Flows），在连续嵌入空间基于连续时间流匹配（Continuous-time Flow Matching）进行训练和生成，直到最终一步才通过共享权重网络映射到离散token。这样可方便地引入如无分类器引导（Classifier-Free Guidance, CFG）的图像域技术。

Result: 实验结果显示，ELF在生成质量和采样步数方面，均显著优于主流离散和连续DLM。

Conclusion: ELF为实现高效的连续空间扩散语言模型提供了新方向，充分发掘连续嵌入空间对自然语言生成的潜力。

Abstract: Diffusion and flow-based models have become the de facto approaches for generating continuous data, e.g., in domains such as images and videos. Their success has attracted growing interest in applying them to language modeling. Unlike their image-domain counterparts, today's leading diffusion language models (DLMs) primarily operate over discrete tokens. In this paper, we show that continuous DLMs can be made effective with minimal adaptation to the discrete domain. We propose Embedded Language Flows (ELF), a class of diffusion models in continuous embedding space based on continuous-time Flow Matching. Unlike existing DLMs, ELF predominantly stays within the continuous embedding space until the final time step, where it maps to discrete tokens using a shared-weight network. This formulation makes it straightforward to adapt established techniques from image-domain diffusion models, e.g., classifier-free guidance (CFG). Experiments show that ELF substantially outperforms leading discrete and continuous DLMs, achieving better generation quality with fewer sampling steps. These results suggest that ELF offers a promising path toward effective continuous DLMs.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [492] [Understanding Asynchronous Inference Methods for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08168)
*Ayoub Agouzoul*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文系统性比较了四种用于异步VLA模型推断延迟缓解的方法（IT-RTC、TT-RTC、VLASH、A2C2），在统一的代码库与基线下评估了其在推断延迟场景下的表现。A2C2表现最佳，TT-RTC鲁棒性好，IT-RTC低延迟有效，VLASH表现随参数有权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人泛化控制中应用，其推断延迟带来的观测滞后问题影响实际部署。此前缓解这一问题的方法体系各自独立评测，缺乏横向对比和综合分析。作者动机在于统一评测标准，对方法做系统性、可复现的比较。

Method: 作者开发了两个统一代码库，将IT-RTC（推断时修补）、TT-RTC（训练时延迟模拟）、VLASH（未来状态感知）、A2C2（轻量级残差校正）集成于同一平台，并在Kinetix与LIBERO基准测试套件下，采用不同推断延迟设定（最高至20步）进行对比测试。

Result: A2C2在Kinetix测试中表现优异，在8步以内都能保持90%以上解决率，并在LIBERO中从4步后领先。IT-RTC仅在低延迟下表现竞争力，否则性能迅速劣化。TT-RTC在不同最大延迟设定下都十分稳定，推理无额外开销。VLASH对不同延迟参数表现出权衡特性。

Conclusion: A2C2是现有方法中在各种测试情景下表现最优的延迟补偿方案；TT-RTC方法易于泛化且推断灵活高效；IT-RTC与VLASH更依赖于延迟设置与参数选择。统一评测为VLA异步推断研究提供坚实基础。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising path to generalist robot control, but their inference latency causes observation staleness when generated actions are executed asynchronously. Several methods have been proposed concurrently to mitigate this problem: inference-time inpainting (IT-RTC), training-time delay simulation (TT-RTC), future-state-aware conditioning (VLASH), and lightweight residual correction (A2C2). Each takes a fundamentally different approach, but they have so far been evaluated independently with different codebases, base policies, and protocols. We present a systematic comparison of these four methods under controlled conditions. We develop two unified codebases that integrate all methods with harmonized library and dataset versions, and we benchmark them on the Kinetix suite with MLPMixer policies and on the LIBERO manipulation benchmark with SmolVLA, sweeping inference delays up to $d=20$ control steps. A2C2's per-step residual correction is the most effective method on Kinetix, holding above 90% solve rate up to $d=8$, and also leads on LIBERO from $d=4$ onwards. IT-RTC is competitive at low delays but degrades sharply under long chunks ($H=30$) and high delays. TT-RTC is the most robust training-based method: stable across $d_\max$ choices, generalizes beyond its training delay distribution, and adds zero inference overhead. VLASH exhibits a clear low-delay vs. high-delay trade-off governed by the fine-tuning delay range $[0,d_\max]$. Code is available at https://github.com/TheAyos/async-vla-inference

</details>


### [493] [From Ontology Conformance to Admissible Reconfiguration: A RoSO/SMGI Adequacy Argument for Robotic Service Governance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08185)
*Aomar Osmani*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文讨论了服务机器人领域中的Robotic Service Ontology（RoSO）与General Intelligence的结构模型（SMGI）之间的集成问题，以及面对服务重绑定、重组合、修复或重新部署时，如何形式化地判断服务配置的可接受性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RoSO虽然提供了类型化的语义规范，用于定义服务及其各种相关约束，但其自身很难应对服务在运行中动态变更（如重绑定、重组等）后能否保持原有服务身份与合规性的问题。因此，需要更高阶的模型来支撑这些运行时语义与治理。

Method: 文章提出将RoSO嵌入到SMGI模型中，让RoSO成为SMGI的类型化语义层，通过SMGI的结构接口、诱导行为语义以及治理规范机制，对服务的动态变化进行管理。此外，作者给出了RoSO到SMGI的适配性定理以及相关的组合性适应标准。

Result: 证明了RoSO作为类型语义层可以被嵌入至SMGI体系，从而让服务在面对动态变更时具备形式化的治理标准和判断准则。同时推导出形式化的身份保持重新配置标准、以及局部可接受更新全球可接受的组合条件。

Conclusion: SMGI并不是取代RoSO，而是为RoSO在运行时支持服务语义不变的可演化和治理提供了形式机制。当服务需要应对动态演变时，利用SMGI可以获得对可接受变化的充分形式化保障。

Abstract: The Robotic Service Ontology (RoSO) gives service robotics a typed semantic vocabulary for services, functions, interactions, and deployment-sensitive constraints. Its public revision trail makes visible a harder question than ontology conformance alone can settle: once a service is rebound, recomposed, repaired, or redeployed, under what conditions does the resulting configuration remain an admissible realization of the same protected service? This article argues that the Structural Model of General Intelligence (SMGI) is relevant exactly at that level \citep{osmani2026smgi}. SMGI adds not only a structural interface $θ$, but an induced behavioral semantics $T_θ$ and a governance discipline for norm-respecting change. We show that RoSO can be embedded into SMGI as a typed semantic layer, so that service descriptions become dynamically governable rather than merely well formed. This yields a RoSO-to-SMGI adequacy theorem, identity-preserving reconfiguration criteria, and compositional conditions under which locally acceptable updates remain globally admissible. The resulting claim is not that SMGI replaces RoSO, but that it provides a formal account of what admissible runtime change requires once service semantics must survive revision.

</details>


### [494] [Anatomical Landmark-Guided Deep Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Gastric Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08269)
*Haoxuan Wu,Sishen Yuan,Haitao Gao,Zhen Li,Xiuli Zuo,Hongliang Ren*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种基于解剖学标志引导的深度强化学习方法，用于无线胶囊内镜的自主胃部导航，显著提升了覆盖率与操作效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无线胶囊内镜便于无痛检查消化道，但因现有自主导航方法在不同患者间适应性差、黏膜覆盖不全等问题，限制了其临床诊断潜力。因此急需提高其导航效果和适应性的新方法。

Method: 提出一种可迁移的解剖标志引导深度强化学习（AL-DRL）框架，利用轻量级的边缘-轮廓-深度融合模块，仅处理低维的人体标志坐标，实现从仿真到真实环境的有效转化。同时设计了两阶段的迁移管道和自适应动态规划控制器，以应对物理干扰。

Result: 在8例患者模型仿真中，方法在50秒内实现97%以上的胃部黏膜覆盖率，显著优于传统强化学习方法（如PPO、SAC和DQN）。离体实验中，平均覆盖率达到87%，操作时间比专家手动减少约53%。

Conclusion: 该方法在提升无线胶囊内镜自动导航的覆盖率和效率方面取得了显著成效，具备较强的跨患者适应性，有望推动其在临床中的广泛应用。

Abstract: Wireless capsule endoscopy (WCE) enables painless visualization of the gastrointestinal tract, but its diagnostic potential is limited by incomplete mucosal coverage and poor transferability of existing navigation methods across patient anatomies. We propose a transferable, anatomical landmarkguided deep reinforcement learning (AL-DRL) framework for autonomous gastric navigation. Leveraging a lightweight edgecontour-depth fusion module, our policy operates on stable, lowdimensional landmark coordinates rather than high-dimensional video streams, effectively bridging the sim-to-real gap. In simulations across eight patient-derived models, the method achieves over 97% coverage within 50 seconds, significantly outperforming vanilla PPO, SAC, and DQN agents. A two-stage sim-to-real pipeline with an adaptive dynamic programming controller actively mitigates physical disturbances. Ex-vivo experiments demonstrate a mean coverage of 87% and a 53% reduction in procedure time compared with expert manual control.

</details>


### [495] [Hierarchical Prompting with Dual LLM Modules for Robotic Task and Motion Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08330)
*Karolina Źróbek,Tessa Pulli,Paweł Gajewski,Antonio Galiza Cerdeira Gonzalez,Bipin Indurkhya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种分层的、基于语言驱动的机器人任务与运动规划框架，通过结合大语言模型实现人机自然交互，系统在多种场景测试中取得了86%的任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前的人机交互在服务和辅助场景下往往缺乏直观、自然的沟通方式。提升机器人对自然语言命令的理解与执行能力是提升机器人实用性的关键。

Method: 系统采用两个大语言模型模块：高层的规划代理负责解析自然语言并生成动作序列，低层的空间推理模块则专注于处理例如“把杯子放在盘子旁边”这样的三维空间理解问题。此外，系统集成了YOLOX-GDRNet进行目标检测与姿态估计，并配备了运动执行机制。

Result: 在24个测试场景下（命令难度从简单到复杂），该系统的总体任务成功率为86%。

Conclusion: 基于大语言模型和空间推理的分层框架，能够有效提升机器人对自然语言复杂指令的理解与执行能力，适用于服务与辅助等实际场景。

Abstract: We present a hierarchical language-driven framework for robotic task and motion planning to improve natural, intuitive human-robot interaction in service and assistance scenarios. The proposed system employs two large language model (LLM) modules: a high-level planning agent and a low-level spatial reasoning sub-module. The primary agent processes natural language commands and generates action sequences using a ReAct-style prompt, interacting with tools for object perception and manipulation (e.g., pick, place, release). For precise spatial placement, such as interpreting "place the mug next to the plate", a separate sub-prompting module handles 3D reasoning based on object geometry and scene layout. The system integrates YOLOX-GDRNet for object detection and pose estimation, along with a motion execution stub. We evaluated the system in 24 test scenarios, ranging from simple spatial commands to high-level instructions and infeasible requests. The system achieved an overall task success rate of 86%.

</details>


### [496] [Failing Forward: Adaptive Failure-Informed Learning for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08434)
*Meng Zheng,Samhita Marri,Anwesa Choudhuri,Benjamin Planche,Zhongpai Gao,Van Nguyen Nguyen,Terrence Chen,Girish Chowdhary,Ziyan Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的机器人操作训练框架AFIL，它通过结合成功与失败示例，使视觉-语言-动作模型更为鲁棒和有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型主要依赖于只包含成功案例的行为克隆方法，缺乏对失败情况的纠正信号，导致在实际操作中一旦发生微小偏差就容易积累错误并最终失败。为此，作者希望开发能充分利用失败经验、提升模型强健性的机制。

Method: AFIL框架利用当前VLA模型自动生成失败轨迹（rollouts），无需人工设计失败模式或人工干预；然后分别用两套动作生成器（DAGs）建模成功和失败，两者共享视觉-语言主干，以实现参数高效的联合训练。采样时，通过适应性地借助失败生成器引导动作分布远离易失败区域，从而提升执行的可靠性。指导强度则根据成功与失败分布的距离动态调整。

Result: 在涵盖短期和长期目标的机器人操作实验中（包括域内与域外测试），AFIL相比以往VLA基线方法在任务成功率和鲁棒性上均取得了一致且显著的改进。

Conclusion: AFIL能有效利用失败经验，提升VLA模型在复杂机器人操作任务中的表现，兼具高效性和通用性，有望为实际机器人部署提供支持。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models provide a promising paradigm for scalable robotic manipulation, yet their reliance on success-only behavioral cloning leaves them brittle; lacking corrective training signals, minor execution errors rapidly compound into unrecoverable, out-of-distribution failures. To address this limitation, we propose Adaptive Failure-Informed Learning (AFIL), an end-to-end framework that leverages failure trajectories as adaptive negative guidance for diffusion- and flow-based VLA policies. AFIL uses a pretrained VLA to generate failure rollouts online, avoiding the need for handcrafted failure-mode design or human-in-the-loop recovery. It then jointly trains Dual Action Generators (DAGs) for successful and failed behaviors while sharing a common vision-language backbone, enabling efficient failure-aware policy learning with limited parameter overhead. During sampling, the failure generator adaptively steers action generation away from failure-prone regions and toward more reliable success modes, with guidance strength determined by the per-diffusion-step distance between success and failure distributions. Experiments across in-domain and out-of-domain robotic manipulation tasks, covering both short- and long-horizon settings, show that AFIL consistently improves task success rates and robustness over existing VLA baselines, demonstrating its effectiveness, efficiency, and generality.

</details>


### [497] [LE-PAVD: Learning-Enhanced Physics-Aware Vehicle Dynamics for High-Speed Autonomous Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08489)
*Musabbir Ahmed Arrafi,Malik Ali,Nicholas M. Stiffler,Krishna Bhavithavya Kidambi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种结合物理知识与深度学习的混合车辆动力学模型LE-PAVD，显著提升了高动态自动驾驶的建模精度、泛化性和推理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高速自动驾驶赛车中，车辆动力学极为非线性，传统基于物理的模型虽然可解释，但依赖简化假设，纯深度学习模型虽能捕捉复杂性但缺乏物理一致性和泛化。作者希望设计出兼具二者优点的新模型。

Method: 提出LE-PAVD模型，将基于物理的知识嵌入深度学习框架。包括四个新增部分：1）考虑载荷变化的Pacejka轮胎力，2）纵向载荷转移，3）横向轮胎力效应，4）执行器输入限速。模型在仿真和真实遥测数据上端到端训练，通过物理先验提升结构合理性和预测准确性。

Result: LE-PAVD在未见赛道上，平均/最终位移误差较仅深度学习基线分别下降16.1%/20.6%，横摆率均方根误差降低91.3%；推理所需FLOPs减少21.6%，速度提升约1.5倍。闭环仿真中，圈速提升17.4%（训练）/9.5%（测试），无越界。

Conclusion: LE-PAVD是一种紧凑且物理一致的车辆动力学骨架，显著提升了状态预测与闭环控制精度，且推理更高效，适用于高动态自动驾驶场景。

Abstract: Accurate modeling of nonlinear vehicle dynamics is essential for high-speed autonomous racing, where controllers operate at the handling limits. Model-based methods are interpretable but rely on simplifying assumptions, while purely learned models capture nonlinearities yet often lack physical consistency and generalization. We propose LE-PAVD (Learning-Enhanced Physics-Aware Vehicle Dynamics), a hybrid model that integrates physics priors with learned components. Our architecture adds four components: load-sensitive Pacejka tire forces, longitudinal load transfer, lateral tire-force effects, and rate-limited actuator inputs. Trained end-to-end on simulation and real-world telemetry, LE-PAVD enforces physical consistency while improving state prediction accuracy. On an unseen track, LE-PAVD reduces average displacement error (ADE) by 16.1$\%$, final displacement error (FDE) by 20.6$\%$, and lowers yaw-rate root mean squared error (RMSE) by 91.3$\%$ versus a deep dynamics baseline, while using 21.6$\%$ fewer FLOPs and achieving approximately 1.50$\times$ faster inference. In closed-loop simulations, LE-PAVD consistently outperforms the baseline by achieving faster lap times by 17.4$\%$ on a training track and 9.5$\%$ on a test track, without any track boundary violations. Overall, LE-PAVD offers a compact, physics-grounded dynamics backbone that improves predictive fidelity and closed-loop performance while reducing inference cost.

</details>


### [498] [Trajectory-Consistent Flow Matching for Robust Visuomotor Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08511)
*Riad Ahmed,Sujosh Nag,Moniruzzaman Akash,Mostafa Hussein,Momotaz Begum*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套改进流配准（flow matching）策略，以提升机器人操作任务中自动化动作生成的准确性和可靠性。通过多项方法解决训练与推理阶段的不匹配问题，在多个真实和模拟任务中取得了显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流配准策略仅优化单点速度场，未考虑推理过程中数值积分带来的累计轨迹误差，导致实际机器人执行动作时性能下降。亟需解决训练与推理阶段之间的gap。

Method: 提出四项互补措施：（1）辅助速度回归，提升时间区间内的监督一致性；（2）多步轨迹一致性训练，直接对轨迹位移进行监督，弥合训练和推理gap；（3）速度场正则化，保证速度场时序平滑，避免积分不稳定；（4）采用高阶RK4积分方法大幅降低离散误差。同时，新增双视角三维点云编码以增强空间感知。

Result: 在Franka机械臂和Boston Dynamics Spot的4个真实机器人任务上，长周期多阶段任务成功率分别达到70%和60%（基线为0%），精密工具放置任务成功率100%。MetaWorld仿真任务上亦稳定提升，消融实验验证各措施互为补充。

Conclusion: 轨迹级别的监督对可靠策略执行至关重要，结合所提出方法和结构可显著提升机器人操作任务的推理准确率，实现更稳健的决策控制。

Abstract: Flow matching policies learn continuous velocity fields that transport noise to actions, enabling fast deterministic inference for robot manipulation. However, standard training optimizes a pointwise velocity objective while inference requires numerical integration of that field -- a mismatch that causes compounding trajectory errors. We propose four complementary remedies: (1) auxiliary rectified flow velocity regression that provides uniform temporal supervision across the full time interval; (2) multi-step trajectory consistency training that supervises the integrated displacement of the velocity field over trajectory segments, directly closing the train-inference gap; (3) velocity field regularization that enforces temporal smoothness, preventing oscillations that destabilize integration; and (4) fourth-order Runge-Kutta (RK4) inference that reduces global discretization error by orders of magnitude over Euler methods. Critically, these components are not independently sufficient -- RK4 without a smooth velocity field fails, and smoothness without trajectory-level supervision still drifts, as our ablation study confirms. We further pair these with a dual-view 3D point cloud encoder using two independent PointNet encoders for complementary spatial perception. On four real-robot tasks across a Franka arm and a Boston Dynamics Spot, our method achieves 70% and 60% overall success on two long-horizon multi-phase tasks where both baselines score 0%, and reaches 100% on precision tool placement. Three MetaWorld simulation tasks confirm consistent improvements, validating that trajectory-level supervision is essential for reliable policy execution.

</details>


### [499] [Model-Reference Adaptive Flight Control of the 95-mg Bee++](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08525)
*Francisco M. F. R. Gonçalves,Conor K. Trygstad,Néstor O. Pérez-Arancibia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种模型参考自适应控制(MRAC)架构，提升了Bee++昆虫级扑翼飞行器的高性能位置跟踪能力。相关实验数据验证了方法效果优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对Bee++这种超轻小型扑翼飞行器实现高精度位置控制的需求，传统方法在快速变化和复杂条件下表现有限，因此需要一种更高效鲁棒的控制方法。

Method: 本文采用模型参考自适应控制(MRAC)技术，根据实时飞行数据进行参数自适应调整，保证飞行器精确追踪目标位置。实验基于Bee++平台进行。

Result: 基于真实飞行实验数据，所提MRAC方法展现出优越的适应性和控制性能，显著提升了飞行器的位置跟踪精度。

Conclusion: MRAC架构非常适用于昆虫级扑翼飞行器的高性能定位控制，未来可进一步拓展到更多微型无人系统中。

Abstract: We introduce a model-reference adaptive control (MRAC) architecture for high-performance positional tracking of the Bee++, a 95-mg insect-scale flapping-wing aerial vehicle. The suitability, functionality, and high performance of the proposed approach are demonstrated using data from real-time flight experiments.

</details>


### [500] [BEACON: Cross-Domain Co-Training of Generative Robot Policies via Best-Effort Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08571)
*Antong Zhang,Han Qi,Heng Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BEACON是一个理论驱动的跨领域联合训练框架，可通过源域大规模演示和目标域少量演示训练生成式机器人策略，在多种跨域任务中实现更强的泛化和数据效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有从源领域到目标领域迁移机器人策略的方法在源演示丰富但目标演示有限时常常面临泛化性差、特征未对齐等问题。提升数据效率与目标域泛化能力是关键挑战。

Method: 提出BEACON框架，将跨领域联合训练建模为基于差异感知的重要性重加权问题，联合学习基于扩散模型的视觉-运动策略和逐样本源域权重。引入可扩展的实例级差异度量、策略与权重的交替随机更新，以及适用于多源异构域的扩展，实现高维时序策略下的有效适应。

Result: 在模拟到模拟、模拟到现实、多源操作等多种设置中，BEACON较目标域单独训练、固定比例联合训练和特征对齐方法表现更佳，获得更高的鲁棒性和更优数据效率。

Conclusion: BEACON无需显式特征对齐，通过差异感知跨域训练隐式实现了特征对齐，有效提升了跨域机器人策略的泛化能力和实用性。

Abstract: We introduce BEACON--Best-Effort Adaptation for Cross-Domain Co-Training--a theory-driven framework for training generative robot policies with abundant source demonstrations and limited target demonstrations. BEACON casts cross-domain co-training as a discrepancy-aware importance-reweighting problem, jointly learning a diffusion-based visuomotor policy and per-sample source weights that minimize an objective informed by target-domain generalization guarantees. To make best-effort adaptation practical for high-dimensional sequence policies, we develop scalable instance-level discrepancy estimators, stochastic alternating updates for policy and weights, and a multi-source extension that balances heterogeneous source domains. Across sim-to-sim, sim-to-real, and multi-source manipulation settings, BEACON improves robustness and data efficiency over target-only, fixed-ratio co-training, and feature-alignment baselines. Importantly, even without an explicit alignment objective, BEACON achieves feature alignment as an implicit result of discrepancy-aware cross-domain co-training.

</details>


### [501] [ATAAT: Adaptive Threat-Aware Adversarial Tuning Framework against Backdoor Attacks on Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08612)
*Kewei Chen,Yayu Long,Shuai Li,Mingsheng Shang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文分析了视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中的安全漏洞，提出了基于视觉通道的后门攻击新方法，并通过新机制大幅提升了攻击成功率与隐蔽性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着VLA模型的广泛应用，其安全问题日益突出，但传统后门攻击方法在VLA模型中面临“梯度干扰”而效果有限。本文旨在揭示该根本障碍并提高针对VLA模型的后门攻击效率。

Method: 作者提出了自适应威胁感知对抗调优（ATAAT）框架，利用“威胁-方法自适应映射”机制，根据攻击者能力智能选择最优梯度解耦策略，以优化后门注入过程。

Result: 通过大量实验，ATAAT方法在仅5%投毒率下，实现了超过80%的目标攻击成功率（TASR），在应对复杂语义触发器时表现出极高的攻击鲁棒性和隐蔽性，同时首次实现了数据投毒场景下的隐式解耦攻击。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLA模型在视觉通道中的关键安全漏洞，为后续的安全防御系统设计提供了理论和方法基础。

Abstract: Addressing the escalating security vulnerabilities in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, this study investigates backdoor attacks targeting the visual pathway. We identify a core obstacle causing the failure of traditional attack paradigms: "Gradient Interference." This phenomenon represents an optimization failure triggered by conflicting strategies during end-to-end training. To resolve this, we propose an Adaptive Threat-Aware Adversarial Tuning (ATAAT) framework. Through its core "Threat-Method Adaptive Mapping" mechanism, ATAAT intelligently selects the optimal gradient decoupling strategy based on the adversary's capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ATAAT exhibits significant advantages, achieving a highly robust Targeted Attack Success Rate (TASR > 80%) while maintaining extreme stealthiness with merely a 5% poisoning rate. It efficiently handles complex semantic-level triggers and achieves implicit decoupled attacks in data poisoning scenarios for the first time. This work reveals a critical security vulnerability in VLAs and provides theoretical and methodological support for future defense architectures.

</details>


### [502] [Geometry Guided Self-Consistency for Physical AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08638)
*Yinwei Dai,Zhuofu Chen,Lijie Yang,Ravi Netravali*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了KeyStone方法，通过在推理时并行生成多个动作序列并聚类选择最优代表，提升了扩散式物理AI模型的稳定性与表现。该方法无需改动模型或额外训练，提升了任务成功率，且无需增加推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前物理AI模型在推理时生成的动作序列具有随机性，只选取单一路径容易导致脆弱性，并且在多轮推理下这一问题会被放大，因此需要更稳定、鲁棒的推理方法。

Method: KeyStone方法在每次推理时，从同一模型上下文并行生成K个动作片段，将它们在连续动作空间内聚类，并选择最大簇的中心作为最终动作输出。由于动作序列表示较为紧凑，可以并行不增加延迟，且欧氏距离能直接反映动作相似性，无需训练额外选择器。

Result: 在多种视觉-语言-动作模型和世界-动作模型上，KeyStone方法相比单轨迹采样，最高提升任务成功率13.3%，且推理延迟可以忽略，与需训练的模型选择器准确率相当，但无需额外训练。

Conclusion: KeyStone提升了基于扩散的动作生成模型在推理时的稳定性和准确性，实现了零训练成本、几乎无延迟地提升系统性能。

Abstract: State-of-the-art physical AI models generate a chunk of actions per inference through diffusion or flow matching, iteratively refining an initial noise sample into an action trajectory. Because this inference process is inherently stochastic, committing to a single trajectory per round is brittle, and this brittleness compounds across the many sequential rounds that comprise a complete episode. We introduce KeyStone, an inference-time self-consistency method for diffusion-based action generation that draws $K$ candidate action chunks in parallel from a shared model context, clusters them in continuous action space, and returns the medoid of the largest cluster -- no additional model required. Two properties make this practical. First, the compact nature of action trajectories makes diffusion inference memory-bandwidth bound, leaving spare compute capacity to run $K$ chains in parallel with no additional wall-clock latency. Second, unlike token or pixel spaces where distance carries no semantic meaning and selection requires a learned judge, action chunks are geometrically structured such that Euclidean distance directly reflects physical similarity, making selection principled and judge-free. Across diverse vision-language-action models (VLAs) and world-action models (WAMs), KeyStone improves task success rates by up to \textbf{13.3\%} over single-trajectory sampling with negligible latency overhead, while having on par accuracy with model-based selectors at no training cost. We open source KeyStone at https://github.com/dywsjtu/keystone.

</details>


### [503] [REAP: Reinforcement-Learning End-to-End Autonomous Parking with Gaussian Splatting Simulator for Real2Sim2Real Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08713)
*Changze Li,Zhe Chen,Shaoyu Chen,Lisen Mu,Yijian Li,Yuelong Yu,Qian Zhang,Qing Su,Ming Yang,Tong Qin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于强化学习的端到端自动泊车方法（REAP），有效提升了车辆在极端泊车场景下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 极端泊车场景（如机械车位、死胡同车位）对现有自动泊车技术提出了巨大挑战，传统多阶段方法和端到端模仿或强化学习方法均存在性能或效率瓶颈，因此亟需更高效并适用性强的自动泊车解决方案。

Method: 提出REAP方法，基于Soft Actor-Critic (SAC)的非对称强化学习框架，同时融合了基于规则规划器的行为克隆技术以提升训练效率。创新引入“软预测碰撞惩罚机制”以降低碰撞率，并构建了Real2Sim2Real仿真环境：利用3D高斯斑点技术将真实场景数字化，在仿真环境中训练，再迁移至真实车辆进行测试。

Result: REAP在多类型真实和极窄机械停车位环境下完成了泊车任务，显著提升了端到端强化学习泊车的可行性和实际部署能力。

Conclusion: REAP不仅解决了极端复杂场景下端到端泊车的训练及泛化难题，也验证了其在实际部署中的有效性，为自动泊车技术发展提供了可行新路径。

Abstract: In recent years, autonomous parking has made significant advances, yet parking tasks still face challenges in extreme scenarios such as mechanical and dead-end parking slots, often resulting in failures. This is mainly due to traditional parking methods adopting a multistage approach, lacking the ability to optimize the parking problem as a whole. End-to-end methods enable joint optimization across perception and planning modules to eliminate the accumulation of errors, enhancing algorithm performance in extreme scenarios. Although several end-to-end parking methods use imitation or reinforcement learning, the former is limited by data cost and distribution coverage, while the latter suffers from inefficient exploration. To address these challenges, we propose a Reinforcement learning End-to-end Autonomous Parking method (REAP). REAP employs Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) within an asymmetric reinforcement learning framework to improve training efficiency and inference performance. To accelerate model convergence, we distill the capabilities of a rule-based planner into the end-to-end network through behavior cloning. We further introduce a soft predictive collision penalty mechanism to reduce collision rates by penalizing obstacle-approaching actions. To ensure that the trained reinforcement learning network can directly transfer to real-world scenarios, we have established a Real2Sim2Real simulator. In the Real2Sim step, we use 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to transform real-world scenes into digital scenes. In the Sim2Real step, we deploy the end-to-end model onto the vehicle to bridge the Sim2Real gap. Trained in the 3DGS simulator and deployed on physical vehicles, REAP successfully parks in various types of parking spaces, especially demonstrating the feasibility of end-to-end RL parking in extremely narrow mechanical slots.

</details>


### [504] [HULK: Large-scale Hierarchical Coordination under Continual and Uncertain Temporal Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08722)
*Qingyuan Luo,Jie Li,Meng Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效的多智能体协作框架（HULK），以解决团队任务持续生成且不确定情况下的任务分配与协作问题。该方法分层处理子团队任务分派和动态执行，实现了更高的计算效率和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统在并行与协作完成任务（如快递、监控、搜救）时非常高效，但现实中任务常常持续且不确定地产生，传统静态、离线求解的方法难以适应，需要新的动态高效的协调方法。

Method: 提出了两层交互的分层框架HULK：上层对当前已知任务在一个时域内进行滚动分配，下层在子团队内部根据在线执行时检测到的子任务动态协调，各层按不同粒度和触发条件分层协作。

Result: 该方法在不同的时序任务和环境不确定性下，对大规模异构多智能体系统进行了严格验证，表现出较高的计算效率和系统鲁棒性。

Conclusion: HULK框架能有效协调大规模多智能体在不确定、持续变化的任务环境中的协同作业，优于传统的离线全局求解方法，具备实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems can be extremely efficient when working concurrently and collaboratively, e.g., for delivery, surveillance, search and rescue. Coordination of such teams often involves two aspects: selecting appropriate subteams for different tasks in various areas, and coordinating agents in the subteams to execute the associated subtasks. Existing work often assumes that the tasks are static and known beforehand, where an integer program can be formulated and solved offline. However, in many applications, the team-wise tasks are generated online continually by external requests, and the amount of subtasks within each task is uncertain, e.g., the number of packages to deliver or victims to rescue. The aforementioned offline solution becomes inadequate as it would require constant re-computation for the whole team and global communication to broadcast the results. Thus, this work tackles the large-scale coordination problem under continual and uncertain temporal tasks, specified as temporal logic formulas over collaborative actions. The proposed hierarchical framework, HULK, consists of two interleaved layers: the rolling assignment of currently known tasks to subteams within a certain horizon, and the dynamic coordination within a subteam given the detected subtasks during online execution. Thus, coordination is performed hierarchically at different granularities and triggering conditions, improving computational efficiency and robustness. The method is validated rigorously over large-scale heterogeneous systems under various temporal tasks and environment uncertainties.

</details>


### [505] [Latent Geometry Beyond Search: Amortizing Planning in World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08732)
*Hoang Nguyen,Xiaohao Xu,Xiaonan Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出将规划过程从在线搜索转化为离线推断，通过在规则化的潜在空间中直接学习逆动力学模型，实现更高效的目标导向控制。实验结果在多环境中显著提升了推理速度，并不依赖特定优化器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管视觉世界模型可压缩表征观测信息，但在该潜在空间中的快速有效规划仍然困难。作者关注：在什么情况下，学习到的表示不仅有助于预测，还能简化控制过程。

Method: 作者基于LeWorldModel的预训练潜在空间，约束其几何结构（平滑与均匀）。核心做法是用一种轻量级的目标条件逆动力学模型（GC-IDM），将当前潜状态、目标潜状态和剩余步数一次性映射到下一步动作，取代传统在线迭代式规划。

Result: 在四个基准环境（包括导航、复杂操控和连续控制）以及多种规划协议下，所提方法在7/8设置中表现优于或匹配CEM（传统采样优化法），并实现推理成本减少100-130倍。泛化测试显示，这一优势不依赖某种特定规划器。

Conclusion: 本文表明充分结构化的潜在空间能够让规划过程由在线优化转向高效的学习推断，说明测试时大部分可利用结构已隐式编码于潜空间中。

Abstract: Modern vision-based world models can represent observations as compact yet expressive latent manifolds, but fast goal-oriented planning in these spaces remains challenging. This raises a central question: when does a learned representation simplify control, rather than merely enabling prediction? We study this question in a pretrained LeWorldModel, whose latent geometry is regularized for smoothness and uniformity. Our key insight is that, under such geometry, planning can be amortized into a latent inverse-dynamics mapping instead of requiring online search. We therefore replace iterative planning with a lightweight Goal-Conditioned Inverse Dynamics Model (GC-IDM) that maps the current latent state, goal latent state, and remaining horizon directly to the next action. Empirically, across four benchmark environments spanning navigation, contact-rich manipulation, and continuous control, our controller matches or exceeds CEM in seven of eight environment-protocol settings while reducing per-decision cost by 100-130x. A broader sweep over test-time planners (CEM, MPPI, iCEM, and gradient-based methods) shows that this result is not specific to a particular optimizer. These findings suggest that much of the structure recovered by test-time planning is already locally encoded in the latent representation. More broadly, our results indicate that sufficiently structured latent spaces can shift part of the planning burden from online optimization to learned inference.

</details>


### [506] [A Visuo-Tactile Data Collection System with Haptic Feedback for Coarse-to-Fine Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08757)
*Yeseung Kim,Nayoung Oh,Jun Park,Teetat Thamronglak,Daehyung Park*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的视觉-触觉数据采集系统，用于生成时序结构化且富含接触信息的演示数据，助力模仿学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据采集系统通常将操作员与接触力隔离，影响微妙力控制的演示，限制了模仿学习的表现。

Method: 本系统采用直驱式夹爪，操作员直接用手指进行操作，确保自然的触觉反馈。集成的视觉传感器和自定义触觉阵列能够采集图像流和接触几何数据。操作手柄上的按钮允许操作员实时标注任务的重要时序区域，实现任务的时序结构注释。

Result: 通过融合手内力感知和现场时序注释，系统能生成多模态数据集，适用于利用任务结构知识、采用粗到细学习算法的模仿学习任务。

Conclusion: 该系统为高质量的操作策略开发提供了基础，有助于提升模仿学习在复杂操作任务中的表现。

Abstract: We present a visuo-tactile data-collection system that generates temporally structured, contact-rich demonstrations for imitation learning. Conventional systems often decouple the operator from contact forces, which hinders the demonstration of subtle force modulation. Our system introduces a direct-drive gripper that the operator actuates with the fingers, preserving natural haptic feedback. Integrated visual sensors and custom tactile arrays capture image streams and contact geometry. A handle-mounted push button enables the operator to annotate the task's temporal structure in real time by marking task-critical regions. By fusing in-hand force perception with in-situ temporal annotation, the system produces multimodal datasets designed for coarse-to-fine learning algorithms that exploit structural task knowledge, enabling the development of high-quality manipulation policies.

</details>


### [507] [Omni-scale Learning-based Sequential Decision Framework for Order Fulfillment of Tote-handling Robotic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08758)
*Jiaxin Liu,Peng Yang,Yuping Li,Xinyue Xie*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种面向箱式机器人系统订单履行的全尺度学习型序决策框架，实现了高效统一的订单-箱-机器人协同决策，并在各类实际场景下显著提升了作业效率和系统适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着电商与小批量生产快速发展，物流单元日益小型化，箱（Tote）逐步取代托盘，促使箱式机器人系统成为自动化订单履行中心核心。现有决策方法多面向特定场景，难以跨系统泛化和迁移，亟需统一、可扩展的决策框架。

Method: 提出Omni-scale Learning-based Sequential Decision Framework for Order Fulfillment of Tote-handling Robotic Systems（OLSF-TRS），结合结构化组合优化与多智能体强化学习，实现订单-箱-机器人三级协同、可扩展的序贯决策。

Result: 在小规模系统上，OLSF-TRS取得优良的近最优性能，平均最优性差距小于3.5%；在大规模系统下，明显优于启发式及SOTA规则基线，总移动箱数减少8-12%并超30%，同时保证实时性。

Conclusion: OLSF-TRS为箱式机器人系统订单履行决策提供高效统一的解决方案，降低成本，节约能耗，提升效率和稳定性，具备在电商和工业物流领域广泛应用的潜力。

Abstract: Driven by the rapid expansion of e-commerce and small-batch production, the size of the intralogistics load unit of finished goods, semi-finished goods and raw materials is steadily shrinking. Totes are gradually replacing pallets as the primary handling and storage container. This shift has propelled tote-handling robotic systems to the forefront of automation order fulfillment centers. The order-fulfillment decisions of tote-handling robotic systems share a common order-tote-robot sequential decision-making nature. Existing studies primarily focus on decision mechanisms tailored to particular systems, making it difficult to generalize or transfer them to other contexts. We propose an Omni-scale Learning-based Sequential Decision Framework for Order Fulfillment of Tote-handling Robotic Systems (OLSF-TRS), a generalized and scalable sequential decision framework that combines structured combinatorial optimization with multi-agent reinforcement learning to coordinate order,tote, and robot decisions. On small-scale tote-handling robotic systems, OLSF-TRS achieves near-optimal performance with average optimality gaps below 3.5% across two distinct system configurations. In large-scale scenarios, OLSF-TRS consistently outperforms heuristic baselines across two different system types, reducing total tote movements by 8-12% and over 30% compared to SOTA rule-based approaches, while maintaining real-time responsiveness. These improvements translate into tangible operational benefits, including cost reduction, lower energy consumption, and enhanced throughput stability. The proposed framework delivers an efficient and unified order fulfillment decision-making framework for widely deployed tote-handling robotic systems,supporting high-quality order fulfillment in both e-commerce and industrial logistics sectors.

</details>


### [508] [ProcVLM: Learning Procedure-Grounded Progress Rewards for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08774)
*Youhe Feng,Hansen Shi,Haoyang Li,Xinlei Guo,Yang Wang,Chengyang Zhang,Jinkai Zhang,Xiaohan Zhang,Jie Tang,Jing Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ProcVLM，一种能够以过程为基础、提供密集反馈的视觉-语言进展估计模型，用于提升机器人在长时序操作任务中的阶段性进展反馈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时序机器人操作任务需要反馈系统能区分任务过程的每个阶段，并及时反映出未完成步骤、停滞和失败状态，而传统奖励模型仅依赖终局标签或时间插值，导致不足以反映真实进展。

Method: ProcVLM不依赖终极结果或时间代理，而是基于任务的过程结构和阶段内的视觉变化估算任务进展，采取'推理-再估计'范式，先推断剩余原子动作，再估算进展。训练上，设计了自动化的过程语义监督合成流程，构建了包含6000万帧的ProcCorpus-60M，用以训练和预训练模型，核心任务包括进展估算、动作分割和未来规划。

Result: 在自行构建的ProcVQA和奖励模型基准测试上，ProcVLM相较于代表性基线显著提升了过程推理能力，并能更准确地区分任务内部不同比例的阶段进展。

Conclusion: ProcVLM作为一种以任务过程为基础的密集奖励模型，有助于提升下游基于奖励优化的机器人策略学习，适合用于复杂长时序操作任务。

Abstract: Long-horizon robotic manipulation requires dense feedback that reflects how a task advances through its procedural stages, not merely whether the final outcome is successful. Existing reward models often rely on trajectory-level success labels or time-based interpolation, which can conflate elapsed time with true task progress and therefore fail to capture unfinished steps, stagnation, and failure states. We present ProcVLM, a progress-aware vision-language model that learns procedure-grounded progress as a dense reward signal for manipulation. Rather than deriving progress from terminal outcomes or temporal proxies, ProcVLM grounds progress estimation in procedural structure and intra-stage visual change, and further adopts a reasoning-before-estimation paradigm that infers the remaining atomic actions before estimating task progress. Specifically, we construct this supervision by synthesizing frame-level subtask-semantic annotations, assigning progress budgets according to subtask structure, and distributing each budget based on intra-subtask visual change. To train ProcVLM at scale, we build a standardized procedural supervision synthesis pipeline and construct ProcCorpus-60M from 30 embodied datasets with 60M annotated frames, from which we derive ProcVQA for procedure-aware pretraining, with progress estimation as the central task alongside action segmentation and future planning. Experiments on ProcVQA and reward-model benchmarks show that ProcVLM improves embodied procedural reasoning and yields more discriminative trajectory-internal progress estimates than representative baselines, supporting its use as a dense reward model for downstream reward-guided policy optimization. Project page: https://procvlm.github.io/

</details>


### [509] [ElasticFlow: One-Step Physics-Consistent Policy with Elastic Time Horizons for Language-Guided Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08799)
*Kewei Chen,Yayu Long,Shuai Li,Mingsheng Shang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ElasticFlow框架，实现了无需蒸馏、物理一致的一步扩散策略，大幅提升推理效率并保持高性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散策略技术在具身智能任务上表现出色，但其迭代去噪带来高延迟。已有的加速方法往往以牺牲物理一致性为代价。因此，亟需一种能够兼顾推理速度和物理一致性的方案。

Method: 作者提出ElasticFlow框架：1）重构平均场理论，直接建模平均速度场，实现单步从噪声到动作的映射（一步推理，降低计算延迟）；2）针对机器人任务的时间异质性，引入Elastic Time Horizons（弹性时间规划）机制，通过显式编码控制粒度，有效克服光谱偏置，实现语义指令与物理执行的高效对齐。

Result: 在LIBERO、CALVIN和RoboTwin等基准测试中，ElasticFlow实现约71Hz的1-NFE推理速度，并在长时序任务中优于OpenVLA和π₀等SOTA方法。

Conclusion: ElasticFlow兼顾推理效率、物理一致性和语义对齐能力，在具身智能控制领域展现出高效、强鲁棒性的前景。

Abstract: Diffusion policies have demonstrated exceptional performance in embodied AI. However, their iterative denoising process results in high latency, and existing acceleration methods often sacrifice physical consistency. To address this, we propose ElasticFlow, a distillation-free, physics-consistent one-step policy framework. We reconstruct the Mean Field Theory by directly modeling the average velocity field, enabling a direct single-step mapping from noise to action. Addressing the Temporal Heterogeneity of robotic tasks, we introduce the Elastic Time Horizons mechanism. This mechanism effectively overcomes Spectral Bias by explicitly encoding control granularity, achieving efficient alignment between semantic instructions and physical execution horizons. Experiments on benchmarks such as LIBERO, CALVIN, and RoboTwin demonstrate that ElasticFlow achieves efficient 1-NFE inference (approximately 71Hz). Furthermore, it outperforms state-of-the-art methods, including OpenVLA and $π_0$, on long-horizon tasks, highlighting its potential for efficient, robust, and semantically aligned control.

</details>


### [510] [Constraint-Aware Diffusion Priors for High-Fidelity and Versatile Quadruped Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08804)
*Jianhui Chen,Ruixin Zhan,Liu Liu,Yang Cai,Ziqiao Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合扩散模型和约束感知的新型步态生成框架Diff-CAST，解决了模仿学习与强化学习在四足机器人步态控制中遇到的GAN模式崩溃和安全等问题，实现了高多样性及高安全性的机器人运动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的GAN判别器在面对大规模多源数据时容易出现模式崩溃，难以捕捉多样性动作分布。同时，现有运动学先验存在分布外冲突，导致动作失真和方向漂移，且忽视硬件动力学带来安全隐患。

Method: 提出了Diff-CAST框架，采用扩散模型为奖励建模，实现多模态动作分布学习，替代GAN判别器以提升数据扩展能力。并整合Sim2Re架构，引入对称增强指令调节（SACC）解决追踪漂移，采用约束强化学习保障硬件安全。

Result: 在四足机器人实验上，Diff-CAST有效消除了模式崩溃，实现了多技能无缝切换，且运动过程稳定、符合硬件要求，表现出优异的数据扩展与现实部署能力。

Conclusion: Diff-CAST为四足机器人复杂步态模仿与控制提供了新范式，兼顾了多样性、动作准确性和物理安全性，为大规模数据驱动的机器人运动学习奠定了基础。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning combined with imitation learning has significantly advanced biomimetic quadrupedal locomotion. However, scaling these frameworks to massive, multi-source datasets exposes fundamental bottlenecks. First, traditional GAN-based discriminators are prone to mode collapse, struggling to capture diverse motion distributions from uncurated datasets. Second, existing kinematic priors suffer from out-of-distribution (OOD) tracking conflicts, leading to severe unintended heading drifts during complex maneuvers. Furthermore, deploying unconstrained priors to physical hardware poses critical safety risks by disregarding actuator dynamics. To overcome these challenges, we propose Diff-CAST (Diffusion-guided Constraint-Aware Symmetric Tracking), a novel motion prior framework leveraging the multi-modal distribution modeling capabilities of diffusion models for stylistic rewards. Diff-CAST effectively replaces traditional GAN discriminators, unlocking robust data scaling on heterogeneous collections. To ensure high-fidelity intent execution and reliable real-world deployment, we introduce a comprehensive Sim2Re architecture integrating Symmetric Augmented Command Conditioning (SACC) for drift-free tracking, and Constrained RL for hardware safety. Experiments on a quadruped demonstrate that Diff-CAST mitigates mode collapse, enables seamless transitions between diverse skills, and ensures robust, hardware-compliant locomotion.

</details>


### [511] [AssemPlanner: A Multi-Agent Based Task Planning Framework for Flexible Assembly System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08831)
*Chenhao Zhang,Chaoran Zhang,Zhaobo Xu,Yongbo Yang,Pingfa Feng,Long Zeng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于多智能体的装配任务规划系统（AssemPlanner），能将自然语言任务自动转化为生产操作序列，实现灵活组装与自适应任务规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前柔性装配系统中新产品上线前需多位专家进行耗时的人工配置，缺乏高效、自适应的任务规划方法。

Method: 设计了AssemPlanner系统，并引入多种专用智能体（如SchedAgent、KnowledgeAgent、LineBalanceAgent等）协同工作。任务首先以自然语言描述输入，经过SchedAgent（基于ReAct框架）中心推理和其他智能体反馈，动态调整装配计划并解决组装约束问题。

Result: 系统能根据多智能体反馈，真实模拟生产过程中的各种限制，自动完成装配任务规划，并提升了装配线建立的灵活性和效率。

Conclusion: AssemPlanner能够高效替代传统人工配置流程，实现复杂装配线任务的自主规划，有助于生产自动化、柔性制造发展，并已开源以促进复现与应用。

Abstract: In flexible assembly systems, existing task planning methods require a time-consuming configuration process by multiple experts to establish a production line for a new product. To address this challenge, we propose a multi-agent based task planning framework for flexible assembly systems, denoted as AssemPlanner. It takes tasks described in natural language as input, which are then converted into actionable sequential production operations. It comprises several specialized agents, including SchedAgent , KnowledgeAgent, LineBalanceAgent, and a scene graph. Within the proposed framework, SchedAgent serves as the central reasoning engine. Departing from traditional static pipelines, AssemPlanner utilizes a ReAct-based SchedAgent to adaptively adjust actions via multi-agent feedback. By observing the feedback from KnowledgeAgent, LineBalanceAgent, and the scene graph, it autonomously resolves complex industrial process constraints. To facilitate reproducibility, all code and datasets are released at https://github.com/chz332/Assemplanner.

</details>


### [512] [Preserving Foundational Capabilities in Flow-Matching VLAs through Conservative SFT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08879)
*Tianyi Zhang,Shaopeng Zhai,Haoran Zhang,Fuxian Huang,Qi Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种保守的有监督微调方法（ConSFT），用以解决视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在无约束微调时容易遗忘原有能力的问题。ConSFT通过对低置信度样本的梯度动态缩放，防止模型参数被过度修改，有效保留此前学习的技能。该方法无需额外先验数据，也无架构复杂性，在多个主流数据集和实际机器人实验中显示出优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在无约束微调过程中，容易因参数更新过多导致灾难性遗忘，损失原有预训练能力。传统解决方案如显式正则化需额外参考网络或数据，成本较高。因此，作者希望探索一种无需先验数据且能有效防遗忘的方法。

Method: 提出了一种新的优化目标ConSFT，核心思想是根据模型对样本的置信度动态调整学习信号，对低置信度样本适当抑制梯度，减少不必要参数更新。方法借鉴强化学习中的trust-region思想，确保参数扰动受控，实现渐进式学习，不依赖并行参考网络。

Result: 在LIBERO和RoboTwin基准测试中，ConSFT显著提升了原有能力保留，平均绝对提升超20%，在无先验数据条件下与经验回放（Experience Replay）效能持平。真实机器人实验表明，该方法可避免空间过拟合，稳定下游任务适应过程。

Conclusion: ConSFT是一种无需先验数据和架构开销的高效微调方法，有效防止VLA模型灾难性遗忘，能在适应新任务同时保留原有物理技能，适用性强且部署方便。

Abstract: Unconstrained fine-tuning of flow-matching Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models drives dense parameter overwrites, degrading pre-trained capabilities. We present Conservative Supervised Fine-Tuning (ConSFT), an optimization objective that adapts to target distributions while mitigating catastrophic forgetting, requiring zero prior data or architectural overhead. By dynamically scaling learning signals based on model confidence, ConSFT suppresses excessive gradients from low-confidence samples to prevent disproportionate parameter updates, thereby bounding the intrinsic parameter disruption risk. Inspired by reinforcement learning's trust-region clipping, this formulation establishes a progressive learning dynamic to secure target convergence and prior capability retention, maintaining sparse parameter updates without relying on the parallel reference networks required by explicit regularization. We evaluate ConSFT on the LIBERO and RoboTwin benchmarks across state-of-the-art flow-matching VLAs ($π_0$, $π_{0.5}$, and GR00T-N1.6-3B). The method outperforms vanilla SFT in capability retention by an average absolute margin of over 20\%, matching the efficacy of data-heavy Experience Replay in a prior-data-free regime. Real-world robotic deployments confirm that ConSFT precludes spatial overfitting during downstream adaptation, preserving pre-trained physical skills while acquiring sequential target tasks.

</details>


### [513] [Raymoval: Raycasting-based Dynamic Object Removal for Static 3D Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08937)
*Daebeom Kim,Seungjae Lee,Seoyeon Jang,Kevin Christiansen Marsim,Hyun Myung*
