Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于光线投射的动态物体去除模块，提升静态3D地图的一致性，对动态物体残留和表面丢失问题进行了有效处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器人导航中，静态地图为长期自主性提供了持续的几何先验和一致的参考。然而，动态物体对地图一致性造成干扰，残留痕迹和表面数据丢失影响导航效果。为此，需要高效区分动态与静态物体的方法，提升地图质量。

Method: 作者提出用光线投射法，将每次扫描投影到方位-俯仰网格上。通过每个方向上的距离最小值与静态地图的第一次击中距离进行对比，引入一次基于光线投射的一致性检测区分动态点和静态点，并通过空间一致性验证进一步优化标签，从而减少残留动态特征、降低静态信息被过度去除的现象。

Result: 在SemanticKITTI和自定义挑战性数据集上进行了定量和定性评估，结果显示该方法能够稳定实现动态物体剔除，得到高一致性的静态地图。

Conclusion: 提出的方法显著提升了静态地图的纯净度和一致性，对动态环境下的机器人自主导航具有实际价值。

Abstract: Static mapping is fundamental to robot navigation, providing a persistent geometric prior and a consistent reference for long-term autonomy. However, dynamic objects leave residual traces and cause surface loss, which reduces map consistency. We propose a raycasting-based module for dynamic object removal in static 3D mapping. Each scan is projected onto an azimuth-elevation grid, and for every viewing direction we compare the bin-wise minimum range with the map's first-hit distance computed by raycasting. Furthermore, we apply a raycast consistency test that separates dynamic from static points. Finally, a spatial consistency validation step refines labels, producing static maps with lower residual dynamics and reduced over-removal. We evaluate our approach quantitatively and qualitatively on SemanticKITTI and a challenging custom dataset, and show consistent static mapping results.

</details>


### [514] [A low-cost mockup to simulate robotic laser cutting in nuclear decommissioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08947)
*Frederico Fernandes Afonso Silva,Murilo Marques Marinho,Bruno Vilhena Adorno*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种低成本实物模拟平台，用于核退役中容器激光切割工艺的仿真。该系统集成了三自由度平台、六自由度机械臂（紫外灯模拟激光）、摄像机视觉系统，以及自适应运动控制器，无需系统标定即可高精度追踪不同轨迹，并避障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 核退役工作需要对容器进行安全高效的激光切割，但实际操作风险高且成本昂贵。因此，开发低成本且能真实模拟切割过程的实验平台，有助于相关技术的研究和优化。

Method: 搭建由三轴平台和六轴机械臂组成的实验系统，用紫外灯模拟激光切割，通过视觉系统定位，并用带有几何约束的自适应运动控制器实时纠正误差和避障。创新之处在于指定仅需四自由度控制紫外光束跟踪路径，提高了控制精度和灵活性。

Result: 无需预先标定，系统可实现不同切割轨迹的追踪，端执行器控制平均精度为3.9mm（标准差2.5mm），紫外光束控制平均精度为2.4mm（标准差1.3mm）。

Conclusion: 本文提出的仿真平台能够有效模拟激光切割工艺，不仅成本低、操作安全，还能高精度追踪复杂路径，具备很好的实际应用和研究价值。

Abstract: This paper introduces a low-cost experimental mockup to simulate the laser cutting process of containers in nuclear decommissioning. It is composed of a three-axis table supporting a cuboid container with ultraviolet-sensitive faces, a six-degree-of-freedom serial manipulator holding an ultraviolet torch that simulates the laser, and a visual system based on cameras and fiducial markers. The system employs a constrained task-space adaptive motion controller that compensates for inaccurate parameters and eliminates the need to calibrate the system. Furthermore, as the motion controller explicitly accounts for geometric constraints, the robot reactively avoids collisions with obstacles while handling the ultraviolet torch. To enhance tracking of the laser-cutting path, we control the ultraviolet beam, which requires only four degrees of freedom, instead of the full end-effector pose. Experiments show that, despite an initially uncalibrated system, the overall system is capable of tracking different trajectories with an overall mean accuracy of 3.9 (sd 2.5) mm when the end-effector pose is controlled and 2.4 (sd 1.3) mm when the ultraviolet beam is controlled.

</details>


### [515] [Towards Backdoor-Based Ownership Verification for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09005)
*Ming Sun,Rui Wang,Xingrui Yu,Lihua Jing,Hangyu Du,Zhenglin Wan,Xu Pan,Ivor Tsang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了GuardVLA，一个专为视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型设计的后门式所有权验证框架，在不影响原有任务表现的情况下，通过嵌入隐蔽后门水印，实现安全可靠的模型所有权验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着VLA模型的广泛传播和应用，模型所有权保护变得十分重要。现有的所有权验证方法难以直接应用于端到端多模态决策的机器人模型，因此亟需专有的验证框架。

Method: GuardVLA在模型训练阶段，将秘密信息注入到视觉数据中，植入隐蔽且无害的后门水印。验证时，采用swap-and-detect机制，利用触发器和外部分类头，通过预测概率激活并检测后门，证明模型归属权。

Result: 在多种数据集、模型结构及适应性设定下，GuardVLA表现出良好的所有权验证能力，同时不影响任务性能，并且水印对后续模型适应也具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: GuardVLA为VLA模型的所有权验证提供了一种安全、高效的方法，为开源和安全部署奠定基础，并证明后门水印在多场景下具有实用性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) support generalist robotic control by enabling end-to-end decision policies directly from multi-modal inputs. As trained VLAs are increasingly shared and adapted, protecting model ownership becomes essential for secure deployment and responsible open-source usage. In this paper, we present GuardVLA, the first backdoor-based ownership verification framework specifically designed for VLAs. GuardVLA embeds a stealthy and harmless backdoor watermark into the protected model during training by injecting secret messages into embodied visual data. For post-release verification, we propose a swap-and-detect mechanism, in which the trigger projector and an external classifier head are used to activate and detect the embedded backdoor based on prediction probabilities. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets, model architectures, and adaptation settings demonstrate that GuardVLA enables reliable ownership verification while preserving benign task performance. Further results show that the embedded watermark remains detectable under post-release model adaptation.

</details>


### [516] [Terminal Matters: Kinodynamic Planning with a Terminal Cost and Learned Uncertainty in Belief State-Cost Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09046)
*Zhuoyun Zhong,Seyedali Golestaneh,Constantinos Chamzas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的终端代价公式，使运动规划器在路径代价最小化的同时，显式优化机器人最终到达目标的概率和偏好，提高在不确定性下的目标到达可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的采样型运动规划器主要优化累计轨迹代价，而对末端状态（如目标达成概率或优先级）只做可行性检查，缺乏对目标到达质量的明确优化。在实际机器人任务中，终态的质量（如更高的目标达成概率）很重要，特别是在有不确定性的环境下。

Method: 引入终端代价到运动规划目标中；证明AO-RRT(一种渐近最优采样运动规划器)在新目标下依然保持渐近最优性。同时推广到belief space（概率分布空间），通过最小化Wasserstein距离提升目标达成的下界；并提出名为KiTe的新规划器，能学习系统动态和不确定性，无需解析模型，直接用数据训练后进行规划。

Result: 在Flappy Bird、Car Parking、Planar Pushing等任务上，KiTe在不确定条件下降低了目标未达率。真实机器人实验中，KiTe基于学习到的动态和不确定性，也能有效地生成规划。

Conclusion: KiTe通过引入终端代价优化方式，显著提升了在不确定环境下的目标达成率和鲁棒性，在没有精确动力学模型时也可应用。

Abstract: In many real-world robotic tasks, robots must generate dynamically feasible motions that reliably reach desired goals even under uncertainty. Yet existing sampling-based kinodynamic planners typically optimize accumulated trajectory costs and treat goal reaching as a feasibility check, rather than explicitly optimizing terminal-state quality, such as goal preference or goal-reaching reliability. In this work, we introduce a terminal-cost formulation for kinodynamic planning that allows terminal-state quality to be optimized alongside accumulated trajectory cost. We prove that AO-RRT, an asymptotically optimal kinodynamic planner, preserves its asymptotic optimality under this augmented objective. We further extend the formulation to belief space and prove that minimizing the Wasserstein distance between the terminal belief and the goal improves a lower bound on the probability of reaching the goal region. The resulting planner, KiTe, uses this terminal-cost objective to encode goal preferences and improve reliability under uncertainty. To support systems without analytical uncertainty models, we learn dynamics and process uncertainty directly from data and integrate the learned belief dynamics into planning. Experiments on Flappy Bird, Car Parking, and Planar Pushing show that KiTe consistently improves goal-reaching success under uncertainty. Real-world Planar Pushing experiments further demonstrate that KiTe can plan effectively with learned dynamics and uncertainty. Source code is available at https://github.com/elpis-lab/KiTe.

</details>


### [517] [Automated Robotic Moisture Monitoring in Agricultural Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09050)
*Senthil Palanisamy,Akila I. S*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出一种结合机器人和土壤湿度传感器的自动化田地湿度监测系统，通过分区布置传感器，机器人在检测到干旱警报后，利用最短路径算法前往目标区块，结合图像处理汇报土壤湿度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统大规模种植园的土壤湿度监测费时费力，缺乏高效与经济的方法，需要开发自动化、智能化的解决方案。

Method: 将农田划分为小网格，每格内设有湿度传感器。一旦有区域检测到土壤干燥，机器人根据Dijkstra最短路径算法，依据田地航拍图像自动前往目标网格。机器人利用图像处理算法评估该区块的总湿度，并记录报告。

Result: 搭建了田间实验小场地，通过在田地上方安装摄像头完成测试工作，开发出一套自动化原型系统，实现了机器人协同监测田地湿度。

Conclusion: 通过本项目，实现了高效、自动化、经济的农业土壤湿度监测系统原型，为大规模应用提供了基础支撑。

Abstract: Monitoring moisture level of land in a large-scale plantation is tedious. The main objective of this project is to use a robotic kit in collaboration with the on-field moisture sensor circuits, thereby creating an efficient and economical moisture monitoring system. A large agriculture field is divided into smaller grids. Each grid is placed with a moisture sensor. Whenever a sensor reports the soil to be dry, the robot goes to the concerned field for inspection. The path to the concerned field is found by applying Dijkstra's shortest path algorithm on the aerial image of the field. Then the total moisture content of the field is calculated by the robot using suitable image processing algorithms and reported accordingly. For developing and testing this work, a small study field was set up above which a camera was mounted at an appropriate height to capture its aerial view. Thus a prototype for an automated system of monitoring agricultural fields' moisture has been developed through this work.

</details>


### [518] [Octopus Protocol: One-Shot Hardware Discovery and Control for AI Agents via Infrastructure-as-Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09055)
*Quilee Simeon,Justin M. Wei,Yile Fan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Octopus Protocol系统，实现自动化发现并适配新硬件，仅需一条命令即可将硬件暴露为HTTP服务，极大降低机器人系统开发成本和难度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的agentic-robotics系统需要手动编写底层驱动、SDK或原语，成为新硬件接入的主要工程瓶颈。如何自动推断和快速适配新设备成了亟待解决的问题。

Method: 提出了五阶段自动化流程（PROBE, IDENTIFY, INTERFACE, SERVE, DEPLOY）：通过语言模型API，自动发现连接设备，推断功能，生成与部署MCP协议服务并实时监控与自愈。系统遵循“协议即提示”及“编码智能即运行环境”两大架构原则。

Result: 系统在多种异构平台和商业级具备视觉反馈的机械臂上通过实验验证。一条命令，十几分钟内完成30个MCP工具自动上线，无需手写控制代码即可实现闭环视觉-运动控制。

Conclusion: Octopus Protocol极大降低了新硬件接入智能体控制系统的门槛，为机器人开发赋能，具备高扩展性与普适性。

Abstract: Recent agentic-robotics systems, from Code-asPolicies to modern vision-language-action (VLA) foundation models, presuppose that drivers, SDKs, or ROS-style primitives for the target hardware already exist. Writing those primitives is the dominant engineering cost of bringing up new hardware for agent control. We present Octopus Protocol, a system that collapses that cost to a single shell command. Given only raw OS access and a language-model API key, a coding agent executes a five-stage pipeline--PROBE, IDENTIFY, INTERFACE, SERVE, DEPLOY--to discover connected devices, infer their capabilities, generate a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server with typed tools, and deploy it as a live HTTP endpoint. A persistent daemon then monitors the system, heals broken code, and perceives physical state through the camera tools it generated for itself. Two architectural principles make this work: protocols are prompts, not code, and the coding agent is the runtime. We validate the system on three heterogeneous platforms (PC/WSL, Apple Silicon macOS, Raspberry Pi 4) and on a commercial 6-DOF robotic arm with USB camera feedback. One command onboards the hardware in ~10-15 minutes and exposes up to 30 MCP tools; an MCP-compliant client then performs closed-loop visual-motor control through tools no human wrote.

</details>


### [519] [Smoothing Out the Edges: Continuous-Time Estimation with Gaussian Process Motion Priors on Factor Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09073)
*Connor Holmes,Sven Lilge,Zi Cong Guo,Frank Dellaert,Timothy D. Barfoot*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文旨在推广高斯过程(GP)在连续时间状态估计中的应用，提出了基于因子图的新解释，并结合GTSAM框架提供了实际示例。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然连续时间状态估计优势明显，但现有高斯过程方法实际应用较少。作者希望通过简化理论和实现流程，降低其使用门槛，推动GP方法在机器人领域的应用。

Method: 作者以因子图为基础，重新解释了高斯过程连续时间估计的方法，并在常用的GTSAM框架中实现和演示了三种具体的工作示例。

Result: 本文为GP方法在连续时间估计上的解释更加直观，同时通过GTSAM内的示例降低了用户理解和实践的难度。

Conclusion: 对GP连续时间状态估计的因子图解释提升了其易用性和可推广性，有望推动该技术在机器人等领域的更广泛应用。

Abstract: Continuous-time state estimation is gaining in popularity due to its abilities to provide smooth solutions, handle asynchronous sensors, and interpolate between data points. While there are two main paradigms, parametric (e.g., temporal basis functions, splines) and nonparametric (Gaussian processes), the latter has seen less adoption despite its technical advantages and relative ease of implementation. In this article, we seek to rectify this situation by providing a new simplified explanation of GP continuous-time estimation rooted in the language of factor graphs, which have become the de facto estimation paradigm in much of robotics. To simplify onboarding, we also provide three working examples implemented in the popular GTSAM estimation framework.

</details>


### [520] [HyDRA Scorpion: A Cost-effective and Modular ROV for Real-Time Underwater Inspection, Intervention, and Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09093)
*Anika Tabassum Orchi,Md Farhan Zaman,Md Darain Khan,Md Alamgir,Mahbubul Islam,Md. Jobayer Rahman,A. M. Zayed Abdullah,Md Mehrab Hossain Khan,Md. Kutub Al Baki,Iftekharul Islam,Shakil Ahmed,Md Sadique Hossain,Md Muzahidul Islam,Shah Mohammad Seaman,Nusrat Jahan Piyal,Shekh Md. Saifur Rahman,Fahim Hafiz,A. K. M. Muzahidul Islam,M. Rezwan Khan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HyDRA Scorpion是一种集成AI感知和原位测量系统的低成本水下机器人平台，兼具4自由度机动、双操纵臂及耐压壳体，具有较强的鲁棒性和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前商用水下机器人价格高、智能集成度低，导致科研人员获取和使用门槛高。

Method: 提出可本地制造、低成本的ROV平台，融合AI视觉算法、实时3D测距和高自由度机械臂，并通过实验对电子舱耐压、定位精度、操控能力和AI识别精度进行验证。

Result: 平台在4bar环境下电子舱无渗水，定位误差小于±0.15米，AI模块mAP达0.89，机械臂支持360度旋转和双功能操作。

Conclusion: HyDRA Scorpion有效填补了水下机器人低成本与智能集成间的空白，且性能和可靠性达到了水下科研需求标准。

Abstract: A Remotely Operated Vehicle (ROV) is a tethered underwater robot used for tasks like inspection and intervention. While essential tools for underwater science, the high cost of commercial ROVs and a persistent gap between mechanically capable platforms and those with integrated intelligence create a significant barrier to access. HyDRA Scorpion differs from conventional systems by addressing these challenges, integrating an advanced, AI-driven perception stack with in-situ measurement capabilities onto a low-cost, locally manufacturable platform. The system combines 4-DoF maneuverability, dual manipulators, and a custom pressure-tested housing. Experimental results validate the system's robustness and performance. Leak-free operation was confirmed through prolonged pressure testing of the electronics housing to 4 bar, equivalent to the pressure of a 304.8-meter water depth approximately in a simulated environment, with no moisture ingress detected. The vehicle also demonstrated stable station-keeping, maintaining its position within a tight tolerance of $\(\pm\)0.15$ meters under external disturbances. The onboard AI module achieved underwater object detection mean Average Precision (mAP) of 0.89 with real-time inference, length and 3D-mapping based distance measurement. Also, 4-DoF manipulator arm can grip and maintain dual-function manipulator feature which support 360 degree tangle-free rotation.

</details>


### [521] [IMPACT: An Implicit Active-Set Augmented Lagrangian for Fast Contact-Implicit Trajectory Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09127)
*Jiayun Li,Dejian Gong,Georgia Chalvatzaki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种高效且有理论保证的接触-隐式轨迹优化（CITO）方法——IMPACT，并大幅提升了解决速度与质量，在仿真和真实机器人任务中证实有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受限于现有CITO方法数值条件差、求解效率低、理论收敛性不足等问题，难以推广应用。急需更高效且有收敛保证的解法，以满足复杂机器人接触任务的需要。

Method: 基于增广拉格朗日法，提出IMPACT方法，在轨迹优化过程中动态识别隐式接触模式分支。该方法使用高效C++实现，适配轨迹优化任务。

Result: 在开源CITO和CI-MPC基准测试中，IMPACT比现有强基线提速2.9-70倍（几何平均13.8倍）；在精巧操作任务的仿真中获得更优控制质量；并在实际机器人推物任务中成功验证。

Conclusion: IMPACT显著提升了CITO的求解效率和控制性能，突破了既有解法的瓶颈，为复杂接触场景下的机器人规划与控制提供了有力工具。

Abstract: Contact-implicit trajectory optimization (CITO) has attracted growing attention as a unified framework for planning and control in contact-rich robotic tasks. Recent approaches have demonstrated promising results in manipulation and locomotion without requiring a prescribed contact-mode schedule. It is well known that the underlying mathematical programs with complementarity constraints (MPCCs) remain numerically ill-conditioned, and systematic, scalable solution strategies for CITO remain an active area of research. More efficient and principled solvers that can handle contact constraints are therefore essential to broaden the applicability of CITO. In this work, we develop an augmented-Lagrangian approach to CITO for solving MPCC-based CITO with stationarity guarantees. The method can be interpreted as identifying the implicit contact-mode branches on the fly during the trajectory optimization (TO) iterations; we call this approach IMPACT (IMPlicit contact ACtive-set Trajectory optimization). We provide an efficient C++ implementation tailored to trajectory-optimization workloads and evaluate it on the open-source CITO and contact-implicit model predictive control (CI-MPC) benchmarks. On CITO, IMPACT achieves 2.9x-70x speedups over strong baselines (geometric mean 13.8x). On CI-MPC, we show improved control quality for contact-rich trajectories on dexterous manipulation tasks in simulation. Finally, we demonstrate the proposed method on real robotic hardware on a T-shaped object pushing task.

</details>


### [522] [Beyond Self-Play: Hierarchical Reasoning for Continuous Motion in Closed-Loop Traffic Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09153)
*Weifan Zhang,Xiaofeng Zhao,Adel Bazzi,Mingrui Li,Yifan Wei,Dengfeng Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种层次化的多智能体强化学习架构，通过结合高级交互推理与低级连续运动，实现更逼真的交通仿真智能体行为，显著提升控制平滑性和安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统自博弈强化学习方法虽具备良好扩展性，但智能体行为难以表现现实驾驶环境中的社会意识，导致交通仿真效果偏离人类驾驶者。

Method: 提出层次化架构：高层为Stackelberg式多智能体强化学习模块，生成基于交互的意图指令；低层为连续运动模块，将战略意图转换为物理可行、与场景响应的控制序列。同时引入混合协同训练方法，辅以辅助恢复监督以缓解闭环部署中的分布偏移问题。

Result: 在基于SUMO的城市路网实验中，新框架相比自博弈及模仿学习基线，在控制平滑性和交通安全性方面表现更优，同时交通效率保持竞争力。

Conclusion: 所提方法在兼顾仿真智能体可扩展性与行为真实性方面取得显著平衡，为交通仿真及相关驾驶智能体研究提供新思路。

Abstract: Closed-loop traffic simulation requires agents that are both scalable and behaviorally realistic. Recent self-play reinforcement learning approaches demonstrate strong scalability, but their equilibrium strategies fail to capture the socially aware behaviors of real human drivers. We propose a hierarchical architecture that goes beyond self-play by combining high-level multi-agent interaction reasoning with low-level continuous trajectory realization. Specifically, a Stackelberg-style Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) module generates interaction-aware intention commands. These commands condition a low-level continuous motion module, translating the strategic intent into physically consistent, scene-responsive control sequences. To mitigate distribution shift in closed-loop deployment, we introduce a hybrid co-training scheme combining MARL with auxiliary recovery supervision. Experiments on a SUMO-based urban network demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior control smoothness and safety compared to self-play and passive imitation baselines, while maintaining competitive traffic efficiency.

</details>


### [523] [SHIELD: Scalable Optimal Control with Certification using Duality and Convexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09171)
*Hansung Kim,Siddharth H. Nair,Francesco Borrelli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出SHIELD算法，可减少ℓ1正则化凸优化中的决策变量和约束数量，并用深度网络加速其筛选过程，显著加快了模型预测控制在复杂交通场景下的计算速度，并保持安全性和可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ℓ1正则化凸优化常用于稀疏性建模，但随着变量和约束数量增加，计算成本极高；尤其在模型预测控制等实时系统中，亟需高效方法降低计算负担，同时保证解的质量和安全。

Method: 作者基于强凸性和拉格朗日对偶理论，推导可安全剔除变量和约束的条件，并结合transformer神经网络指导此筛选过程，从而构建分层SHIELD算法。该方法在SMPC复杂交通仿真中与全维模型进行对比。

Result: 仿真结果表明，SHIELD在大幅减少维度和约束的同时，保证了约束可行性和变量零值性。在复杂多模态交通场景下，SHIELD带来数量级上的计算加速，并在闭环控制中保持安全。

Conclusion: SHIELD兼具理论安全保障和实际高效性，为复杂驾驶场景下的轻量级模型预测控制提供了切实可用的方案，促进了安全与实时性的统一。

Abstract: We present SHIELD, a hierarchical algorithm that reduces both the decision-variable dimension and the constraint set in $\ell_1$-regularized convex programs. From strong convexity and Lagrangian duality, we derive certificates that \emph{safely} discard constraints and decision variables while guaranteeing that all removed constraints remain satisfied and all removed variables are null. To further accelerate the proposed algorithm, we propose a transformer-based deep neural network to guide the dual certificate inference. We validate SHIELD on stochastic model predictive control (SMPC) in complex, multi-modal traffic scenarios, comparing against a full-dimensional SMPC policy. Numerical simulations demonstrate order-of-magnitude computational speedups while preserving feasibility and closed-loop safety, highlighting the practicality of certifiably safe, lightweight MPC in complex driving scenes.

</details>


### [524] [Continuum Robot Modeling with Action Conditioned Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09216)
*Jiong Lin,Jinchen Ruan,Hod Lipson*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于自建模的深度学习方法，用于准确预测腱驱动连续体机器人(TDCR)的静态形态。实现了数据驱动的自建模框架，并在仿真和实际硬件中取得高精度结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 腱驱动连续体机器人由于连续变形、腱路径复杂、柔顺性、摩擦和制造差异等因素，预测其驱动后的稳定形态极具挑战性。缺乏高效精确的形态预测方法，严重限制其在实际任务中的应用。

Method: 作者搭建了轻量化3D打印TDCR平台，并开发多摄像头RGB-D数据采集系统。提出并训练点云流匹配模型，该模型将电机驱动状态映射为TDCR的三维结构。采用随机采样的准静态配置训练模型，并在同设计家族和驱动区间内评估泛化能力。此外，在MuJoCo仿真和真实硬件上与前人方法对比，并验证了受负载等条件影响下的形态预测性能。

Result: 在模拟和实际的2、3、5模块TDCR上，本文方法在CD和EMD等形态相似性指标下都取得了更高的预测准确度。同时，方法在仿真中还能泛化到带端部负载的条件，仍能准确预测静态形态。

Conclusion: 本文证明了基于数据驱动、条件自建模的框架能够实现高精度、泛化性强的TDCR静态形态预测，对提升连续体机器人自感知与控制能力有重要意义。

Abstract: Predicting the shape of tendon driven continuum robots (TDCRs) at steady state from actuation remains challenging due to continuous deformation, complex tendon routing, compliance, friction, and fabrication variability. In this paper, we address this problem as kinematic self modeling conditioned on action. We present a lightweight 3D printed TDCR hardware platform and an RGB-D data collection pipeline with multiple cameras, and we learn a point cloud flow matching model that maps motor actuation states to the robot's settled 3D geometry. The model is trained from randomly sampled quasi static configurations and evaluated on test motor commands within the same TDCR design family and actuation range. We compare against prior 3D deformable object and robot self modeling approaches in both MuJoCo simulation and real hardware experiments. Experiments on simulated 2-, 3-, and 5-module TDCRs and real 2- and 3-module robots show improved shape prediction accuracy under CD and EMD metrics. We further show in simulation that the same conditional formulation generalizes to tip payload as a conditioning input, enabling payload conditioned steady-state shape prediction. These results demonstrate a data driven self modeling framework for quasi static TDCR geometry prediction.

</details>


### [525] [PECMAN: Perception-enabled Collaborative Multi-Agent Navigation in Unknown Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09344)
*Tianchonghui Fang,Shaunak Roy,Shalabh Gupta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SMART-3D提出在动态未知环境中，通过剪枝和修复RRT*树实现高效实时路径重规划。PECMAN扩展该方法至多智能体协作导航，并通过共享感知信息优化整体效率和反应速度。实验表明，该方法能显著提升团队完成任务速度，且保持高成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有路径规划方法通常假设环境是静态且完全可观测的，但实际导航环境往往是动态并且部分可观测，因此需要能够在此类环境下实时、安全地进行路径规划和多机器人协作。

Method: SMART-3D方法基于RRT*，在环境变化时不重建路径树，而是通过剪除失效节点/边并修复子树来快速更新路径。PECMAN进一步引入了分布式树变形和感知共享，每个机器人根据自身和其他机器人的新发现动态调整路径，实现协同避障和高效导航。

Result: 通过对七种二维场景、共28,000次多智能体仿真验证，PECMAN能使团队完成任务时间缩短最高达52%，且成功率接近100%。实际在两台自主机器人上实验也验证了其有效性。

Conclusion: SMART-3D和PECMAN为动态、未知、部分可观测环境中的单/多智能体导航提供了高效、可靠的实时路径重规划方案，显著提升了多智能体系统的适应性和协作性能。

Abstract: Most path planners assume fully known, static environments, assumptions that fail when robots navigate in dynamic and partially observable environments. SMART-3D addresses these issues by real-time replanning, where it morphs the underlying RRT* tree whenever new obstacles or structures are discovered in the environment. Instead of rebuilding the tree entirely from scratch, SMART-3D prunes invalid nodes and edges and subsequently repairs the disjoint subtrees at hot-nodes to find a new path, thus providing high computational efficiency for real-time adaptability. We extend SMART-3D to perception-enabled collaborative multi-agent navigation (PECMAN) in unknown environments. PECMAN is built upon distributed tree morphing and shared perception strategies, where each agent reacts to environmental changes and morphs its respective tree to replan its path, while simultaneously broadcasting newly discovered structures to other agents, thus enabling them to proactively replan even in areas that have not yet been explored by them. This approach reduces redundant reactions and unnecessary replannings of the agents due to improved situational awareness. The performance of PECMAN was evaluated by 28,000 multi-agent simulations on seven 2D scenarios with different case studies. The results show that PECMAN achieves up to 52% reduction in the team-completion time, while maintaining near 100% success rates. Finally, PECMAN was tested by real experiments on two autonomous robots in a building environment.

</details>


### [526] [Mismatch-Aware Adaptive Constraint Tightening for Bicycle-Model Trajectory Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09376)
*Lingxue Lyu,Zihui Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文针对自动驾驶车辆轨迹优化模型不匹配导致安全约束失效的问题，提出动力学误差自适应收紧方法（MACT），实验证明其可提升安全性和减少不必要的安全裕度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自动驾驶车辆轨迹优化多采用运动学自行车模型，因其计算简便，但实际动态效果（如侧滑、轮胎刚度、偏航-横向耦合）常被忽略，导致执行时可能违反安全约束，存在安全隐患，亟需理论分析模型不匹配的具体表现及改进方法。

Method: 1）推导出分界车速$v_c=\sqrt{C_αL/M}$，明确低于该速度时车辆内侧转向（安全），高于时外侧转向（危险）；2）证明轨迹偏移误差$\varepsilon^*$随规划时域$T$呈$T^2$标度，给出瞬态及稳态上下界；3）提出无仿真解析系数$a_2^{\mathrm{anal}}$，可直接由车辆参数和规划时域获得；4）基于上述理论，提出MACT约束收紧策略，误差随状态自适应调整。

Result: 通过八组数值实验验证了理论标度规律。MACT方法在2自由度车辆模型下达到100%安全性，安全裕度浪费较固定裕度法减少84%；在非线性倾斜自行车模型中亦表现优秀；闭环MPC比较中，MACT较传统管控MPC在保证相同安全性的情况下，减少34%的应用裕度。

Conclusion: 理论分析和实验均表明：针对运动学与动力学模型不匹配导致的安全隐患，采用状态自适应的约束收紧方法MACT能显著提升安全性和轨迹优化利用率，减少保守裕度，适用于不同车辆动力学模型。

Abstract: Trajectory optimization for autonomous vehicles usually relies on the kinematic bicycle model because of its
  computational simplicity. However, when the planned trajectory is executed under the true vehicle dynamics, which
  include lateral slip, tire stiffness and yaw-lateral coupling, safety constraints can be violated owing to the model
  mismatch. In this paper, we make three theoretical contributions. First, we derive a characteristic speed
  $v_c=\sqrt{C_αL/M}$ which separates two different mismatch regimes: below $v_c$ the dynamic bicycle initially
  oversteers inward (safe); above $v_c$ it understeers outward (safety-critical). Second, we prove that the peak outward
  deviation $\varepsilon^*$ follows a $T^2$ horizon scaling whose coefficient transitions between a transient bound
  $\frac{1}{2}(v^2-v_c^2)κ$ and a steady-state bound. Third, we obtain a simulation-free analytical coefficient
  $a_2^{\mathrm{anal}}=\frac{1}{2}(1-v_c^2/v_{\max}^2)T^2$ that is computable from vehicle parameters and the planning
  horizon alone. Putting these together, we propose Mismatch-Aware Adaptive Constraint Tightening (MACT),
  $ε(v,κ)=a_2 v^2|κ|$, which replaces a fixed worst-case margin by a state-dependent one that is large
  at high speed/curvature but nearly zero on gentle paths. Eight numerical experiments confirm the scaling laws. MACT
  reaches 100% safety with 84% less wasted margin than a fixed-margin baseline on the 2-DOF vehicle, extends to a
  nonlinear leaning bicycle, and in a closed-loop direct-shooting MPC comparison it cuts the applied margin by 34%
  compared with tube MPC while keeping the same safety.

</details>


### [527] [Safety-Critical LiDAR-Inertial Odometry with On-Manifold Deterministic Protection Level](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09383)
*Yueqi Zhu,Yan Pan,Chufan Rui,Jiasheng Luo,Shihua Li,Bo Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种安全关键的激光雷达-惯性测量(LIO)里程计算法，为移动机器人提供确定性的保护水平，用于在线安全评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动机器人导航系统大多只做离线精度评估，缺乏在真实环境中实时提供安全保护水平的方法。此外，当前方法通常无法为机器人的实际自主操作提供足够的在线安全保障。

Method: 基于流形上的确定性状态估计，并采用未知但有界的假设，推导了点云噪声与ICP估计不确定性间的解析关系。在此基础上，设计并实现了流形上的椭球型集合成员过滤器，用于LIO系统，对位置估计的可行集合进行实时在线界定。

Result: 实验结果显示，提出的LIO系统能够在多样环境和不同机器人平台下，提供有效的确定性在线安全参考。

Conclusion: 该论文方法可为移动机器人自主操作时提供实用且可靠的实时安全保护水平，弥补了当前在线安全评估不足的空白。

Abstract: In safety-critical scenarios, the protection level of the autonomous navigation system is crucial for enabling mobile robots to perform safe tasks. However, existing studies on probabilistic navigation systems for robots usually perform offline accuracy evaluations using limited datasets and assume that the results can be applied to unknown real-world environments. As a result, current autonomous mobile robots often lack protection levels for online safety assessment. To fill this gap, we propose a safety-critical LiDAR-inertial odometry (LIO) that provides deterministic protection levels based on on-manifold deterministic state estimation. By adopting the unknown but bounded assumption, we derive a neat closed-form relationship between point cloud noise and the uncertainty of the estimation from the iterated closest point algorithm. Using this relationship, we design an on-manifold ellipsoidal set-membership filter and implement it within the LIO system. Leveraging the properties of the set-membership filter, our system offers the feasible sets of the estimated locations as the deterministic protection levels, serving as safety references for the robots' downstream autonomous operations. The experimental results show that our system can provide effective deterministic online safety references for diverse robots in various environments.

</details>


### [528] [RePO-VLA: Recovery-Driven Policy Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09410)
*Weijia Liufu,Xiaoyu Guo,Ruiyi Chen,Jingzhi Liu,Kaidong Zhang,Xiwen Liang,Jianqi Lin,Dawei Sun,Yuze Wang,Rongtao Xu,Bingqian Lin,Bowen Yang,Tongtong Cao,Bowen Peng,Dongyu Zhang,Guangrun Wang,Min Wang,Liang Lin,Xiaodan Liang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出RePO-VLA框架，通过回收失败轨迹中的有用信息，提高长期复杂操作任务中的鲁棒性和成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统VLA模型在长时序、接触丰富的操作任务中表现脆弱，主要是因为只利用成功轨迹进行模仿，忽视了失败轨迹中的监督信息，导致执行过程容易漂移，并且缺乏有效的纠正与恢复机制。

Method: RePO-VLA框架为成功、恢复、失败三类轨迹分配不同作用：（1）恢复感知初始化（RAI）：切割和重置恢复片段，仅利用当前不利状态决定纠正动作，隔离失败影响；（2）学习进度感知的语义价值函数（PAS-VF），用轨迹与指令及成功先例对齐，赋予失败前缀衰减式标签，标记漂移和终止失效区分各种动作；（3）通过规划器或人工采集将不利状态变成恢复演示，训练恢复行为；（4）价值条件化 Refinement（VCR）机制，使策略偏好高进展动作，部署时直接采取高价值动作，无需在线失败检测或重试启发式。

Result: 提出的RePO-VLA在仿真和真实双臂任务上均显著提升鲁棒性，使对抗性任务成功率从20%提升到平均75%、实际任务中最高达80%。

Conclusion: RePO-VLA充分利用失败和恢复轨迹信息，显著提升VLA模型在长期复杂操作任务中的泛化能力与鲁棒性，无需额外在线检测机制，具备实际部署潜力。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain brittle in long-horizon, contact-rich manipulation because success-only imitation provides little supervision for execution drift, while failed rollouts are often discarded. We introduce RePO-VLA, a recovery-driven policy optimization framework that assigns distinct roles to success, recovery, and failure trajectories. RePO-VLA first applies Recovery-Aware Initialization (RAI), slicing recovery segments and resetting history so corrective actions depend on the current adverse state rather than the preceding failure. It then learns a Progress-Aware Semantic Value Function (PAS-VF), aligning spatiotemporal trajectory features with instructions and successful references. The resulting labels salvage useful failure prefixes via reliability decay, while low-value labels mark drift and terminal breakdowns, teaching differences among nominal, failed, and corrective actions. The data engine turns adverse states into planner-generated or human-collected corrective rollouts, teaching recovery to the success manifold. Value-Conditioned Refinement (VCR) trains the policy to prefer high-progress actions. At deployment, a fixed high value ($v=1.0$) biases actions toward the learned success manifold without online failure detectors or heuristic retries. We introduce FRBench, with standardized error injection and recovery-focused evaluation. Across simulated and real-world bimanual tasks, RePO-VLA improves robustness, raising adversarial success from 20% to 75% on average and up to 80% in scaled real-world trials.

</details>


### [529] [Beyond Isolation: A Unified Benchmark for General-Purpose Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09441)
*Samson Sun,Tianyi Yang,Tengyue Wang,Yikai Xue,Zhengjie Xu,Lingming Zhang,Qichen Zhang,Chao Liang,Zhipeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了OmniNavBench，这是一个针对通用型具身智能体的全新导航基准，强调跨技能协调和跨形态泛化能力，旨在更真实地反映实际应用需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的智能体导航评测标准通常只关注单一技能或特定机器人形态，与现实中需要多种能力协作和适应不同装备的环境脱节，限制了通用智能体的研发。

Method: 设计了OmniNavBench基准，引入三大创新：(1)复合任务指令，将六种子任务（如目标导航、语言引导导航、对象导航、社交导航等）组合于单一情景中；(2)支持多种机器人形态（人形、四足、轮式）和多样传感器配置，并涵盖170个融合虚拟与真实场景的环境；(3)提供1779条人工遥操作的专家示范轨迹，捕捉真实行为细节。

Result: 在OmniNavBench上的广泛评测显示，当前主流方法在处理复杂且交错的导航任务时表现不佳，暴露出现有系统与实际应用需求之间的显著差距。

Conclusion: OmniNavBench为开发和评价新一代通用导航智能体提供了重要平台和挑战，促进具身智能朝真实部署迈进。

Abstract: The pursuit of general-purpose embodied agents is hindered by fragmented evaluation protocols that isolate navigation skills and fixate on specific robot morphologies, failing to reflect real-world scenarios where agents must orchestrate diverse behaviors across varying embodiments. To bridge this gap, we introduce OmniNavBench, a benchmark for cross-skill coordination and cross-embodiment generalization. OmniNavBench introduces three paradigm shifts: (1) Compositional Complexity. We propose composite instructions that interleave sub-tasks from 6 categories (PointNav, VLN, ObjectNav, SocialNav, Human Following and EQA), compelling agents to transition between exploration, interaction, and social compliance within a single episode. (2) Morphological Universality and Sensor Flexibility. We present a simulation platform that breaks the reliance on single-morphology evaluation, enabling generalization tests across humanoid, quadrupedal, and wheeled robots, with a modular sensor interface and 170 environments blending synthetic assets with real-world scans. (3) Demonstrations Quality. Moving beyond shortest-path algorithms, we curate 1779 expert trajectories via human teleoperation, capturing behavioral nuances such as exploratory glance and anticipatory avoidance. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that current methods, despite their claimed unified design, struggle with the complex, interleaved nature of general-purpose navigation. This exposes a critical disparity between existing capabilities and real-world deployment demands, underscoring OmniNavBench as a testbed for the next generation of generalist navigators. Dataset, code, and leaderboard are available at http://omninavbench.cloud-ip.cc.

</details>


### [530] [High Precision Hydraulic Excavator Control for Heavy-Duty Grading](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09465)
*Lennart Werner,Pol Eyschen,Sean Costello,Andrei Cramariuc,Marco Hutter*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自主控制器，实现了与专家操作员相当速度和更高精度的重载地面平整作业，并在不同液压体系的挖掘机上取得卓越效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统精密重载整平依赖经验丰富的操作员，不同液压结构对操作员输入和土壤反作用的响应差异大，难以设计通用的高效控制器，限制了自动化与智能化发展。

Method: 作者将控制器分为两层：一是针对特定液压结构的低层液压感知控制回路；二是协调各关节运动的路径跟踪层。通过校准实现对不同液压体系（载荷感应与负流量控制）的适应，方案在两台不同液压结构的挖掘机上对比主流商业产品进行测试。

Result: 在两台不同液压结构挖掘机上的对比实验中，本文方法的RMSE精度达1.8 cm，优于商业方案的4.7 cm（精度提升2.6倍），且能够更充分利用机器极限压力防止过早停机。

Conclusion: 所提控制器不仅在不同液压结构机型上具备广泛适应性，同时在作业精度与机器效能上均显著优于现有商业方案，为工程机械自动化与智能化提供了新路径。

Abstract: High-precision heavy-duty grading is a common step in earthworks, traditionally carried out manually by skilled operators. Removing a significant amount of material while achieving a high-precision surface requires substantial machine-specific experience. Different hydraulic architectures react differently to operator inputs and soil interaction forces, which makes generalizable controllers challenging. In this paper, we present an autonomous controller that achieves high-precision grading at expert-operator speed on Load Sensing and Negative Flow Control machines alike. We split our controller into two parts: (1) a hydraulic-aware low-level loop that is hydraulic architecture-specific and (2) a path-tracking layer that coordinates joint motions and responses. Through a calibration process, our technique is applicable to load-sensing and negative-flow-control machinery. To showcase its versatility, we benchmark our approach on two excavators with different hydraulics and compare it against a commercial state-of-the-art solution. Our technique (RMSE 1.8~cm) outperforms the commercial solution (RMSE 4.7~cm) in precision by a factor of 2.6 and improves machine usage by leveraging the maximum function pressure, as opposed to commercial solutions that stall prematurely.

</details>


### [531] [LASSA Architecture-Based Autonomous Fault-Tolerant Control of Unmanned Underwater Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09494)
*Hong Chen,Zixiang Tang,Yuanbao Chen,Yu Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种新型基于大语言模型（LLM）的水下航行器（UUV）智能控制架构，实现了高效容错控制，并在实地验证中取得显著成效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前UUV需要在通信受限环境下长期自主运行，容错控制至关重要。现有方法依赖硬编码规则，面对未知故障时效果有限。同时，LLM在推理能力上有潜力，但其幻觉问题妨碍实际应用。

Method: 设计了LASSA架构，集成LLM智能推理、感知、决策、物理可行性验证等模块，构建感知-推理-验证-执行的闭环控制系统。引入快慢双闭环，分别处理高频实时控制和高层智能决策。

Result: 在湖泊实测中，系统能准确检测航迹异常、重规划路径（如调整转弯半径、降低航速），快速通过三项物理约束验证，顺利完成任务。在无故障情况下未出现误报。

Conclusion: 提出的架构有效提升了UUV容错与智能决策能力，保证决策可解释与物理可行，兼顾智能性与实时性，可应用于复杂任务。

Abstract: Unmanned underwater vehicles (UUVs) operate persistently in communication-constrained environments, thus requiring high-level autonomous fault-tolerant control under faulty operating conditions. Existing approaches rely heavily on predefined hard-coded rules and struggle to achieve effective fault-tolerant control against unforeseen faults. Although large language models (LLMs) possess powerful cognitive and reasoning capabilities, their inherent hallucinations remain a major obstacle to their application in UUV control systems. This paper proposes an intelligent control method based on the LASSA (LLM-based Agent with Solver, Sensor and Actuator) architecture. Within this architecture, an LLM identifies unknown faults and accomplishes task replanning via autonomous reasoning without hard-coded rules; the intelligent agent undertakes perception, scheduling and decision evaluation; the solver verifies physical boundary feasibility constraints prior to command transmission to the actuators. This architecture suppresses physically infeasible LLM hallucinations and ensures interpretable, verifiable decision-making. Moreover, it enables fast-slow dual closed-loop collaborative control, where the slow loop undertakes high-level dynamic decision-making and the fast loop guarantees high-frequency real-time control, simultaneously balancing decision intelligence and control timeliness. Lake experiments under normal and lower-rudder-fault conditions show that the framework detects trajectory tracking abnormalities, replans the route by adjusting the turning radius from 4m to 12m and reducing speed from 2kn to 1kn, passes all three solver constraints on the first invocation, and guides the UUV to complete the full mission; under normal conditions no false fault alarms are raised throughout the run.

</details>


### [532] [Drift is a Sampling Error: SNR-Aware Power Distributions for Long-Horizon Robotic Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09537)
*Kewei Chen,Yayu Long,Mingsheng Shang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 针对机器人感知-语言-动作（VLA）模型在长任务中易出现的指令漂移问题，提出CAPS推理框架，通过上下文感知和自适应推理策略显著提升了模型的稳定性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型在执行长序列任务时，常因局部贪心采样陷入不可逆“负关键窗口”，导致指令漂移，严重影响全局任务成功率。已有方法不足以根本解决推理环节的此类失误。

Method: 提出了一种名为Context-Aware Power Sampling（CAPS）的无训练、推理时可用的采样框架，通过幂分布调整增加轨迹全局成功概率。同时引入基于信噪比（SNR）的元认知控制机制，仅在检测到漂移风险时自适应触发MCMC搜索，平衡计算快速性与理性推理。

Result: 在RoboTwin、Simpler-WindowX和Libero-long等多个基准测试上，CAPS无需参数更新即显著超越OpenVLA及TACO等强基线方法，表现出对长时序任务漂移的明显改进。

Conclusion: CAPS方法表明，适应性推理计算机制能有效提升具身决策模型在长任务下的鲁棒性，对未来VLA领域相关任务具有良好推广意义。

Abstract: Despite rapid progress in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for robotic control, instruction drift remains a persistent failure mode in long-horizon tasks. This paper reconceptualizes this phenomenon, positing that instruction drift is fundamentally a systematic sampling error: local greedy sampling is prone to collapsing into "Negative Pivotal Windows"--irreversible local optima with high local probability that sever global success pathways. To address this, we propose Context-Aware Power Sampling (CAPS), a training-free inference-time computation framework. CAPS leverages power distributions to sharpen global trajectory probabilities, enabling lookahead search over the model's conditional generative trajectory distribution. Furthermore, we introduce a metacognitive control mechanism based on Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR). This mechanism triggers adaptive MCMC search solely when drift risk is detected, enabling a dynamic transition from "intuitive fast thinking" to "rational slow search." Experiments on RoboTwin, Simpler-WindowX, and Libero-long benchmarks show that CAPS achieves substantial improvements over strong baselines, including OpenVLA and TACO, without parameter updates. These results support the effectiveness of adaptive inference-time computation for improving long-horizon robustness in embodied control.

</details>


### [533] [SABER: A Scalable Action-Based Embodied Dataset for Real-World VLA Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09613)
*Narsimha Menga,Parikshit Sakurikar,Amirreza Rouhi,Satya Sai Reddy,Anirudh Govil,Sri Harsha Chittajallu,Rajat Aggarwal,Anoop Namboodiri,Sashi Reddi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出SABER高保真零售机器人动作数据集，实现无需机器人参与即可高效收集真实门店的人类动作数据，并大幅提升机器人在零售场景操作任务的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用机器人基础模型在复杂的实际零售操作任务上表现不佳，原因在于现有预训练数据缺乏真实零售环境的动作数据，而通过远程操作收集此类数据成本高且难以扩展。

Method: 构建SABER数据集，通过超过100小时多家门店头戴式第一视角与360度第三视角真实录制，捕捉精细手部动作、全身运动及场景动态。数据集包含三种行动表征流：LAPA编码潜在动作序列、手部姿态轨迹（映射到机器人关节空间）、全身同步运动序列。所有数据均为无设定、无脚本真实场景拍摄。

Result: SABER数据集包含44,800条训练样本。用共享主干多任务迁移方法对GR00T N1.6模型后训练，平均10个零售操作任务成功率提升至29.3%，较传统微调提升2.19倍。

Conclusion: 高质量、规模化的真实零售动作数据能显著提升机器人在实际零售场景的能力，该类数据集可无需机器人直接参与即高效采集，有助于推动更智能的零售机器人发展。

Abstract: Robotic deployment in real-world environments depends on rich, domain-specific action data as much as on strong model architecture. General-purpose robot foundation models show modest performance in complex unseen tasks such as manipulation in a retail domain when applied out of the box. The root cause is a data gap: retail environments are structurally absent from general robot pretraining distributions, and the path to filling that gap through teleoperation is prohibitively expensive, logistically constrained, and difficult to scale. We introduce SABER, a high-fidelity retail robotics action dataset built from over 100 hours of natural in-store capture across multiple real grocery environments. Egocentric footage from head-mounted cameras records fine-grained hand activity at the point of interaction, while exocentric 360-degree scene footage from DreamVu's ALIA camera simultaneously observes all actors and activities across the entire space. This combination yields a uniquely complete picture of human retail behavior: dexterous hand activity, whole-body motion, and scene dynamics, all captured without staging, scripting, or teleoperation overhead. The SABER corpus contains 44.8K training samples across three action representation streams: 25K latent action sequences via LAPA-style encoding, 18.6K dexterous hand-pose trajectories retargeted to robot joint space, and 1.2K whole-body synchronized motion sequences retargeted to a humanoid embodiment. When applied to GR00T N1.6 via a shared-backbone multi-task post-training recipe, SABER yields a mean success rate of 29.3% across ten retail manipulation tasks -- more than 2.19x over fine-tuning baselines (13.4%). SABER demonstrates that the path to capable retail robots runs through better data, which can be collected today, at scale, without a robot in the loop. The dataset and code are available at https://dreamvu.ai/saber

</details>


### [534] [Minimizing Worst-Case Weighted Latency for Multi-Robot Persistent Monitoring: Theory and RL-Based Solutions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09633)
*Weizhen Wang,Ziheng Wang,Jianping He,Xinping Guan,Xiaoming Duan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究多机器人在加权图上的持续监控问题，提出了新的尾部性能目标和基于强化学习的TWLO-MDP方法，并通过实验验证其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的最坏情况延迟目标无法区分短期不良策略，因此需要提出能兼顾临时与长期性能的优化目标。

Method: 提出了一系列尾部性能优化目标，分析理论性质，并将问题转化为等价的事件驱动型MDP（TWLO-MDP），利用强化学习求解。同时搭建了用于评测的方法平台M2Bench。

Result: 理论上证明了最优策略的存在及其性质，TWLO-MDP能准确表征原问题。实验表明新方法显著降低了最坏情况加权延迟，并优于多种基线方法。

Conclusion: 所提尾部性能目标及TWLO-MDP方法兼顾瞬时和长期性能，具创新性及良好实际效果，为多机器人监控问题提供了有效的新思路。

Abstract: We study multi-robot persistent monitoring on weighted graphs, where node weights encode monitoring priorities and edge weights encode travel distances. The goal is to design joint robot trajectories that minimize the worst-case weighted latency across all nodes over an infinite time horizon. The widely adopted worst-case latency objective evaluates team performance over the entire time horizon and therefore may fail to distinguish strategies with poor transient behavior but strong asymptotic performance. To address this limitation, we propose a family of tail-performance objectives that generalize the standard objective and study the resulting functional optimization problems. We establish several key theoretical properties, including the existence of optimal strategies, relationships among the proposed objectives and their corresponding optimization problems, approximation by periodic solutions to arbitrary accuracy, and reductions to event-driven decision models with discretized waiting times. Building on these results, we construct an equivalent event-driven Markov decision process (MDP), called the Tail Worst-case Latency-Optimizing Markov Decision Process (TWLO-MDP), which reformulates the tail-performance objective as a standard average-reward criterion. We then develop reinforcement-learning-based solution methods for the TWLO-MDP and introduce the multi-robot monitoring benchmark (M2Bench), a unified platform that supports the evaluation and comparison of heuristic and learning-based monitoring algorithms. Experiments on synthetic and realistic monitoring scenarios show that our methods effectively reduce the worst-case weighted latency and outperform representative baselines.

</details>


### [535] [ORICF -- Open Robotics Inference and Control Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09656)
*Andrés Meseguer Valenzuela,Luís Miguel Bartolín Arnau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于机器人多模态推理流水线的模块化、声明式、与模型无关的框架ORICF，实现了灵活的模型和硬件适配，并支持边缘卸载推理，大幅降低机器人端的计算压力和能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AI在机器人感知和语言建模领域取得进步，但高计算需求导致的延迟和能耗问题限制了其广泛应用。

Method: 设计并实现了ORICF框架，集成I/O适配器、可插拔推理后端和后处理逻辑，支持通过轻量级YAML文件灵活配置模型、硬件和数据通路，同时可将推理任务卸载到边缘计算设备，实现高效部署。

Result: 在移动机器人应用中，ORICF边缘推理将本地计算占用降低了最高83.16%，估算能耗降低65.8%，同时保持了系统的模块化和可重现性。

Conclusion: ORICF框架有效缓解了机器人AI系统的计算和能耗瓶颈，提升了部署灵活性，对多模态智能机器人推理系统具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have enabled effective perception and language models for robots, but their deployment remains computationally expensive, increasing latency and energy use. This work presents the Open Robotics Inference and Control Framework (ORICF), a modular, declarative, and model-agnostic platform for composing multimodal robotic inference pipelines. ORICF integrates input/output (I/O) adapters, pluggable inference back ends, and post-processing logic, while lightweight YAML specifications allow models, hardware targets, and data channels to be changed without code modification. The framework also supports edge offloading, i.e., executing inference on nearby external computers instead of onboard the robot. ORICF is evaluated on a mobile robot that answers spoken queries about people detected in its camera stream by combining automatic speech recognition (ASR), a large language model (LLM), and a convolutional neural network (CNN) detector through Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2). Compared with onboard execution, ORICF-based edge deployment reduces robot-side compute utilization by up to 83.16% and estimated energy consumption by 65.8%, while preserving modularity and reproducibility.

</details>


### [536] [ASACK : Adaptive Safe Active Continual Koopman Learning for Uncertain Systems with Contractive Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09659)
*Chandan Kumar Sah,Rajpal Singh,Jishnu Keshavan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合主动学习和安全约束的自适应Koopman算子学习框架，实现了在分布转移和模型不确定性下的安全、高效、在线模型更新，并在仿真与实验证明优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Koopman算子理论能够将非线性系统用线性算子表达，便于用线性控制方法处理非线性动力学问题。然而，数据驱动的Koopman模型在训练和实际部署时会受模型不确定性和分布移位影响，表现大幅下降，且现有的在线适应方法多依赖神经网络，计算开销大且缺乏安全保证，难以应用于实时和安全关键的机器人应用。

Method: 本工作先离线用自编码器学习Koopman模型，在线时采用收缩型自适应律进行模型更新，并理论上保证在分布转移和不确定性下的收敛性。融合主动学习策略引导系统采集高价值数据加速模型更新，同时兼顾任务目标。最终将主动学习与安全约束一同建模为非凸优化问题，并将模型误差上界纳入MPC（模型预测控制）中，为决策提供正式的安全保证。

Result: 通过大量仿真和实际实验，所提方法在模型精度和任务执行效果上均超过现有的主流基线方法。

Conclusion: 作者提出的自适应Koopman学习框架可在保证实时性和安全性的前提下，统一实现高效学习、主动激励及安全控制，为机器人等安全关键场景下的非线性系统控制提供了新方案。

Abstract: Koopman operator theory provides a powerful framework for representing nonlinear dynamics through a linear operator acting on lifted observables, enabling the use of linear control techniques for nonlinear systems. However, Koopman models are typically learned from data and often degrade in performance under model uncertainty and distributional shifts between training and deployment. Although several works have explored online adaptation to address this issue, many rely on neural network-based updates that introduce significant computational overhead and lack formal safety guarantees, limiting their suitability for real-time and safety-critical robotic applications. In this work, we propose a unified framework for continual adaptive Koopman learning that enables safe and efficient online refinement of learned models during task execution. An autoencoder-based Koopman model is first learned offline and subsequently refined online through a contractive adaptation law, which provides theoretical convergence guarantees under distributional shifts and model uncertainty. To improve data efficiency and accelerate model refinement, the adaptation mechanism is integrated with an active learning strategy that drives the system to collect informative data while accomplishing task objectives. The resulting control problem is formulated as a nonconvex optimization problem incorporating both active learning objectives and safety constraints. We further derive theoretical bounds on model approximation error and show how these bounds can be incorporated within a robust Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework to provide formal safety guarantees. The proposed approach unifies learning, excitation, and safety within a single control framework without sacrificing real-time feasibility. Extensive simulation and experimental studies demonstrate superior performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [537] [Towards Generative Predictive Display for Vision-Based Teleoperation: A Zero-Shot Benchmark of Off-the-Shelf Video Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09670)
*Aws Khalil,Jaerock Kwon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文针对遥操作系统中由于通信延迟导致感知和控制性能下降的问题，评估了现有主流生成式视频模型对短期预测显示的适应性，发现这些模型目前难以实现高精度、低延迟且稳定的实时预测显示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥操作系统在实际应用中广泛存在，如远程机械控制、机器人操作等，但通信延迟严重影响了操作的时效性和安全性。为减缓延迟影响，预测显示技术应运而生，然而现有高质量生成视频模型的适用性尚未被系统评估。

Method: 作者提出使用CARLA模拟器生成的驾驶数据，构建统一基准流程，针对五种主流开源生成视频模型（包括transformer和diffusion类）进行无特定任务微调（zero-shot），在不同分辨率和视频条件下测试其未来帧预测能力。评估指标涵盖预测准确率、推理延迟、GPU显存占用及错误随时间演化等。

Result: 测试结果显示，现有视频模型在不调整的情况下难以同时兼顾精度、稳定性和实时性。模型增大规模或提升分辨率对性能提升有限，甚至存在倒退。

Conclusion: 现有通用生成视频模型难以直接满足远程操作预测显示的苛刻需求，实用落地需要针对短期时序进行监督、领域适配或极致推理优化，不能直接从主流模型迁移。

Abstract: Teleoperation systems are fundamentally limited by communication latency, which degrades situational awareness and control performance. Predictive display aims to mitigate this limitation by presenting an estimate of the current visual state rather than delayed observations. While recent advances in generative video models enable high-quality video synthesis, their suitability for latency-sensitive predictive display remains unclear. This paper presents a zero-shot benchmark of off-the-shelf generative video models for short-horizon predictive display, without task-specific fine-tuning. We formulate the problem as rollout-based future frame prediction and develop a unified benchmarking pipeline using simulated driving data from the CARLA simulator. Five publicly released video models spanning transformer-based and diffusion-based families are evaluated across two resolutions and two conditioning regimes (multi-frame and single-frame). Performance is assessed using prediction accuracy (mean absolute difference), per-rollout latency, peak GPU memory usage, and temporal error evolution across the prediction horizon. On this zero-shot benchmark, no tested model simultaneously achieves low rollout error, non-divergent per-step error behavior, and real-time inference at the source frame rate. Increasing model scale or resolution yields limited and, in some cases, inverted improvements. These findings highlight a gap between general-purpose generative video synthesis and the requirements of predictive display in teleoperation, suggesting that practical deployment will require either explicit short-horizon temporal supervision, in-domain adaptation, or aggressive inference optimization rather than direct application of off-the-shelf models. Code, configurations, and qualitative results are released on the project page: https://bimilab.github.io/paper-GenPD

</details>


### [538] [MVB-Grasp: Minimum-Volume-Box Filtering of Diffusion-based Grasps for Frontal Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09672)
*Bibek Poudel,Abdul Basit,Muhammad Shafique*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MVB-Grasp方法通过引入最小体积包围盒（MVBB）几何先验到扩散式抓取生成器，有效提升了低成本机械臂在受限工况下的正面抓取成功率，实现了2.4倍于现有方法的提升，且无需重训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前主流6-DoF抓取生成器在台面场景下表现优异，但在低成本机械臂、空间受限的正面抓取场景中，由于动作学约束和接近方向限制，抓取失败率较高。本研究针对Unitree Z1机械臂，旨在提升其在受限空间内的可靠抓取能力。

Method: 提出MVB-Grasp抓取系统：1）利用MVBB几何滤波，通过包围盒面法向量高效剔除从桌面穿透或与目标表面对齐性差的抓取候选；2）设计结合学习判别器与面对齐几何加权的评分函数，专为Z1正面与动作学约束调参；3）构建系统化MuJoCo评测协议，涵盖不同物体、距离、位置、姿态。

Result: 在MuJoCo仿真的81组实验（包括圆柱、不对称盒和水瓶）中，MVB-Grasp的抓取成功率为59.3%，而原始GraspGen仅为24.7%，提升2.4倍。实际机械臂测试也证实几何先验显著提升了抓取可靠性。

Conclusion: 面向受限空间和低成本机械臂，MVB-Grasp通过几何约束筛选和重评分，不依赖算法重训练，显著提升了正面抓取的表现，为实际机器人抓取任务提供了更具适应性的解决方案。

Abstract: State-of-the-art 6-DoF grasp generators excel on tabletop benchmarks with overhead cameras but struggle in frontal grasping scenarios on low-cost manipulators with constrained workspaces, where kinematic limits and approach-direction constraints cause high failure rates. We address this challenge for the Unitree Z1 arm by proposing MVB-Grasp, a novel grasping stack that injects a Minimum Volume Bounding Box (MVBB) geometric prior into diffusion-based grasp generation to dramatically improve success rates in frontal, workspace-constrained settings. Our key scientific contributions are threefold: (i) an MVBB-based geometric filter that exploits oriented bounding-box face normals to reject grasps approaching through the table or misaligned with accessible object faces in O(N) time; (ii) a combined re-scoring function that blends learned discriminator scores with face-alignment geometry α=0.85, specifically calibrated for the Z1's frontal workspace and kinematic constraints; and (iii) a systematic MuJoCo evaluation protocol measuring grasp success across object types, distances, lateral positions, and pitch orientations to validate embodiment-specific performance. We implement MVB-Grasp on a Unitree Z1 arm with an Intel RealSense D405 camera, integrating YOLOv8 object detection, GraspGen for candidate generation, Principal Component Analysis (PCA)-based MVBB fitting, and inverse-kinematics trajectory planning. Experiments across 81 MuJoCo episodes (cylinder, asymmetric box, waterbottle) demonstrate that MVB-Grasp achieves 59.3% success versus 24.7% for vanilla GraspGen, a 2.4x improvement, by filtering geometrically infeasible candidates and prioritizing face-aligned grasps suited to the Z1's frontal approach constraints. Real-world trials confirm that the MVBB prior substantially improves grasp reliability on constrained, low-cost manipulators without requiring model retraining.

</details>


### [539] [Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Robot Learning: A Dexterous Manipulation Study on Reactive Catching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09789)
*Kejia Ren,Gaotian Wang,Andrew S. Morgan,Kaiyu Hang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种新方法DRIS，用于提升灵巧操作任务在模拟到现实（sim-to-real）迁移中的鲁棒性，相比传统DR方法，在多个实例上同时训练，显著增强了策略的泛化能力，无需大量现实调优即可实现可靠迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灵巧操作极度依赖物理建模，受建模误差和感知噪声影响大，导致从模拟训练转向现实应用困难。传统“域随机化”一回合仅随机一次，不能充分覆盖现实动态的多样性，导致策略鲁棒性有限。为了解决这种鲁棒性不足、本质难以转移的问题，作者设计了新的训练方法。

Method: 提出Domain-Randomized Instance Set (DRIS)方法，每次传播一组多个随机化模拟实例，而非单一实例，用以更全面地覆盖现实中动力学的不确定性。通过理论分析和实验验证展示该方法如何让策略学会对多种可能结果作出反应。

Result: 在极具挑战性的反应式接物任务中，DRIS方法获得远超传统方法的鲁棒策略。实验环境采用不带机械稳定的平板夹取，极易受噪声影响，要求实时反应。结果显示，即使只用约10个实例，DRIS也能带来显著效果提升，实现无需额外微调的zero-shot sim-to-real迁移。

Conclusion: DRIS方法可以有效提升灵巧操作类任务的策略鲁棒性，扩大对真实动态变化的适应范围，明显减少现实环境下的调整需求。为高难度、敏感任务的sim-to-real迁移提供了更有效手段。

Abstract: Dexterous manipulation is physics-intensive and highly sensitive to modeling errors and perception noise, making sim-to-real transfer prohibitively challenging. Domain randomization (DR) is commonly used to improve the robustness of learned policies for such tasks, but conventional DR randomizes one instance per episode, offering very limited exposure to the variability of real-world dynamics. To this end, we propose Domain-Randomized Instance Set (DRIS), which represents and propagates a set of randomized instances simultaneously, providing richer approximation of uncertain dynamics and enabling policies to learn actions that account for multiple possible outcomes. Supported by theoretical analysis, we show that DRIS yields more robust policies and alleviates the need for real-world fine-tuning, even with a modest number of instances (e.g., 10). We demonstrate this on a challenging reactive catching task. Unlike traditional catching setups that use end-effectors designed to mechanically stabilize the object (e.g., curved or enclosing surfaces), our system uses a flat plate that offers no passive stabilization, making the task highly sensitive to noise and requiring rapid reactive motions. The learned policies exhibit strong robustness to uncertainties and achieve reliable zero-shot sim-to-real transfer.

</details>


### [540] [Efficient Multi-Robot Motion Planning with Precomputed Translation-Invariant Edge Bundles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09801)
*Himanshu Gupta,Paul Motter,Aritra Chakrabarty,Rishabh Sodani,Srikrishna Bangalore Raghu,Alessandro Roncone,Bradley Hayes,Zachary Sunberg*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了KiTE-Extend机制，通过离线生成的轨迹片段库引导采样，提高多机器人运动规划中的可行解寻找效率，能在不改变原有算法关键模块的前提下，显著提升多机器人问题规划效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人运动规划（MRMP）由于机器人间的相互作用和时空约束，规划空间复杂、计算量大、求解难度高。现有采样-基运动规划方法在多智能体场景下效率受限，需要提升可行轨迹段的发现能力。

Method: KiTE-Extend是一种无关具体规划器的动作选择机制。它通过预先离线计算得到轨迹片段库，在线时依据片段库引导动作采样，增强了采样的有效性。该机制不需改变状态传播、碰撞检测与代价评估流程，也不影响算法的理论性能保证。

Result: 实验证明，KiTE-Extend能在多种动力学系统和环境中有效缩短规划时间，提升三类主流多机器人运动规划方法（集中式、优先级式、基于冲突式）的可扩展性。

Conclusion: KiTE-Extend作为一种可迁移、规划器无关的动作引导机制，尤其在多机器人协同规划复杂场景下，能显著提升采样效率和全局解的搜索能力，有潜力推广至更广泛的动态图多智能体系统。

Abstract: Solving multi-robot motion planning (MRMP) requires generating collision-free kinodynamically feasible trajectories for multiple interacting robots. We introduce Kinodynamic Translation-Invariant Edge Bundles or KiTE-Extend, a planner-agnostic action selection mechanism for sampling-based kinodynamic motion planning. KiTE-Extend uses a library of trajectory segments computed offline to guide action selection during online planning, improving the ability of existing planners to identify feasible motion segments without altering state propagation, collision checking, or cost evaluation, and without changing their theoretical guarantees. While KiTE-Extend can modestly improve single-agent planners, its benefits are most clear in the multi-agent setting, where it is able to explore more effectively and significantly improve planning through the dense spatiotemporal constraints introduced by robot-robot interaction. Through experiments on multiple kinodynamic systems and environments, we show that KiTE-Extend reduces planning time and improves scalability across the three most common MRMP paradigms: centralized, prioritized, and conflict-based.

</details>


### [541] [Above and Below: Heterogeneous Multi-robot SLAM Across Surface and Underwater Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09811)
*John McConnell,Armon Shariati,Paul Szenher,Yaxuan Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种基于回环检测而非声学测距的新型USV与AUV多机器人SLAM系统，显著提升了复杂水域中的定位精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有USV与AUV多机器人SLAM多依赖声学测距技术，但该技术受制于信号传输路径、同步和环境结构影响，在复杂海域常常不实用。因此需要新的、多样的互机器人协作方法，提升团队作业效率。

Method: 提出了一种集中的多机器人SLAM框架。每台机器人独立估计自身状态，通过检测AUV与USV观测数据中的回环，实现不同机器人的状态融合，构建全体机器人历史轨迹的中心图。验证使用三种真实环境数据进行。

Result: 实验结果显示，在多机器人SLAM系统下，AUV的定位误差较单机器人SLAM明显降低，证实了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本研究首次实现了基于回环检测的USV与AUV多机器人SLAM系统，为后续跨域机器人协作提供了新方法，尤其适用于复杂海洋环境。

Abstract: Multi-robot simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a fundamental task in multi-robot operations. Robots must have a common understanding of their location and that of their team members to complete coordinated actions. However, multi-robot SLAM between Uncrewed Surface Vessels (USVs) and Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) has primarily been achieved through acoustic pinging between robots to retrieve range measurements; a measurement technique requires that robots to be in similar locations simultaneously, have an uninterrupted path for signal propagation, and may necessitate synchronized clocks. This is especially challenging in complex, cluttered maritime environments, where structures may impede signals. However, these same structures may be observable above and below the water's surface, presenting an opportunity for inter-robot SLAM loop closure between USV and AUV data streams. This work builds upon recent research on inter-robot SLAM loop closure between USV and AUV data, extending it to propose a centralized multi-robot SLAM system. Each robot performs its state estimation, and we detect loop closures between each AUV and the USV data. These inter-robot loop closures are used to merge each robot's state estimate into a centralized graph, yielding estimates for the whole time history of the USV and all AUVs in the system. Validation is performed using real-world perceptual data in three different environments. Results show improved errors for AUVs in the multi-robot SLAM system compared to single-robot SLAM over the same trajectories. To our knowledge, this is the first instance of a multi-robot SLAM system with AUVs and USVs built on loop closures rather than acoustic distance measurements.

</details>


### [542] [ConsistNav: Closing the Action Consistency Gap in Zero-Shot Object Navigation with Semantic Executive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09869)
*Haosen Wang,Zhenyang Li,Yinqiang Zhang,Zongqi He,Lutao Jiang,Kai Li,Yizhou Zhao,Liaoyuan Fan,Wenjian Hou,Tingbang Liang,Yibin Wen,Defeng Gu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了ConsistNav框架，通过三大核心模块提升零样本目标导航的稳定性和成功率，无需更改检测器和底层策略，在多个数据集上实现了新的最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本目标导航方法即使能检测到目标，仍容易在探索与追踪间反复切换，或在接近目标时未能坚持完成，表明缺乏跨步骤的动作一致性支撑。

Method: 提出ConsistNav框架，核心由三个部分组成：(1)有限状态执行控制器，将目标追踪任务阶段化；(2)持久候选记忆，累积跨帧目标证据，形成稳定的目标假设；(3)稳定性感知动作控制，抑制原地旋转、无效追踪和错误停止。该框架不更改检测器和底层路径规划算法，而以高层策略控制语义信息何时参与与何时被抑制。

Result: 在HM3D和MP3D数据集上，ConsistNav超过了当前所有零样本ObjectNav方法，在MP3D上SR提升11.4%，SPL提升7.9%。消融实验和实物测试均验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: ConsistNav在无需重训练、保持灵活兼容性的前提下，通过高层语义执行机制显著缓解了动作一致性不足导致的导航失败，推进了零样本目标导航性能。

Abstract: Zero-shot object navigation has advanced rapidly with open-vocabulary detectors, image--text models, and language-guided exploration. However, even after current methods detect a plausible target hypothesis, the agent may still oscillate between exploration and pursuit, or abandon the object near success. We identify this failure mode as an action consistency gap: semantic evidence is repeatedly reinterpreted at each step without persistent commitment across the episode. We introduce ConsistNav, a training-free zero-shot ObjectNav framework built around a semantic executive composed of three coordinated modules: Finite-State Executive Controller stages target pursuit through guarded semantic phases; Persistent Candidate Memory accumulates cross-frame target evidence into stable object hypotheses; and Stability-Aware Action Control suppresses rotational stagnation, ineffective pursuit, and unverified stopping. This design changes neither the detector nor the low-level planner; instead, it controls when semantic evidence should influence navigation and when it should be suppressed or revisited. We conduct extensive experiments on HM3D and MP3D, where ConsistNav achieves state-of-the-art results among compared zero-shot ObjectNav methods and improves SR by 11.4% and SPL by 7.9% over the controlled baseline on MP3D. Ablation studies and real-world deployment experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed executive mechanism.

</details>


### [543] [Network-Efficient World Model Token Streaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09886)
*Shatadal Mishra,Ahmadreza Moradipari,Nejib Ammar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效、实用的离散世界模型状态流式传输方法，能够在有限带宽和丢包环境下提升自主驾驶系统的同步和感知效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶和车路协同场景中，生成式世界模型需要在车载节点、边缘服务器等分布式计算环境之间实时同步紧凑的潜在状态表征。受限的网络带宽和不稳定的通信条件对模型同步效率提出很大挑战，需要设计高效的状态编码与同步机制。

Method: 采用stride-16 VQ-U-Net实现图像帧到离散token的表征(每帧288x512像素被编码为18x32总576个token，单帧936字节)。在有限每条消息负载和丢包情形下，提出一种全在线、无需标签的增量优先传输策略：利用token在embedding空间的余弦距离选择增量更新内容，并通过汉明漂移自适应触发关键帧。

Result: 新算法在给定比特率(例如0.024 Mb/s和0.036 Mb/s)下可大幅降低重建失真(如动态部分降幅达7.2%和4.8%)。在10%丢包场景下也优于周期性关键帧基线。此外，基于该流式同步方式训练的下游预测任务(使用perplexity评价)也表现出有意义的提升，如动态位置信息困惑度降低6.3%。

Conclusion: 自适应离散状态流式同步策略能在汽车网络环境下有效提升同步效率与世界模型可用性，支持带宽自适应同步机制，是车联网及分布式自动驾驶系统实用的系统层新方案。

Abstract: Generative driving world models rely on compact latent state representations that must be efficiently transmitted and synchronized across distributed compute and connected vehicles. We study network-efficient streaming of a discrete world model state, where a stride-16 VQ-U-Net tokenizer (codebook size 8,192) maps each 288x512 frame to an 18x32 grid of token IDs (576 tokens/frame), equivalent to 936 bytes/frame under fixed-length coding. We consider a keyframe--delta protocol under strict per-message payload budgets and packet loss, and propose a fully online, label-free algorithm that prioritizes delta updates via cosine distance in codebook embedding space and triggers keyframes adaptively using a Hamming-drift threshold. The adaptive algorithm consistently improves the rate distortion frontier over periodic keyframes at matched bitrates: at 0.024 Mb/s (200-byte budget) dynamic-only embedding distortion drops from 0.0712 to 0.0661 (7.2\%), and at 0.036 Mb/s (400-byte budget) from 0.0427 to 0.0407 (4.8\%). Under 10\% delta packet loss at 200 bytes, dynamic-only distortion is 0.0757 versus 0.0789 for a matched periodic baseline. To connect state fidelity to world model usefulness, we train a lightweight next-token predictor and evaluate perplexity conditioned on streamed receiver states: at 0.024 Mb/s, dynamic-position perplexity improves from 206.0 to 193.1 (6.3\%), and at 0.036 Mb/s from 158.9 to 155.6 (2.1\%). These results support discrete token-state streaming as a practical systems layer for bandwidth-aware synchronization and improved downstream token-dynamics utility under vehicular networking constraints.

</details>


### [544] [Neural Distance-Guided Path Integral Control for Tractor-Trailer Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09939)
*Peng Wei,Chen Peng,Stavros Vougioukas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合几何神经编码器和路径积分模型预测控制器的新方法，实现了牵引车-挂车系统在复杂环境下的实时安全导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有牵引车-挂车导航方法往往简化车辆几何结构或依赖于静态已知地图，无法适用于动态、部分未知且拥挤的农业环境。因此，需要能够准确、高效感知环境和自身形态，并基于此实现碰撞规避与动态可行的控制方法。

Method: 提出几何神经编码器，以原始激光雷达点云为输入，在线估算车辆整体（牵引车-挂车）的最小距离，实现车辆与障碍物间的快速、精确距离推断。将该距离估计结果融入路径积分模型预测控制器（MPPI）的代价函数，直接以车辆真实关节几何体参与路径规划和决策。

Result: 仿真结果表明，该框架能为牵引车-挂车系统生成动态可行且安全的轨迹，在复杂、拥挤的农业环境中表现优异。

Conclusion: 结合几何神经编码器和MPPI控制器的方法，有效提升了牵引车-挂车系统在未知、复杂环境下的实时安全导航能力，具有良好的实际应用前景。

Abstract: Autonomous and safe navigation of tractor-trailer systems requires accurate, real-time collision avoidance and dynamically feasible control, particularly in cluttered and complex agricultural environments. This is challenging due to their articulated, deformable geometries and nonlinear dynamics. Traditional methods oversimplify vehicle geometry or rely on precomputed distance fields that assume a known map, limiting their applicability in dynamic, partially unknown environments. To address these limitations, we propose a geometric neural encoder that provides fast and accurate distance estimates between the full tractor-trailer body and raw LiDAR perception, enabling real-time, map-free geometric reasoning. These learned distances are integrated into a Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) controller, allowing the system to incorporate true articulated geometry directly into its cost evaluation and enabling more responsive navigation in challenging agricultural settings. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed framework generates dynamically feasible and safe trajectories for navigating tractor-trailer systems in cluttered and complex environments.

</details>


### [545] [Explicit Stair Geometry Conditioning for Robust Humanoid Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09944)
*Jianguo Zhang,Wentai Xu,Shusheng Ye,Yuxiang He,Weimin Qi,Qinbo Sun,Ning Ding,Liguang Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种显式楼梯几何参数条件的策略，显著提升了人形机器人在复杂和未知楼梯环境下的攀爬鲁棒性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习型步态策略多依赖隐式地形表达或盲目的本体反馈，导致面对不同楼梯几何变化和现实感知不确定性时泛化和适应性较差。针对这一难题，本文致力于提升人形机器人的楼梯行走能力。

Method: 提出将楼梯的高度、深度及当前相对朝向等一组解释性强、低维度的楼梯参数，作为显式输入条件到PPO（近端策略优化）行走策略。这使得机器人步态可根据楼梯结构自主调整摆腿高度和步幅。

Result: 仿真实验证明该方法可在超出训练分布的楼梯高度下实现高泛化性。实物测试（Unitree G1）中，机器人在室内外楼梯均可稳定上下，尤其是在户外场景中连续跨越33阶楼梯无失误。

Conclusion: 将楼梯几何显式输入到学习型策略，有效增强了人形机器人楼梯爬行的鲁棒性与实用性，为复杂地形下的实际部署提供了新思路。

Abstract: Robust humanoid stair climbing remains challenging due to geometric discontinuities, sensitivity to step height variations, and perception uncertainty in real-world environments. Existing learning-based locomotion policies often rely on implicit terrain representations or blind proprioceptive feedback, limiting their ability to generalize across varying stair geometries and to anticipate required gait adjustments. This paper proposes an explicit stair geometry conditioning framework for robust humanoid stair climbing. Instead of encoding terrain as high-dimensional latent features, we extract a compact set of interpretable geometric parameters, including step height, step depth, and current yaw angle relative to the robot heading. These explicit stair parameters directly condition a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)-based locomotion policy, enabling proactive modulation of swing-foot clearance and stride characteristics according to stair structure. Simulation experiments demonstrate improved generalization across unseen stair heights beyond the training distribution. Real-world experiments on the Unitree G1 humanoid validate reliable indoor and outdoor stair traversal. In challenging outdoor scenarios, the robot successfully ascends 33 consecutive steps without failure, demonstrating robustness and practical deployability.

</details>


### [546] [JODA: Composable Joint Dynamics for Articulated Objects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09954)
*Tianhong Gao,Cheng Yu,Yinghao Xu,Mengyu Chu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: JODA提出了一种能够模拟真实机械行为的关节动力学新框架，使仿真和AI中关节行为更贴近现实。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真系统往往只考虑几何和运动学结构，忽略了摩擦保持、软关闭、卡扣等真实机械细节，导致动态表现不真实或缺乏表达力。

Method: JODA将关节动力学表示为一个结构化的三通道场，覆盖保守力、干摩擦和阻尼；通过PCHIP分段三次插值生成紧凑、易解释且可微的动力学函数空间。以视觉和关节上下文为输入，借助视觉-语言模型生成关节动力学原语，再合成为统一动力学场，并支持直接操作和梯度优化。

Result: JODA能有效支持多种关节动态行为的拟真模拟与控制，实现动力学模型的推理、编辑和优化。

Conclusion: JODA为仿真和AI任务提供了统一、可控且真实的关节动力学建模手段，提升了关节仿真的现实性和灵活性。

Abstract: Articulated objects used in simulation and embodied AI are typically specified by geometry and kinematic structure, but lack the fine-grained dynamical effects that govern realistic mechanical behavior, such as frictional holding, detents, soft closing, and snap latching. Existing approaches either ignore the detailed structure of dynamics entirely, or use simple models with limited expressiveness.
  We introduce JODA, a framework for generating joint-level dynamics as a structured three-channel field over the joint degree of freedom, capturing conservative forces, dry friction, and damping. Instantiated using shape-constrained piecewise cubic interpolation (PCHIP), this formulation defines a compact and expressive function space that is both interpretable and compatible with differentiable simulation. Building on this representation, we develop methods for inferring and refining joint dynamics from multimodal inputs. Given visual observations and joint context, a vision-language model proposes structured dynamical primitives, which are composed into a unified dynamics field. The resulting representation supports both direct manipulation and gradient-based refinement. We demonstrate that JODA enables plausible and controllable modeling of diverse joint behaviors, providing a unified interface for inference, editing, and optimization. Code and example assets with their generated profiles will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [547] [HiDrive: A Closed-Loop Benchmark for High-Level Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09972)
*Zhongyu Xia,Guanyu Zhu,Guo Tang,Wenhao Chen,Yongtao Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 当前自动驾驶基准面临饱和，无法全面评估车辆极端和复杂场景的能力。论文提出了HiDrive新基准，专注于长尾稀有场景和高级驾驶能力评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的端到端自动驾驶基准在常规任务上已趋于饱和，无法覆盖多样化场景和安全关键的“长尾”罕见对象，也难以评价法律合规、伦理推断及紧急决策等高阶能力，因此需要更具挑战性的评测体系。

Method: 论文提出HiDrive闭环基准，通过引入多样稀有对象及非典型交通状况，丰富测试场景。同时将评测范围从基础驾驶技能扩展至法律合规、道德推断和情境应急操作等。评估体系也从仅关注碰撞拓展到包含碰撞与制动、交通规则遵循及道德推理等指标。依托先进物理引擎，HiDrive提供高真实度物理和视觉渲染。

Result: HiDrive实现了测试场景多样性的显著提升，对端到端自动驾驶系统进行了更全面和苛刻的能力检验，为未来自动驾驶系统实际部署评定提供了更具挑战性的基准环境。

Conclusion: HiDrive基准填补了当前测试体系的空白，为研究社区和行业提供了涵盖长尾场景和复杂驾驶能力评测的新工具，有助于推动端到端自动驾驶研究迈向实际落地场景应用。

Abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has witnessed rapid progress, yet existing benchmarks are increasingly saturated, with state-of-the-art models achieving near-perfect scores on widely used open-loop and closed-loop benchmarks. This saturation does not mean that the problem has been solved; instead, it reveals that current benchmarks remain limited in scenario diversity, object variety, and the breadth of driving capabilities they evaluate. In particular, they lack sufficient long-tail scenarios involving rare but safety-critical objects and fail to assess advanced decision-making such as legal compliance, ethical reasoning, and emergency response. To address these gaps, we propose HiDrive, a new closed-loop benchmark for end-to-end autonomous driving that emphasizes long-tail scenarios and a richer evaluation of driving capabilities. HiDrive introduces a diverse set of rare objects and uncommon traffic situations, and expands evaluation from basic driving skills to more advanced capabilities, including rule compliance, moral reasoning, and context-dependent emergency maneuvers. Correspondingly, we extend previous collision-avoidance-centered metrics into a comprehensive evaluation system that encompasses collision and braking, traffic-rule compliance, and moral-reasoning indicators. Built on a more advanced physics engine, HiDrive provides physically realistic lighting and high-fidelity visual rendering, offering a more challenging and realistic testbed for assessing whether autonomous driving systems can handle the complexity of real-world deployment. The HiDrive software, source code, digital assets, and documentation are available at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/HiDrive.

</details>


### [548] [StereoPolicy: Improving Robotic Manipulation Policies via Stereo Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09989)
*Evans Han,Yunfan Jiang,Yingke Wang,Haoyue Xiao,Huang Huang,Jianwen Xie,Jiajun Wu,Li Fei-Fei,Ruohan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: StereoPolicy是一种新型的视觉模仿学习框架，通过同步立体图像对提升机器人几何推理能力，无需显式三维重建或相机标定，在多个仿真和真实机器人场景中均显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于单目视觉的机器人模仿学习方法因缺少深度与空间信息，导致在复杂或拥挤场景下操作精度受限。为弥补单目视觉的这一短板，作者希望探索更强的视觉感知手段。

Method: 提出StereoPolicy框架，利用同步立体图像对，通过预训练二维视觉编码器分别处理左右图像，并用Stereo Transformer融合两者表征，捕捉空间对应关系和视差信息。该方法不依赖三维重建或相机标定，可与扩散式与视觉-语言-动作策略无缝结合。

Result: 在RoboMimic、RoboCasa和OmniGibson三大仿真基准测试中，StereoPolicy在RGB、RGB-D、点云和多视角等基线之上取得持续优异表现。同时在现实机器人（包括桌面和双臂移动操作）实验中也得到验证。

Conclusion: StereoPolicy验证了立体视觉作为桥接2D预训练表征与3D几何理解的有效方式，为机器人操作任务提供了可扩展且鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in robot imitation learning have yielded powerful visuomotor policies capable of manipulating a wide variety of objects directly from monocular visual inputs. However, monocular observations inherently lack reliable depth cues and spatial awareness, which are critical for precise manipulation in cluttered or geometrically complex scenes. To address this limitation, we introduce StereoPolicy, a new visuomotor policy learning framework that directly leverages synchronized stereo image pairs to strengthen geometric reasoning, without requiring explicit 3D reconstruction or camera calibration. StereoPolicy employs pretrained 2D vision encoders to process each image independently and fuses the resulting representations through a Stereo Transformer. This design implicitly captures spatial correspondence and disparity cues. The framework integrates seamlessly with diffusion-based and pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) policies, delivering consistent improvements over RGB, RGB-D, point cloud, and multi-view baselines across three simulation benchmarks: RoboMimic, RoboCasa, and OmniGibson. We further validate StereoPolicy on real-robot experiments spanning both tabletop and bimanual mobile manipulation settings. Our results underscore stereo vision as a scalable and robust modality that bridges 2D pretrained representations with 3D geometric understanding for robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [549] [Muninn: Your Trajectory Diffusion Model But Faster](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09999)
*Gokul Puthumanaillam,Hao Jiang,Ruben Hernandez,Jose Fuentes,Paulo Padrao,Leonardo Bobadilla,Melkior Ornik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Muninn的训练无关缓存加速方法，使扩散模型轨迹规划器无需牺牲轨迹质量和重训练，即可实现实时规划与控制，加速比最高可达4.6倍，并保证任务和安全性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于扩散模型的轨迹规划方法生成轨迹能力强，但其迭代去噪步骤导致规划速度极慢，不适用于机器人实时规划。现有加速方法要么影响规划质量，要么需重训练且未考虑后续控制风险。

Method: 作者发现轨迹去噪过程中存在两个可用信号：一是轨迹内部表示变化的廉价度量，二是解析系数用于描述去噪误差导致采样器状态变化。通过离线运行校准这两个信号，得到每步的轨迹偏差上界，将其作为不确定性预算。在每次去噪时，若预算足够允许缓存，便复用去噪输出，否则重新计算。该方法不破坏模型本身，可直接包裹不同的轨迹扩散结构。

Result: Muninn在标准基准上加速可达4.6倍，显著减少去噪器的计算次数，同时保持任务性能与安全性。在闭环导航和操作任务的实际机器人硬件实验中均验证了效果。

Conclusion: Muninn无需重训练和模型结构修改即可加速扩散式轨迹规划，且能通过可证的轨迹变化界限保证性能和安全，在实际控制任务中效果显著。

Abstract: Diffusion-based trajectory planners can synthesize rich, multimodal robot motions, but their iterative denoising makes online planning and control prohibitively slow.
