Existing accelerations either modify the sampler or compress the network--sacrificing plan quality or requiring retraining without accounting for downstream control risk. We address the problem of making diffusion-based trajectory planners fast enough for real-time robot use without retraining the model or sacrificing trajectory quality, and in a way that works across diverse state-space diffusion architectures. Our key insight is that diffusion trajectory planners expose two signals we can exploit: a cheap probe of how their internal trajectory representation changes across steps, and analytic coefficients that describe how denoiser errors affect the sampler's state update. By calibrating the first signal against the second on offline runs, we obtain a per-step score that upper-bounds how far the final trajectory can deviate when we reuse a cached denoiser output, and we treat this bound as an uncertainty budget that we can spend over the denoising process. Building on this insight, we present Muninn, a training-free caching wrapper that tracks this uncertainty budget during sampling and, at each diffusion step, chooses between reusing a cached denoiser output when the predicted deviation is small and recomputing the denoiser when it is not. Across standard benchmarks Muninn delivers up to 4.6x wall-clock speedups across several trajectory diffusion models by reducing denoiser evaluations, while preserving task performance and safety metrics. Muninn further certifies that cached rollouts remain within a specified distance of their full-compute counterparts, and we validate these gains in real-time closed-loop navigation and manipulation hardware deployments. Project page: https://github.com/gokulp01/Muninn.

</details>


### [550] [Beyond Self-Play and Scale: A Behavior Benchmark for Generalization in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10034)
*Aron Distelzweig,Faris Janjoš,Andreas Look,Anna Rothenhäusler,Daniel Jost,Oliver Scheel,Raghu Rajan,Daphne Cornelisse,Eugene Vinitsky,Joschka Boedecker*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了BehaviorBench，一个用于自动驾驶的大规模强化学习策略的全面测试套件，在评估、复杂性和行为多样性三个方面填补了现有基准的空白，并揭示了纯自博策略的泛化能力问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然近期自动驾驶研究（如GigaFlow和PufferDrive）使用大规模强化学习（RL）训练驾驶策略取得进展，但这些策略尚未在标准化基准上进行系统评测，因此其实际性能和泛化能力未知。

Method: 1）开发了BehaviorBench测试套件，包括：a）连接PufferDrive与nuPlan，实现RL策略首次可在权威自动驾驶基准上评测；b）在PufferDrive仿真内快速直接评测多种规划器；2）针对现有基准过于简单提出，以WOMD中复杂交互片段作为新评测子集；3）引入多种交通行为代理，兼容多样行为测试而非仅依赖IDM。4）发现RL自博策略泛化问题，提出PPO和规则规划混合体作为改进方案。

Result: 评测发现：大规模RL策略虽然能学习出交互行为，但如果仅用自博和标准奖励，策略会对训练对手过拟合，难以泛化到多样的现实交通环境。混合PPO和规则规划能够缓解该问题。

Conclusion: BehaviorBench为自动驾驶策略的公平、多维、复杂和多样行为测试提供了新平台。基准分析显示，单一自博RL策略的泛化性有限，需结合规则规划方式改进。

Abstract: Recent Autonomous Driving (AD) works such as GigaFlow and PufferDrive have unlocked Reinforcement Learning (RL) at scale as a training strategy for driving policies. Yet such policies remain disconnected from established benchmarks, leaving the performance of large-scale RL for driving on standardized evaluations unknown. We present BehaviorBench -- a comprehensive test suite that closes this gap along three axes: Evaluation, Complexity, and Behavior Diversity. In terms of Evaluation, we provide an interface connecting PufferDrive to nuPlan, which, for the first time, enables policies trained via RL at scale to be evaluated on an established planning benchmark for autonomous driving. Complementarily, we offer an evaluation framework that allows planners to be benchmarked directly inside the PufferDrive simulation, at a fraction of the time. Regarding Complexity, we observe that today's standardized benchmarks are so simple that near-perfect scores are achievable by straight lane following with collision checking. We extract a meaningful, interaction-rich split from the Waymo Open Motion Dataset (WOMD) on which strong performance is impossible without multi-agent reasoning. Lastly, we address Behavior Diversity. Existing benchmarks commonly evaluate planners against a single rule-based traffic model, the Intelligent Driver Model (IDM). We provide a diverse suite of interactive traffic agents to stress-test policies under heterogeneous behaviors, beyond just using IDM. Overall, our benchmarking analysis uncovers the following insight: despite learning interactive behaviors in an emergent manner, policies trained via pure self-play under standard reward functions overfit to their training opponents and fail to generalize to other traffic agent behaviors. Building on this observation, we propose a hybrid planner that combines a PPO policy with a rule-based planner.

</details>


### [551] [Guided Streaming Stochastic Interpolant Policy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10051)
*Puming Jiang,Meiyi Wang,Kelvin Lin,Ce Hao,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的生成式机器人策略推理引导方法，使其能实时快速、具备高反应性地适应动态目标和规避障碍，在多样环境下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有面向生成式机器人策略的推理时引导方法多局限于高延迟、反应性差的分块架构，无法灵活满足测试时的偏好调整或动态避障需求。作者致力于突破现有方法的瓶颈，实现更实时、更具适应性的推理时策略引导。

Method: 作者从理论上推导了用于Stochastic Interpolants（SI）的最优引导项，基于逆Kolmogorov方程分析了价值函数随时间的演化，并据此提出修正漂移项，从理论上保证可采样至目标分布。该框架通过Streaming Stochastic Interpolant Policy（SSIP）实现对实时控制的扩展，并统一了引导律与流式架构，实现快速、反应性强的控制。此外，论文提出了无需训练的Stochastic Trajectory Ensemble Guidance（STEG）与基于训练的Conditional Critic Guidance（CCG）两种互补机制，以适应不同部署需求。

Result: 实验结果表明，该流式引导策略在反应速度与适应性上大幅领先传统分块策略，并能为动态、非结构化环境中的机器人提供更优和物理合理的行动引导。

Conclusion: 新提出的推理时流式引导法可普适应用于需实时决策响应的生成式机器人任务，相比以往方法在动态目标适应与物理有效性方面具备显著优势。

Abstract: Inference-time guidance is essential for steering generative robot policies toward dynamic objectives without retraining, yet existing methods are largely confined to chunk-based architectures that exhibit high latency and lack the reactivity needed for test-time preference alignment or obstacle avoidance. In this work, we formally derive the optimal guidance term for Stochastic Interpolants (SI) by analyzing the value function's time evolution via the Backward Kolmogorov Equation, establishing a modified drift that theoretically guarantees sampling from a target distribution. We apply this framework to real-time control through the Streaming Stochastic Interpolant Policy (SSIP), which generalizes the deterministic Streaming Flow Policy (SFP). Unifying this guidance law with the streaming architecture enables fast and reactive control. To support diverse deployment needs, we propose two complementary mechanisms: training-free Stochastic Trajectory Ensemble Guidance (STEG) that computes gradients on-the-fly for zero-shot adaptation, and training-based Conditional Critic Guidance (CCG) for amortized inference. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our guided streaming approach significantly outperforms conventional chunk-based policies in reactivity and provides superior, physically valid guidance for dynamic, unstructured environments.

</details>


### [552] [EFGCL: Learning Dynamic Motion through Spotting-Inspired External Force Guided Curriculum Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10063)
*Keita Yoneda,Kento Kawaharazuka,Kei Okada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于物理引导的外力辅助课程学习（EFGCL）方法，用于提升四足机器人动态全身动作的强化学习效率，显著加快学习速度并成功迁移至真实机器人。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态全身动作（如跳跃、后空翻等）的强化学习在腿式机器人上由于失败风险高、探索效率低而极具挑战，现有方法往往难以高效收敛。

Method: 受到艺术体操“保护动作”启发，在训练阶段引入外部辅助力，通过物理引导课程辅助，机器人能够在无需特定奖励函数设计或参考轨迹下体验到正确运动并进行高效探索和学习。

Result: 在Jump、Backflip 和 Lateral-Flip 三项运动任务中，EFGCL方法使Jump任务学习速度提升约2倍，并能成功学会常规RL无法完成的复杂动作。学习策略可自如应用于真实机器人，实际动作与仿真结果一致。

Conclusion: 物理指导下的探索让机器人在训练前期尽早体验成功，显著提高了动态全身动作任务的强化学习效率，是提升机器人运动学习能力的有效且通用的方法。

Abstract: Learning dynamic whole-body motions for legged robots through reinforcement learning (RL) remains challenging due to the high risk of failure, which makes efficient exploration difficult and often leads to unstable learning. In this paper, we propose External Force Guided Curriculum Learning (EFGCL), a guided RL approach based on the principle of physical guidance, in which external assistive forces are introduced during training. Inspired by spotting in artistic gymnastics, EFGCL enables agents to physically experience successful motion executions without relying on task-specific reward shaping or reference trajectories. Experiments on a quadrupedal robot performing Jump, Backflip, and Lateral-Flip tasks demonstrate that EFGCL accelerates learning of the Jump task by approximately a factor of two and enables the acquisition of complex whole body motions that conventional RL methods fail to learn. We further show that the learned policies can be deployed on real robot, reproducing motions consistent with those observed in simulation. These results indicate that physically guided exploration, which allows agents to experience success early in training, is an effective and general strategy for improving learning efficiency in dynamic whole-body motion tasks.

</details>


### [553] [A cell-decomposition based path planner for 3D navigation in constrained workspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10086)
*João P. L. Morais,Luciano C. A. Pimenta,Marcelo A. Santos,Guilherme V. Raffo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了用于二值占用栅格的细胞分解算法，确保每个单元格与至少一个相邻单元格间可完全互见，便于后续路径优化。作者结合SOCP、MISOCP结构与k最短路径算法，测试结果表明性能优越，内存消耗低，适用于大规模场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于栅格的路径规划复杂度高，且最优性与计算效率难以兼顾，特别是在大规模、城市类地图中更为突出。为提升路径可行性验证的效率与优化问题的嵌入性，需要新的细胞分解策略。

Method: 1) 提出相邻单元之间完全互见的二值占用栅格细胞分解算法。2) 在该框架下，构建SOCP、MISOCP模型进行路径优化。3) 融合Yen's k-最短路径算法，提出KSP-SOCP方法，获得优化解同时规避MISOCP的高计算负担。4) 在九个类城市场景地图中开展实验评估。

Result: 分解算法高效地划分了地图，各优化方法成功计算出可行路径。KSP-SOCP方法取得接近MISOCP的运算速度，但内存消耗更低，表现优于常规SOCP。

Conclusion: 该细胞分解算法为大规模、复杂环境中的路径规划问题提供了高效、优化友好的解法。提出的KSP-SOCP方法兼具计算速度与内存优势，非常适合用于实际大型应用场景。

Abstract: This paper proposes a cell decomposition algorithm for binary occupancy grids that ensures mutual complete visibility from each cell to at least one adjacent cell. This decomposition establishes a simplified framework for verifying path feasibility that can be easily embedded in optimization problems. To illustrate its utility, we formulate both second-order cone programs (SOCP) and their mixed-integer variant (MISOCP) within the proposed framework. Furthermore, we propose the KSP-SOCP method, which combines Yen's k-shortest path algorithm with the SOCP, achieving improved solutions compared to a standard SOCP approach while avoiding the computational burden of MISOCP. The cell decomposition algorithm, KSP-SOCP, and MISOCP approaches were evaluated in 9 city-like workspaces. The decomposition efficiently partitioned each map, enabling both optimization methods to compute feasible paths. The proposed KSP-SOCP achieved time performance comparable to the MISOCP while requiring less memory, making it highly suitable for large-scale problems.

</details>


### [554] [Retrieve-then-Steer: Online Success Memory for Test-Time Adaptation of Generative VLAs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10094)
*Jianchao Zhao,Huoren Yang,Hu Yusong,Yuyang Gao,Qiguan Ou,Cong Wan,SongLin Dong,Zhiheng Ma,Yihong Gong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的在线成功记忆引导测试时自适应架构，提高机器人在实际部署中的可靠性。通过在部署时存储和利用历史成功经验，实现无需参数更新的轻量化适应，明显提升了任务成功率和闭环稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型在实际部署的闭环任务中可靠性不足，且通常将测试集视为独立的零样本测试，但实际机器人常在同一环境重复操作。文章旨在探索：VLA能否通过复用测试时的成功经验自动提升在特定环境中的可靠性。

Method: 文中提出一种在线成功记忆引导的测试时自适应框架。具体做法是：部署期间，机器人将已验证成功的观测-动作片段存入长期记忆，在推理阶段检索相关的动作片段，并通过轨迹一致性筛选、聚合为优秀动作先验。采用信心自适应的先验引导，将该先验注入动作生成过程，同时根据检索信心调整引导强度，从而提升动作生成的可靠性。

Result: 仿真及真实机器人实验显示，该方法明显提升了长时序、多阶段任务中的任务成功率和闭环稳定性，相较于不利用测试经验的原始冻结VLA有显著改进。

Conclusion: 本文方法可为VLA模型带来环境特定的闭环可靠性提升，且实现了无需参数更新的轻量域适应，表明复用成功经验对实际机器人部署极具价值。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models show strong potential for general-purpose robotic manipulation, yet their closed-loop reliability often degrades under local deployment conditions. Existing evaluations typically treat test episodes as independent zero-shot trials. However, real robots often operate repeatedly in the same or slowly changing environments, where successful executions provide environment-verified evidence of reliable behavior patterns. We study this persistent-deployment setting, asking whether a partially competent frozen VLA can improve its reliability by reusing its successful test-time experience. We propose an online success-memory guided test-time adaptation framework for generative VLAs. During deployment, the robot stores progress-calibrated successful observation-action segments in a long-term memory. At inference, it retrieves state-relevant action chunks, filters inconsistent candidates via trajectory-level consistency, and aggregates them into an elite action prior. To incorporate this prior into action generation, we introduce confidence-adaptive prior guidance, which injects the elite prior into an intermediate state of the flow-matching action sampler and adjusts the guidance strength based on retrieval confidence. This design allows the frozen VLA to exploit environment-specific successful experience while preserving observation-conditioned generative refinement. This retrieve-then-steer mechanism enables lightweight, non-parametric test-time adaptation without requiring parameter updates. Simulation and real-world experiments show improved task success and closed-loop stability, especially in long-horizon and multi-stage tasks.

</details>


### [555] [Plan in Sandbox, Navigate in Open Worlds: Learning Physics-Grounded Abstracted Experience for Embodied Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10118)
*Zhixuan Shen,Jiawei Du,Ziyu Guo,Han Luo,Lilan Peng,Joey Tianyi Zhou,Haonan Luo,Tianrui Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出SAGE框架，通过语义抽象的物理环境仿真提升VLM在机器人导航任务中的迁移与表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLMs虽推理能力强，但缺乏实体导航相关的视觉与控制数据，且仿真器的写实要求限制了策略迁移至真实世界的能力。

Method: 提出SAGE框架，包括三阶段：1）Genesis：生成多样、物理约束下的语义环境，2）Evolution：利用新型非对称自适应裁剪机制强化学习，3）Navigation：将抽象策略桥接到实际机器人导航控制上。

Result: SAGE在A-EQA评测中LLM-Match成功率达53.21%，较基线提升9.7%，在现实室内机器人部署中也表现良好。

Conclusion: SAGE系统显著提升了规划辅助的机器人导航能力，并显示了较好从抽象环境到现实机器人任务的迁移能力。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated exceptional general reasoning capabilities. However, their performance in embodied navigation remains hindered by a scarcity of aligned open-world vision and robot control data. Despite simulators providing a cost-effective alternative for data collection, the inherent reliance on photorealistic simulations often limits the transferability of learned policies. To this end, we propose \textit{\textbf{S}andbox-\textbf{A}bstracted \textbf{G}rounded \textbf{E}xperience} (\textbf{\textit{SAGE}}), a framework that enables agents to learn within a physics-grounded semantic abstraction rather than a photorealistic simulation, mimicking the human capacity for mental simulation where plans are rehearsed in simplified physics abstractions before execution. \textit{SAGE} system operates via three synergistic phases: (1) \textit{Genesis}: constructing diverse, physics-constrained semantic environments to bootstrap experience; (2) \textit{Evolution}: distilling experiences through Reinforcement Learning (RL), utilizing a novel asymmetric adaptive clipping mechanism to stabilize updates; (3) \textit{Navigation}: bridging the abstract policy to open-world control. We demonstrate that \textit{SAGE} significantly improves planner-assisted embodied navigation, achieving a 53.21\% LLM-Match Success Rate on A-EQA (+9.7\% over baseline), while showing encouraging transfer to physical indoor robot deployment.

</details>


### [556] [Data-Asymmetric Latent Imagination and Reranking for 3D Robotic Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10166)
*Lianghao Luo,Xizhou Bu,Ruyan Liu,Qingqiu Huang,Chufeng Tang,Xiaoshuai Hao,Hongbo Wang,Wei Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的3D机器人模仿学习框架DALI-R，能够从高低质量混合的演示轨迹中提升机器人任务成功率，且推理开销较低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中收集机器人模仿学习数据时，常常会获得失败、探索性、或次优的演示轨迹。以往方法往往舍弃这些低质量数据，导致有用信息浪费。而优质演示高昂而稀缺，因此更高效利用所有数据具有重要意义。

Method: DALI-R是一种数据非对称的潜在想象与重排序方法。它包含：（1）针对3D点云学习潜在世界模型用于想象式rollout，（2）任务完成评分器对候选动作块进行重排序。该方法可与扩散模型、flow-matching等3D策略结合，无需额外高质量演示即可提升决策能力。

Result: 在Adroit和MetaWorld基准测试上，与两种3D策略结合后，DALI-R平均提升了6.8%的任务成功率，同时推理开销仅增加不到0.7倍。

Conclusion: DALI-R能有效吸收典型与非典型（包含失败和探索）演示信息，增强机器人3D模仿学习的泛化性和决策表现，且额外资源消耗有限。

Abstract: Robotic imitation learning typically assumes access to optimal demonstrations, yet real-world data collection often yields suboptimal, exploratory, or even failed trajectories. Discarding such data wastes valuable information about environment dynamics and failure modes, which can instead be leveraged to improve decision-making. While 3D policies reduce reliance on high-quality demonstrations through strong spatial generalization, they still require large-scale data to achieve high task success. To address this, we propose DALI-R, a Data-Asymmetric Latent Imagination and Reranking framework for 3D robotic imitation learning from mixed-quality trajectories. It learns a Latent World Model over 3D point clouds for imagined rollouts and a Task Completion Scorer that reranks candidate action chunks, improving decision-making without additional high-quality demonstrations. We instantiate DALI-R with both diffusion and efficient flow-matching policies and evaluate it on Adroit and MetaWorld benchmarks. Across the two evaluated 3D base policies, DALI-R achieves an average $6.8$\% improvement in success rate while incurring less than $0.7\times$ additional inference overhead.

</details>


### [557] [HeteroGenManip: Generalizable Manipulation For Heterogeneous Object Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10201)
*Zhenhao Shen,Zeming Yang,Yue Chen,Yuran Wang,Shengqiang Xu,Mingleyang Li,Hao Dong,Ruihai Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出HeteroGenManip框架，实现机器人对多类型异构物体的泛化操作能力，并大幅提升任务表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人异构物体操作方法大多采用端到端策略，未能区分“如何接触（抓取）”与“如何交互（轨迹规划）”，导致误差累计严重，且单一模型难以捕获多种物体特性。

Method: 提出HeteroGenManip，两阶段方案。第一阶段用Foundation-Correspondence-Guided Grasp模块利用结构先验减少抓取姿态不确定性。第二阶段通过Multi-Foundation-Model Diffusion Policy，将不同类别物体分流至专用基础模型，并用双流跨注意力机制整合细粒度几何和零部件特征。

Result: 框架在仿真中平均提升31%，在四项现实不同交互类型任务中提升36.7%，实现强泛化能力。

Conclusion: HeteroGenManip有效克服异构物体操作中泛化差和误差积累问题，为复杂多样的机器人交互任务提供通用新思路。

Abstract: Generalizable manipulation involving cross-type object interactions is a critical yet challenging capability in robotics. To reliably accomplish such tasks, robots must address two fundamental challenges: ``where to manipulate'' (contact point localization) and ``how to manipulate'' (subsequent interaction trajectory planning). Existing foundation-model-based approaches often adopt end-to-end learning that obscures the distinction between these stages, exacerbating error accumulation in long-horizon tasks. Furthermore, they typically rely on a single uniform model, which fails to capture the diverse, category-specific features required for heterogeneous objects. To overcome these limitations, we propose HeteroGenManip, a task-conditioned, two-stage framework designed to decouple initial grasp from complex interaction execution. First, Foundation-Correspondence-Guided Grasp module leverages structural priors to align the initial contact state, thereby significantly reducing the pose uncertainty of grasping. Subsequently, Multi-Foundation-Model Diffusion Policy (MFMDP) routes objects to category-specialized foundation models, integrating fine-grained geometric information with highly-variable part features via a dual-stream cross-attention mechanism. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that HeteroGenManip achieves robust intra-category shape and pose generalization. The framework achieves an average 31\% performance improvement in simulation tasks with broad type setting, alongside a 36.7\% gain across four real-world tasks with different interaction types.

</details>


### [558] [Nano-U: Efficient Terrain Segmentation for Tiny Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10210)
*Federico Pizzolato,Francesco Pasti,Nicola Bellotto*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种适用于低成本微控制器的高效地形二元分割模型Nano-U，结合了量化感知蒸馏训练，并在嵌入式硬件上实现了出色的性能，推动了小型机器人平台的实用部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地形分割模型对内存和计算资源需求较高，不适合计算和存储受限的微控制器，制约了其在小型自治机器人上的规模化应用。

Method: 设计了参数量极少的Nano-U二元分割网络，通过量化感知蒸馏（QAD）结合知识蒸馏与量化感知训练提升小模型性能；采用Rust实现的MicroFlow推理引擎，将模型无解释器和动态内存消耗地部署在ESP32-S3微控制器上。

Result: Nano-U量化模型在Botanic Garden和自建TinyAgri数据集上取得优异表现，并成功部署至低成本微控制器，表现出极小的内存占用与低延迟。

Conclusion: 本方法为低成本机器人平台的感知任务提供了高效、实用并节能的解决方案，有助于推进嵌入式智能感知的实际落地。

Abstract: Terrain segmentation is a fundamental capability for autonomous mobile robots operating in unstructured outdoor environments. However, state-of-the-art models are incompatible with the memory and compute constraints typical of microcontrollers, limiting scalable deployment in small robotics platforms. To address this gap, we develop a complete framework for robust binary terrain segmentation on a low-cost microcontroller. At the core of our approach we design Nano-U, a highly compact binary segmentation network with a few thousand parameters. To compensate for the network's minimal capacity, we train Nano-U via Quantization-Aware Distillation (QAD), combining knowledge distillation and quantization-aware training. This allows the final quantized model to achieve excellent results on the Botanic Garden dataset and to perform very well on TinyAgri, a custom agricultural field dataset with more challenging scenes. We deploy the quantized Nano-U on a commodity microcontroller by extending MicroFlow, a compiler-based inference engine for TinyML implemented in Rust. By eliminating interpreter overhead and dynamic memory allocation, the quantized model executes on an ESP32-S3 with a minimal memory footprint and low latency. This compiler-based execution demonstrates a viable and energy-efficient solution for perception on low-cost robotic platforms.

</details>


### [559] [Learning Point Cloud Geometry as a Statistical Manifold: Theory and Practice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10456)
*Jinwoo Lee,Jiwoo Kim,Woojae Shin,Giseop Kim,Hyondong Oh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出POLI方法，利用高斯分布描述点云局部几何结构，实现无监督学习下的高效几何估计，显著提升机器人感知任务效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 点云是机器人感知(如定位、建图、姿态估计)的重要表示，但激光雷达采集的点云稀疏且非均匀，导致下游任务性能受限。现有方法要么依赖手工特征，要么需大规模标注数据，存在可扩展性或数据瓶颈问题。作者希望设计一种无需标注、可泛化且几何表达能力强的方法。

Method: 作者提出将点云局部几何表示为高斯分布诱导的统计流形，每个点用一个高斯描述其局部的几何结构。基于这一表述，设计了深度神经网络POLI，能自监督学习点到高斯的映射，实现无监督估算每个点的局部几何信息。该方法无需修改现有感知管线结构。

Result: 实验证明，POLI能够准确、鲁棒地估算点云几何结构，并在多种机器人感知任务场景下显著提升感知性能，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: POLI方法通过自监督学习高斯描述的局部几何，对机器人感知任务有广泛适用性，可无缝集成进现有管线，提升几何推理和整体性能。

Abstract: Point clouds are a fundamental representation for robotic perception tasks such as localization, mapping, and object pose estimation. However, LiDAR-acquired point clouds are inherently sparse and non-uniform, providing incomplete observations of the underlying scene geometry. This makes reliable geometric reasoning challenging and degrades downstream perception performance. Existing approaches attempt to compensate for these limitations by estimating local geometry, but often rely on hand-crafted statistics or end-to-end supervised learning, which can suffer from limited scalability or require large amounts of accurately labeled data. To address these challenges, we explicitly model point cloud geometry under a principled mathematical formulation. We represent local geometry as a statistical manifold induced by a family of Gaussian distributions, where each point is associated with a Gaussian capturing its local geometric structure. Based on this formulation, we introduce Point-to-Ellipsoid (POLI), a deep neural estimator that predicts per-point Gaussian geometry. POLI learns a mapping from point cloud observations to their underlying geometry in a self-supervised manner, removing the need for labeled data while preserving strong geometric inductive biases. The resulting representation integrates seamlessly into existing robotic perception pipelines without architectural modifications. Extensive experiments show that POLI enables accurate and robust geometry estimation and consistently improves performance across diverse robotic perception tasks.

</details>


### [560] [VEGA: Visual Encoder Grounding Alignment for Spatially-Aware Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10485)
*Hao Wang,Xiaobao Wei,Jingyang He,Chengyu Bai,Chun-Kai Fan,Jiajun Cao,Jintao Chen,Ying Li,Shanyu Rong,Ming Lu,Xiaozhu Ju,Jian Tang,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种提升视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型空间感知能力的新方法VEGA，通过在视觉编码器输出层直接对齐空间特征，显著改善机械臂等机器人操作任务中的空间推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型的视觉骨干通常预训练于2D图像数据，缺少3D几何的直接监督，导致模型空间感知能力不足；已有的方法仅在引入空间感知的基础模型上做部分层次对齐，且对齐发生在语言与空间结构已混合的阶段，限制了泛化和空间解释性。

Method: 提出VEGA，将VLA模型的视觉编码器输出直接与经过多视角3D高斯溅射监督微调过的DINOv2（即DINOv2-FiT3D）的空间感知特征对齐。具体靠一个轻量投影模块，用余弦相似性损失辅助训练，与动作预测任务并行，推理阶段不引入任何计算开销。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界的机器人操作任务中，VEGA在空间推理和操作任务指标上均优于当前的空间对齐方法，刷新VLA模型空间感知基线。

Conclusion: VEGA通过早期空间特征对齐，极大提升了VLA模型的空间解释性和泛用性，无需增加推理计算量，为视觉-语言-动作多模态模型空间能力增强设立了新标杆。

Abstract: Precise spatial reasoning is fundamental to robotic manipulation, yet the visual backbones of current vision-language-action (VLA) models are predominantly pretrained on 2D image data without explicit 3D geometric supervision, resulting in representations that lack accurate spatial awareness. Existing implicit spatial grounding methods partially address this by aligning VLA features with those of 3D-aware foundation models, but they rely on empirical layer search and perform alignment on LLM-level visual tokens where spatial structure has already been entangled with linguistic semantics, limiting both generalizability and geometric interpretability. We propose VEGA (Visual Encoder Grounding Alignment), a simple yet effective framework that directly aligns the output of the VLA's visual encoder with spatially-aware features from DINOv2-FiT3D, a DINOv2 model fine-tuned with multi-view consistent 3D Gaussian Splatting supervision. By performing alignment at the visual encoder output level, VEGA grounds spatial awareness before any linguistic entanglement occurs, offering a more interpretable and principled alignment target. The alignment is implemented via a lightweight projector trained with a cosine similarity loss alongside the standard action prediction objective, and is discarded at inference time, introducing no additional computational overhead. Extensive experiments on simulation benchmark and real-world manipulation tasks demonstrate that VEGA consistently outperforms existing implicit spatial grounding baselines, establishing a new state-of-the-art among implicit spatial grounding methods for VLA models.

</details>


### [561] [Embodied AI in Action: Insights from SAE World Congress 2026 on Safety, Trust, Robotics, and Real-World Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10653)
*Jan-Mou Li,Paul Schmitt,Wei Tong,Majed Mohammed,Akshay Chalana,Arpan Kusari,Edward Griffor*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本白皮书综述了SAE世界大会2026小组讨论“行动中的具身智能”的要点，强调将具身AI安全、可信地部署到现实系统中需多方面协作和严谨治理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自动驾驶、移动机器人和工业自动化快速发展，具身AI已实际应用，但伴随能力增强，也产生了安全、信任和治理等新挑战。本文旨在探讨如何负责地推进具身AI部署。

Method: 通过专家小组跨领域讨论，总结交流汽车、机器人、AI与安全工程的经验和观点，提出具身AI需系统化、严谨工程、全生命周期治理及以人为中心的设计理念。

Result: 专家一致认为，AI能力进步固然重要，但成功关键同样在于安全、可信和标准化的系统部署。此外，提出了供管理者、决策者及技术领导者参考的实践建议。

Conclusion: 具身AI的长远成功取决于技术和治理双轮驱动，必须注重系统的安全性、可治理性和以人为本，方可实现负责任地推广和应用。

Abstract: Embodied artificial intelligence is rapidly moving from research into real-world systems such as autonomous vehicles, mobile robots, and industrial machines. As these systems become more capable of perceiving, deciding, and acting in dynamic environments, they also introduce new challenges in safety, trust, governance, and operational reliability. This white paper summarizes key insights from the SAE World Congress 2026 panel session \textit{Embodied AI in Action}, which brought together experts from automotive, robotics, artificial intelligence, and safety engineering. The discussion highlighted the need to treat embodied AI as a systems challenge requiring engineering rigor, lifecycle governance, human-centered design, and evolving standards. The paper provides practical perspectives for executives, policymakers, and technical leaders seeking to adopt embodied AI responsibly. The panel reached broad agreement that long-term success will depend not only on advances in AI capability, but equally on safe and trustworthy deployment.

</details>


### [562] [VRA: Grounding Discrete-Time Joint Acceleration in Voltage-Constrained Actuation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10696)
*Lingwei Zhang,Jiaming Wang,Tianlin Zhang,Zhitao Song,Xuanqi Zeng,Weipeng Xia,Zhongyu Li,Yun-hui Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 为了解决电动执行器电压限制下的加速度不可实现问题，提出了电压可实现加速度（VRA）接口，提升了系统执行的一致性和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在机械系统中控制加速度的方法，往往只考虑理论上的运动学约束（如位置与速度），而忽略了实际电动执行器的物理限制，特别是电压约束。这导致部分加速度虽然在理论上可行，但在执行层面上无法实现，进而影响机器的性能及安全性。

Method: 提出了Voltage-Realizable Acceleration（VRA）接口，直接在加速度命令层对其进行电压约束，确保给定的加速度指令在执行器实际电压能力范围内可实现。通过对电动执行器和轮腿式四足机器人进行实验验证。

Result: 实验结果表明，VRA接口有效消除了在加速度约束下不可实现的指令，提升了接近约束边界时的执行一致性，并减少了由约束引起的系统振荡。

Conclusion: 采用VRA接口能显著提升电动驱动机器人和设备的运动执行性能，使加速度命令更贴合实际系统能力，有助于构建更为安全、稳定和高效的控制系统。

Abstract: Discrete-time joint acceleration constraints are widely used to enforce position and velocity limits. However, under voltage-constrained electric actuators, kinematically admissible accelerations may be physically unrealizable, exposing a missing execution-level abstraction. We propose Voltage-Realizable Acceleration (VRA), a joint-level acceleration interface that grounds kinematic acceleration in voltage-constrained actuator physics by restricting commanded accelerations to voltage-realizable constraints. Hardware experiments on electric actuators and a wheel-legged quadruped show that VRA removes unrealizable accelerations, restores consistent near-constraint execution, and reduces constraint-induced oscillations.

</details>


### [563] [ObjView-Bench: Rethinking Difficulty and Deployment for Object-Centric View Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10707)
*Sicong Pan,Hao Hu,Xuying Huang,Benno Wingender,Maren Bennewitz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了ObjView-Bench评测框架，针对主动几何3D重建中的物体中心化视角规划，重新审视难度和部署评估，发现现实约束对方法表现影响显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主动视角规划的评测常混淆了物体复杂性、规划难度、预算和物理可达性，导致理想化评测结果无法可靠反映现实重建表现，有必要提出更精细的评测指标和协议。

Method: 作者将视角规划评测中的三大影响因素（物体遮挡、观测饱和难度、规划协议难度）进行解耦，并通过集合覆盖的数学建模定义规划难度；提出支持受控数据集构建和慢饱和物体分析的方法，同时还提出面向实际部署的评测协议，覆盖预算和可达性约束。

Result: ObjView-Bench框架在经典、学习型和混合型规划器上实验证明，物体属性、预算、可达性约束会显著改变各方法的表现排名及其失败模式。难度感知采样可以进一步提升学习型规划器的表现。

Conclusion: 物体属性、预算和部署约束对于主动视角规划方法的真实表现具有决定性影响，传统理想化评测难以反映实际应用需求，ObjView-Bench为现实场景评价和方法发展提供了更有效的工具和新思路。

Abstract: Object-centric view planning is a core component of active geometric 3D reconstruction in robotics, yet existing evaluations often conflate object complexity, planning difficulty, budget assumptions, and physical reachability constraints. As a result, conclusions drawn from idealized view-planning evaluations may not reliably predict performance under realistic reconstruction settings. We introduce ObjView-Bench, an evaluation framework for rethinking difficulty and deployment in object-centric view planning. First, we disentangle three quantities underlying view-planning evaluation: omnidirectional self-occlusion as an object-side attribute, observation saturation difficulty, and protocol-dependent planning difficulty defined through a set-cover formulation. This separation supports controlled dataset construction, analysis of slow-saturation objects, and a case study showing that planning difficulty-aware sampling can improve learned view planners. Second, we design deployment-oriented evaluation protocols that reveal how budget regimes and reachable-view constraints alter method behavior. Across classical, learned, and hybrid planners, ObjView-Bench shows that difficulty, budget, and reachability constraints substantially change method rankings and failure modes.

</details>


### [564] [MAGS-SLAM: Monocular Multi-Agent Gaussian Splatting SLAM for Geometrically and Photometrically Consistent Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10760)
*Zhihao Cao,Qi Shao,Shuhao Zhai,Jing Zhang,Anh Nguyen,Baoru Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MAGS-SLAM是一种仅用RGB图像的多智能体高保真3D重建方法，兼具高性能和低硬件依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前多智能体的3D高斯即撒（3DGS）SLAM方法多需RGB-D传感器，这对成本、重量和机器人平台能源有较高要求，限制了3D重建系统的部署和应用，因此急需一种仅用RGB图像即可高效协作的方案。

Method: 提出MAGS-SLAM框架，使每个智能体仅用单目RGB图像独立构建局部高斯子图，并通过紧凑子图摘要通信，结合几何与外观特征的环验证、占据感知高斯融合等技术，有效解决了单目尺度模糊及多智能体融合问题，无需主动深度传感器即可协作重建。

Result: 在仿真和真实数据集上，MAGS-SLAM实现了与最先进RGB-D多智能体高斯SLAM方法相当甚至更优的跟踪精度与重建质量，并仅依赖RGB影像数据。

Conclusion: MAGS-SLAM证明了无深度信息下多智能体协作3D重建的可行性，降低了系统成本与部署门槛，为虚拟制作和多机器人探索等应用提供了新途径。

Abstract: Collaborative photorealistic 3D reconstruction from multiple agents enables rapid large-scale scene capture for virtual production and cooperative multi-robot exploration. While recent 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) SLAM algorithms can generate high-fidelity real-time mapping, most of the existing multi-agent Gaussian SLAM methods still rely on RGB-D sensors to obtain metric depth and simplify cross-agent alignment, which limits the deployment on lightweight, low-cost, or power-constrained robotic platforms. To address this challenge, we propose MAGS-SLAM, the first RGB-only multi-agent 3DGS SLAM framework for collaborative scene reconstruction. Each agent independently builds local monocular Gaussian submaps and transmits compact submap summaries rather than raw observations or dense maps. To facilitate robust collaboration in the presence of monocular scale ambiguity, our framework integrates compact submap communication, geometry- and appearance-aware loop verification, and occupancy-aware Gaussian fusion, enabling coherent global reconstruction without active depth sensors. We further introduce ReplicaMultiagent Plus benchmark for evaluating collaborative Gaussian SLAM. Intensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that MAGS-SLAM achieves competitive tracking accuracy and comparable or superior rendering quality to state-of-the-art RGB-D collaborative Gaussian SLAM methods while relying only RGB images.

</details>


### [565] [ALAM: Algebraically Consistent Latent Transitions for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10819)
*Zuojin Tang,Haoyun Liu,Xinyuan Chang,Changjie Wu,Dongjie Huo,Yandan Yang,Bin Liu,Zhejia Cai,Feng Xiong,Mu Xu,jiachen Luo,De Ma,Zhiheng Ma,Gang Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型的代数一致潜动作模型（ALAM），通过对无动作标签视频进行结构化建模，并将其应用到视觉-语言-动作（VLA）任务，大幅提升了机器人行为策略的学习效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受限于标注机器人动作的数据稀缺，目前的VLA模型能力受限。相比之下，大量无动作标签的视频蕴含着丰富的物理世界变化信息。如何将这些视频中的可用先验知识有效提取并利用于VLA任务，是该工作的核心动机。

Method: 提出了ALAM模型：通过视频帧三元组学习潜在状态转移，不仅依靠重构损失，还引入组合性（composition）和可逆性（reversal）约束，构建代数一致的潜在空间。VLA下游任务中，冻结预训练编码器，将其潜在状态转移作为辅助生成目标，与机器人动作联合训练，实现策略和结构化潜在表示的耦合。

Result: 在Libero和MetaWorld MT50基准上，ALAM在转移至VLA策略后显著提升了平均成功率（47.9%提升至85.0%，94.1%提升至98.1%），且在现实世界操作任务上保持一致改进。表征探测显示，ALAM比无结构模型减少了25-85倍的可逆性和加法性误差，有效提升了长时序重构效果。

Conclusion: 代数一致的潜动作结构和联合流匹配目标的协同作用，是性能提升的关键。该方法表明通过挖掘无标签视频中的动态结构，能够显著增强机器人视觉-语言-动作模型的泛化与实际应用能力。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models remain constrained by the scarcity of action-labeled robot data, whereas action-free videos provide abundant evidence of how the physical world changes. Latent action models offer a promising way to extract such priors from videos, but reconstruction-trained latent codes are not necessarily suitable for policy generation: they may predict future observations while lacking the structure needed to be reused or generated coherently with robot actions. We introduce ALAM (Algebraic Latent Action Model), an Algebraically Consistent Latent Action Model that turns temporal relations in action-free video into structural supervision. Given frame triplets, ALAM learns latent transitions that are grounded by reconstruction while being regularized by composition and reversal consistency, encouraging a locally additive transition space. For downstream VLA learning, we freeze the pretrained encoder and use its latent transition sequences as auxiliary generative targets, co-generated with robot actions under a joint flow-matching objective. This couples structured latent transitions with flow-based policy generation, allowing the policy to exploit ALAM's locally consistent transition geometry without requiring latent-to-action decoding. Representation probes show that ALAM reduces additivity and reversibility errors by 25-85 times over unstructured latent-action baselines and improves long-horizon cumulative reconstruction. When transferred to VLA policies, ALAM raises the average success rate from 47.9% to 85.0% on MetaWorld MT50 and from 94.1% to 98.1% on LIBERO, with consistent gains on real-world manipulation tasks. Ablations further confirm that the strongest improvements arise from the synergy between algebraically structured latent transitions and joint flow matching.

</details>


### [566] [Unified Noise Steering for Efficient Human-Guided VLA Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10821)
*Junjie Lu,Xinyao Qin,Yuhua Jiang,Kaixin Wang,Chuheng Zhang,Bin Liang,Jun Yang,Min Xu,Li Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为UniSteer的统一噪声引导方法，实现了将人类纠正指导与噪声空间强化学习相结合，有效提升了机器人操作任务的自适应效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 噪声引导的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型为机器人操作提供了强先验，但它们的现实世界适应仍有挑战，尤其是在真实机器环境中进行强化学习成本高且效率低下。因此需要一种新的方法以在有限的真实交互预算内高效提升策略性能，特别是结合人类反馈和噪声空间微调的融合难题。

Method: 作者提出了UniSteer框架，将人类的动作空间纠正通过近似的动作到噪声反推（action-to-noise inversion）映射到噪声空间，并结合传统噪声空间RL对同一个轻量级噪声actor进行监督和强化更新。此方法利用冻结的流匹配解码器，将人类反馈间接转化为噪声信号，有效利用人类指导。

Result: 在多种实际操作任务中的实验结果显示，UniSteer能比传统噪声空间RL及仅有人在环基础线更高效地完成自适应训练，平均66分钟内在4个现实任务上成功率由20%提升至90%。

Conclusion: UniSteer实现了人类反馈和噪声空间RL的有机结合，显著提高了机器人实际应用中策略适应的效率，为现实场景下的机器人自主学习与人类协同提供了新方法。

Abstract: Diffusion-based vision-language-action (VLA) models have emerged as strong priors for robotic manipulation, yet adapting them to real-world distributions remains challenging. In particular, on-robot reinforcement learning (RL) is expensive and time-consuming, so effective adaptation depends on efficient policy improvement within a limited budget of real-world interactions. Noise-space RL lowers the cost by keeping the pretrained VLA fixed as a denoising generator while updating only a lightweight actor that predicts the noise. However, its performance is still limited due to inefficient autonomous exploration. Human corrective interventions can reduce this exploration burden, but they are naturally provided in action space, whereas noise-space finetuning requires supervision over noise variables. To address these challenges, we propose UniSteer, a Unified Noise Steering framework that combines human corrective guidance with noise-space RL through approximate action-to-noise inversion. Given a human corrective action, UniSteer inverts the frozen flow-matching decoder to recover a noise target, which provides supervised guidance for the same noise actor that is simultaneously optimized via reinforcement learning. Real-world experiments on diverse manipulation tasks show that UniSteer adapts more efficiently than strong noise-space RL and action-space human-in-the-loop baselines, improving the success rate from 20% to 90% in 66 minutes on average across four real-world adaptation tasks.

</details>


### [567] [Safe Aerial 3D Path Planning for Autonomous UAVs using Magnetic Potential Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10880)
*Haechan Mark Bong,Giovanni Beltrame*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种3DMaxConvNet方法，将基于Maxwell方程的潜力场路径规划从2D扩展到3D，并利用卷积自编码器从激光雷达点云生成适应障碍物的潜力场，实现了无人机在城市环境下的安全高效自主导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市环境中的无人机自主导航需要实时和高效的路径规划，现有方法如基于潜力场的方法容易陷入局部最小值，传统的启发式搜索算法如A*和RRT*计算量大、速度慢，难以满足实时性和复杂环境适应性的需求。

Method: 作者将2D的MaxConvNet（基于麦克斯韦方程的潜力场路径规划网络）扩展到3D，结合卷积自编码器网络，根据激光雷达生成的101^3体素网格预测适应障碍物的潜力场。方法在Cosys-AirSim模拟器的两个不同城市环境中，基于100次随机闭环实验进行评测。

Result: 在两个环境（密集夜景城市、郊区）统计100%路径规划成功率，无需重新训练。在离线路径规划中，3DMaxConvNet路径长度与A*相当，但规划速度提升1.7-1.95倍（从0.155s降至0.087s）；与RRT*（3k）相比，路径质量类似，但规划速度提升约193-201倍（从17.2s降至0.09s）。

Conclusion: 3DMaxConvNet能够在城市复杂环境中实现高效、可靠、无局部最小值的无人机路径规划，兼顾路径质量和极高的计算效率，在无需重新训练的情况下适应不同场景，有很强的实用和推广价值。

Abstract: Safe autonomous Uncrewed Aerial Vehicle (UAV) navigation in urban environments requires real-time path planning that avoids obstacles. MaxConvNet is a potential-field planner that leverages properties of Maxwell's equations to generate a path to the goal without local minima. We extend the 2D MaxConvNet magnetic field planner to 3D, using a convolutional autoencoder to predict obstacle-aware potential fields from LiDAR-derived 101^3 voxel grids. Evaluation across 100 randomized closed-loop trials in two distinct Cosys-AirSim urban environments, a dense night-time cityscape and a suburban district shows a 100% path planning success rate on both maps without retraining. In offline path planning, 3DMaxConvNet produces path lengths comparable to A* on unseen maps while reducing runtime from 0.155--0.17s to 0.087--0.089s, or about 1.7--1.95 times faster than A*. Against RRT*(3k), 3DMaxConvNet achieves similar path quality while reducing planning runtime from 17.2--17.5s to about 0.09s, which is roughly 193--201 times faster than RRT*(3k).

</details>


### [568] [RoboMemArena: A Comprehensive and Challenging Robotic Memory Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10921)
*Huashuo Lei,Wenxuan Song,Huarui Zhang,Jieyuan Pei,Jiayi Chen,Haodong Yan,Han Zhao,Pengxiang Ding,Zhipeng Zhang,Lida Huang,Donglin Wang,Yan Wang,Haoang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了RoboMemArena，一个包含26项任务的大规模、长程、复杂结构的机器人记忆基准，包括仿真与真实世界测试，并提出了新的双系统视觉-语言代理PrediMem，显著提升了机器人在依赖记忆任务中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的机器人记忆基准在多模态注释、任务覆盖和结构复杂性、真实环境评估等方面存在不足，难以全面评估和推动机器人复杂记忆能力的发展。

Method: 作者搭建了RoboMemArena基准，包含26个任务，每个任务轨迹长度超过1000步，其中近70%的子任务依赖记忆。基于视觉-语言模型自动生成并组合子任务，提供记忆相关的多模态注释，还支持现实场景中的物理评估。同时提出PrediMem模型，将高层视觉-语言规划器与记忆管理模块结合，辅以预测编码机制，提高对任务动态的敏感性。

Result: PrediMem在RoboMemArena所有任务中均优于现有基线，实验证明其在复杂记忆任务和场景中的突出表现。同时带来了对记忆管理机制、模型架构及其扩展规律的深入洞见。

Conclusion: RoboMemArena为机器人记忆研究提供了丰富的评测平台，PrediMem显著提升了记忆动力学复杂任务的完成能力，为未来智能机器人记忆系统的发展提供了新范式和理论参考。

Abstract: Memory is a critical component of robotic intelligence, as robots must rely on past observations and actions to accomplish long-horizon tasks in partially observable environments. However, existing robotic memory benchmarks still lack multimodal annotations for memory formation, provide limited task coverage and structural complexity, and remain restricted to simulation without real-world evaluation. We address this gap with RoboMemArena, a large-scale benchmark of 26 tasks, with average trajectory lengths exceeding 1,000 steps per task and 68.9% of subtasks being memory-dependent. The generation pipeline leverages a vision-language model (VLM) to design and compose subtasks, generates full trajectories through atomic functions, and provides memory-related annotations, including subtask instructions and native keyframe annotations, while paired real-world memory tasks support physical evaluation. We further design PrediMem, a dual-system VLA in which a high-level VLM planner manages a memory bank with recent and keyframe buffers and uses a predictive coding head to improve sensitivity to task dynamics. Extensive experiments on RoboMemArena show that PrediMem outperforms all baselines and provides insights into memory management, model architecture, and scaling laws for complex memory systems.

</details>


### [569] [PriorVLA: Prior-Preserving Adaptation for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10925)
*Xinyu Guo,Bin Xie,Wei Chai,Xianchi Deng,Tiancai Wang,Zhengxing Wu,Xingyu Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PriorVLA是一个新的迁移框架，通过保留预训练模型的先验知识并高效适应下游任务，实现了比全量微调和主流基线更优的机器人操作性能，特别是在分布外和小样本场景下效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型尽管大规模预训练带来了泛化能力，但在适应具体下游任务时，常规全量微调方法会导致模型过度贴合训练分布，丧失了有价值的广域先验。需要新的方法兼顾先验保留和高效适应。

Method: PriorVLA框架包括一个只读的先验专家（Pretrained VLM）和一个为下游任务专门训练的适配专家。模型通过专家查询（Expert Queries）方式从先验和运动专家采集场景与运动先验，再整合到适配专家，对下游任务进行高效适应，仅需更新25%的参数。

Result: 在RoboTwin 2.0、LIBERO以及实际机器人任务中，PriorVLA在整体表现上优于全量微调和先进的VLA基线。在分布外和小样本测试中优势更明显。例如，在RoboTwin 2.0-Hard提升11分，在LIBERO上达99.1%成功率，在八个真实任务上分布内/外成功率分别为81%/57%；仅用10次演示时也表现突出。

Conclusion: PriorVLA有效解决了VLA模型下游迁移中的先验丧失与适应效率问题，实现了参数更新更少但效果更强的适应性能，尤其是在分布外及小样本设定下具备明显优势。

Abstract: Large-scale pretraining has made Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models promising foundations for generalist robot manipulation, yet adapting them to downstream tasks remains necessary. However, the common practice of full fine-tuning treats pretraining as initialization and can shift broad priors toward narrow training-distribution patterns. We propose PriorVLA, a novel framework that preserves pretrained priors and learns to leverage them for effective adaptation. PriorVLA keeps a frozen Prior Expert as a read-only prior source and trains an Adaptation Expert for downstream specialization. Expert Queries capture scene priors from the pretrained VLM and motor priors from the Prior Expert, integrating both into the Adaptation Expert to guide adaptation. Together, PriorVLA updates only 25% of the parameters updated by full fine-tuning. Across RoboTwin 2.0, LIBERO, and real-world tasks, PriorVLA achieves stronger overall performance than full fine-tuning and state-of-the-art VLA baselines, with the largest gains under out-of-distribution (OOD) and few-shot settings. PriorVLA improves over pi0.5 by 11 points on RoboTwin 2.0-Hard and achieves 99.1% average success on LIBERO. Across eight real-world tasks and two embodiments, PriorVLA reaches 81% in-distribution (ID) and 57% OOD success with standard data. With only 10 demonstrations per task, PriorVLA reaches 48% ID and 32% OOD success, surpassing pi0.5 by 24 and 22 points, respectively.

</details>


### [570] [HarmoWAM: Harmonizing Generalizable and Precise Manipulation via Adaptive World Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10942)
*Qiuxuan Feng,Jiale Yu,Jiaming Liu,Yueru Jia,Zhuangzhe Wu,Hao Chen,Zezhong Qian,Shuo Gu,Peng Jia,Siwei Ma,Shanghang Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文通过实验归纳了现有两种世界动作模型（WAM）范式的优劣，并提出了HarmoWAM模型，成功实现了泛化性与精确性的统一控制，显著提升了机器人任务的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有WAM方法在迁移泛化和交互精度之间存在权衡：基于想象→执行策略的模型迁移能力强但交互不精确；联合建模策略能精细操作但受训练分布限制，缺乏泛化。为统一这两者的优点，作者提出了新方法。

Method: 提出HarmoWAM，一种端到端的世界动作模型。该模型用世界模型提供空间和时间的物理先验信息，分别条件化两个互补的动作专家：预测专家用于基于潜变量动力学的迭代动作生成，反应专家则直接从视觉演化中推断动作。同时设计了自适应门控机制，以在任务不同阶段智能切换两类专家，兼顾泛化和精细操控。

Result: 在三个未见过的测试环境和六个现实世界机器人任务上评测。HarmoWAM在不同背景、位置和物体语义变化条件下，均表现出强大的零样本泛化能力。相较最新VLA模型和传统WAM提升分别为33%和29%。

Conclusion: HarmoWAM实现了预测与反应控制的高度统一，兼得泛化和精细操控优点，极大推动了基于视频世界模型的机器人控制技术。

Abstract: World Action Models (WAMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for robot control by modeling physical dynamics. Current WAMs generally follow two paradigms: the "Imagine-then-Execute" approach, which uses video prediction to infer actions via inverse dynamics, and the "Joint Modeling" approach, which jointly models actions and video representations. Based on systematic experiments, we observe a fundamental trade-off between these paradigms: the former explicitly leverages world models for generalizable transit but lacks interaction precision, whereas the latter enables fine-grained, temporally coherent action generation but is constrained by the exploration space of the training distribution. Motivated by these findings, we propose HarmoWAM, an end-to-end WAM that fully leverages a world model to unify predictive and reactive control, enabling both generalizable transit and precise manipulation. Specifically, the world model provides spatio-temporal physical priors that condition two complementary action experts: a predictive expert that leverages latent dynamics for iterative action generation, and a reactive expert that directly infers actions from predicted visual evolution. To enable adaptive coordination, a Process-Adaptive Gating Mechanism is proposed to automatically determine the timing and location of switching between them. This allows the world model to drive the reactive expert to expand the exploration space and the predictive expert to perform precise interactions across different stages of a task. For evaluation, we construct three training-unseen test environments across six real-world robotic tasks, covering variations in background, position, and object semantics. Notably, HarmoWAM achieves strong zero-shot generalization across these scenarios, significantly outperforming prior state-of-the-art VLA models and WAMs by margins of 33% and 29%, respectively.

</details>
